9:61.t: No e maɓɓe ɓen lorrayɓe annabiijo on heɓe mbi'a : "Ko o nofel".-Maaku : "Ko nofel moƴƴere mon. homo gooŋɗini Alla o gooŋɗiini gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen, e yurmeende ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe e mooɗon. ɓeen lorrayɓe Nulaaɗo Alla on, hino woodani ɓe lepte mu'usuɗe.

9:62.t: Heɓe ngooɗndirana on Alla fii yo ɓe mbeltin on. Ko Alla -e Nulaaɗo makko on- ɓuri haan dude e weltineede, si ɓe laatike gooŋɗinɓe.

9:63.t: E ɓe nganndaa won de mo lunnduki Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on, haray no woodani mo Yiite Jahannama, ko o luttoowo e magge? Ko ɗum woni koyeera mawɗo.

9:64.t: Naafigeeɓe ɓeen no kuli nde cortewol(simoore) Jippintee e maɓɓe ngol no humpita ɓe ko woni e ɓerɗe maɓɓe. Maaku : "njalkitee, pellet, Alla ko yaltinoowo kon ko kuluɗon (wata jippo)".(suhritde on)

9:65.t: Si a laɓndike ɓe, ɓe mbi'ay: "nganndee men laatinoke miɗen jumpa miɗen fija." maaku : "E ko Alla, e Aayeeje makko ɗeen e nulaaɗo makko on laatinoɗon hoɗon njalkita?

9:66.t: Wota on ngantino: gooɗii on njddii ɓaawo gooɗinal mon. Si minn njaafike fedde goo e mooɗon, minn leptat fedde woɗnde tawde kamɓe ɓe laatinoke bonnooɓe.

9:67.t: Naafigi'en worɓe, e naafigi'en rewɓe, yoga maɓɓe no jeyaa e yaga. Heɓe njamira ŋiñere, ɓe kaɗa moƴƴere, heɓe tama juuɗe maɓɓe. ɓe yejjitii Alla, Kaŋko kadi o yejjiti ɓe. Pellet, naafigiiɓe ɓen ko kamɓe ngoni yaltuɓe. ɗoftaare.

9:68.t: Alla fodanii naafigeeɓe'en worɓe, e naafigeeɓe rewɓe, e heeferɓe ɓeen, Yiite Jahannama, ko ɓe luttinteeɓe toon.Nge yonii ɓe. Alla huɗii ɓe, hino woodani ɓe lepte duumiiɗe.

9:69.t: [Hiɓe mba'i] wano ɓeen adinooɓe on : ɓe laatinoke ɓurɓe on saɗtude doole, ɓurɓe on ɗuuɗude jawɗeele e ɓiɗɓe. Ɓe dakmitori [ontuma] e geɗal maɓɓe ngal dakmitorɗon geɗal mon ngal wano adinooɓe on ɓen dakmitornoo geɗal maɓɓe ngal, jnumpirɗon wano ɓe njumpirnoo. ɓeen ɗoon, golle maɓɓe ɗen poɓii(njirbii) aduna e laakara. Ko ɓeen ɗoon ngoni hayruɓe(perduɓe) ɓen.

9:70.t: E kabaaru ɓen adinooɓe ɓe araali ɓe : yimɓe Nuuhu ɓen, e Aadi'en, e Thamuuda'en, e yimɓe Ibraahiima ɓen, e wonndiɓe Madyana ɓen e waylitanooɓe ɓen? Nulaaɓe maɓɓe ɓen addani ɓe hujjaaji ɓannguɗi.=peeñɗi Alla wonaani tooñoowo ɓe, ko woni tan ko woŋkiiji maɓɓe ɗin ɓe wonunoo tooñude.

9:71.t: Gooŋɗimɓe worɓe ɓen e gooŋɗinɓe rewɓe ɓen yoga maɓɓe ko wallooɓe yoga. Hiɓe yamira moƴƴere, ɓe haɗa ŋiñere=bone, ɓe ñiiɓna juulde, ɓe totta zakka, ɓe ɗoftoo Alla e Nualaaɗo makko on. ɓen ɗoon, arma Alla yurmee ɓe. Pellet, Alla ko pooluɗo, Ñeeñuɗo.

9:72.t: Alla fodanii gooŋɗinɓe worɓe ɓen e gooɗinɓe rewɓe ɓen Aljannaaji, ɗi caatli ilata e ley majji, ko ɓe duumotooɓe nder majji, e koɗooli laaɓuɗi e nder Aljanna duumal. E yarluyee=weluye Alla ɓurɗo mawnude. Ko ɗum woni malal mawnungal.

9:73.t: Eehey ma annabiijo, haɓa heeferɓe ɓen e naafigeeɓe ɓe, caɗtinanaa ɓe; jaaƴnde maɓɓe nden ko Jahannama, nge bonii ruttorde.

9:74.t: Hiɓe ngooɗndira Alla ɓe wowlaali, gooŋɗii le ɓe wowlii konngol keeferaaku ngol, ɓe njeddi ɓaawo silmugol maɓɓe, ɓe himmiri ko ɓe heɓaani. ɓe mettiniraani (ɓe aybiniri) si wanaa fii Alla - e nulaaɗo makko on - alɗinirii ɓe e ɓural makko ngal. Si ɓe tuubii, wonanay ɓe moƴƴere. Si ɓe nduŋtiima noon, Alla leptiray ɓe lepte muusuɗe aduna e laakara; giɗo alanaa ɓe ka leydi wanaa balloow

9:75.t: Hino e maɓɓe ƴettanɓe Alla ahadi : "Si O okkorii men e ɓural makko ngal, ko ma min cakkor min laatoo jeyaaɓe e moƴƴuɓe ɓen".

9:76.t: Nde O okkunoo ɓe e ɓural makko nagl, ɓe wuddiri ɗuum ɓe hucciti to ɓe ɗuurnii ɓe.

9:77.t: O waɗtintinirani ɓe naafigaaku ka ɓerɗe maɓɓe haa Ñalnde ɓe kawroyta e makko, sabu ko ɓe lunndii Alla kon ko ɓe fodunoo mo e ko ɓe laatinoo hiɓe pena.

9:78.t: E ɓee nganndaa won de Alla no anndi koɓe cuuɗi eko ɓe peññini (gunndo) maɓɓe e won de pellet, Alla ko gaannduɗo mbirniiɗi ɗin?

9:79.t: Ɓeen aybinooɓe gattooɓe jeyaaɓe e gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen ka sadakaaji e ɓen ɓe keɓataa si wanaa tiiɗnaare maɓɓe nden, heɓe njalkita ɓeen. Alla jalkitii ɓe. hino woodani ɓe lepte muusuɗe.

9:80.t: Imsinano ɓe, maa hara a imsinanaaki ɓe -hay si a imsinanike ɓe laaɓi cappanɗe jeeɗiɗi - Alla yaafataako ɓe. Ko waɗi ɗuum, ɓeen ɓe njeddii Alla e nulaaɗo makko on. Alla feewnataa yimɓe yaltuɓe ɗoftaare ɓeen.

9:81.t: Luutndinooɓe ɓen mbeltorii jooɗagol maɓɓe ngol lunndoo nulaaɗo Alla on, ɓe añiniri kaɓirgol jawɗeele maɓɓe ɗen e woŋkiiji maɓɓe ɗin fii laawol Alla ngol, ɓe mbi'i : "Wata on njltu e nguleendi ndin". Maaku : "Ko Yiite Jahannama ɓuri tiiɗude nguleendi." - Sinno ɓe faamaynoo ! -

9:82.t: Yo ɓe njaal seeɗa ɓe ngulla buy njoɓdi ko ɓe laatinoo hiɓe paggitoo.

9:83.t: Si Alla ruttitii ma faade e fedde jeyaande e maɓɓe ɓe duŋinani maa yaltugol, maaku : "On njaltidataa e am poomaa, on kaɓidataa e am gaño. Onon on mbelaama jooɗagol ka laawol aranol, njooɗodee e lunndii ɓe ɓen".

9:84.t: Wata a juulu e gooto maɓɓe maayɗo poomaa, wata a daro e aññeere makko. Kamɓe ɓe njeddii Alla e nulaaɗo makko on ɓe maayi ko ɓe yaltuɓe ɗoftaare

9:85.t: Wata jawɗeele maɓɓe e ɓiɗɓe maɓɓe haawne! anndu ko Alla fa'andii ko nde O leptirta ɗe ɓe ka aduna, woŋkiiji maɓɓe ɗin ɗo'ofee hara ko ɓe yedduɓe.

9:86.t: Si Cortewol=simoore jippinaama : "Si ko woni, gooŋɗinee Alla tiiɗnodon jihaadi e nulaaɗo makko on", jom-yaajeende'en e maɓɓe duŋinoto ma ɓe mbia : "Accu min wontida e jooɗiiɓe ɓeen".

9:87.t: Ɓe mbelaama heddodugol e lunndiiɓe ɓen. notaama =tappaama e ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen, kamɓe ɓe paamataa.

9:88.t: Kono Nulaaɗo on kañum e gooŋɗinɓe won duɓe e makko ɓen ɓe tiiɗnorii jawɗeele maɓɓe ɗen e woŋkiiji maɓɓe ɗin. Ɓen ɗon, hino woodani ɓe moƴƴereeji, ko ɓeen kadi ngoni malaaɓe ɓeen.

9:89.t: Alla heblanii ɓe Aljannaaji ɗi caatli ilata senngo ley majji, ko ɓe duumotooɓe ton. Ko ɗum woni maloore mawnde ndeen.

9:90.t: Ngantinotooɓe jeyaaɓe e yimɓe buruure ɓen nari fii yo ɓe duŋinane. een fenanɓe Alla e nulaaɗo makko on luttiti (jooɗii). Arma lepte muusuɗe mema ɓen yedduɓe e maɓɓe.

9:91.t: Bakkaatu fawaaki e lo'uɓe ɓen, wanaa ñawɓe ɓen, wanaa ɓen ɓe keɓaani ko wintoo( nafqa) si ɓe laaɓanii Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on. Laawol feloore alanaa moƴƴimɓe ɓen. Alla ko jaafotooɗoo, jurmotooɗo.

9:92.t: Wanaa kadi e ɓeen arooɓe ka maaɗa fii yo a waɗɗimɓe, mbi'aa : "mi heɓaali ko mi waɗɗina on." Ɓe kuccita hara gite maɓɓe no njuppa gonɗi suno fii ɓe heɓaali ko ɓe wintoo nafki.

9:93.t: Anndu ko laawol (bakkaatu) fawii, ko ɓeen duŋinotooɓe(sakkinkinotoobe) ma hara ko ɓe alɗuɓe. ɓe mbelaama nde ɓe laatoda e luutndiiɓe ɓen. Alla tapi ɓerɗe maɓɓe tawi kamɓe ɓe nganndaa.

9:94.t: Heɓe ngantinoo e mooɗon si on nduttitike e maɓɓe. Maaku : "Wata on ngantino : min ngooŋɗintaa on. Gooŋɗii Alla habriino amen kabaruuji moooɗon. Arma Alla yi'a golle mon ɗen, e nulaaɗo makko on. Refti ruttiteɗon e on gannduɗo ko wirnii eko feeñi, ko kumpita on kon ko laatinoɗon hoɗon ngolla.

9:95.t: Aray ka ɓe ngooɗndirana on Alla, si on nduttitike e maɓɓe, fii yo on ɗuurno ɓe (on pelaani ɓe). Ɗuurnee ɓe. Pellet, ɓe koɓe soɓe. Jaaƴorde maɓɓe nden ko Jahannama, njoɓdi kon kobe laatinoo hiɓe paggitoo.

9:96.t: heɓe ngooɗndirana on fii yo on mbele ɓe. Si on mblaama ɓe, pellet, Alla weletaake yimɓe yaltuɓe ɓe.

9:97.t: Yimɓe ladde en hino ɓuri tiiɗude keeferaaku e naafiaagu, ɓe ɓuri haandude kadi nde ɓe ngandataa keeri ɗi Alla jippini e Nulaaɗo makko on. Alla ko Aganduɗo, Ñeeñuɗo.

9:98.t: Hino e yimɓe ladde ɓen, on mo no jogitoo ko wintotoo kon sooyo, himo habbitanoo on jiilotooɗi bonɗi. Ko e dow maɓɓe jiiotooɗi bonɗi (njanata). Alla ko Nanoowo, gannduɗo.

9:99.t: Hino e yimɓe ladde ɓen (fahin), on gooŋɗinoowo Alla e Ñalaande sakkitiinde nden, o jogitora kon ko o nafqata ɓaɗtorɗum ka Alla e [heɓugol] du'aaji nulaaɗo on. Nnganndee ɗum ko ɓadorɗum (Alla) wonan de ɓe. Aray Alla naada ɓe ka Yurmeende makko. Pellet, Alla jaafotooɗo, jurmotooɗo.

9:100.t: Ɓeen adinooɓe [gooŋɗinal] adiiɓe e ferɓe ɓeen e weernuɓe wallitiiɓe ɓeen, e ɓen jokkuɓe e ɓeen no moƴƴiri, Alla welaama ɓe, kamɓe kadi ɓe mbelaama mo. o maranii ɓe Aljannaaji ɗi caatli ilata ley majji, ko ɓe duumotooɓe ton poomaa. Ko ɗuum woni malal mawnungal.

9:101.t: Hino e ɓeen won ɓe banŋe mon jeyaaɓe e yimɓe ladde ɓen,naafigeeɓe,e yimɓe Madiina ɓeen kadi.ɓe candolɗinii e naafigaagu.A anndaa ɓe, minen miɗen nganndi ɓe.Aray min lepta ɓe laabi ɗiɗi,refti ɓe nduttitee e lepte mawnuɗe.

9:102.t: E woɗɓe goo, kirliiɓe bakkatuuji maɓɓe ɗin, ɓe njilli gollal moƴƴal e goɗngal bon gal. Hino tijja nde Alla jaɓanta ɓe tuubuubuyee.Pellet, Alla ko jaafoooɗo, jurmotooɗo.

9:103.t: Ƴettu e jawɗeele maɓɓe ɗen sadaka, laɓɓiniraaɓe lootiraaɓe mo, ndu'anoɗaa ɓe. Pellet, du'aa maa ko deeƴere wonan de ɓe. Alla ko Nanoowo, gannduɗo.

9:104.t: E ɓe ngannda won de ko Alla no jaɓana jeyaaɓe makko ɓen tuubuubuyee, himo jaɓa sadakaaji ɗin, e won de ko Alla woni Jaɓoowo tuubuubuyee, ko jurmotooɗo.

9:105.t: Maaku : "ngollee, arma Alla yi'a golle mon ɗeen, e nulaaɗo makko on e gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen. Aray ruttita-ɗon ka gannduɗo ko wirni eko feeñi ɗin, O humpita on ko ngollaynoɗon".

9:106.t: E woɗɓe goo ko nennanaaɓe e yamiroore Alla : immaa O lepta ɓe, maa O jaɓana ɓe tuubuubuyee. Alla ko gannduɗo, Ñeeñuɗo.

9:107.t: Ɓeen jogitorɓe juulirde fii lorra, e keefereegu, e senndude hakkunde gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen, e tommbaade on kabuɗo Alla e nulaaɗo makko on ko adii. Pellet, heɓe ngooɗndira : "min paandaaki si wanaa moƴƴere" Alla no seedii won de pellet, ko ɓe fenooɓe.

9:108.t: Wata a daro (juulugol) e mayre poomaa. Ko juulirde diidiraande kulol Alla gila ka arannde ñalaande, ɓuri jojjude nde darotoɗaa e mun [juulaa]. Hino e mayre worɓe yiɗɓe nde ɓe laɓɓinotoo. Alla no yiɗi laɓɓinotooɓe ɓen.

9:109.t: E ko on didirɗo maadi mu'un kulol Alla e welayee makko, ɓuri moƴƴude, kaa ko on didirɗo maadi mu'un e sera ngasko yirbuka, o yirbida e mayri ka Yiite Jahannama?! Alla feewnataa yimɓe tooñooɓe ɓen.

9:110.t: Ndin maadi maɓɓe ndi ɓe mahi seerataa ko ndi sikke ka ɓerɗe maɓɓe, si wanaa ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen taƴay tun. Alla ko gannduɗo, Ñeeñuɗo.

9:111.t: Pellet, Alla sooditirii e gooɗinɓe ɓen woŋkiiji maɓɓe ɗin, e jawɗeele maɓɓe ɗen won de no woodani ɓe Aljanna. Heɓe kaɓa fii laawol Alla ngol : heɓe mbara, heɓe mbaree. Ko fodoore goonga nde O fodi ka tawreeta, e ka Linjiila e Alqur'aana. Ko hommbo ɓuri Alla huuɓngol ahdi mun? mbeltoree njeeygu mon ngu njeeeyondirɗon e mum : ko ɗuum woni malala mawnungal ngal.

9:112.t: Ko tuubooɓe ɓeen, rewooɓe (Alla) ɓeen, yettooɓe (Mo) ɓeen, hoorooɓe ɓeen, ruƴƴooɓe ɓeen, sujjooɓe ɓeen, yamirooɓe ko moƴƴi ɓeen kaɗa ko boni, e reenotooɓe e keeri Alla ɗiin.weltin gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen.

9:113.t: Haananaa Annabiijo on e ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe nde ɓe imsinantoo sirkooɓe ɓen, hay si ɓen laatike joomiraaɓe ɓadondiral, ɓaawo nde feeñani ɓe won de koɓe yimɓe Jahiimi.

9:114.t: Imsinanagol Ibraahiima ngol baaaba makko wonaano si wanaa fodoore nde o fodannnoo mo. Tuma nde ɓanngannoo mo won de on ko gaño Alla, o daɗndino(hisnii) mo. Pellet, Ibraahiima ko heewuɗo yankinaare, muññiiɗo.

9:115.t: Alla siforaali majjinoowo yimɓe ɓaawo nde o feewni ɓe, haa O ɓannginana ɓe ko ɓe kaani reentaade e mu'um. Pellet, Alla ko gannduɗo kala huunde.

9:116.t: Pellet, Ko Alla woodani laamu kammuuli ɗin e leydi ndin. Himo wuurna, himo wara. Alanaa on gah Alla giɗo, wanaa balloowo

9:117.t: Wollahi Alla jaɓanii Annabiijo on tuubuubuyee, e ferɓe ɓeen e walluɓe weerni ɓen jokkuɓe e saa'a saɗtuɗo, ɓaawo nde ɓerɗe woɗɓe e maɓɓe eɓɓunoo ooñaade. refti Alla jaɓani ɓe tuubgol. Pellet, Kaŋko ko O jaafotoooɗo, jumotooɗo ɓe.

9:118.t: [O jaɓanii tuubuubuyee on] kadi ɓeen tato luutndiooɓe, haa leydi ndin faaɗani ɓe e hoore ko ndi yaaji kon; woŋkiiji maɓɓe ɗin ɓittaniiɓe, ɓe fellitii won de moolorde e Alla aalaa si wanaa ka makko. refti o hawrindini ɓe e tuubuubuyee fii yo ɓe tuubu. Pellet, ko Alla woni jaɓoowotuubabuya, jurmotooɗo.

9:119.t: Eeymon gooŋɗiiɓe, kulee Alla laatodon e gooŋɗuɓe ɓeen.

9:120.t: Haananaa yimɓe Madiina ɓeen, e ɓeen wonɓe sera maɓɓe immorde e yimɓe ladde ɓen, nde ɓe luttitata ɓaawo Nulaaɗo Alla on, wanaa nde ɓe yiɗatanta ko'e maɓɓe ɓura mo.Ko waɗi, noon ko heɓataa ɓe, wanaa tampere, wanaa heege fii laawol Alla ngol, ɓe tippataa(yabbatah) e nokkuure tikkinaynde heeferɓe ɓeen, ɓe kawrataa e gaño hawrannde, si wanaa ɓe mbinndante e ɗuum gollal moƴƴal. Pellet, Alla yeebataako njoɓdi moƴƴinooɓe ɓeen.

9:121.t: Ɓe wintotaako(nafqatah) wintaari, famɗundi maa mawnundi, ɓe taƴataa aynde(joolol)=caatngol, si wanaa ɓe mbinndante ɗuum, fii yo Alla yoɓ ɓe ko ɓuri moƴƴude e ko ɓe ngollaynoo.

9:122.t: Haananaa gooŋɗinɓe ɓen nde ɓe njahata (jihaadi) ɓe fof maɓɓe. Ko haɗno fedde kala e maɓɓe yalta fii yo ɓe faamino ka diina, e fii yo ɓe jeertin yimɓe maɓɓe ɓe si ɓe nduttitike e maɓɓe, mbelejo'o, kamɓe ɓe ndeentoto.

9:123.t: Eehey mon yo gooŋɗinɓe, kaɓee ɓeen ɓaɗiiɓe on immorde e heeferɓe ɓeen; yo ɓe taw e mooɗon ñaaɗre. ngnndon pellet Alla no won di e gooŋɗuɓe ɓeen.

9:124.t: Si cortewol(simoore) jippinaama, hino e maɓɓe on wi'oowo : "ko hommbo e mo'on woni ko ngol ɓeydi gooŋɗinal?" Ammaa ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe, ngol ɓeydu ɓe gooŋɗinal, kamɓe heɓe mbeltoo.

9:125.t: Ammma ɓeen ɓeen ñawu woni ka ɓerɗe muen, ngol ɓeydu ɓe soɓe e hoore soɓe maɓɓe, ɓe maayi ko ɓe heeferɓe.

9:126.t: E ɓee njiaani won de kamɓe heɓe njarribee hitaande kala laawol maa laaɓi ɗiɗi? refti ɓe tuubataa, ɓe ngonnah waactotooɓe.

9:127.t: Si tawii cortewol jippinaama, yoga maɓɓe ndaara yoga [ɓe mbi'a] : "Hara goɗɗo no yi*a on?" refti ɓe haɓana=pirlito. Alla firlitii ɓerɗe maɓɓe tawde ko ɓe yimɓe ɓe paamataa.

9:128.t: Mi wooɗndi nulaaɗo arii e mooɗon, jeyaaɗo emon hino saɗta e makko ko tampoton, deerɗuɗo e mooɗon, newaniiɗo hinnotooɗo(yurmotoodo) gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen.

9:129.t: Si ɓe huccitii(nduŋtiima), maaku : "Alla yonii kam. Alaa deweteeɗo si wanaa Kaŋko. Ko e makko mi fawii; ko Kaŋko woni Jeyɗo daŋkii mawnuɗo on".

10:1.t: Alif, laam, Raa, ɗeen ko aayeeje deftere ñeñaande ndeen.

10:2.t: Kere wonan yimɓe ɓeen kaawasee, fii min wahyii- ma e gorko jeyaaɗo e maɓɓe, won´de : "jeertin yimɓe ɓe? mbeltiniraa gooŋɗinɓe ɓe won´de no woodani ɓe nokku goongaajo ka Joomi maɓɓe? heeeferɓe ɓe mbi : "oo ko mbileejo peeñɗo".

10:3.t: Pellet Joomi mon ko Alla on takɗo kammuuli ɗin e leydi ndin ndeer balɗe jeegoo, refti o fotondiri ka dow Arsi, hombo toppitoo fiyakkuuji ɗin. Alaa woo e tefoowo si wanaa ɓaawo duŋayee makko. Ko on mo'on woni Joomi mooɗon, ndewee mbo. E on ciftorta?

10:4.t: Ko ka makko woni ruttorde mon on denndaangal, ko fodoore Alla gooŋuɗnde! Ko kaŋko woni fuɗɗude tagoore nde, refti o ruttita nde fii yo o yoɓa ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe e nunɗal. ɓeen heeferɓe kan, hino woodani ɓe njaram immorde e fatayɗam, e lepte muusuɗe sabu ko ɓe laatinoo hiɓe njedda.

10:5.t: Ko kaŋko woni baɗɗo naange ngen jalbunge e lewru ndun nurɗundu, o eɓɓani ndu jipporɗe fii yo on anndu emmbere duuɓi ɗin e limoore ndeen Alla tagiraani ɗiin si wanaa e goonga. hombo fensitana aayeeje ɗen yimɓe anndooɓe.

10:6.t: Hino e luutindirgol jemma e ñalama ngol, e kon ko Alla tagi ka kammuuli e ka leydi, maandeeji wonan´de yimɓe gooŋɗuɓe.

10:7.t: Ɓen ɓe njoortaaki hawrugol e amen, ɓe mbeltori nguurndam aduna ɗam, ɓe deeƴiri ɗam, e ɓeen welsindiiɓe e aayeeje amen ɗeen,

10:8.t: Ɓeen, jaaƴorde maɓɓe nden ko Yiite ngen, sabu ɗuum ko ɓe paggittonoo.

10:9.t: Pellet, ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe, joomi maɓɓe feewnayɓe e gooŋɗinal maɓɓe ngal. Caatli no ila ley maɓɓe ka aljannaaji dokke.

10:10.t: Noddaandu maɓɓe nder ton, ko "Ya Alla senaade woodaniima", salminaandu maɓɓe ndu toon, ko : "Salaam", [kisal]. Ko woni wattannde noddaandu maɓɓe, ko : "jettoore ngoodanii Alla, Jeyɗo Winndere ndeen".

10:11.t: Sinno Alla yaccinanayno yimɓe ɓen bone wano o yacciniranta ɓe moƴƴere, lajal maɓɓe ngal timminanteno ɓe. min, ngacca ɓe ɓe tamƴinaaki kawrugol e amen e bewre maɓɓe nde heɓe bumam-bumannoo.

10:12.t: Si lor memii neɗɗaŋke o, o nodda min ɓaŋŋe makko, maa ko jooɗiiɗo, maa ko o dariiɗo. tuma nde min kuñcini mo lor makko o, o feƴƴira wa si o noddaano min e lor memɗo mo. Ko wano noon ɓurtinooɓe ɓeen cuɗiranaa ko ko ɓe ngollaynoo.

10:13.t: Gooŋɗii min kallkiino gire adinooɓe on nde ɓe tooñnoo, nulaaɓe maɓɓe ɓeen ngaddani ɓe ɓanngannduyeeji. ɓe wonaano gooŋɗinooɓe. Ko wana nii min njoɓirta yimɓe bonɓe ɓeen.

10:14.t: Refti min mbaɗi on lomtotooɓe ka leydi ɓaawo maɓɓe, ha min ndaara no ngollirton.

10:15.t: Si aayeeje amen ɓannguɗe ɗeen njanngaama e dow maɓɓe, ɓeen ɓe tamƴinaaki kawrugol e amen mbi'a: "Addu Alqur'aanaare goo hara wanaa ndee ɗoo" maa "wostonde". maaku : haananaa kam nde mi waɗtitira nde immorde e ɓaŋŋe wonkii am. mi jokkataa si wanaa kon ko wahayinaa e am. min miɗo huli si mi yeddii joomi am, lepte ñalaande mawnde".

10:16.t: Maaku : "Sinno Alla muuyuno, mi janngataano nde e dow mooɗon, mi aanndintaande mon kadi. Gooŋɗii mi ñiiɓiino e mooɗon nguurndamado may- re. e on haqqiltaa?".

10:17.t: Alaa ɓurɗo tooñude haa hewta on pekifindiiɗo fenaande e hoore Alla, maa o yenni aayeeje makko ɗeen. Si ko woni, o malnatah bonɓe ɓen.

10:18.t: Heɓe ndeewa ga Alla ɗuum ko lorrataa ɓe nafataa ɓe, heɓe mbi'a : "Ko ɗii ɗoo ngoni tefanooj amen ɗi ka Alla". Maaku : "E on njweetoto Alla ko o anndaa ka kammuuli wanaa ka leydi?" Senayee woodanii mo, O toowii gaay e ko ɓe sirkata.

10:19.t: Yimɓe ɓe laatanooki si wanaa mofte goote. Ɓe lurri. Sinno wanaa konngol adinoo ngol immorde ka Joomi maa, ñaaweteno hakkunde maɓɓe e ɗuum ko ɓe lurraynoo.

10:20.t: Heɓe mbia : "Ko haɗnoo aaya njiippinee e makko immorde ka Joomi makko?" Maaku : "ngannde ko wirnii kon ko Alla woodanii.padee; min komi patɗo wonndude e mo'on".

10:21.t: Si minn meeɗinirii yimɓe ɓe yurmeende ɓaawo lorra memnooka ɓe, jaka yoo heɓe mari pewje e aayeeje amen ɗeen. Maaku : "Ko Alla ɓuri yaawude pewjugol". Pellet, Nulaaɓe amen ɓen heɓe mbinnda kon ko pewjoton.

10:22.t: Ko kaŋko woni doginoowo on ka njorndi e ka maayo, haa si on wonii ka laaɗe, ɗe ndoknira ɓe henndu laaɓndu, ɓe weltora ndu. Ara e majje henndu bippooru, mollooɗe (bempejje) ɗen ara e maɓɓe immorde e kala baŋŋe, ɓe pellita won´de kamɓe ɓe huɓindaama, ɓe toroo Alla ko ɓe laɓɓinana mo diina kan, [ɓe mbi'a]: "Si a daɗndii amen e ɗum ɗoo, pellet, men laatoday e yettooɓe [ma] ɓeen.

10:23.t: Ɓaawo nde o daɗndi ɓe, e jaka yoo kamɓe heɓe bewira ko leydi ko adaa e goonga. eehey mon yimɓe, ngandee bewre mon nden yantay e woŋkiiji mon. Ko dakamme nguurndam aduna. refti ko ka amen woni rutorde mon, min kaalano on ko laatino hoɗon ngolla.

10:24.t: Nganndee misal nguurndam aduna ɗam, ko wano ndiyam ɗam minn njippini immorde ka kammu, puɗi leydi ndin jillondira e majjam ɗum ko yimɓe e neemoraaɗi ñaamata. Haa si ndi leydi ndi ƴettii cuɗaari mayri ndi cuɗike, yimɓe mayri ɓen jikka won´de ko ɓe hattamɓe (soñugol) e mayri, yami- roore amen ardira e mayri jemma maa ñalorma, minn mbaɗa (puɗi) ɗin soñaaɗi wa si tawii ɗi moƴ- ƴaano hanki mun. Ko wano nii min fensitirta aayeeje ɗe wonan´de yimɓe miijitotooɓe ɓen.

10:25.t: Alla no nodda on faade e galle kisal, hombo fewna on mo o muyyi faade e laawol pocciingol ngol.

10:26.t: Hino woodani ɓeen moƴƴimɓe (golle) moƴƴere e ɓeydaari. Nduggu hippataa geece maɓɓe ɗen, wanaa kadi koyeera. Ko ɓen woni yimɓe Aljanna ɓen, kamɓe ko ɓe duumotooɓe ton.

10:27.t: Ɓeen faggitiiɓe boneeji ɗin, njoɓdi bone ko yeru makko. Koyeera hippay ɓe, Alanaa ɓe immorde ka Alla hay daɗndoowo, A sikkay jeece maɓɓe ɗen ko hippiraa ko taƴontinnde jemma niɓɓutɗo. Ko ɓeen ngoni yimɓe yiite, kamɓe ko luttooɓe toon.

10:28.t: Ñande min mooɓindirta ɓe denndaangal, refti min mbi'ana ɓene sirkunooɓe : "ngonee e nokku mon, onon e kafidiiɓe mon." min senndindira hakkunde maɓɓe, kafidiiɓe maɓɓe ɓen mbi'a : "wonaa minen ngonoɗon e rewde".

10:29.t: Alla yonii seedee hakkunde amen e mon. Si ko woni, min laatinoke welsindiiɓe ga e dewe mon ɗen.

10:30.t: Ko ɗon woŋkii kala jarriborte ko ki ardinnoo. ɓe nduttee ka Alla giɗo maɓɓe on ka goonga; ko ɓe ngonnoo e fefindaande kon majjira ɓe.

10:31.t: Maaku : "Ko hommbo arsikata on immorde ka kammu e ka leydi? Kaa ko hommbo jeyti nanɗe ɗen e giiɗe ɗen, ko hommbo kadi yaltinta ko wuuri e ndeer ko maayi, o yaltina ka maayi e nder ko wuuri, ko hommbo kadi yiilata fiyaaku on?" ɓe mbi'ay : "Ko Alla". Maaku : "e on kulatah?".

10:32.t: Ko oon ɗoon mo'on Alla, woni jeyɗo on e goonga. Ko holɗum woni ɓaawo goonga si wanaa majjere? Ko honno pirlitirte ɗon?

10:33.t: Ko wano nii konngol joomi maa ngol jojjiri e hoore yaltuɓe ɗoftaare ɓen :won´de pellet, ɓe ngooŋɗintah.

10:34.t: Maaku : "Hara no e kafidiiɓe mon ɓen oon mb no fuɗɗa tagoore refi o ruttita nde [ɓaawo maayde]?" Maaku :"Ko Alla fuɗɗata tagoore nde refti O ruttita nde Ko honno fefindara ɗon [faade e meere]?"

10:35.t: Maaku : "Hara no e kafidiiɓe mon ɓeen on feewnoowo e goonga?" Maaku: "Alla no feewna e goonga. E ko on peewnoowo e goonga ɓuri haandude e jokkeede, kaa ko on mo feewanataa (hoore mon) si wanaa o feewna? Ko heɓi on sifa no ñaawirton?

10:36.t: Ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe jokkah si wanah sikke. Pellet sikke ɗen nafataa e goonga kan hay e huunde. Pellet Alla ko gannduɗo ko ɓe ngollata.

10:37.t: Sellatah ka ndee Alqur'aanaa fefindiree gaanin Alla, si ko woni, ko nde gooŋginnde ko woni yeeso mayre, e fensitunde deftere, sikke alaa e mayre, ko nde immorde ka Jeyɗo winndere nden.

10:38.t: Kaa ɓe mbiat : "o fekindi nde?" Maaku : "ngaddee cortewol(simoore) yeru mayre, noddon kala mo kattanɗon ga Alla, si on laatike gooŋɓe".

10:39.t: Ko woni, ɓe njeddii ko ɓe kuɓindaaki ganndal mun, [ko ɓe fenniri nde], ko nde tawnoo firo mayre araani ɓe taho. Ko wano non adinooɓe ɓen fennirnoo. Ndaaru ko honno battane tooñooɓe ɓen wa'unoo.

10:40.t: No e maɓɓe gooŋɗinɗo nde, no e maɓɓe kadi mo gooŋɗinaa nde. Ko Joomi maa ɓuri anndude bonnooɓe ɓeen.

10:41.t: Si ɓe njeddii ma, maaku : "No woodani kam (njoɓdi) golle am, no woodani on (njoɓdi) golle mon. Onon ko on hisɓe ko mi gollata, min kadi ko mi kisɗo ko ngolloton".

10:42.t: No e maɓɓe ɓeen heɗotooɓe ma. E ko annannta faaɗu ɓe ɓeen, hay tawii ɓe haqqiltah?

10:43.t: ino e maɓɓe on ndaaroowo ma. e ko aan fewnata bumɗo oon, hay si wonii ɓe nji'atah?

10:44.t: Pellet Alla tooñirta yimɓe ɓeen huunde, ko woni, ko yimɓe ɓe tooñata ko'e muen.

10:45.t: Ñande o mooɓoyta ɓe, wa'ata kona si ɓe ñiiɓaano si wanaa sa'a gooto e ñalawma, heɓe nganndandira hakkunde maɓɓe. Gooŋɗii ɓeen yedduɓe kawral Alla ngal sooyii, ɓe ngonaano feewɓe.

10:46.t: Si min kollii ma yoga e ko ko min podaniɓe, maa ɗuum min ƴettitii ma, (fow e mun), ko faade ka amen woni ruttorde maɓɓe. refti Alla ko ceediiɗo e ko ɓe ngollata ko.

10:47.t: Hino woodani mofte kala nulaaɗo. Si nulaaɗo maɓɓe on arii, ñaawiree hakkunde maɓɓe nuunɗal, kamɓe ɓe tooñetaake.

10:48.t: Heɓe mbi'a: "Ko honnde tuma woni ndee fodoore, si on laatike gooŋguɓe?"

10:49.t: Maaku : "mi waawanaa hoore am lorra wanaa nafa si wanaa ko Alla muuyi. Hino woodani mofte kala lajal. Si lajal maɓɓe ngal arii, ɓe neeɓnirantaake saa'a ɓe ngardinantaake kadi".

10:50.t: Maaku : "kaalaneekam, si lepte makko ɗe ngarii e mon jemma maa ñalawma, ko holɗum bonɓe ɓe hawjiranta ɗe?"

10:51.t: E ko tuma ɗe yani ngooŋɗin ton ɗe? e ko jooni noon, gooŋɗii on laatinoke heñaniiɓe ɗum?

10:52.t: Refti tooñɓe ɓen mbi'anee : "meeɗee lepte luttugol. hara on njoɓete si wanaa kon ngonnoɗon e faggitaade?"

10:53.t: Heɓe kabrino maa : "ɗuum ko goonga?" maaku : "Ko non, mi wooɗndirii joomi am, pellet ko ɗe goonga. on ngonaani roŋkinooɓe".

10:54.t: Sinno tabitanno kala woŋkii tooñki jeyno ko woni leydi, ki sottorayno ɗum. ɓe cuuɗi nimse ɗeen ɓaawo nde ɓe nji'i lepte ɗe. ñaawiree hakkunde maɓɓe nuunɗal, kamɓe ɓe tooñetaake.

10:55.t: Ngandee ko Alla woodani ko woni ka kammuuli e ka leydi. Ngandee pellet, fodoore Alla nde ko goonga. Kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e yimɓe he ɓe nganndaa.

10:56.t: Kaŋko Hombo wuurna hombo wara; ko faade ka makko nduttoteɗon.

10:57.t: Eehey mon yimɓe, gooŋɗii waaju arii e mon immorde e Joomi mon, e lekki fii (ñabbuuji) ko woni e ɓerɗe, e peewal, e yurmeende wonannan´de gooŋɗinɓe ɓe.

10:58.t: Maaku : "[Ko addan-mi on kon] ko ɓural Alla e yurmeende makko; yo ɓe mbeltor ɗum ɗon. Ko ɗuum ɓuri moƴƴude ko ɓe mooɓata".

10:59.t: Maaku : "kaalaneekam, ɗuum ko Alla jippinani on e arsike, mbaɗɗɗon e mun ko harmi e ko dagii? -maaku : "Ko Alla duŋanii on? kaa ko e Alla pekintoɗon (penaale)?"

10:60.t: Ko holɗuum woni sikke ɓeen fekindotooɓe fenaande e Alla, Ñande Darngal? Pellet, Alla ko Joom ɓural e dow yimɓe ɓen. Kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe njettatah (dokkem ɗe).

10:61.t: A wonatah e fiyaaku, a janngataa e mayre e janngannde (alqur'aana), on ngollataa e gollal si wanaa minn ngoonat seediiɓe e mooɗon tuma nde ngonoton e mun. Wirnotaako gaay e joomi maa yeru abbere jarra, wonaa ka leydi wonaa ka kam- mu; wonaa ko ɓuri ɗum famɗude, wonaa ko ɓuri mawnude si wonaa no e ndeer deftere ɓanngunde.(feeñnde)..

10:62.t: Nganndee yimɓe Alla ɓe, kulol alanaa ɓe, ɓe ngonah sunoytooɓe.

10:64.t: Hino woodani ɓe welo-welo ka nguurndam aduna e ka laakara. - Alaa bayloowo konnguɗi Alla ɗin -. Ko ɗum woni malal mawngal.

10:65.t: Wota konngol maɓɓe sunine. Pellet, teddungal ngal denndaangal ko Alla woodani. Ko kaŋko woni Nanoowo, gannduɗo.

10:66.t: Nganndee ko Alla heeranii ɓeen wonɓe ka kammuuli e ɓeen wonɓe ka leydi. eko ɓeen noddooɓe gah Alla njokkaani e kafidiiɓe? ɓe jokkaani si wonaa sikke, ɓe ngoonaani si wonaa fenooɓe.

10:67.t: Ko Kaŋko woni baɗanɗo on jemma on fii yo on ndeeƴ e maako, e ñalawma on jii'rɗo. Pellet, wonii e ɗum maandeeji wonann´de yimɓe nanooɓe.

10:68.t: Ɓe mbi'i : "Alla jogitike ɓiɗɗo". Senaade woodanii mo! Ko Kaŋko woni galo jon diɗiiɗo on. Hino woodani mo ɗuum ko woni ka kammuuli e ɗuum ko woni ka leydi; alanah on cemmbe e ɗuum. E on wowlay Alla ko on nganndaa?

10:69.t: Maaku: "Pellet, ɓeen fekindotooɓe fenaande e Alla ɓe maletaake".

10:70.t: Ko dakamme ka aduna, refti ko ka amen woni ruttorde maɓɓe nde refti min meeɗina ɓe lepte cattuɗe ɗen sabu ko ɓe njeddiraynoo ko.

10:71.t: Janngan ɓe kabaaru Nuuhu, tuma nde o maakan-no yimɓe makko ɓen: "Ko onon yo yimɓe, si tawii ñiiɓugol am (hakkunde mon) mawnii e mon, e baa- jorgol lam Aayeeje Alla ɗe, ko e Alla woni ko mi fawii. Haray pellitee fiyaaku mon on, e kafidiiɓe mon ɓeen. refti wota fiyaaku mon on wonan on ko mugii. refti pewjanon kam (ko paalaɗon), wota on neeɓtinanam.

10:72.t: Si on nduŋtiima, mi lamndaaki on njoɓdi, njoɓdi am ndi wonaani si wonaa ka Alla. mi yamiraama nde mi laatotoo e jebbiliiɓe ɓeen".

10:73.t: Ɓe njeddi mo. minn daɗndi mo kaŋko e wondiiɓe makko ɓeen ka laana. min mbaɗi ɓe lomtotooɓe (e leydi). min njooli ɓeen yeddunooɓe Aayeeje amen ɗen. Ndaar ko honno battane jertinaaɓe (salii) ɓeen waɗi.

10:74.t: Refti minn immini ɓaawo makko nulaaɓe haa e yimɓe maɓɓe ɓen. Ɓe ngaddani ɓe ɓanngannduyeeji. Ɓe ngonaano gooŋɗinooɓe sabu ko njeddiri ɗuum ko ko adii. Ko wano nii min notirta e ɓerɗe ɓeen jaggituɓe.(yawtuɓe keeri).

10:75.t: Refti minn immini ɓaawo maɓɓe Muusaa e Haaruuna haa e Fir'awna e mbatu mun, won`dude e Aayeeje amen ɗen. Ɓe mawnikini, ɓe ngoni yimɓe bonɓe.

10:76.t: Nde goonga kan ari e maɓɓe immorde e amen, ɓe mb'i : "ɗum ɗoo ko mbilewu peeñngu".

10:77.t: Muusaa maaki: "E on mbi'anay goonga kan tuma ka ari e mon : E nee ko mbilewu nii? Hara le wiljuɓe ɓen maletaake".

10:78.t: Ɓe mbi'i : "E a ar e amen fii yo a yiltu amen e ko min tawri ko baabiraaɓe amen ɓe, mawngu ngun laatano on onon ɗiɗo ka leydi? Minen min ngonaani gooŋɗinooɓe on".

10:79.t: Fir'awna wi'i : "ngaddanee kam kala bileejo agannduɗo".

10:80.t: Nde wileeɓe ɓeen ngarnoo, Muusaa maakani ɓe : "Bugee(mberne) ko bugotoɗon kon".

10:81.t: Tuma nde ɓe buginoo, Muusaa maaki : "Kon ko ngadduɗon ko ko mbilewu, pellet, Alla bonnay ɗum. Pellet, Alla moƴƴintah golle bonnooɓe ɓeen".

10:82.t: Alla no tabintinira Goonga kan Konnguɗi makko ɗin, hay si bonɓe ɓen ngañii.

10:83.t: Gooŋɗinaano Muusaa si wanaa geñngol( ɓesngu)e yimɓe makko ɓen, sabu kulol Fir'awna e mbatu maɓɓe ngun, nde ɓe fitinta ɓe. Pellet, Fir'awna ko townintinooɗo ka leydi, pellet, ko e fantimɓe ɓen o jeyaa.

10:84.t: Muusaa maaki: "Eehey mon yimɓe am, si on laatike goosɗinɓe Alla, haray ko e Makko pawotoɗon si on laatike jebbiliiɓe".

10:85.t: Ɓe mb'i : "Ko e Alla min koolori. Joomi amen, wota waɗ amen fitina wonan´de tooñooɓe ɓeen.

10:86.t: Daɗndiraa men yurmeende maa nden e yimɓe heeferɓe ɓeen".

10:87.t: Min wahayini faade e Muusaa e neene-gooto makko on, won´de: "njippinee yimɓe mon ɓen Misra e cuuɗi, mbaɗon cuuɗi mon ɗin fewtuɗi (qibla), ñiiɓnon julde nden. mbeltinaa gooŋɗiinɓe ɓen".

10:88.t: Muusaa maaki: "Joomi amen, A okkii Fir'awna e mbatu mum ngu cuɗaari e jawɗeele ka nguurndam aduna, Joomi amen, fii yo ɓe majjin gaay e laawol Maa ngol. Joomi amen, mehu(momtu) jawɗeele maɓɓe ɗen, uddaa ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen, hara ɓe ngooŋɗintaa haa ɓe nji'a lepte muusɗe ɗeen".

10:89.t: O daali: "Gooŋɗii toraare mon nden jaabinaama. Ñiiɓee (e diina), wota on njokku laawol ɓeen ɓe nganndaa".

10:90.t: Min lummbini ɓiɗɓe Israa'iila ɓen maayo ngon. Fir'awna konu mun ngun njokkitiri ɓe bewre e jaggitere. Haa nde joolagol ngol hewtitii mo, o wi'i: "mi gooŋɗinii won´de deweteeɗo Alla si wonaa on mo ɓiɗɓe Israa'iila ɓen ngooŋɗini. min ko mi jeyaaɗo e jebbiliiɓe ɓeen".(juulɓe ɓe).

10:91.t: E ko jooni non? Gooŋɗii a yeddiino ko ado, njeyaya-ɗaa e bonnooɓe ɓeen.

10:92.t: Hannde minn daɗdnirte ɓanndu maa ndun, fii yo a wonan ɓeen arooɓe ɓaawo maaɗa tasakuyee. Pellet, ko ɗuuɗi e yimɓe ɓen gaay e aayeeje amen ɗen ko welsindiiɓe.

10:93.t: Gooŋɗii minn weernii ɓiɗɓe Israa'iila ɓen weerde teddunde, min arsike ɓe immorde e laaɓuɗi. Ɓe lurraali haa nde ganndal ngal ari e maɓɓe. Pellet, Joomi maa ñaawoya hakkunde maɓɓe Ñande Darngal, e kon ko ɓe luutondiraynoo e muuɗum.

10:94.t: Si a wonii e sikkitaare e ɗuum ko min njippinii e maaɗa, lanndii ɓen ɓe no jannga deftere nden ado maaɗa. Gooŋɗii goonga kan arii maa immorde ka Joomi maa, wata a jeye e ɓen sikkitiiɓe.

10:95.t: Wata a jeye e ɓeen yedduɓe aayeeje Alla ɗen, laato-daa e sooyuɓe ɓeen.

10:96.t: Pellet, ɓeen ɓen konngol Joomi maa ngol jojji e mun ɓeen ɓe ngooŋɗintah.

10:97.t: hay si arii e maɓɓe kala aaya, haa ɓe nji'a lepte muusuɗe ɗeen.

10:98.t: Meeɗaani laataade e hoɗo gooŋɗingo, gooŋɗinal maɓɓe nafi ɓe si wonaa yimɓe yuunusa ɓen. Nde ɓe ngooŋɗinnoo, minn kuncanno ɓe lepte koyeera ɗen ka nguurndam aduna, min dakmiti ɓe haa e saanga.

10:99.t: Sinno Joomi maa muuyuno, wonɓe ka leydi ɓen fof ngooŋɗinayno. E an a doolay yimɓe haa ɓe ngoona gooŋɗinɓe?

10:100.t: Laatanaaki wooŋkii nde ki gooŋɗinta si wonaa e duŋayee Alla. Homo waɗa soɓe [lepte] ɗen e hoore ɓeen ɓe kaqqiltaa.

10:101.t: Maaku: "Ndaaree ko holɗum woni ka kammuuli e ka leydi". aayeeje ɗe e jertinooje ɗe nafatah yimɓe ɓe ngooɗintaa ɓen.

10:102.t: Hara heɓe habbii si wonaa yeru ñanɗe ɓen feƴƴunooɓe ado maɓɓe? Maaku: "cabbitee, min miɗo wonndi e mo'on jeyaaɗo e sabbitiiɓe ɓen".

10:103.t: Reft mnn ndaɗnda nulaaɓe amen ɓen e ɓeen gooŋ-ɗinɓe. Ko woni non jojjiri e amen daɗndugol gooŋɗinɓe ɓe.

10:104.t: Maaku: "eeheymon yimɓe, si on wonii e sikkitaare e diina am, (miin) mi rewataa ɗiin ɗi dewoton gaa nin Alla; ko mi rewata, ko Alla oon baroowo on. mi yamiraama nde mi laatotoo e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen".

10:105.t: E won´de : "Ñiiɓin yeeso maa ngon diina kan ko o ooñiiɗo, wata a wonu jeyaaɗo e sirkooɓe ɓeen".

10:106.t: Wota a noddu gah Alla, ɗuum ko nafatah ma lorrataa ma. Si a waɗii (ɗuum), an dey haray a jeyaama ontuma e tooñooɓe ɓeen".

10:107.t: Si Alla meminirii ma lorra, alaa kñuncoowo mo si wonaa Kaŋko. Si o faandike e maaɗa moƴƴere, alaa duttoowo ɓural makko ngal. Homo memina nde on mo o muuyi e jeyaaɓe makko ɓeen. Ko Kaŋko woni jaafotooɗo, jurmotooɗo on.

10:108.t: Maaku : "Eehey mon yimɓe, gooŋɗii goonga ka arii mon immorde ka Joomi mon. Kala peewuɗo, e haray ko hoore-makko o feewani; kala kaadi majju- ɗo, haray ko e makko defii. min wonaani pawaaɗo e hoore-mon.

10:109.t: Jokku ko wona ko e wahayineede ko e maaɗa, muñño-ɗaa haa Alla ñaawa. Ko Kaŋko woni ɓurɗo moƴƴude e ñaawooɓe.

11:1.t: Alif, Laam, Raa, ko deftere nde aayeeje mun ñeñaa refti ɗe fensitaa immorde e oon Ñeeño kumpitiiɗo.

11:2.t: wota on ndw si winaa Alla.min dee komi jeertinoo jeertinoowo ummaade e makko, beltinoowo

11:3.t: E nde imsintoɗon Joomi mon; refti tuubanon mo. O dakmita on dakamme labaaɗo haa e lajal innangal o jonna kala jom ɓural ɓural makko ngal. Si on nduŋtiima, haray min mi hulanii on lepte ñalaande mawnde.

11:4.t: Ko ka Alla woni ruttorde mon. Kaŋko ko O kattanɗo kala huunde.

11:5.t: Nganndee ɓeen ɗoon ɓe cowa ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen fii yo ɓe cuuɗo e makko. Nganndee fewndo ɓe cuddotortnoo comci maɓɓe ɗin, Homo anndi ko ɓe cuuɗata e ko ɓe peññinta. Pellet ko O gannduɗo ko woni e ɓerɗe ɗen.

11:6.t: Alaa e ruugayngel ka leydi si wanah ko Alla fawtii arsike maggel on, Homo anndi ñiiɓirde maggel e daakorde maggel; fof no e deftere ɓanngunde. Feeñnde

11:7.t: Ko Kaŋko tagi kammuuli ɗin e leydi ndin nder balɗe jeegoo, hari arsi makko kin no ka hoore ndiyam, fii yo o ndaarndo on ko hommbo e mo'on ɓurata moƴƴinnde gollal. Pellet si a wi'i: "onon ko on ummintinteeɓe ɓaawo maayde", maa heeferɓe ɓen mbi'u: "ɗum wonaani si wonaa mbilewu peeñngu".

11:8.t: Pellet si min neeɓaniiɓe lepte ɗen haa e dumunna limaaɗo, maa ɓe mbi'u: "Ko tonngi ɗe?" nganndee ñande nde arat e mabɓe, ɓe wonataa sureteeɓe e majje; jippoo e maɓɓe ɗuum ko laatinoo heɓe njalkita.

11:9.t: Si tawii min meeɗinii neɗɗaŋke on dokke immornde ka amen, refti min ɓoori nde e makko, kaŋko ko otaƴiido, yeddoowo.

11:10.t: Si tawii kadi minn meeɗinirii mo dokke ɓaawo lorra memɗo mo, maa o wi'oy : "Satteende nden iwii e am", kaŋko (ontuma) ko o beltiiɗo, ñaaƴoowo.

11:11.t: Si wonaa ɓeen muññii ɓe, ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe. ɓeen ɗoon, no woodani ɓe haforanal e njoɓdi mawndi.

11:12.t: Yaamajo'o ko a accoowo yoga ko wahayinaa e maaɗa, ɓernde maa nden ɓiɗtora ɗum; fii heɓe mb'i: "Ko haɗno ngalu jippinee e makko? maa Malaa'ika arda e makko?" Anndu an ko a jertinoowo. Alla ko deenoowa kala huunde.

11:13.t: Kaa ɓe mbi'at : "O fekindi nde?" Maaku : "ngaddee Corteeji( cimooje) sappo yeru mayre, pekindaaɗe, noddon kala mo haɗtanɗon gaanin Alla, si on laatike gooŋɗuɓe".

11:14.t: Si ɓe njaabitaaki on, ngnndee won´de ko nde jippinira ko ganndal Alla, e won´de deweteeɗo alaa si wanaa Kaŋko. Hara onon ko on jebbiliiɓe?

11:15.t: Kala on tawɗo ko nguurndam aduna e cuɗaari majjam faandii, min humnanay ɓe golle maɓɓe ɗen ton, hara kamɓe ɓe ustantaake ton.

11:16.t: Ko ɓeen ngoni ɓe alanah ɗum en ka laakara si wanaa Yiite. Ko ɓe ngolli ton kon firtii, ko meere woni koɓe ngollaynoo.

11:17.t: E ko oon laatiiɗo e ɓanngannduyee immorde ka Joomi makko, homo janngande mo seediiɗo immorde ka makko, e nde aditiinde mo [kaŋko Muhammadu], deftere Muusaa nden ardiinde e yurmeende [ɓuri moƴƴude diini ko alah hujja kon?]: Ɓen ɗon hino gooŋɗini nde; kala on jedduɗo nde e feddeeji ɗin, ko Yiite ngen woni fodoore makko. wota a laato e sikke fii mayre. Pellet ko nde goonga immornde ka Joomi maa; ko woni tun, ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓen gooŋɗintaa.

11:18.t: Alaambo ɓuri tooñde ɓuri on pekandiido fenaa- nde e Alla? ɓeen ɗoon kolliroyte ka Joomi maɓɓe, (malaleykaaji) seediiɓe ɓen mbi'a: "Ko ɓee ɗoo pennoo e Joomi maɓɓe". Hey, kuddi Alla ndin wonii e tooñooɓe ɓeen.

11:19.t: Ɓeen falotooɓe ga e laawol Alla ngol, ɓe ɗaɓɓana ngol ooñorde, hara kadi ko ɓe yedduɓe laakara.

11:20.t: Ɓeen ɓe ngonaani laawotooɓe ka leydi, laatanaaki ɓe kadi weldiiɓe gaanin Alla, heɓe cowayanee lepte ɗeen. Ɓe laatanooki hattanɓe nangol, ɓe ngonaano kadi yi'ooɓe.

11:21.t: Ko ɓe ngoni sooyinɓe woŋkiiji mun ɗin. ɗuum ko ɓe pekintonoo majji gaay e maɓɓe.

11:22.t: Sikke alah, won`de ɓen ɗon ka laakara, ko kamɓe ɓuroyta sooyude.

11:23.t: Ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe, ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe, ɓe njankinanii Joomi maɓɓe, ko ɓe ngoni yimɓe Aljanna ɓen, kamɓe ko ɓe duumotooɓe toon.

11:24.t: Misal peɗle ɗiɗi ɗe: ko wano bumɗo e pahɗuɗo, e ji'oowo e nanoowo. E ɓee ɗoo ɗiɗi fotat e misal? E on mbaajitotaako?

11:25.t: Wollahi min nuliri Nuuhu e yimɓe makko ɓen: "miin wonan´de on ko mi jertinoowo ɓannginɗo.(peeñɗo.)

11:26.t: won´de wota on ndew si wanah Alla. min miɗo hulani on lepte ñalaande mu´usnde".

11:27.t: Mbatu ɓeen yedduɓe e yimɓe makko ɓen mbi'i: min nji'aani ma si wonah ko a ɓanndiŋke sifa amen, men nj'aani kadi ɓen jokkuɓe ma si wo- naa jaasɓe amen faaɗuɓe feere, men nji'anaani on e amen ɓural. Worin miɗen cikki ko on fenooɓe".

11:28.t: O maaki: "eehey mon yo yimɓe am, kaalnee kam si tawii miɗo e ɓanngannduyee immorde ka Joomi am, O weeɗii kam yurmeende (Annabaaku) immorde ka makko, ɗuum wumna e mooɗon, e min mbaaw- nay on nde hara ko on añɓe nde?"

11:29.t: Eeheymon yo yimɓe am, mi laɓndaaki on jawdi e ɗuum. Njoɓdi am wonaani si wonah ka Alla. min mi wonaani raɗotooɗo ɓen gooŋɗinɓe, kamɓe ko ɓe hawroyooɓe Joomi maɓɓe. Ko woni tun, min mi yi'ii on yimɓe majjuɓe.

11:30.t: Eehey mon yimɓe am, ko hommbo walloytammi ka Alla si mi raɗike ɓe? E on mbaajitotaako?

11:31.t: Mi wi'antah on miɗo mari ngaluujii Alla, mi annah kadi ko wirnii, mi wi'ataa won´de ko mi maleyko, mi wi'antaa ɓeen ɓe gite mon ɗen yawi, Alla okkoytaa-ɓe moƴƴere; ko Alla ɓuri anndude ko woni e woŋkiiji maɓɓe. miin ontuma [si mi waɗii ɗum], haray ko mi jeyaaɗo e tooñɓe ɓeen.

11:32.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Ko an yo Nuuhu, gooŋɗii a wenjidii e amen, a ɗuɗɗinii yeddondiral ngal e amen. Addan men ɗuum ko pod-ɗaa amen, si a laatike jeyaaɗo e goonguɓe ɓe".

11:33.t: o maaki: "nganndee ko Alla addanta on ɗe -si o muuyii- on ngonaani roŋkinooɓe.

11:34.t: Laaɓal-reedu am nafatah on, si mi faandike laaɓangol on, si tawii Alla no faandii bewnugol on (majjina). Ko Kaŋko woni Joomi mon, ko ka makko woni ruttorde mon.

11:35.t: Si ko woni, ɓe mbay : o fekindi-nde. Maaku: "Si mi fekindi nde, haray bonnere am nden no fawii kam. min no ko mi daɗndiiɗo ko mbonnoton kon".

11:36.t: Wahayinaa e Nuuhu won´de : "Gooŋɗintah e yimɓe maa ɓen si wanaa ɓen gooŋɗinnooɓe. Wota a suno e ko ɓe ngollaynoo".

11:37.t: Moƴƴin laana kan e ndeenka amen e yamiroore amen. Wota a yewtidoy e am fii ɓen tooñɓe, kamɓe ko ɓe yoolotooɓe.

11:38.t: Homo moƴƴina laana kan. Tuma kala nde dental hoorewal rewi ka o moƴƴinta ton, ɓe jalkita mo. o maaki: "Si on jalkitii men, minen kadi min njalkitoyay on wano njalkitirton [men non]".

11:39.t: Arma nde ngannduɗon ko hommbo lepte koynatɗe aroyat e muuɗum, lepte duumiiɗe njippoo e makko.

11:40.t: Haa si yamiroore amen nden aroyii, huɓɓinirɗe ɗen fati, min daali: "Roondo e makka kala nooneeji ɗiɗi resindirayɗi e ɓeynguure maa nden -si wanaa ɓen konngol lepte ngol adii e mu'un- e ɓen gooŋɗinɓe". Goosɗinaano won`dude e makko si wonah seeɗaaɓe.

11:41.t: O maaki: "mbaɗɗee e makka e Innde Alla ka dogugol makka e daragol makko. Pellet Joomi am ko kaforoowo jurmotooɗo".

11:42.t: Kan no dogida e maɓɓe e mollooɗe waaɗe wa pelle. Nuuhu noddi ɓiɗɗo makko on, hari on no serindi: "eehey ma yo ɓinngel am, waɗɗida e amen, wata a won´du e yedduɓe ɓeen".

11:43.t: O wi'i: "Mi ƴawoyay e fello daɗndayngo kam ndiyam ɗam". O maaki: "Daɗoowo yamiroore Alla nden alaa hannde si wanah oon Mo O yurmini". Molloonde nden heedi hakkunde maɓɓe, o laatodii e yoolaaɓe ɓen.

11:44.t: Wi'a: "eeyma leydi, moɗ ndiyam maa ɗam! eeyma kadi yo kammu, jogito [sorombooji ndiyam ɗin]!". Ndiyam ɗam ɓeeɓi, fiyaaku on ñaawaa, [laana] kan daroyii ka dow fello juudiiy, wi'aa: "Halkaare woodanii ɓen yimɓe tooñɓe".

11:45.t: Nuuhu noddi Joomi makko, o maaki: "Joomi am, pellet ɓiɗɗo am on ko jeyaaɗo e ɓeynguure am, pellet fodoore maa nde ko goonga. Ko aan ɓuri nuunɗude ñaawoore ñaawooɓe".

11:46.t: O daali: "Ko an yo Nuuhu, pellet on jeyaaka e ɓeynguure maa, nden (toraare) ko gollal ngal moƴƴaa. Wata a toro kam ko a alanaa ɗum ganndal. min miɗo waajo maa fii wata a jeye e majjuɓe ɓeen".

11:47.t: O maaki: "Joomi am, mi moolorike ma nde mi lanndoto maa huunde nde mi alanah ɗum ganndal. Si wanaa A hafranam yurmin Ɗaa mi, mi jeyete e hayruɓe ɓen"(.pertuɓe)

11:48.t: Wi'aa: "Ko an yo Nuuhu, jippor kisiyee immorde ka amen, e moƴƴi dow maaɗaa e mofte won´duɓe e maaɗa. Mofte goo (no ton), aray min dakmita ɓe, refti memoya ɓe immorde e amen, lepte muusɗe".

11:49.t: Ɗii ɗoo ko jeyaaɗi e kabaruuji birniiɗi, miɗen wahayina ɗe e maaɗa. A anndaano ɗe an, wanaa yimɓe maa ɓen, ko adii ɗum. Muñño, pellet battane moƴƴe ɗen woanii gooŋɗuɓe ɓen.

11:50.t: [minn Nulii] kadi faade e Aadinkooɓe ɓen, musiɗɗo maɓɓe on Huudi. O maaki : "eeheymon yo yimɓe am, ndewee Alla, deweteeɗo alanah on ko woori mo. On ngonaani si wonaa fekindotooɓe".

11:51.t: Eeheymon yimɓe am, mi laɓndaaki on e ɗuum njoɓdi. Njoɓdi am wonaani si wonaa ka on takɗo lam. En on haqqiltaa?

11:52.t: Eheymon yimɓe am, imsinee ka Joomi mon, refti tuubanon mo o jippina e mooɗon toɓo jokkondirn-ngo, o ɓeyda on cemmbe e hoore cemmbe mon ɗen. Wota on nduŋto ngono ko on bonɓe.

11:53.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "eheymaHuudu, kala ko addan-ɗaa men e ɓanngannduyee, minen men wonaani accooɓe deweteeɗi amen ɗin fii konngol maa ngol, minen min ngonaani gooŋɗinooɓe ma".

11:54.t: Min mb'atah si wanaa yoga e deweteeɗi amen ɗin meminirii ma bone". O maaki: "Min miɗo seedina Alla -seeditee onon kadi- won´de min, ko mi daɗndiiɗo e ɗuum ko sirkoton,

11:55.t: ga makko. Pewjanee kam on denndaangal, refti wata on padiree kam.

11:56.t: Min mi fawike e Alla, Joomi am e Joomi mon. Alaa e ruugayngel si wanaa ko O nannguɗo jubuuru maggel. Pellet, Joomi am no e laawol poocciingol.

11:57.t: Si on nduŋtii, gooŋɗii mi yottinanii kon ko mi nulidaa e mooɗon. Joomi am lomtinay yimɓe goo ɓe wonaa onon, on lorrirtaa mo hay e huunde. Pellet, Joomi am ko deeno kala huunde.

11:58.t: Nde yamiroore amen nden ari, min daɗndiri Huudi e ɓen goosɗinɓe won´duɓe e makko yurmeende amen. min daɗndi ɓe lepte tiiɗɗe.

11:59.t: Ɓeen ko Aadinkooɓe. e njedduno aayeeje Joomi amɓɓe ɗen, ɓe yeddi Nulaaɓe maɓɓe ɓen, ɓe jokki yamiroore kala dunndaranke sanndolɗinɗo.

11:60.t: Ɓe jokkindinaa ka aduna ɗoo, kuddi, e Ñande Darngal. ngnndee pellet, Aadinkooɓe ɓen njeddi Joomi maɓɓe. ngndee goɗɗal woodanii Aadi'en, yimɓe Huudi.

11:61.t: [Men Nulii] kadi e Samuuda'en, musiɗɗo maɓɓe Saalih, o maaki: "eehey monyimɓe am, ndewee Alla. deweteeɗo alanaano on ko woori mo. Ko Kaŋko fuɗɗi on ka leydi, O wuurni on e mayri. Imsinanee mo, refti tuubon ka makko. Pellet Joomi am ko ɓaɗiiɗo, jaabotooɗo".

11:62.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "eeheyma Saalihu, gooŋɗii a woniino hakkunde amen jaakoraaɗo ado ɗum ɗoo. E a haɗay amen rewugol ko baabiraaɓe amen rewatno? Minen non, min ngonii e sikke e huunde nde noddataa amen e mun (sikke) jaaliiɗe".

11:63.t: O maaki: "eeheymon yimɓe! Kaalanee kam, si mi laatike e ɓanngannduyee immorde ka Joomi am, O okkii kam immorde ka makko yurmeende, ko hommbo faabotoo mi ka Alla si mi yeddii mo? On ɓeydataa kam si wonaa hayrugol.perte

11:64.t: Eeheymon yimɓe am, baa ɗoo ko ngelooba wonan´de on maande. Tertee mba, mba ñaama e leydi Alla. Wata on memir-mba bone, lepte ɓaɗtiiɗe keɓa on".

11:65.t: Ɓe mborii-ba. o maaki: "ndakmitee ka galleeji mon balɗe tati! Ɗuum ko fodoore nde fennetaake".

11:66.t: Nde yamiroore Alla nden arunoo, min daɗndiri Saalihu e ɓen gooŋɗinɓe won´duɓe e makko, yur-meende immorde ka amen- e koyeera nden ñande Pellet Joomi maa, ko Kaŋko woni cemmbinɗo, pooluɗo.

11:67.t: Haacaango ngoon nanngi tooñuɓe ɓeen.Ɓe waɗtini ka galleeji maɓɓe jicciiɓe.(jusɓe).

11:68.t: A sikkay ɓe ñiiɓaano ɗoon. Nganndee pellet Samuudu en njedduno Joomi maɓɓe, nganndee goɗɗal yurmee- nde (Alla) woodanii Samuuda'en!

11:69.t: Gooŋɗii Nulaaɓe amen ɓeen nggaddanii Ibraahiima welo-welo, ɓe mbi'i: "Kisal (e mon)". O maaki: "Kisal (e mon). Neeɓaani o ardi e ngaari juɗaandi.

11:70.t: Nde o yi'noo juuɗe maɓɓe ɗeen njottaaki ndi, o faytiɓe (o sikkitii), o soomi kulol e maɓɓe. Ɓe mbi'i: "Wota a hul, ko min nulaaɓe e yimɓe Luuti ɓeen".

11:71.t: Tawi cuddiiɗo makko on no darii, o jali, min mbeltiniri mo Ishaaqa, e ɓaawo Ishaaqa, Yaaquube.

11:72.t: [Debbo on] wi'i: "Ee jalla am! emi jibinay e hoore ko mi nayeejo, e hino oo ɗoo gorko am ko nayeejo? Pellet ɗuum ɗoon ko huunde haawniinde!".

11:73.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "E a haawete fiyaaku Alla on? Yurmeende Alla e barkiiji makko ngonii e mon, yimɓe nduu suudu. Pellet ko O jettiniiɗo Tedduɗo".

11:74.t: Nde kulol ngol iwnoo e Ibraahiima, welo-welo o ari e makko, homo yeddandira e amen fii yimɓe Luuti ɓeen.

11:75.t: Pellet, Ibraahiima ko muññiiɗo, keewɗo jankina-gol, tuuboowo.

11:76.t: Eheyma Ibraahiima, ɗuurno ga e ɗum; gooŋɗii yamiroore Joomi maa nden arii, e pellet, lepte aray e maɓɓe lepte ɗe nduuttetaake.

11:77.t: Nde nulaaɓe amen ɓen ngarnoo ka Luuti, o sunanii ɓe, o ɓiɗtori fonndo makko ngon fii maɓɓe, o maaki: "ndee ɗoo ko ñalaande saɗtunde".

11:78.t: Yimɓe makko ɓeen ngari e makko e yaccoo. Ado ɗum hari heɓe ngollaynoo bonɗi. O maaki: "Eeheymon yimɓe am, ɓee ɗoo ko jiwɓe am: ko kamɓe ɓuri laaɓannde on. Kulee Alla, wata on kersinam e hoɓ- ɓe am. E gorko peewɗo alaa e mo'on?".

11:79.t: Ɓe mi'i: "Pellet haɗa anndi haaju alanah men e jiwɓe maa ɓeen, pellet haɗa anndi kadi ko men faalaako" koy..

11:80.t: O maaki: "Sinno miɗo marunoo doole e mon! maa ɗuum mi fattinoo(moolo) e soɓɓundu sattundu(jookdu)!".

11:81.t: [Hoɓɓe ɓen] mbi'i: "eheymaLuutu, pellet ko men nulaaɓe Joomi maa. ɓe njottotaaka ema. Yaltinir ɓeynguure maa nden e taƴunnde jemma, wata gooto e mo'on yeƴƴito si wonaa cuddiiɗo maa on, ko fii heɓay mo ko heɓata ɓeya kon. Nganndon fodoore maɓɓe nden ka subaka. E subaka on laataaki ɓaɗiido?".

11:82.t: Nde yamiroore amen nden arnoo, min waɗtiri dow [saare] nden ley mayre, min caaƴini e mayre kaaƴe iwruɗe loope juɗaaɗe dewondirɗe.

11:83.t: Maandinaaɗe ka Joomi maa. ɗe ngonaani goɗɗuɗe e tooñooɓe ɓeen.

11:84.t: [Min Nulii] kadi e Madyana'en, musiɗɗo maɓɓe on Shu'aybu, o maaki: "eheymon yo yimɓe am, ndewee Alla; deweteeɗo alanaa on ko woori mo. Wota on ustu ɓetu ngun e manndake ɗen. min on miɗo yi'i on e moƴƴere. miin non miɗo hulani on lepte ñalaande fiiltiindede.

11:85.t: Eeheymon yo yimɓe am, timminee ɓetu ngun e manndake ɗen nuunɗal. Wata on ustan yimɓe ɓen coggu maɓɓe ngun, wata on njahru ka leydi bonnugol.

11:86.t: Ko keddiiɗe Alla ɗen ɓuri moƴƴannde on si on laatike gooŋɗinɓe. Mi wonaani deenoowo on".

11:87.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "eeheyma yo Shu'aybu! E ko juulde maa nden yamiru-maa nde men ngaccata rewugol ko baabiraa- ɓe amen ɓeen rewaynoo kon, maa nde men nggollata huuwata e jawle amen ɗen ko men njiɗi? Pellet an ko a muññiiɗo peewɗo".

11:88.t: O maaki: "eeheymon yo yimɓe am, kaalaneekam: si miɗo e ɓanngannduyee immorde ka Joomi am, O arsikii lam immorde ka makko arsike moƴƴo?... mi faandaaki lunndaade on e kon haɗay-mi on e muuɗum. mi faandaaki si wonaa moƴƴingol fotde yeru am on. Kawral am wonaani si wonaa ka Alla. Ko e makko mi fawii, ko ka makko mi ruttotoo".

11:89.t: Eehmon yimɓe am, wata ngañngu am defu on haa heɓa on sifa ko heɓnoo yimɓe Nuuhu maa yimɓe Huudi maa yimɓe Saalih. Yimɓe Luuti ɓen kan ngoɗɗaani on.

11:90.t: Imsinanee Joomi mon, refti tuubanon mo. Pelet Joomi am ko jurmotooɗo, Giɗo".

11:91.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "eeheyma Shu'aybu, men alah faamude ko ɗuuɗi e ɗuum ko mbi'ataa; minen miɗen ma nji'a hakku-nde amen lo'oɗo. Si wanaano gorol maa ngol, men piyirteno keeƴe. Aan a wonaani tedduɗo e amen".

11:92.t: O maaki: "E ko gorol am ngol ɓuri teddudo e mon diini Alla, on waɗtirii mo ɓaawo mon hawkaaɗo? Pellet Joomi am ko huɓindiiɗo(fiiltiido) ko ngollaton kon.

11:93.t: Eeheymon yimɓe am, ngollee e nokku mo'on. miin kadi ko mi golloowo. Arma nde nganndoton ko hombo lepte koynooje arat e mu'm e ko hommbo woni penoowo on. (Jooni non) padee! min kadi miɗo won´di e mon patndiiɗo.

11:94.t: Nde yamiroore amen nden arnoo, min daɗndiri Shu'aybu e ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe won´duɓe e makko yurmeende amen. Haacaango ngon nanngi ɓen tooñɓe, ɓe waɗtini ka cuuɗi maɓɓe jicciiɓe(.jusɓe)

11:95.t: A wi'ay ɓe ñiiɓaano ɗon. ngandee woɗɗineede yurmeende wonanii Madayana wano Samuuda'en woɗɗiniranoo.

11:96.t: Gooŋɗii Men Nulirii Muusaa Aayeeje amen ɗeen e hujja ɓannguɗo.

11:97.t: Ha e Fir'awna e mbatu mun. ɓe njokkii yamiroore Fir'awna nden, yamiroore Fir'awna non wanaa feewnde.

11:98.t: O ardoyto yimɓe makko ɓeen ñande darngal, o jolna ɓe ka Yiite. (Nge)bonii jolirde jolaande.

11:99.t: Ɓe njokkinaama kuddi e oo (aduna), e ñande Darngal. Bonii ballal ngal ɓe njokkindiranaa.

11:100.t: Ɗuum ko jeyaaɗum e kumpite ce'e, miɗen fillano maa ɗuum: no e majje ñiiɓɗe e coñaaɗe.

11:101.t: Min tooñaani ɓe. Ko woni, ko kamɓe tooñi ko'e maɓɓe. deweteeɗi maɓɓe ɗiin ɗiɓe ndwatnoo gah ɗin duncanaali ɓe hay e huunde, tuma nde yamiroore Joomi maa nden arnoo; ɗi ɓeydaani ɓe si wonaa hayrude.

11:102.t: Ko wano nii nanngal Joomi maa ngal, si tawii o nanngii ce'e ɗen hara ko ɗe tooñɗe. Pellet nanngal makko ngal ko muusngal caɗtungal.

11:103.t: Pellet tasakuyee wonii e ɗuum ɗoo wonan´de on kulɗo lepte laakara. nden ko ñalaande yimɓe en mooɓoyte e mun, nde kadi ko ñalaande seedoyteende.

11:104.t: Min neeɓtinataa nde si wanah haa e lajal limangal.

11:105.t: Ñalnde ngal arata, woŋkii (woo) wowlatah si wanaa e duŋayee makko. Hino e maɓɓe malkisaaɗo e malaaɗo.

11:106.t: Si ko malkisaaɓe ɓen, ko ka Yiite; hino woodani ɓe ndeer ton ottaango e hiikaango.

11:107.t: Ko ɓe luttinteeɓe ndeer magge fotde kammuuli ɗiin e leydi ndin no duumii, si wonah si Joomii maa muuyii; pellet Joomi maa ko baɗoowo kala ko O faandii.

11:108.t: Si tawii non ko malaaɓe ɓen, ko ka ndeer Aljanna woni ko duumintee e mun fotde kammuuli ɗin e leydi ndin no duumii, si wanaa si Joomi maa muuyii. (Ɗum) ko dokkal ngal taƴondirtaa.

11:109.t: Wota a won e sikke e huunde ko ɓee ndewata. ɓe rewiraani si wanaa no baabiraaɓe maɓɓe ndewiray- noo ko adii. minen non, min hunniranay ɓe geɗal maɓɓe ngal ko aldah e ustugol.

11:110.t: Gooŋɗii min ngkkii Muusaa Deftere nden, luutondi- raa e mayre. Si wanaano konngol ardinoongol immorde ka Joomi maa, ñaaweteno hakkunde maɓɓe. Kamɓe kan heɓe e sikke sikkitiiɗo e e mayre.

11:111.t: Wonaani kala maɓɓe si wonaa Joomi maa hunna- nay ɓe (njoɓdi) kuuɗe maɓɓe. Pellet ko O kumpitiiɗo ko ɓe ngollata kon.

11:112.t: Ñiiɓir [e pocciingol ngol] wano njamiraɗaa non, e tuubuɓe won´duɓe e maaɗa. wota on mbew. Pellet ko O deenɗo ko ngolloton kon.

11:113.t: Wata on ooñor e tooñuɓe ɓen sakko Yiite ngen mema on. Alanah on gah ni Alla yiɗɓe. refti on mballoytaake.

11:114.t: Ñiiɓnu juulde nde ka seraaji ɗiɗi ñalawma e saa'iiji jemma. Pellet moƴƴi ɗin hino momta bonɗi ɗin. Ɗuum ko waaju wonan´de ɓeen waajitotooɓe.

11:115.t: Muñño. pellet Alla yeebataa njoɓdi moƴƴinooɓe ɓeen.

11:116.t: Ko haɗnoo wona e gire adinooɓe on ɓen, joomiraa- ɓe kedde, ɓe no haɗa e bonnugol ka leydi! si seeɗaaɓe e ɓen ɓe min ndaɗndunoo e maɓɓe. Tooñuɓe ɓen nokki e ko ɓe neeminaa e mun kon, ɓe laatii bonɓe.

11:117.t: Joomi maa siforaani kalkiroowo ce'e e hoore tooñe tawa yimɓe maɓɓe ko moƴƴinooɓe.

11:118.t: Sinno Joomi maa muuyiino, O waɗatno yimɓe ɓen moftal gootal. ɓe ceerataa ko ɓe luutondirooɓe.

11:119.t: si wanaa ɓeen ɓe Joomi maa yurmaa. Ko sabu ɗuum O tagiri ɓe. Konngol Joomi maa ngol jojjii won´de: "Pellet, Mi hebbiniray Jahannama jinna e yimɓe, ɓe denndaangal".

11:120.t: Kala e mu'un, miɗen fillano maa kabaruuji Nulaaɓe, ko min tabintinra ɗuum ɓernnde maa ngon. Aranii ma e ngol (cortewol) goonga e waaju e janntoore wonan´de gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

11:121.t: Maakan ɓeen ɓe gooŋɗinah: "NGollee e nokku mo'on. minen kadi, ko min gollooɓe.

11:122.t: Padee kadi. minen ko men fatndiiɓe".

11:123.t: Ko Alla heeranii birniiɗi kammuuli ɗin e leydi ndin, ko ka makko fiyaaku no fow ruttetee. Awa rewu Mo, fawo-ɗaa e makko. Joomi maa wonaani belsindiiɗo e ɗuum ko ngolloton.

12:1.t: Alif, laam, Raa, Ɗeen ko Aayeeje deftere ɓanngunde nden. feeñnde.

12:2.t: Minen min njippiniriinde janngeteende [e ɗemngal] Aarabu, mbelejo'o, on kaqqilay.

12:3.t: Minen Miɗen pillano maa ko ɓuri moƴƴude e fillayee, e ɗuu ko min mbahyi e maaɗa ndee Alqur'aanaare, hay si woniino ado mayre, ko a jeyaaɗo e welsindiiɓe ɓen.b

12:4.t: Tuma nde Yuusufu maakannoo baabamakko: "eehey may baaba', mi yi'ii [e koyɗol] koode sappo e go'o, naange ngen kadi e lewru ndun; mi yi'ii ɗin no cujjana kam".

12:5.t: [Baaba makko] maaki: "Eehey ma ɓinngel am, wota a fillano musiɗɓe maa ɓen koyɗol maa ngol sakko ɓe fewjane feere; pellet seytaane ko gaño aade ɓannguɗo(.peeñɗo.)

12:6.t: Ko wano nii Joomi maa suɓoray maa, O anndinma firo koyɗi, o timmina dokke makko on e maaɗa e ɓeynguure Yaaquuba nden, wano o timminirnoo mo e baabiraaɓe maa ɓen ɗiɗo: Ibraahiima e ishaaqa. Pellet Joomi maa ko gannduɗo Ñeeñɗo.

12:7.t: Gooŋɗii wonii e Yuusufa e musiɗɓe makko ɓeen, taskuyeeji wonan´de laɓndotooɓe ɓen.

12:8.t: tuma nde ɓe mbi'noo: "Pellet ko Yuusufa e neene-gooto(musiɗɗo )mun on ɓuraa yiɗeede ka ben-men dii enen, enen le ko en jamaa ɗuuɗuɓe. Pellet baabamen wonii e majjere ɓanngunde".

12:9.t: Mbaree Yuusufa maa feroɗon mo e leydi; yeeso baaba mon ngon heeranoo on, ngonton ɓaawo ɗum yimɓe moƴƴuɓe".

12:10.t: Gooto e maɓɓe wi'i: "Wota on mbarYuusufa, mbeddee mo ka niɓe woyndu yoga e seteeɓe hoccay mo, si on laatike gollooɓe".

12:11.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "eeheyma baaba amen, ko heɓu-maa a hoolotaako amen e fii Yuusufa? Minen le ko men laaɓamɓe mo reedu".

12:12.t: Accitid-mo e amen o ñaama, o fija,minen ko men reenooɓe mo.

12:13.t: O maaki: "miin no suninat kam nde njahdoton e makko; miɗo huli nde boyeeru ndu ñaamata-mo tawa Ko on mbelsindi-ɗoon e makko".

12:14.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Pellet si saafaandu ñaamii mo e hoore ko men jamaa ɗuuɗuɓe, haray ko men hayruɓe"(pertuɓe.)

12:15.t: Nde ɓe njahdunoo e makko, ɓe fottani ukkugol mo ka niɓe woyndu, min mbahayini e makko: "Ma a haaltayan ɓe ɗee kuuɗe maɓɓe hara ɓe so'aa anndude".ɓe( tinaani)..

12:16.t: Ɓe ngrti ka baaba maɓɓe kiikiiɗe heɓe woya .

12:17.t: Ɓe mb'i: "Ko an yo baaben amen, minen men njehii miɗen adondira, men ngacci Yuusufa ka kaake amen saafaandu ndun ñaami mo. A hoolotaako min non, hay si min ngonii gooŋɗuɓe".

12:18.t: Ɓe ngardi e dolokke makko on hino moddi ƴiiƴam fenaande. o maaki: "si ko woni, woŋkiiji mon ɗin cuɗinanii on fiyaaku. Ko muñal moƴƴal [heddanii kam]! Ko Alla woni ballitorɗo e ko sifotoɗon kon".

12:19.t: Seteeɓe ngari, ɓe nuli ƴoogoowo maɓɓe on, o jippini baagal makko ngal. O wi'i: "Ee wel¨-welo am! E hino paykum!" Ɓe cuuɗiri mo keyee maɓɓe. Alla non ko gannduɗo ko ɓe ngollata kon.

12:20.t: Ɓe njeeyiri mo coggel pamɗungel: dirhamoñ limotoo-koñ. Ɓe ngoni welsindiiɓe e fii makko.

12:21.t: Cootɗo mo on Misra wi'ani ɓeyngu makko: "Teddin jipporde makko. Hino gasa ka o nafa en maa njogitoɗen mo ɓiɗɗo". Ko nii min koɗniri Yuusufa ka leydi fii yo minn nganndin mo firo koyɗi. Alla ko pooluɗo e fiyaaku makko on: kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓen nganndaa.

12:22.t: Nde o yottinoo sagatalaagu makko, min ngokki mo faamu e ganndal. Ko wano nii min njoɓirta moƴƴinooɓe ɓeen.

12:23.t: OOn [debbo] mo on woni e suudu mun ɗaɓɓiri mo hoore-makko. O soki baafe ɗen o wi'i: "mi heblanii-mo-ma!" o maaki: "Moolaare Alla! Jeyɗo kam on moƴƴinii weerde am. Si ko woni, tooñooɓe ɓen maletaake".

12:24.t: Gooŋɗii [debbo] on himmanii oon. Kaŋko kadi o himmanayno mo si wanaa o yi'ii hujja Joomi makko on. Ko nii [min gerdiri] fii yo min njiiltu mo e bone e paŋkare. Pellet ko o jeyaaɗo e jeyaaɓe amen laɓɓinaaɓe ɓeen.

12:25.t: Ɓe ɗiɗo kala ɓe ngidondiri ka baafal, o seekiri dolokke oya oon ɓaawo. Ɓe tawi moodi makko ka baafal. [debbo] on wi'i: "Ko holɗum woni njoɓdi on paalanaaɗo ɓeynguure maa nden bonki si wanaa yo soke [o leptiree] lepte muusɗe?"

12:26.t: [Yuusufu] maaki: "Ko kaŋko ɗaɓɓiri kam hoore-am". Tawanooɗo e yimɓe [debbo] on ceeditii: "Si tawii dolokke mum on ko yeeso seekiraa, haray ko [debbo] oon gooŋɗi, kaŋko [gorko] on ko jeyaaɗo e fenɓe ɓeen.

12:27.t: Si tawii noon dolokke makko oon ka ɓaawo seekiraa, haray [debbo] on fenii, kaŋko [gorko] on ko o jeyaaɗo gooŋɗuɓe ɓeen.

12:28.t: Nde [moodi makko] yi'noo dolokke oon ko ɓaawo seekori, o wi'i: "Ɗum ko jeyaaɗum e pewje mon! Pellet pewje mon ɗen ko mawɗe!".

12:29.t: Yuusufa, ɗuurno gah e ɗum. Aan [debbo on], imsinano junuubi(bakkaat) maa ɗin; tawde pellet a jeyaama e woopɓe ɓeen".

12:30.t: Rewɓe ɓen ka saare mbi'i: "Debbo laamɗo on ɗaɓɓirii kurka makko o hoore-makko! Gooŋɗii yiɗde ɓurtirii mo. Minen dey miɗen nji'a oo [debbo] e majjere ɓanngunde".

12:31.t: Nde o nannoo pewje maɓɓe ɗen, o nulani ɓe, o hebilani ɓe ngawluuji, o jonni gooto kala e maɓɓe laɓi, o wi'i: "Yaltu e maɓɓe!". Nde ɓe nji'unoo mo, ɓe mawnini mo, ɓe taƴi juuɗe maɓɓe ɗen, ɓe mbi'i: "Kaawee Alla! Oo wanaa ɓanndiŋke, oo wonaani si wanaa malayiko tedduɗo".

12:32.t: O wi'i: "Ko oo mo'on felirɗon kamm fii mun, gooŋɗii mi ɗaɓɓirii mo hoore-makko o haɗitii. Si wonii o waɗaani ko mi yamirta mo kon, ma o soke ma o laato jeyaaɗo e hoyɓe ɓen".

12:33.t: O maaki: "Joomi am, Ko kaso oon ɓurani kam e ko ɓe noddata kam e mun kon. Si a pottinaani kam pewje maɓɓe ɗen, mi ooñoto e maɓɓe, mi jeyee e majjuɓe ɓe".

12:34.t: Joomi makko jaabinani mo, O firliti e makko pewje maɓɓe ɗen. Pellet, ko Kaŋko woni Nanoowo, gannduɗo O.

12:35.t: Refti feeñani (rewɓe) ɓen ɓaawo nde ɓe nji'i maandeeji ɗin, ma ɓe cok-mbo tigi haa e saaji.

12:36.t: Sukaaɓe ɗiɗo naatidi e makko ka kaso. Goɗɗo e maɓɓe wi'i: "Min mi hoyɗii hoore-am miɗo siiwa sanngara". Oya kadi wi': "Min mi hoyɗii hoore-am miɗo ronndii ka hoore-am cobbal, colli no ñaama e maggal". Humpitii min firo ɗin, minen men nji'ii ma jeyaaɗo e moƴƴinooɓe ɓeen".

12:37.t: O maaki: "Ñaametee mo wonaɗon okkoreede on aratah on si wanaa mi humpitay on firo mun ado o arde on. Ɗuum mo'on ko jeyeeɗum e ko Joomi am anndini lam. Min mi ɗalii diina yimɓe ɓe ngooŋɗinaa Alla, hara kamɓe e fii laakara ko ɓe yedduɓe".

12:38.t: Njookku-mi diina baabiraaɓe am ɓen: Ibraahiima e Ishaaqa e Yaaquuba. Haananaa men nde men kafidata e Alla hay e huunde. Ɗuum ko jeyaaɗum e ɓural Alla e dow amen e hoore yimɓe ɓeen; kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓen ɓe njettataa.

12:39.t: Eehey mon won´diiɓe am ɗiɗo ka kaso! E ko deweteeɗi ceertuɗi ɓuri moƴƴude, kaa ko Alla Gooto poolɗo o?

12:40.t: On ndewani gah mum, si wonah inɗe ɗe innuɗon ɗum, onon e baabiraaɓe mon, Alla jippinanaani ɗen hujja. Ñaawoore ndeen alanah si wanaa Alla. O yamirii wota on ndw si wanaa Kaŋko. Ko ɗuum woni diina ñiiɓuka kan; kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓen ɓe nganndaa.

12:41.t: Eehey mon won´diiɓe am ɗiɗo ka kaso! Goɗɗo e mo'on yarnay koohoo mun on sanngara; oya on, o fetee, colli ɗin ñaama ka hoore makko. Fiyaaku mo laɓndiɗon fii mun on ñaawaama.

12:42.t: O maakani on mo o sikke daɗay e maɓɓe kamɓe ɗiɗo: "Jaŋto lam ka koohoojo maa on". Seytaane yejjintini mo jaŋtanagol koohoojo makko on. [Yuusufu] ñiiɓiti ka kaso yoga e duuɓi.

12:43.t: Laamɗo on wi'i: "Min mi yi'ii (e koyɗol) na'i jeeɗiɗi payɗi, na ñaama pooƴuɗi jeeɗiɗi ɗin, e butaali jeeɗiɗi kecci, e goɗɗi goo joorɗi. Eheymon dental, pirtanee kam ngol koyɗol am, si on laatike firtooɓe koyɗi".

12:44.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Ko jiiɓu-jaaɓu koyɗi ! min ngonaani annduɓe firo koyɗi !".

12:45.t: Daɗnooɗo on e ɓeya ɗiɗo miijitii ɓaawo dumunna o wi'i: "Min mi humpitay on firo maggol. Nulee kam".

12:46.t: Yuusufu, an yo gooŋɗuɗo! haalani min fii na'i jeeɗiɗi payɗi, na ñaama pooƴuɗi jeeɗiɗi ɗin, e butaali jeeɗiɗi kecci e goɗɗi jooruɗi, mbelejo'o mi ruttoo ka yimɓe ɓen, belejo'o, ɓe ngannday".

12:47.t: O maaki: "On ndemat duuɗi jeeɗiɗi jokkondirɗi. Kala ko coñɗon, ngccon ɗum ka dukkal(butaali) mun, si wanaa seeɗa e kon ko ñaamoton".

12:48.t: Refti aroyat ɓaawo ɗum, duuɓi jeeɗiɗi caɗtuɗi, ɗin (duuɓi) no ñaama ɗuum ko marnaɗon ɗi si wonaa seeɗa e ko maroton [fii awdi].

12:49.t: Refti aroya ɓaawo ɗuum, hitaande, ko e mayre yimɓe ɓen toɓetee, ko e mayre kadi ɓe kamata.

12:50.t: Laamɗo on wi'i: "ngaddanee kam on". Nde imminaaɗo on arunoo mo, o maaki: "Rutto ka koohoojo maa on laɓndoɗaa mo: Ko woni fiyaaku ɓen rewɓe taƴnooɓe juuɗe mun ɗen? Pellet Joomi am ko gannduɗo pewje maɓɓe ɗen".

12:51.t: [Laamɗo on] wi'i: "Ko holɗum wonnoo fiyaaku mon tuma ɗaɓɓirnoɗon Yuusufa hoore-makko?" Ɓe mbi'i: "Moolaare Alla! min nganndiraa mo ko boni". Ɓeyngu laamɗo on wi'i: "Jooni goonga kan feeñii. Ko min ɗaɓɓirnoo mo hoore-makko, pellet ko o jeyaaɗo e gooŋɗuɓe ɓen".

12:52.t: "Ɗuum ko fii yo o anndu won´de mi jamfaaki mo ka wirnii, e won´de Alla fewnatah pewje jamfotooɓe ɓen.

12:53.t: Mi laɓɓinaa hoore-am, tawde woŋkii ko heewkii yamirde bone, si wanah kiin ki Joomi am yurmini. Joomi am ko jaafotooɗo jurmotooɗo.

12:54.t: Laamɗo on wi'i: "ngaddanee kam mo, mi heertinana mo hoore-am". Nde o yewtunoo mo, o wi'i: "Aa on hannde ka amen, ko a jom-nokku koolaaɗo".

12:55.t: O maaki: "Waɗam e hoore-ngaluuji leydi ndin: ko mi deenoowo gannduɗo".

12:56.t: Ko wano nii min ñimnirani Yuusufa ka leydi, homo jippora e mayri nokku ka o yiɗi. miɗen keɓnira yurmeende amen nden on mo min muuyi, min njeebataaka njoɓdi moƴƴinooɓe ɓen.

12:57.t: Pellet ko njoɓdi laakara ndiin ɓuri moƴƴannde ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe laatii gooŋɗuɓe.

12:58.t: -Musiɗɓe-baaba-gootooɓe Yuusufa ɓeen ngari ɓe naati ka makko. O annditi ɓe, kono kamɓe ɓe paayti mo.

12:59.t: Tuma nde o hebllannooɓe doŋlle maɓɓe ɗeen, o maaki: "ngaddanee kam musiɗɗo mon baaba-gooto. E on nji'aani miɗo timmina ɓetu ngun, e won´de ko mi ɓurdo moƴƴude e weernooɓe ɓen?"(jippinooɓr).

12:60.t: Si on ngaddanaani kam mo, haray ɓetu alanaa on ka am ɗoo; wota on ɓado kamm kadi".

12:61.t: Ɓe mb'i: "min ɗaɓɓiray mo baba makko, minen ko men gollooɓe (ɗuum)".

12:62.t: O maakani gollooɓe makko ɓen: "mbaɗee coggeeji(njigguuji) maɓɓe ɗin ka doŋle maɓɓe: belejo'o ɓe ngannditat ɗi si ɓe nduttima ka yimɓe maɓɓe ɓen, belejo'o ɓe njiiltoto".

12:63.t: Tuma nde ɓe nduuttinoo ka ben maɓɓe, ɓe mbi'i: "eeheyma ben(baaba) amen, min skaɗaama ɓetu. neldu amen musiɗɗo amen on, men ɓetanee. Ko men reenooɓe mo".

12:64.t: O maaki: "Hara mi hooloray on e fii makko, si wonaa no mi hoolornoo on non e musiɗɗo-neene-gooto makko on ko adii? Ko Alla woni moƴƴo deenoowo, ko Kaŋko ɓuri moƴƴude yurmotooɓe ɓeen".

12:65.t: Nde ɓe ngudditunoo doŋle maɓɓe ɗeen, ɓe tawi cogguuji(njigguuji) maɓɓe ɗin ruttaama e maɓɓe. Ɓe mbi'i: "eeyma yo ben amen, ko men ɗaɓɓata [kadi]? Ɗii ko cogguuji amen, ɗi nduttaama e amen. Miɗen njiggana yimɓe amen, men ndeena musiɗɗo amen on, men ɓeydora ɓetu ngelooba; ɗuum ko ɓetu newiingu".

12:66.t: O maaki: "Mi immindintaa(neldatah) mo e mooɗon haa ƴettanon mi ahadi ka Alla, won´de on ngrtiranat kam mo si wonaa hara on kuɓinda". Ɓaawo ɓe ƴettanii mo ahadi maɓɓe ndin, o maaki: "Alla e dow ko wowluɗen kon, ko o deenoowo".

12:67.t: O maaki: "eeheymin ɓiɗɓe am, wota on naatiroy e damal gootal, naatiree e dame ceertuɗe. Mi dun-cantaa on e (muyɗe) Alla hay e huunde. Ñaawoore alanaa si wonaa Alla: Ko e makko mi fawii, ko e makko kadi, yo fawo fawotooɓe ɓeen".

12:68.t: Nde ɓe naatirnoo nokku ka baaba maɓɓe yamirnoo ɓe ɗon, ɗum wonaano no duncana ɓe [ko iwri] ka Alla si wanaa haaju wonunooɗo e fittaandu Yaaquuba mo o gasini. Kaŋko on, ko o jom-ganndal ngal min anndini mo. Kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓen ɓe nganndaa.

12:69.t: Nde ɓe naatnoo ka Yuusufa, o maɓɓi musiɗɗo-neene-gooto makko on e makko, o maaki: "Ko mi musiɗɗo-neene-gooto maa, wata a sunor ko ɓe ngollatnoo".

12:70.t: Tuma nde o hebilannoo ɓe doŋle maɓɓe ɗen, o waɗi ɓetirgal ngal ka doŋngal musiɗɗo-neene-gooto makko on, refti ewnotooɗo eewnii: "eeymon yo seteeɓe, Ko on wuyɓe".

12:71.t: Ɓe fewtiti e maɓɓe ɓe mbi'i: "Ko holɗuum kattiɗon?"

12:72.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "minn kattike ɓetirde laamɗo on. Hino woodani kala gadduɗo ngal, doŋngal ngelooba, ko miin woni pawtiiɗo ɗuum".

12:73.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "min ngooɗndirii Alla, gooŋɗii hoɗon nganndi min ngaraani bonnugol ka leydi, min laataaki kadi wuyɓe".

12:74.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Ko wonata njoɓdi makko si tawii ko on fenooɓe?"

12:75.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Njoɓdi makko: ko kala mo: [ɗuum] tawaa ka doŋngal mun, haray ko kaŋko [tigir] woni njoɓdi mun. Ko wano non min njoɓitirta tooñooɓe ɓen".

12:76.t: [Yuusufu] fuɗɗori doŋle maɓɓe ɗen ado doŋngalmusiɗɗo- neene-gooto makko on; refti o yaltiniri nde ka doŋngal musiɗɗo-neene-gooto makko on. Ko wano non men fewjirani Yuusufa, [tawde] o hattantaano nanngude musiɗɗo-neene-gooto makko on ka sariya laamɗo on, si wonaa hara ko Alla muuyi. Miɗen ɓantana darajaaji on mo min muuyi. No e dow kala jom-ganndal ganndo [goo].

12:77.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Si o wujjii, haray musɗo- neene-gooto makko wujjiino ko adii". Yuusufu mari ɗum ka woŋkii makko, o feññinanaani ɓe ɗuum. o maaki: "Ko onon ɓuri bon´de nokku! Ko Alla ɓuri anndude ko cifotoɗon".

12:78.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "heyma yo laamɗo on, oo no mari baabiraawo nawyuɗo oggos; ƴettu gooto e amen lomto makko. Menen men nji'ii ma jeyaaɗo e moƴƴinooɓe ɓeen".

12:79.t: O maaki: "Moolaare Alla nde min nanngata si wanaa oon mo men tawi doŋle amen ɗeen e juuɗe mun. Mene haray ontuma ko men tooñɓe".

12:80.t: Nde ɓe taƴinoo fii hettugol mo, ɓe martiti ko ɓe gunndondirɓe. Mawɗo maɓɓe on wi'i: "E on nganndaa won´de baaba mon ƴettodii e mo'on ahadi ka Alla, e aranun tuma belsindinoɗon e Yuusufa? Mi seerataa leydi ndin haa baaba am duŋanoo kam maa o ñaawana kam [hettugol mo], ko Kaŋko ɓuri moƴƴude e ñaawooɓe ɓeen".

12:81.t: Nduttee ka baaba mon mbi'on: "eeheyma yo baaba amen, ɓiɗɗo maa on wujjii. min ceedaaki si wonaa ko men nganndi, men wonaani reenɓe ko wirnii.

12:82.t: Laɓndo (yimɓe) saare nden nde men ngonunoo e mun, e seteeɓe ɓen ɓe men kawrondirnoo e mun. Pellet ko men gooŋɗuɓe".

12:83.t: [Yaaquuba] maaki: "Woŋkiiji mon ɗin cuɗanii on fiyaake! Ko muñal labangal. Hino hasii ka Alla artiranta mi ɓe, ɓe denndaangal. Ko Kaŋko woni gannduɗo, Ñeeñɗo".

12:84.t: O ɗuurnii ɓe o maaki: "Ee suno am e fii Yuusufa!" Gite makko ɗen ndanwiri suno. Ko o cuuɗɗo suno.

12:85.t: Ɓe mb'i: "min ngooɗdirii Alla! A seerataa haɗa jaŋtoo fii Yuusufa, haa ngonaa horsuɗo maa ngonaa jeyaaɗo e halkiiɓe ɓen".

12:86.t: O maaki: "nganndee ko e Alla mi wullitotoo ngannde am e sunaare am. Miɗo anndi ka Alla ko on nganndaa".

12:87.t: "Eeheymon ɓiɗɓe am, njehee tefon fii Yuusufa e musiɗɗo neene-gooto makko on. Wota on taƴo e yurmeende Alla. Ko fii, taƴotaako e yurmeende Alla si wanaa yimɓe yedduɓe ɓen".

12:88.t: Nde ɓe naatunoo ka makko [kaŋko Yuusufa], ɓe wi'i: "Ko an yo laamɗo, lorra heɓii men memen e ɓeynguure amen; men angadii e sil'a jaasuɗo. Huɓnan men ɓetu ngun, cakko-ɗaa e amen. Pellet, Alla yoɓay sakkotooɓe ɓeen".

12:89.t: O maaki: "Enee, on ngannditii ko mbaɗunoɗon Yuusufa e musiɗɗo neene-gooto makko on kon tuma nde ngonnoɗon majjuɓe?"

12:90.t: Ɓe mbii'i: "Kere ko aan woni Yuusufa?" O maaki: "Ko miin woni Yuusufa. Oo ɗoo ko miñam. Gooŋɗii Alla moƴƴike e amen. Ko fii, mo gomɗii o muññike, pellet, Alla yeebataa njoɓdi moƴƴinooɓe ɓen".

12:91.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "min ngooɗndiri Alla, Alla ɓurnii ma e amen, men woniino woopɓe".

12:92.t: O maaki: "Feloore alaa e hoore-mon hannde! Yo Alla yawtan on. Ko Kano woni ɓurɗo Yurmotooɓe".

12:93.t: Njehhdee e oo dolokke am ɗoo, mberloɗon mo ka yeeso baaben am: o wattinat ji'oowo. ngaddanon kam ɓeynguure mon nden ɓe denndaangal".

12:94.t: Nde seteeɓe ɓen ceerti [yalti Misra]ben maɓɓe maaki: "miin miɗo heɓa balangol Yuusufa, sinno wanaa fii yo on ɗaaytinam".

12:95.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "min ngooɗndirii Alla, an haɗa e majjere maaɗa ɓooyunde nden".

12:96.t: Nde beltinoowo on arnoo, o werlii [dolokke] on ka yeeso makko, o wonti yi'oowo. O maaki: "E mi wi'anaano on miɗo anndi ka Alla ko on nganndaa?"

12:97.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "eheyma yo baaba amen, imsinano men junuubi amen. minen men ngoniino woopɓe".

12:98.t: O maaki: "Arma mi imsinano on Joomi am. Ko Kaŋko woni jaafotooɗo, jurmotooɗo".

12:99.t: Nde ɓe naatnoo ka Yuusufa, o tappi ka makko [ɗoun] mawɓe makko ɓen ɗiɗo, o maaki: "Naatiree Misra, si Alla muuyii, ko on hooliiɓe".

12:100.t: O towniri mawɓe makko ɓen ɗiɗo ka belorki(daŋki), ɓe naayirani mo cujjugol. O maaki:"eymon baaba'en, ko ɗum ɗoo woni firo koyɗol am ngol oya tuma, gooŋɗii Joomi am waɗii ngol goonga. Gooŋɗii O moƴƴike e am tuma O yaltinnoo kam ka kaso, O itti on ka ladde, ɓaawo nde seytaane bonnii hakkunde am musiɗɓe- baab-gootooɓe am ɓen. Pellet, Joomi am ko newaniiɗo ko O muuyi kon. Ko Kaŋko woni gannduɗo, Ñeeñɗo".

12:101.t: Joomi am, gooŋɗii A weeɗii kam laamu, A anndinii kam kadi firo koyɗi. [Aan] Takɗo kammuuli ɗin e leydi ndin, ko Aan woni giɗo am aduna e laakara. Ƴettitam ko mi juulɗo, waɗitdaa kam e moƴƴuɓe ɓen.

12:102.t: Ɗuum ko jeyaaɗum e kumpite wirniiɗe, miɗen wahayini ɗe e maaɗa. A tawanooka e maɓɓe tuma nde ɓe eɓɓunoo fiyaaku maɓɓe on heɓe pewja.

12:103.t: Ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓen, hay si a reerɗi, (ɓe) ngonaani gooŋɗinooɓe.

12:104.t: A ɗaɓɓiraani ɓe e ɗuum njoɓdi. Nde wonaani si wanaa waaju wonan´de winndere nden.

12:105.t: Ɗuuɗii e aayeeje ka kammuuli e ka leydi, heɓee ndewa e majje hara ko ɓe ɗuurniiɓe ɗe.

12:106.t: Ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe goosɗintaa Alla, si wonaa hara ko ɓe sirkuɓe.

12:107.t: E ɓe kooli nde hippooje arata ɓe e lepte Alla ɗee maa darngal ngal ardira ɓe juhal, hara kamɓe ɓe tinaani

12:108.t: Maaku: "Ko ngo'ol woni laawol am, miɗo noddira e Alla dow hujja, min e ɓeen jokkuɓe kam. Senayee woodanii Alla! Mi wonaani jeyaaɗo e sirkooɓe ɓen.

12:109.t: Men nulaali ado maa si wanaa worɓe jeyaaɓe e yimɓe ca'e ɗen, miɗen mbahayina e maɓɓe. E ɓee [fennooɓe ma] yiilotaako ka leydi, ɓe ndaara ko honno battane ɓeen adinooɓe ɓe w'anoo? Pellet ko saare laakara nden ɓuri moƴƴannde ɓen hulɓe [Alla]. E on haqqiltaa?

12:110.t: Haa si tawii nulaaɓe ɓen taƴike, (heeferɓe ɓen) fellita won´de kamɓe ɓe fennaama, ballal amen ngal ara e maɓɓe; min daɗnda on mo min muuyi, lepte amen ɗen ruttetaake gaayi e yimɓe bonɓe ɓen.

12:111.t: Gooŋɗii wonii e fillayeeje maɓɓe ɗin tasakuyye wonan`de joomiraaɓe haqqillaaji ɓen. Nde wonaani yewtere fekidaande. Ko woni, ko nde gooŋɗinnde ɗen adinooɗe nde, e fensitunde kala huunde, e peewal e yurmeende wonan´de yimɓe gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

13:1.t: Alif, Laam, Miim, Raa. Ɗee ko aayeeje deftere nden; jippinaande nden e maaɗa immorde ka Joomi maa ko goonga; kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓen ɓe ngooŋɗintaa.

13:2.t: Ko Alla woni ɓamtuɗo kammuuli ɗin doose ɗe on nji'ataa. refti O fotondiri ka dow 'Arshi, O elti naange ngeen e lewru ndun: kala majji no doga haa e lajal innaangal. Hino toppitoo fiyaakuuji ɗin, Homo fensita aayeeje ɗeen belejo'o on njanante kawwroygol e Joomi mon.

13:3.t: Ko Kaŋko woni fontuɗo leydi ndin, O waɗi e majji pelle e caatli. E kala (noone) e dimɗe, o waɗi e majje noone ɗiɗi resindirayɗi. Homo suddira jemma on ñalawma on. Wonii e ɗuum, maandeeji wonan`de yimɓe miijitotooɓe.

13:4.t: Hino ka leydi tummbe ɓadondirɗe, e gese 'inabu, e remuruuji, e tamarooje dukkinɗe e ɗe wonaa ɗukkinɗe, heɗe yarniree ndiyam ngootam, Miɗen ɓurna yoga majji dow yoga ka dakamme. Wonii e ɗuum, maandeeji wonan´de yimɓe haqqilooɓe.

13:5.t: Si a ŋalɗay, -haawete-haray ko konngol maɓɓe ngol jojji ŋalɗude:-haawniinde- "Eyoo si men wontii mbulmbuldi, mene men wontat e tagoore hesre?" Ko ɓeen ngoni yedduɓe Joomi mun ɓen, ko ɓeen tonngoytee ka daaɗe mun, ko ɓen kadi ngoni yimɓe Yiite; kamɓe ko ɓe luttooɓe e magge.

13:6.t: Heɓe hawjirane bone on ado moƴƴere nden. Gooŋɗii wulike ado maɓɓe [lepte] yeruuje majje. Pellet, Joomi maa ko Jom-haforanal wonan`de yimɓe ɓeen, e tooñe maɓɓe ɗeen. Pellet kadi Joomi maa, ko cɗttuɗo lepte.

13:7.t: Ɓeen heefereɓe no wi'a: "Ko haɗno maande jippiniree e makko immorde ka Joomi makko?" Anndu ko an ko a jertinoowo, hino woodani yimɓe kala pewnoowo.

13:8.t: Alla no anndi ko roondotoo kala deyel, e ko renngaaji ɗin ustata e ko ɗi ɓeydata. Kala huunde ka makko, ko eɓɓaa-ɗum.

13:9.t: gannduɗo k owirniiɗi e feeñuɗi, mawɗo, toownitiiɗo.

13:10.t: Hino fota [ka makko ganndugol] oon cuuɗuɗo konngol e mooɗon, e on peññinɗo ngol, on cuuɗiratɗo jemma, e on jaltiniroowo ñalawma.

13:11.t: Hino woodani mo lomtondirooɓe yeeso makko e ɓaawo makko, heɓe ndeenira mo yamiroore Alla. Pellet Alla waylataa ko woni e yimɓe, haa ɓe mbayla ko woni kon e maɓɓe. Si Alla faandanike yimɓe bone, alaa yiltoowo mo. Alanaa ɓe gaanin makko giɗo-heftoowo.

13:12.t: Ko Kaŋko woni kollirayɗo on maƴe ɗen kulul [ɗe] e tamƴinagol [toɓo]; O fuɗɗa ɗeen duule tedduɗe.

13:13.t: Digge ɗeen no senina mo yettugol mo, e maleykaaji ɓen, immorde e kulol makko. o wurta parñite ɗen, O meminira ɗe on mo o muuyi. Kamɓe heɓe wennja fii Alla, Kaŋko non ko O saɗtuɗo nanngal.

13:14.t: Hino woodani oo noddaandu goonga! Ɗiin ɗi ɓe noddata ko woori Mo, ɗi jaabotaako ɓe e huunde; si wanaa wano fontuɗo newe mun e ndiyam fii yo ɗam yotto hunnduko makko, kono ɗam wonaani joottotoo-ɗam kon (hunnduko). Noddaandu heefereɓe ɓen wonaani si wonaa e majjere.

13:15.t: Ko Alla woni ko sujjannta, denndaangal ko woni ka kammuuji e la leydi, ɗoftaare e waawneede, e ɗowdiiji maɓɓe, bimmbi e kiikiiɗe.

13:16.t: Maaku: "Ko hommbo jeyi kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndin?" Maaku: "Ko Alla". Maaku: "E on njogiti gaanin makko, keediiɗi ɗi mbaawanaa ko'e majji nafa wanaa lorra?" Maaku: "Hara bumɗo e ji'iiwo no fota? Kaa hara niɓe ɗen fotay e ndaygu ngu? Kaa ɓe waɗan Alla kafidiiɓe tagirɓe wano tagoore makko nde, tagoore nde nanndari ɓe? Maaku: "Ko Alla woni takɗo kala huunde, ko Kaŋko woni bajjo, poolɗo".

13:17.t: O jippinirii ka kammu ndiyam, ɗam ili e jooli=caatli =emmbere majjam. Ilol ngol roondii ngufo hummbu-ngo. No e kon ko ɓe kuɓɓata yiite e mun fii ɗaɓɓu ɗaɓɓugol cuɗaari maa nafa-hoy, ngufo sugu mun. Ko wano nii Alla waɗirta misal goonga e fenannde. Si ko ngufo ngon, ngo yahray ɓeeɓugol, ammaa ko nafata yimɓe ɓeen kon, ɗum ñiiɓa ka leydi. Ko wano nii Alla waɗirta yeruuji ɗiin.

13:18.t: Hino woodani ɓeen nootiiɓe Joomi mun moƴƴere. Ɓeen ɓe nootaaki Mo, sinno woodaniino ɓe denndaangal ko woni kon ka leydi, e yeru mun won´dude e mu'un, ɓe soktorayno(coottorto) ɗum. Ɓeen ɗon, no woodani ɓe bonɗum hasboore, jaaƴorde maɓɓe nden ko Jahannama. Nge bonii ndaɗɗundi.

13:19.t: E ko on gannduɗo won´de ko jippinaa ko e maaɗa immorde ka Joomi maa ko goonga, wa'ata wa on ɓumɗo? Anndu ko waajitotoo, ko joomiraaɓe-haqqillaaji ɓeen,

13:20.t: Ɓeen huuɓnooɓe ahadi Alla ndiin, ɓe pirtataa ahodal(hoolaare).

13:21.t: e ɓeen jokkooɓe ɗuum ko Alla yamiri yo jokke, heɓe kula Joomi maɓɓe, heɓe kula bon´de hasboore,

13:22.t: Ɓeen muññoriiɓe ɗaɓɓugol yarluyee Joomi maɓɓe, ɓe ñiiɓni julde, ɓe nafqii e kon ko min arsiki ɓe, gunndoo e kene, heɓe duñira moƴƴere ndeen bone on. Ɓeen ɗoon, no woodani ɓe battane galle,

13:23.t: Aljannaaji ñiiɓal, heɓe naata ɗi, e ɓeen moƴƴuɓe e baabiraaɓe maɓɓe ɓeen, e rewɓe maɓɓe ɓen, e geyngolji=ɓesnguuji =maɓɓe ɗin. Hara Maleykaaji ɗi hino naatirana ɓe kala damal:

13:24.t: "Kisal wonii e mo'on, sabu muñal mon ngal. battane galle ɗeen moƴƴii".

13:25.t: Ɓeen (non) firtooɓe ahadi Alla ndin ɓaawo piɓugol ndi, heɓe taƴoo e ko Alla yamiri kon yo jokke, heɓe mbonna ka leydi, ɓee ɗoo, hino woodani ɓe kuɗdi, hino woodani ɓe kadi bonɗum galle.

13:26.t: Alla no yaññana arsike on mo o muuyi, Himo ɓittina. heɓe mbeltora nguurndam aduna, nguurndam aduna non wonaani ka laakara, si wanaa dakamme-hoy.

13:27.t: Ɓeen yedduɓe no mbi'a: "Ko haɗno aaya jippinee e makko immorde ka Joomi makko?" Maaku: "Alla majjinat tun mo o muuyi, O fewna e makko on tuubuɗo-ruttii"

13:28.t: Ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe, ɓe ɓerɗe mun deeƴirta jantagol Alla. Ngandee ko jaŋtagol Alla ngol ɓerɗe ɗeen ndeeƴirta.

13:29.t: Ɓeen gooŋɗiiɓe ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe, welo-welo woodaniiɓe e moƴƴude ruttorde.

13:30.t: Ko wano nii min nulir-maa e mofte - gooŋɗii mofte goo yawtiino ado majje - fii yo a janngan ɓe nden nde min wahayini e maaɗa, kono heɓe yedda Yurmeteeɗo on. maaku: "Ko Kaŋko woni Joomi am. deweteeɗo alaa si wanaa Kaŋko. Ko e makko mi fawii, ko ka makko kadi woni ruttorde am".

13:31.t: Sinno janngeteende naɓirano pelle ɗe, maa leydi ndin seekiraa sabu mayre, maa nde wowliniraa maayɓe ɓen (harayno ko ndee ɗoo). Ko woni, ko Alla woodani fiyaaku on fow. E gooŋɗinɓe ɓen nganndaanii won´de, sinno Alla muuyuno, o fewnatna denndaangal yimɓe ɓen? Masiibo seeraani no heɓira yedduɓe ɓeen ko ɓe paggitii kon, maa [ngon masiibo] yana takko galle maɓɓe nden haa fodoore Alla nden ara. Pellet Alla firtataa fodoore.

13:32.t: Goŋɗii nulaaɓe njalkitanoo ma ado maaɗa. mi muññanii ɓen yedduɓe, refti Mi nanngi ɓe. Ko honno lepte am ɗen ngonirnoo!

13:33.t: E hara ko oon dariiɗo e kala woŋkii ko ki faggitii kon [ɓuri hanndude e dewal?...] Ɓe mbaɗanii Alla kafidii- ɗi. Maaku: "Innee-ɗi" Kaa on humpitay mo ko o ngnndaa ka leydi? Kaa ko ko [tun] e konngol? Ko woni, heeferɓe ɓeen cuɗinanaa ma pewje maɓɓe ɗeen, ɓe sakkaa(pala) e laawol ngol. Kala mo Alla majjini, peewnoowo alanaa mo.

13:34.t: Hino woodani ɓe lepte ka nguurndam aduna. Pellet ko lepte laakara ɗen ɓuri sattude, alanaa ɓe daɗndoowo (ɓe) e Alla.

13:35.t: Sugu Aljanna mo gooŋɗuɓe ɓeen fodaa on: Caati no ila ley makko; ñaamri makko ɗi ko duumiiɗum, e ɗowdi makko ndin. Ɗuum ko battane ɓen gooŋɗuɓe, battane heeferbe non ko Yiite.

13:36.t: Ɓeen ɓe mnn okki deftere ndeen, heɓe mbeltora ɗuum ko jippinaa e maaɗa. No e leƴƴi kon ɓen yeddooɓe yoga mayre. Maaku: "nganndee ko yamiraa-mi, ko nde reway-mi Alla hara mi sirkanaali mo. Ko e makko nodday-mi, ko ka makko kadi woni ruttorde am".

13:37.t: Ko wano nii min njippiniri nde ñaawoore (e haala) aarabu. Pellet si a jokkii mbeleeɗe maɓɓe ɗen ɓaawo nde ganndal ari e maa, alanaa ma gaanin Alla immorde e giɗo, wanaa daɗndoowo.

13:38.t: Gooŋɗii min nulii nulaaɓe ado maa, min waɗani ɓe genndiraaɓe e geyngol. Haananaa Nulaaɗo nde o addata Aaya, si wanaa e sakkitoore Alla. Hino woodani kala lajal caati.(happu binndaɗo)

13:39.t: Alla no meha (momta)ko Muuyi o tabatina (ko o wela), ko ka makko yumma defte ɗeen woni.

13:40.t: Si minn kolliima yogo e ko min fodi ɓe, maa Mmin hunnu maa (ado mun), anndu ko fawi maa ko yottingol, haasboore nde ko minen fawtii.

13:41.t: E ɓee nji'aani won´de miɗen ngara e leydi ndin, min ustira ndi ka seraaji mayri? Alla no ñaawa, alaa wurtinoowo ñaawoore makko nden, ko o yacciiɗo (jaawɗo)ñaawoore.

13:42.t: Gooŋɗii ɓen adinooɓe ɓe pewjaniino (Annabaaɓe maɓɓe); ko Alla non pewje ɗeen fow keeranii. Homo anndi kala woŋkii faggitotoo. Arma heefereɓe ɓeen ngannda ko hommbo battane galle (moƴƴe) woodani.

13:43.t: Heeferɓe ɓeen heɓeo mbi'a: "wonaa a nulaaɗo". Maaku: "Alla yonii seedee hakkunde am e mon, e ɓen jogitiiɓe ganndal deftere ndeen".

14:1.t: Alif, Laam, Raa. (Ndee ko) deftere nde min njppini e maaɗa, fii yo yaltinir yimɓe ɓeen e niɓe faade e annoora, e duŋayee Joomi maɓɓe, haa e laawol pooluɗo, jettiniiɗo.

14:2.t: Alla, oon oo woodani kala ko woni kammuuli e ka leydi. Bone woodani yedduɓe ɓeen, immorde e lepte cattuɗe.

14:3.t: Ɓeen ɓurdinooɓe nguurndam aduna ɗam e dow laakara, ɓe paddoo e laawol Alla ngol, ɓe ɗaɓɓana ngol ooñorgal. Ɓeen ɗoon ngonii e majjere woɗɗunde.

14:4.t: Min nuliraali nulaaɗo (woo), si wanaa e ɗemngal yimɓe makko ɓeen, fii no o ɓannginirana ɓe. Alla no majjina on mo muuyi, o fewna on Mo o muuyi. Ko Kaŋko woni pooluɗo, ñeeñuɗo.

14:5.t: Gooŋɗii min nulirii Muusaa aayeeje amen ɗen [wi'ugol Mo]: "Yaltin yimɓe maa ɓen e niɓe faade e annoora, nganndintinaa ɓe ñalɗi Alla ɗiin". Pellet hino e ɗuum, tasakuyeeji kala munyoowo, jettoowo (dokke).

14:6.t: (Jaŋto) tuma nde Muusaa maakannoo yimɓe makko ɓen: "ciftoree dokke Alla on e mooɗon, tuma o daɗndunoo on e yimɓe Fir'awna ɓe no defaynoo on lepte bon´ɗe. Heɓe kirsa ɓiɗɓe mon (worɓe) ɓe ngacca (ɓiɗɓe) mon rewɓe. Wonii e ɗuum mo'on, jarrabuyee mawɗo immorde ka Joomi mon",

14:7.t: e tuma nde Joomi maa anndinnoo: "Pellet si on njettii, ma mi ɓeydan on. Si on njeddii non, pellet lepte am ɗeen ko caɗtuɗe".

14:8.t: Muusaa maaki: "Si on njeddii, onon e wonɓe ka leydi ɓen fow, [ngnndon] pellet Alla ko Galo jettiniiɗo".

14:9.t: E kumpite ɓeen adinooɓe on araani on, yimɓe Nuuhu e Aadi, e Samuuda e ɓeen wonunooɓe ɓaawo maɓ- ɓe, anndaa ɓe si wanaa Alla? Nulaaɓe maɓɓe ɓen addanii ɓe ɓanngannduyeeji, ɓe ndutti juuɗe maɓɓe ɗeen ka kunndule maɓɓe, ɓe mbii: "minen min yed- dii ko nulidaɗon e mun kon, minen, miɗen e cikkitii e ko noddoton men e mun sikkitiiɓe".

14:10.t: Nulaaɓe maɓɓe ɓeen maaki: "E hara sikke no e fii Alla, puɗɗuɗo kammuuli ɗiin e leydi ndin, homo nodda on fii yo O haforan on yoga e bakkatuuji mon, homo neeɓnana on haa e lajal innaangal?" Ɓe mbi'i: "On ngonaani si wanaa ɓanndinke yeru amen. Hoɗon faandii nde sakkotoɗon(falotodon) men e kon ko baabiraaɓe amen ndewatnoo. ngaddanee amen hujja ɓannguɗo".

14:11.t: Nulaaɓe maɓɓe ɓen maakani ɓe: "[Ko goonga], min ngonaani si wanaa ɓanndiŋkooɓe yeru mon, kono Alla no moƴƴoo e mo o muuyi e jeyaaɓe makko ɓeen. Laatanaaki min nde min ngaddana on hujja, si wanaa e duŋayee Alla. Ko e Alla gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen pawotoo.

14:12.t: Ko haɗata men nde pawotoo e Alla, gooŋɗii o fewnii min (e) laawi amen? Ma min muñño e kon ko lorroton men. Ko e Alla gooŋɗinɓe ɓen pawotoo".
