14:13.t: Ɓeen yedduɓe (kadi) mbi'ani nulaaɓe mun ɓen: "Ma min njaltin on ka leydi amen, maa nduttoɗon e diina amen". Joomi maɓɓe wahayini e maɓɓe: "Ma min kalku tooñuɓe ɓeen,

14:14.t: Ma lin koɗnu on e leydi ndin ɓaawo maɓɓe. Ɗuum ko wonan´de on kulɗo daroyagol yeeso Am, o huli kammbaa am on".(sapporam.)

14:15.t: Ɓe ɗaɓɓi uddita, sooyi kala dunndaranke ƴagguɗo.

14:16.t: Jahannama no yesso makko, himo yarniree ndiyam mbordi ƴiiƴiiri,

14:17.t: homo wooɓa ɗam, e ɗeɓataa ɓennugol ɗam. maayde ndeen ardana mo e kala nokku, kono o wonaani maayoowo. Hara no yeeso makko lepte cattuɗe.

14:18.t: Ko woni sifa ɓeen yedduɓe Joomi mun, kuuɗe maɓɓe ɗen, ko wano ndoondi ndi henndu tiiɗi e mun, e ñalaande bippoore. Ɓe hettoytaa huunde e ko ɓe paggitinoo. Ko ɗuum woni majjere wonɗɗunde.

14:19.t: E a yi'aani Alla tagirii kammuuli ɗiin e leydi ndiin goonga? Si o muuyii, o ittay on o adda tagoore hesre.

14:21.t: Ɓe peeñana Alla ɓe denndaangal. Lo'uɓe ɓen mbi'ana townitinooɓe ɓen: "Minen min ngonanno on jokkuɓe. Taw si on nduncanat amen e lepte Alla ɗen goɗɗum?" Ɓen mbi'a: "Sinno Alla fewnuno amen, men pewnatno on. Hino fota e amen, si en ɗenƴi maa si en muññi; daɗirde alanaa en".

14:22.t: Seytaane wi'a, tuma fiyaaku on ñaawaa: "Pellet Alla fodiino on fodoore goonga; mi podanli on mi lunndii on. Alanaa kam e mo'on immorde e hujja, si wanaa mi nodii on, on njaabike kam. Wata on felam; pelee ko'e mon. Wanaa mi faabotooɗo on; ngoanaa on faabotooɓe kam. Mi yeddii ko kafidunoɗon mi kon [e Alla] ado (hannde)". Pellet, tooñooɓe ɓeen, hino woodani ɓe lepte muusɗe.

14:23.t: Gooŋɗinɓe ngolli moƴƴuɗi ɓen naatnaa e Aljannaaji, caatli hino ila ley majji, ko ɓe duumorayɓe ton e duŋayee Joomi maɓɓe. Hiwraandu maɓɓe ndun ton ko: "Salaam" (Kisiyee).

14:24.t: E a yi'aani ko honno Alla piyiri misal konngol laaɓungol, ko wano leggal welngal, binndeere maggal ko tabituɗi, caalɗi maggal no ka weeyo?

14:25.t: Hangal okkira dimɗe maggal on tuma kala, e duŋayee Joomi maggal. Alla no piyana yimɓe ɓen mise, belejo'o ɓe waajitoto.

14:26.t: Ko woni kadi misal konngol coɓungol, ko wano leggal soɓungal, irtaangal ka hoore-leydi, ngal alanaa ɗuum ñiiɓirde.

14:27.t: Alla no tabintinira gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen konngol tabitungol, ka nguurandam aduna e ka laakara. Alla no majjina tooñooɓe ɓeen. Alla no waɗa ko o muuyi.

14:28.t: E a tinaali ɓeen waɗtitirɓe dokke Alla ɗin keeferaaku, ɓe mbeerni yimɓe ɓen galle halkaare.

14:29.t: Jahannama, heɓe naata nge, nge bonii ñiiɓirde!

14:30.t: Ɓe mbaɗani Alla yerondiraaɗi fii yo ɓe majjin (yimɓe ɓen) e laawol Alla ngol. Maaku: "ndakmitee, pellet ruttorde mon ndeen ko ka Yiite".

14:31.t: Maakan jeyaaɓe am ngooŋɗinɓe ɓeen, yo ɓe ñinnu juulde ɓe wintoo e kon ko Men arsiki ɓe gunndoo e kene, ado nde arata ɓe ñalaande nde njeeygu alaa e mun wanaa weldigal.

14:32.t: Ko Alla woni takɗo kammuuli ɗin e leydi, O jippiniri ka kammu ndiyam; o yaltiniri ɗam dimɗe arsike wonan´de on. o eltirani on laaɗe ɗen, fii yo ɗe ndogir ka maayo e duŋayee makko. O eltani on kadi caatlɗi ɗin.

14:33.t: O eltani on naange ngeen e lewru nduun dogooji ɗiɗi. O eltani on jemma on e ñalawma on.

14:34.t: O okki on e kala ko toriɗon mo. Si on linmii neemaaji Alla ɗiin, on moftataaɗi. Pellet neɗɗaŋke oon ko kee wɗo tooñe, keewuɗo jeddugol.

14:35.t: (Jaŋto) kadi tuma nde Ibraahiima maakunoo: "Joomi am, waɗu ndee saare hooliinde, ndaɗndaa kam e ɓiɗɓe am ɓen nde men ndewata sanamuuji.

14:36.t: Joomi am, kañji (sanamuuji ɗiin), ɗi majjinii ko ɗuuɗi e yimɓe ɓen. Kala jokkuɗo kam, oon ɗoon ko jeyidaaɗo e am. Kala noon jedduɗo kam, haray Aan ko A jaafotooɗo, jurmotooɗo.

14:37.t: Joomi amen, min mi hoɗinii yoga e ɓiɗɓe am ɓen e aynde nde wonaa remotoonde, ka Suudu Maa Hormanteeru, - Joomi amen - fii yo ɓe ñiiɓnu juulde. Waɗ ɓerɗe yimɓe ɓen no yiiloo e maɓɓe, arsikaaɓe dimɗe, belaje'o ɓe njetta.

14:38.t: Joomi amen, pellet, Aan haɗa anndi ko min cuuɗi e ko min peññini: hay huunde suuɗotaako Alla ka leydi wonaa ka kammu.

14:39.t: Jettooje ngoodanii Alla, oon jedduɗuɗo kam e hoore mawngu, Ismaa'iila e Ishaaqa. Pellet, Joomi am ko nanoowo du'aa.

14:40.t: Joomi am, waɗan ñiiɓnoowo juulde e ɓeynugol am ngol. Joomi amen, jaɓ toraare am nden.

14:41.t: Joomi amen, haforanam min e jipnaaɓe am ɓeen e gooŋɗimɓe ɓen, ñalnde ñaawoore nden dorotoo".

14:42.t: Wata sikku Alla ko belsindiiɗo e ko tooñooɓe ɓeen ngollata. Anndu ko o neeɓniranta ɓe, ko haa e ñalaande nde gite saafotoo e mun.

14:43.t: Ko ɓe heñiiɓe, ŋallimɓe ko'e maɓɓe, ndaarɗe maɓɓe ɗeen yiltotaako e maɓɓe, ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗeen ko jeewɗe.

14:44.t: Jeertniri yimɓe ɓen ñalaande nde lepte ɗeen arata ɓe, tooñɓe ɓeen mi'a: "Joomi amen, neeɓnan amen haa lajal ɓaɗiingal, min nootoo noddaanndu Maa, min njokka Nulaaɓe ɓeen". E on laatanooki on ngoondiino ado (hannde) alanaa on iwugol (tion)?

14:45.t: Koɗɗɗon e koɗorli ɓeen tooñuɓe ko'e mun. Ɓanngani on ko honno min mbaɗnoo ɓe, Men piyani on yeruuji

14:46.t: Gooŋɗii ɓe pewjii feere maɓɓe nden. Ko ta Alla feere maɓɓe ndeen woni, hay si feere maɓɓe nden ittayno (ɗoofatno) pelle ɗeen.

14:47.t: Wata a sikku Alla ko luunndotooɗo fodoore makko (nde O fodi) nulaaɓe makko ɓeen. Pellet, Alla ko poolɗo, Jom yottagol,

14:48.t: ñalnde leydi ndiin waɗtitirtee leydi goo, e kammuuli ɗiin, ɓe feeñana Alla, Bajjo oon, poolɗo On.

14:49.t: A yi'ay bonɓe ɓeen nden ñalnde, ko jokkindiraaɓe e kolombooje.

14:50.t: Dolokkaaji maɓɓe ɗiin ko mbullam feewnira, Yiite ngeen no sudda geece maɓɓe ɗeen.

14:51.t: Fii yo Alla yoɓitu kala woŋkii ko ko faggitii. Pellet, Alla ko jaawuɗo hasboore.

14:52.t: Ndee (Alqur'aanaare) ko yottinoore yimɓe ɓeen fii yo ɓe waajitornde, e yooɓe nganndu kadi, won´de Kaŋko ko o deweteeɗo Gooto, e fii yo joomiraaɓe haqqillaaji ɓren waajitor.

15:1.t: Alif, Laam, Raa. ɗeen ko aayeeje deftere e janngeteende ɓannginnde.

15:2.t: Na waawi heeferɓe ɓen njeloyto sinno ɓe laatino juulɓe.

15:3.t: Accu ɓe, ɓe ñaama ɓe dakmitoo, yela soklina ɓe; arma ɓe nganndoya.

15:4.t: Min kalkaani saare woo, si wanaa hara no woodani nde happu ganndaaɗo.

15:5.t: Mofte woo adotaako lajal mun, ɓe neeɓnantaake kadi.

15:6.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Ko aan yo mo deftere nden jippinaa e mun, an ko a peetuɗo.

15:7.t: Ko haɗno addanaa men maleyikaaji si a laatike gooŋɗuɗo?"

15:8.t: Min njippinirtaa maleykaaji si wonaa fii goonga; ɓe wonataa ontuma, neeɓnanteeɓe.

15:9.t: Minen min njippinii deftere nden, minen kadi ko min reenooɓe nde.

15:10.t: Gooŋɗii min nuliino ado maa, e leƴƴi adinooɓe.

15:11.t: Nulaaɗo (woo) araani e maɓɓe si wonaa ɓe njalkitay mo.

15:12.t: Ko wano nii min naadiri ɗum e ɓerɗe bonɓe ɓeen.

15:13.t: Ɓe ngooŋɗintaa nde, gooŋɗii sunna aramɓe ɓen yawtiino.

15:14.t: Hay si minn udditanno ɓe damal ka kammu, ɓe mbaɗtini hiɓe ƴawra heen.

15:15.t: ɓe mbi'ayno: "nganndee gite amen ɗeen kippa. Wurin ko min yimɓe wilaaɓe".

15:16.t: Gooŋɗii min mbaɗii ka kammu koode, min cuɗirani ɗe ndaarooɓe.

15:17.t: Min ndeeni mbo e kala seytaane diiwaaɗo.

15:18.t: Si wonaa oon guujjuɗo nanɗe, o jokkintina hoodere-fiɗaynnde jalɓunde.

15:19.t: Leydi ndin, min weerti ndi min werlii e mayri pelle, min puuɗini e mayri kala huunde eɓɓaande.

15:20.t: Min mbaɗani on e mayri wuurirɗe, e ɓeen ɓe on laatanooki arsikooɓe ɗum.

15:21.t: Huunde alaa si wanaa marga mun ko ka amen, min njippintaa ɗuum si wanaa e eɓɓoore anndaande.

15:22.t: Min ngurti keneeli ɗiin hawrondirooji e duule; min njippiniri ka kammu ndiyam min njarniri on ɗaam, wonaa onon mari ɗam.

15:23.t: Ko minen kadi ngoni ko wuurnata min mbara, ko minen ngoni ronooɓe ɓeen.

15:24.t: Gooŋɗii min nganndii adiiɓe e mon ɓen Gooŋɗii min nganndii sakkitiiɓe ɓen.

15:25.t: Pellet, Joomi maa, ko Kaŋko mooɓoyta ɓe. Kaŋko ko o ñeeño, gannduɗo.

15:26.t: Gooŋɗii min tagii neɗɗaŋke on e senƴayngal, e (cenlatngal) loopal-ɓalewal ɓowrungal.

15:27.t: E jinnaaji ɗin, min tagiri ndu ko adii, e yiite ooyunge.

15:28.t: Jaŋto tuma nde Joomi maa daalannoo maleykaji'en: "min ko Mi tagiroowo ɓanndiŋke immorde e senƴayngal, e loopal-ɓalewal ɓowrungal

15:29.t: si mi fotndiii mo, mi wuttii e makko ruuhu am on, haray suuyanee mo ko on sujjuɓe".

15:31.t: si wonaa ibliisa, o salii tawdeede e sujjooɓe ɓen.

15:32.t: O daali: "eey ma ibliisa, e ko heɓ maa a laatodaaki e sujjuɓe ɓeen?"

15:33.t: O wi'i: "mi wonatah sujjanoowo ɓanndinke mo taguɗaa immorde e senƴayngal, e loopal-ɓalewal ɓowrungal".

15:34.t: O daali: "Yaltu toon, aan o ko a diiwaaɗo,

15:35.t: pellet, kuddi fawike e ma haa ñande njoɓdi diina".

15:36.t: O wi'i : "joomi am, neeɓnitanam haa ñande ndeɓe immintintee".

15:37.t: O daali:"Aa,ko a jeyaaɗo e neeɓnitanteeɓe ɓen.

15:39.t: O wi'i: "Joomi am, sabu ko mbewnuɗaa mi kon, ma mi cuɗinan ɓe ka leydi, ma mi bewnu ɓe fow maɓɓe,

15:40.t: si wanaa jeyaaɓe maa, laɓɓinaaɓe ɓen e maɓɓe".

15:41.t: O daali: "nogol ɗoo ko laawol ka am poocciingol.

15:42.t: Pellet, jeyaaɓe am ɓen, a alanaa ɓe cemmbe, si wonaa ɓeen bewɓe jokkuɓe ma.

15:43.t: Pellet Jahannama on wonii fodoore maɓɓe ɓe fof.

15:44.t: Henge mari dame jeeɗiɗi; damal kala e majje no mari geɗal senndaangal.

15:45.t: Pellet, gooŋɗuɓe ɓeen wonii e aljannaaji e ɓulli.

15:46.t: "Naatiree ɗi e kisial, ko on hooliiɓe".

15:47.t: Min ɗoofi kala ko woni e ɓerɗe maɓɓe e konnaagu(cokotaagal): ɓe ngonti musiɗɓe fewtondirɓe e danɗe.

15:48.t: Tampere heɓataa ɓe toon,, ɓe ngonah kadi yaltintee ɓe toon.

15:49.t: Yeetito jeyaaɓe am ɓen, ko miin woni jaafotooɗo, jurmtooɗo On

15:50.t: e wonnde lepte am ɗeen, ko ɗen ngoni lepte muusɗe ɗen.

15:51.t: haɓru ɓe kadi fii hoɓɓe Ibraahiima ɓeen,

15:52.t: Tuma ɓe naatunoo ka makko ɓe mbi'i: "Salaam (Kisiyee mon)". O maaki: "minen ko min ɗenƴii ɓe on".

15:53.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Wota a faay, minen miɗen mbeltinirma [ɓiɗɗo] gorko ganndo".

15:54.t: O maaki: "E on mbeltiniratkam [ɗuum] e hoore ko mi naywi ko? E ko mbeltinirton mi?"

15:55.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "min mbeltininirii ma goonga, wota a jeye e taƴiiɓe ɓeen".

15:56.t: O maaki: "Ko hommbo taƴotoo e yurmeende Joomi mun nden, si wonaa majjuɓe ɓeen?"

15:57.t: O maaki: "Ko woni fii mon, onon ɓee imminaaɓe?"(nuleeɓe.)

15:58.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "minen min nulaa ko e yimɓe bonɓe,

15:59.t: si wonaa ɓeynguure Luuti nde, pellet ko min daɗndooɓe ɓe denndaangal,

15:60.t: si wonaa debbo makko on". min koddirii oon ɗon ko jeyaaɗo e halketeeɓe ɓen.

15:61.t: Nde imminaaɓe ɓen ngaruno ka ɓeynguure Luuti,

15:62.t: O maaki: "onon ko on yimɓe faaytaa ɓe".

15:63.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Wurin min ngaddanii ma ko ɓe ngonnoo e sikkitaade kon.

15:64.t: Min ngaddanii ma goonga kan, pellet ko min goonŋɗuɓe.

15:65.t: Yahdu e ɓeynguure maa ndeen ka taƴitannde jem- ma, jokkaa ɓaawo maɓɓe; hara gooto e mo'on yeƴƴitaaki, ndewon ka njamiraɗon".

15:66.t: Min anndini mo on fiyaaku: wonn´de wattannde ɓee ɗoo, ko taƴeteeɗum ka subaka.

15:67.t: Yimɓe saare nden ngri heɓe mbeltoro.

15:68.t: O maaki: "ɓee ɗoo ko hoɓɓe am, wata on wirtam.(cuhritam).

15:70.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "e min kaɗaali ma [weernugol] tagoore nden?"

15:71.t: O maaki: "ɓee ɗoo ko jiwɓe am, si wonii ko on waɗooɓe [goɗɗum]!"

15:72.t: Mi woondirii nguurndam maa! ɓe ngonii e siwrugol maɓɓe heɓe mbeemi.

15:73.t: Haacaango ngoon nanngiri ɓe ka puɗal,

15:74.t: Min mbɗtiniri dow mayre on ley mayre, min saaƴini(toɓri) e maɓɓe kaaƴe iwruɗe e loope juɗaaɗe.

15:75.t: Wonii e ɗuum, maandeeji wonan´de ɓen teskotooɓe.

15:76.t: Pellet, ɗeen [ca'e] no e jurol(bolol) ñiiɓngol.

15:77.t: Wonii e ɗuum, maande wonan´de ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe.

15:78.t: Gooŋɗii yimɓe fitaare(sutu) ɓeen [kadi] ko tooñɓe.

15:79.t: Min yoɓtii e maɓɓe. Pellet ɗeen [ca'e] ɗiɗi ngonii e laawol ɓanngungol.

15:80.t: Gooŋɗi yimɓe (aynde) Hijiri nden njeddii nulaaɓe ɓeen.

15:81.t: Min ngaddani ɓe aayeeje amen ɗen, ɓe laatii ɗuurniiɓe ɗe.

15:82.t: Hari heɓe lesoynoo e pelle ɗeen cuuɗi, ko ɓe hooliiɓe.

15:83.t: Haacaango ngoon nanngi ɓe ka subaka.

15:84.t: Nafaaniɓe ɗuum ko ɓe laatinoo heɓe paggitoo.

15:85.t: Min tagiraani kammuuli ɗiin e leydi ndin, e ko woni hakkunde majji kon, si wonaa e goonga. Pellet, darngal ngal ko arayngal! yaafora jaafaggol labaangol.

15:86.t: Tabitii ko Joomi maa woni Takɗo, gannduɗo.

15:87.t: Gooŋɗii min okkii ma jeeɗiɗi ummorde ɗimmitaa-ngol, e Alqur'aanaare mawnde nden.

15:88.t: Wata a ɓamtu gite maa ɗen e neemaaji ɗi lin dakmiti ɓe e mum en, wata a sunu e maɓɓe, lesɗin becce maa ɗen gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

15:90.t: Wano min njppinirnoo e senndooɓe [defte Alla] ɓen [lepte],

15:92.t: Mi wooɗndirii Joomi maa! Ma min laɓndoyo ɓe fof maɓɓe.

15:93.t: fii ko ɓe ngonnoo e huuwude.(gollude).

15:94.t: Feññin ko njamira-ɗaa kon, ɗuurno-ɗaa sirkooɓe ɓeen.

15:95.t: minen min njonii ma e ɓen jalkitooɓe.

15:96.t: Ɓeen waɗdooɓe e Alla deweteeɗo goo. arma ka ɓe ngannda.

15:97.t: Gooŋɗii miɗen nganndi won´de bernde maa nde na ɓiɗtora ko ɓe kaalata kon.

15:98.t: Subbhinor yettugol Joomi maa, laato-daa e sujjooɓe ɓee.

15:99.t: ndewaa Joomi haa yananeede (maayde) ara e maa.

16:1.t: Yamiroore Alla nde ari wota on hawjan nde. senaaree woodanii mo! o toowii e ko ɓe cirkata.ko.

16:2.t: Homo jippinira maleykaaji ɗi e wayhu on e yamiroore makko, dow mo muuyi e jeyaaɓe makko ɓeen, won´de : "Jertinree wiide deweteeɗo alaa si wonaa min. Kulee kam".

16:3.t: O tagiri kammuuli ɗiin e leydi ndin goonga. o toowii e ko ɓe sirkoobe cirkata ko.

16:4.t: O tagiri neɗɗaŋke iwde e toɓɓere (maniiyu); jaka yoo kaŋko ko wennjoowo ɓannguɗo.peeñɗo

16:5.t: Neemoraaɗi ɗin, o tagani on ɗi; no e majji nguli nugguki e nafooje. Ko e majji kadi ñaamoton.

16:6.t: Hino woodani on e majji cuɗaari, tuma njofnoton ɗi e tuma oornoton ɗi.

16:7.t: Hiɗi ndoono doŋle mon naɓa e leydi ndi on njotto- tanooko si wanaa e tampere pittaali. Pellet, Joomi mon ko O Yurmeteeɗo Hinnotooɗo.

16:8.t: E pucci, e mbam-pucci, e mbabbi, fii yo on mbaɗɗo ɗi, e cuɗaari. Himo taga kadi ko on nganndaa.

16:9.t: Ko Alla woodani ɓanngingol laawol poocciingol ngol, no e majji ngol feewaani. Si o muuyuno, o fewnat on denndaangal.

16:10.t: Ko Kaŋko woni jippinirɗo ndiyam ka kammu, hino woodani on e majjam njaram, leɗɗe no (yalta) e majjam, ko e majjam kadi oornoton.

16:11.t: Homo fuɗnirana on ɗam aawruuji, nebbanteeje, e tamarooje, e inabuuje, e kala dimɗe.ɓesnoje wonii e ɗuum, tasakuyee wonan´de yimɓe miijitotooɓe.

16:12.t: O eltani on jemma on e ñalawma on; naange ngen e lewru nduun. Koode ɗeen kadi ko eltiraaɗe yamiroore makko. Wonii e ɗuum, tasakuyeeji wonan´de yimɓe haqqilooɓe.

16:13.t: E ko o tagani on kon ka leydi ceertuɗum nooneeji. wonii e ɗuum, tasakuyee wonan´de yimɓe waajitoratɓe.

16:14.t: Ko Kaŋko woni eltanɗo on maayo ngon fii yo on ñaam e maggo teewu keccu, yaltinon e maggo cuɗaari ndi ɓornotoɗon. A yi'ay laaɗe no feƴƴa e maggo, e fii yo on ɗaɓɓu e ɓural makko ngal, belejo'o, on njettat [mo].

16:15.t: O tuti penle ka leydi fii wata ɗe dillidu e mo'on, e caatli, e ɗate, belejo'o on peeway.

16:16.t: e maandeeji [laawi]. Koode ɗen heɓe ɗowora ɗe.

16:17.t: E hara tagoowo on wa'ay wa on tagataa? E on mbaactotaako?

16:18.t: Si on limtii doke Alla ɗe, on moftataa ɗi. Pellet, Alla ko jaafotooɗo, jurmotooɗo.

16:19.t: Alla no anndi ko cuuɗoton e ko peññinton.

16:20.t: Ɗiin ɗi ɓe ndewata ga ni Alla, ɗi tagataa hay huunde, kaŋji tigi ko ɗi tageteeɗi.

16:21.t: Koɗi maayɗi ɗi nguuraani, ɓe so'aa-anndude (ɓetinaani)de ɓe mmintintee.

16:22.t: deweteeɗo mon on ko deweteeɗo gooto. ɓeen ɓe ngooŋɗinaa laakara, ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen ko jedduɗe, ɓen ko townitiiɓe.

16:23.t: Sikke alaa won´de Alla no anndi ko ɓe cuuɗata e ko ɓe peññinta. Kaŋko O yiɗaa townitiiɓe ɓen.

16:24.t: Si ɓe mbianaama : "Ko holɗum Joomi mon jippini?" Ɓe mbi'a: "Ko tinndi adinooɓe!".

16:25.t: Fii yo ɓe ndoondo bakkaatuuji maɓɓe ɗiin fof ñande Darngal, e bakkaatuuji ɓeen ɓe majjinirta ko aldaa e ganndal; nganndee bonii ko ɓe ndonndoytoo.

16:26.t: Gooŋɗii ɓeen adinooɓe ɓe pewjiino, Alla jirbiniri mahdeele maɓɓe ɗeen ka doose. Kippoodi ndin yanti e maɓɓe, lepte ɗen ardirani ɓe nokku ka ɓe so'aa-aanndude(.tinaani.)

16:27.t: Refti ñande darngal, O hoynoyayɓe, O wi'anaɓe: Ko holto kafidaaɗi am ɗiin ɗi haɓiraynoɗon fii mum?" ɓeen okkaaɓe ganndal mbi'a: "Koyeera on hannde e bone on wonii e heeferɓe ɓen".

16:28.t: Ɓeen ɓen maleykaaji ɓen hunnata, tooñuɓe ko'e-mun, ɓe werloo jebbilraare, (ɓe mbia): "min ngoonaa- no gollatnooɓe ko boni!" -"wonaa non woniri, pellet Alla ko nganduɗo ko huuwaynoɗon".(ngollatnɗon.)

16:29.t: Naatiree dame Jahannama ɗen luttugol ton. Nge bonii ñaaƴorde wonan´de townitiiɓe ɓen.

16:30.t: Wi'anee ɓeen gooŋɗuɓe: "Ko holɗuum Joomi mon jippini?" Ɓe mbi'a: "Ko moƴƴere". Hono woodani ɓen moƴƴinɓe aduna ɗoo moƴƴere; pellet ko saare laakara nden ɓuri moƴƴude. nde moƴƴii saare gooŋɗuɓe ɓen.

16:31.t: Aljannaaji duumal, heɓe naati ɗi, caatli no ila ley majji. Hino woodani ɓe toon kala ko ɓe paaletee; ko wano nii Alla yoɓirta gooŋɗuɓe ɓen.

16:32.t: Ɓeen ɓe maleykaaji ɗi mbarata hara ko ɓe laaɓɓe- ɓe mbi'an [ɓen]: "Kisiyee wonii e mon! Naatiree Aljanna on, sabu ko ngollatnoɗon kon".e

16:33.t: Hara [ɓee sirkooɓe fenna] hino habbitii si wonaa nde maleykaaji ɗi ngarata e maɓɓe, maa yami- roore Joomi maa ndeen ara? Ko wano noon ɓen adinooɓe ɓe waɗirnoo. Alla tooñaani ɓe; si ko woni, ko ko'e maɓɓe ɓe wonnoo e tooñuɓe.

16:34.t: Boneeji ɗi ɓe huuwi ɗin memi ɓen, kon ko ɓe njalkitatnoo jippii e maɓɓe.

16:35.t: Ɓeen sirkuɓe mbi'i: "Sinno Alla muuyuno, men ndewataano ga ni makko hay huunde, wonaa minen wanaa baabiraaɓe amen; min karmintaa- no gaanin makko hay huunde". Ko wano non adi- nooɓe ɓeen gerdunoo. taw si no fawiiii nulaaɓe ɓen si wonaa jottingol ɓanngina?

16:36.t: Gooŋɗii min imminii e kala mofte nulaaɗo, won´de ndewee Alla, ngoɗɗitoɗon bewnayɗi ɗin. Hino e maɓɓe on Mo Alla feewni, hino e maɓɓe kadi on mo majjere ndeen jojji e mum. Yiilee ka leydi, ndaaron ko honno battane yeddunooɓe ɓeen wa'unoo.

16:37.t: Si a reerɗii e peewal maɓɓe, [anndu] pellet, Alla feewnataa on mo o majjini, alanaa ɓe kadi wallooɓe.

16:38.t: Ɓe ngooɗndirii Alla haɗtirde gooɗndooje maɓɓe: "Alla immintintaa on maayuɗo". Wanaa non! Ɗuum ko fodoore goonga ka makko, ko woni tan, ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓe nganndaa.

16:39.t: (O immintiniroyay ɓe) fii yo O ɓannginan ɓe ko ɓe luutondiratnoo e mum. e fii yo ɓeen yedduɓe anndu won´de hari ko ɓe jeddunooɓe.

16:40.t: nganndee daalol amen wonan´de huunde, si min faandike nde, min mbianat nde tan: "Laato", nde laatoo.

16:41.t: Ɓeen fernooɓe fii Alla, ɓaawo ɓe tooñaama, ma min hoɗnu ɓe ka aduna (e weerde) moƴƴere. Pellet, ko njoɓdi laakara ndin ɓuri mawnude, si tawno heɓe nganndi.

16:42.t: Ɓeen muññiiɓe, e tuugii e Joomi maɓɓe.

16:43.t: Min nulaani ado maaɗa si wanaa worɓe, min wahayina e maɓɓe. Lanndee yimɓe defte ɓeen si wonii on nganndaa.

16:44.t: (Men nulirii ɓe) ɓanngudi e defte. min njippini e maaɗa janngeteende nden, fii yo a ɓannginan yimɓe ɓeen kon ko jippinaa e maɓɓe, belejo'o kamɓe ɓe miijitoto.

16:45.t: E hara ɓeen fewjuɓe boneeji ɗiin kooli won´de Alla munnirtaa ɓe leydi ndin, maa lepte ɗeen ngardirana ɓe nokku mo ɓe so'aa-anndude,(ɓetinaani).

16:46.t: maa o nanngira ɓe yahdu maɓɓe, ɓe ngonaani laawotooɓe.

16:47.t: Maa O nanngira ɓe e hoore kulol. anndu Joomi mon ko Yurmeteeɗo, jurmotooɗo.

16:48.t: E ɓee njii'aani ko Alla tagi kon e huunde nde ɗowɗe mun yiiltondirta ñaamo e nano, sujjangol Alla, hara ko ɗi jankiniiɗi.

16:49.t: Ko Alla woni ko sujjanta kala ko woni ka kammuuli e ka leydi, immorde e ruugayngel, e maleykaaji ɓen, kamɓe ɓe townitotaako.(mawnakintaako.)

16:50.t: Heɓe kulira Joomi maɓɓe, senngo dow maɓɓe, heɓe mbaɗa ko ɓe njamiraa.

16:51.t: Alla daali: "Wota on njogito reweteeɓe ɗiɗo. ngnndee Kaŋko ko O deeweteeɗo gooto. Ko min ngoni ko kuloton".

16:52.t: Ko Kaŋko woodani kala ko woni ka kammuuli e ka leydi; ko Kaŋko ɗoftagol duumiingol tabitani. E ko ko woori Alla kuloton?

16:53.t: Kala ko keɓɗon e neema ko immorde ka Alla. refti si lorra memii on, ko Ka makko ngullitotoɗon.

16:54.t: Refti si o huncanii on lorra kan, e jaka fedde goo e mo'on, ko sirkanooɓe Joomi maɓɓe.

16:55.t: Fii yo ɓe njeddu ko min ngokki ɓe kon. Awa ndakmitee, arma nganndon.

16:56.t: Heɓe mbaɗana huunde nde ɓe nganndaa geɗal e kon ko min arsiki ɓe. Wallaahi! On lannditete e kon ko pekindotonoɗon.

16:57.t: Heɓe mbaɗana Alla ɓiɗɓe rewɓe. senaare woodanii mo Heɓe (waɗana) ko'e maɓɓe ko ɓe wooɗitii.

16:58.t: Si gooto e maɓɓe weltiniraama ɓiɗɗo debbo, yeeso makko ngon waɗtina wayliingo ɓalewo e, hara ko o suuɗ-suno.

16:59.t: Homo suuɗora yimɓe ɓeen, sabu bone mo o weltiniraa oon. E o jogitoray mo e hoore koyeera kaa o uway mo ka leydi? ngannde bonii ko ɓe ñaawata!

16:60.t: Hino woodani ɓeen ɓe ngooŋɗinaa laakara sifa bonɗo on. Ko Alla woodani sifa toowɗo on. Ko Kaŋko kadi woni poolɗo, ñeeñɗo.

16:61.t: Si tawno Alla nanngitirayno yimɓe ɓeen sabu tooñe maɓɓe ɗen, O ccataano e dow mayri ruugayngel. Ko woni tun, Himo neeɓtinana ɓe haa e lajal gannda- ngal. Si lajal maɓɓe ngal arii, ɓe neeɓnantaake yonta ɓe adintinantaake.

16:62.t: Hiɓe mbaɗana Alla ko ɓe ngañanta [ko'e-maɓɓe]. Ɗemɗe maɓɓe no cifoo fenaande, won´de no woodani ɓe moƴƴere. Sikke alaa won´de no woodani ɓe Yiite, e won´de ko ɓe ɗaliiɓe.

16:63.t: Wallaahi! Gooŋɗii min nulii e mofte adinooɓe ma, seytaane cuɗani ɓe ngolle maɓɓe ɗen. Ko kaŋko woni giɗo maɓɓe hannde, hino woodani ɓe lepte muusɗe.

16:64.t: Min jippiniraali deftere nden e maaɗa si wonaa fii yo a ɓannginan ɓe kon ko ɓe luutondiri e mun, kadi ko nde peewal, e yurmeende wonan´de yimɓe gooɗinɓe ɓeen.

16:65.t: Alla jippinirii ka kammu ndiyam, O wuurnitiri ɗam leydi ndin ɓaawo ndi yoorde. wonii e ɗuum, maande wonan´de yimɓe nanooɓe.

16:66.t: Hino woodani on e neemoraaɗi ɗiin tasakuyee: miɗen njarna on e ko woni e deedi majji, - hakkunde coowo e ƴiiƴam - ɓiraaɗam laaɓuɗam, welɗam fii yarooɓe.

16:67.t: E dimɗe tamarooji e inabuuje, hoɗon jogitora ɗam siwran e arsike moƴƴo. wonii e ɗuum, maande wonan´de yimɓe haqqilooɓe.

16:68.t: Joomi maa wahayini e ñaakii ngii, won´de : "Jaggu ka pelle cuuɗi, e leɗɗe ɗen, e kon ko ɓe cañata.

16:69.t: Refti ñaamaa e kala dimɗe ɗen, naaton e ɗate Joomi mon newinaaɗe. Hino yalta e deedi majji [kannji ñaaki ɗin], njaram seruɗam nooneeji mun, no e majjam cellal wonan´de yimɓe ɓen. Wonii e ɗuum, maande wonan´de yimɓe miijitotooɓe.

16:70.t: Alla tagii on, refti O hunnay on. Hino e mooɗon on rutteteeɗo e jaasuɗum nguurndam, fii wata o anndu huunde ɓaawo ganndal [makko aranal]. Pellet, Alla ko gannduɗo, kattanɗo.

16:71.t: Alla ɓurnii yoga mon e dow yoga ka arsike. Ɓurnaaɓe ɓen ngonaani ruttirooɓe arsike maɓɓe on e ɓeen ɓe jeytiri ñaame maɓɓe ɗen haa ɓe pota e mayri. E ko dokke Alla on ɓe njeddata?

16:72.t: Alla waɗiranii on e woŋkiiji mon ɗiin resondirɓe, o waɗirani on e resondiraaɓe mon ɓen ɓiɗɓe e taaniraaɓe, o arsiki on immorde e laaɓuɗi. E ko meere nden ɓe gooŋɗinta? E ko neema Alla on kamɓe ɓe njeddata?

16:73.t: Heɓe ndewa gaanin makko, huunde nde waawanaa ɓe (addude) arsike ka kammuuli e ka leydi hay huunde, ɗi kattanaaka [ɗum].

16:74.t: Wata on mbaɗan Alla yerodniraaɗi. Pellet, Alla ko gannduɗo, onon on nganndaa.

16:75.t: Alla piyii misal maccuɗo jeyaaɗo, mo waawaa hay huunde, e on mo min arsiki immorde e amen arsike moƴƴo, hara on wintoo e ɗuum gunndoo e kene. Hara ɓeen no fota? Yettooree woodanii Alla! Ko woni, ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe anndaa.

16:76.t: Alla piyi kadi misal worɓe ɗiɗo: goɗɗo e maɓɓe ko mbobo, o waawaa hay huunde, kaŋko ko o donngal e hoore jeyɗo mo on; nokku kala ka on fewtiniri mo, o addataa moƴƴere; hara on ɗon fotay e on yamiroowo nuunɗal, hara himo e laawol pocciingol?

16:77.t: Ko Alla woodani wirniiɗi kammmuuli ɗin e leydi ndin. Fiyaaku Darngal ngal wonaani si wonaa yeru kinƴan yiitere maa hara ko kañun ɓuri ɓaɗtaade. Pellet, Alla ko kattanɗo kala huunde.

16:78.t: Alla yaltinii on ka deedi neeniraaɓe mon, on anndaa huunde, O waɗani on nanɗe, e giiɗe e ɓerɗe, belejo'o, on yettay [Mo].

16:79.t: E ɓe nji'aani colli ɗiin ko ɗi eltaaɗi ka weeyo kammu (won´de) jogitaaki ɗi si wanaa Alla? Wonii e ɗuum, maandeeji wonan´de yimɓe gooŋɗinooɓe ɓen.

16:80.t: Alla waɗanii on e cuuɗi mon ɗin koɗorle, O waɗani on e guri neemoraaɗi ɗin tillisaaji ɗi taggoton ñande eggoton e ñande koɗtoton. No e leeɓi (baali) ɗin, e leeɓi (gelooɗi) ɗin e leeɓi (dammi) ɗiin ndaɗɗudi [suudu] e dakmitorɗi haa e saanga.

16:81.t: Alla waɗanii on e ko o tagi kon ɗowɗe. O waɗani on e pelle ɗeen cuuɗorɗe. O waɗani on comci daɗndayɗi on nguleendi, e conci daɗndayɗi on e hare mon. Ko wano nii o timminirta dokke makko ɗeen e dow mon, mbelejo'o on njebbiloto.

16:82.t: Si ɓe nduŋtiima, anndu ko fawi maa, ko yottingol ɓanngina (peeñngol.)

16:83.t: Heɓe nganndi dokke Alla ɗeen; refti ɓe njedda ɗe. Ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe ko heeferɓe.

16:84.t: (Jaŋto) kadi ñande min immintinoyta e kala mofte seedeejo, refti ɓeen yedduɓe sakkitoyantaake (ngantinagol), wanaa kamɓe ngoni ko ɗaɓɓiroytee ruttitagol [e yarluyee Joomi maɓɓe].

16:85.t: Si tooñuɓe ɓeen ynj'ii lepte ɗeen, ɓe hoynantaake, lepte wanaa ɓe neeɓnitanteeɓe.

16:86.t: Si sirkooɓe ɓeen nji*i kafidaaɓe maɓɓe ɓeen, ɓe mbi'a: "Joomi amen, ko ɗii woni kafidaaɗi amen ɗi men ndrewaynoo gah ni ma". [Kafidaaɗi maɓɓe] ɗiin njilta e maɓɓe konngol ngol: "Onon ko on fenooɓe".

16:87.t: Ɓe mbernoo e Alla ndeen ñalnde jebbilaare, kon ko pekindotonoo majjira ɓe.

16:88.t: Ɓeen yedduɓe ɓe paddii e laawol Alla ngol, min ɓeydiranii ɓe lepte e hoore lepte, sabu ko ɓe bonniraynoo kon.

16:89.t: (Jaŋto kadi) ñande minn immintinoyta e kala mofte ko seeditoo e maɓɓe, jeyaaɗo e maɓɓe, min ngadda maa [an Muhammadu] ko seeditoo e ɓee ɗoo. min njippini e maaɗa deftere nden, ko nde ɓannginoore kala huunde, e peewal, e yurmeende, e welo-welo wonan´de juulɓe ɓen.

16:90.t: Tabitii Alla yamirii nuunɗal, e moƴƴingol, e moƴƴagol e joomiraaɓe ɓadondiral. homo haɗa gaay e pan-kare, e ko añinii, e bewre. homo waajoo on, mbeleejo'o, on mbaajitoray.

16:91.t: kuuɓnee ahadi Alla ndiin si on ahodaama, wata on pirtu gooɗndooje ɗeen ɓaawo ɗe tenntineede, gooŋɗii on mbaɗii Alla seedaniiɗo [on e hunnugol ngol]. Pellet, ko gannduɗo ko ngolloton.

16:92.t: Wota on ngon wano (debbo) pirtunooɗo mottawol mun ɓaawo doole firtude, hoɗon njogitora gooɗndooje mon ɗeen jamfondiro hakkunde mon, nde mofte [mon ɗen] wonata ɓurde tonaade e dii mofte goo. ngandee Alla no jarribora on ɗuum. ma o ɓanngina- na on ñande darngal, ɗuu ko luutondiratnoɗon e mum.

16:93.t: Sinno Alla muuyuno, o waɗatno on mofte goote. Kono, Himo majjina on Mo o muuyi, O feewna on mo O muuyi. ma on lannditoye e ɗuu ko ngollatnoɗon.

16:94.t: Wota on njogitor gooɗndooje mon jamfondiro hakkunde mon, sakko koyngal [mon] mortotoo (fergito) ɓaawo ngal tabitude, meeɗiron bone sabu ko paddiɗon ko e laawol Alla ngol. hino woodani on lepte mawɗe.

16:95.t: Wota on mbaɗtitir ahadi Alla ndiin coggu pamɗungu. ñganndee ko ko woni ka Alla ko ɓuri moƴƴan´de on, si tawno hoɗon nganndi!

16:96.t: Ko marɗon kon re'ay (gasat), ko woni ka Alla ko ko keddotooɗum. ma min mbarjor ɓeen muññiiɓe njoɓdi maɓɓe ndiin ko ɓuri moƴƴude e ko ɓe ngollatnoo kon.

16:97.t: Kala golluɗo moƴƴere, woni gorko maa debbo, hara ko o gooŋɗinɗo, maa min wuurnu mo nguur- ndam laaɓuɗam. Ma min mbaajor ɓe njoɓdi maɓɓe ndin, ko ɓuri moƴƴude e ko ɓe ngollatnoo kon.

16:98.t: Si a janngay Alqur'aana, moolor Alla seytaane diiwaaɗo on.

16:99.t: Kaŋko on, mbawdi(cemmbe) alanaa mo e ɓen gooŋɗinɓe, ɓe fawii e hoore Joomi maɓɓe.

16:100.t: nganndee mbawdi makko ndiin, ko hoore ɓeen weldiiɓe e makko woni, e ɓeen sirkirooɓe sabu makko.

16:101.t: Si min lomtinii aaya lomto aaya goo - Ko Alla ɓuri anndude ko O jippinta - Ɓe mbi'a: "aan on ko a pekindiiɗo". Si ko woni, ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe anndaa.

16:102.t: Maaku: "Ko jippini ndee, ko [Jibriilu] Fittaanndu Laaɓndu ndun, immorde ka Joomi maa, fii yo o tabintin ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe, e [fii yo nde won] peewal, e welo-welo wonan´de juulɓe ɓeen".

16:103.t: Gooŋɗii min miɗen nganndi won´de heɓe mbi'a: "Ko neɗɗaŋke woni mo anndinnde (Alqur'aana)". Ɗemngal ngal ɓe ooñotoo e mun ngal ko ajami, ndee ɗoo non ka ɗemngal Aarabi ɓanngungal(.laaɓtungal.)

16:104.t: Pellet, ɓen ɓe ngooŋɗinaani Aayeeje Alla ɗeen, Alla feewnataa ɓe. Hino woodani ɓe lepte muusɗe.

16:105.t: Nganndee ko fejkindotoo fenaande, ko ɓeen ɓe ngoŋɗinaani- aayee Alla ɗen; ko kamɓe ngooni fenooɓe ɓeen.

16:106.t: Kala jedduɗo Alla ɓaawo gooŋɗinal makko ngal - si wanaa on waawnaaɗo hara ɓernde makko nden ko deeƴirnde gooŋɗinal , kono, ɓeen yaññamɓe ɓerɗe mun keeferaaku, hino fawii ɓe tikkere immorde Alla, hino woodani ɓe kadi lepte mawɗe.

16:107.t: Ngol [murtugol maɓɓe], ko tawde ɓe cuɓiima nguurndam aduna e dow laakara, e won´de Alla kan, O feewnataa yimɓe yedduɓe ɓeen.

16:108.t: Ko ɓeen ngoni ɓe Alla noti e ɓerɗe mum, e nanɗe mun e gite mum. Ko ɓeen ngooni welsindiiɓe ɓen.

16:109.t: Sikke alaaa won´de ɓeen ɗoon ka laakara, ko kamɓe ngoni sooyɓe ɓeen.

16:110.t: refti pellet Joomi maa, wonannde ɓen ferunooɓe ɓaawo nde ɓe tampinaama, hooti ɓe tiiɗnii ɓe muññii, pellet Joomi maa, ɓaawo ɗuum, Ko O jaafotooɗo, jurmotooɗo.

16:111.t: (Janŋo) tuma ñande kala woŋkii arata, hara hiki wennja fii hoore-makki, woŋkii kala yoɓee ko ki golli kon, kamɓe ɓe tooñetaake.

16:112.t: Alla piyii misal hoɗo: hoɗo hoolinoongo, deeƴungo; arsike maggo no ardirana ngo nokku kala e yaaj- jeende. Ɓe njeddi dokke Alla ɗe, Alla meeɗiniri ɓe kolgu heege e kulol, sabu ko ɓe ngollatnoo kon.

16:113.t: Gooŋɗii arii e maɓɓe nulaaɗo jeyaaɗo e maɓɓe, ɓe njeddi mo. Lepte ɗeen nanngi ɓe, tawi ko ɓe tooñɓe.

16:114.t: Ñaamee e kon ko Alla arsike on dagiiɗi laaɓuɗi, njeetton dokke Alla ɗeen, si wonii ko Kaŋko ndewoton.

16:115.t: nganndee ko o Harminani on, ko jiiba, e ƴiiƴam (rufaaɗam), e teewu kose, e [huunde hirsiraande] daginiraande ko woori Allah. Kala on duñaaɗo [e ñaamugol ɗuum] hara wonaa ɓewɗo wonaa jaggi- tuɗo,nganndee pellet, Allah ko jaatooɗo jurmotooɗo.

16:116.t: Wota on mbi'u ko ɗemɗe mon sifotoo e penaale: "Ɗum ɗoo no dagii, ɗum ɗoo no harmi", fii no pekindoron e hoore Alla fenaande. Pellet, ɓen fekindotooɓe fenaande e hoore Alla, ɓe maletaake.

16:117.t: Ko dakamme pamɗuɗo, hino woodani ɓe lepte muusɗe.

16:118.t: E hoore Alyahuudaaɓe ɓeen (kan), min karminno ko min fillani maa kon ko adii. min tooñaano ɓe; ko woni, ko ko'e-maɓɓe ɓe ngonnnoo e tooñude.

16:119.t: Refti pellel, Joomi maa, wonan´de ɓeen golluɓe bone on majjere, refti ɓe tuubi ɓaawo ɗuum ɓe moƴƴini, pellet Joomi maa, ɓaawo ɗuum, ko jaafotooɗo, jurmotooɗo.

16:120.t: Pellet, Ibraahiima woniino ɗowro koykinaniiɗo Alla, ooñiiɗo [e ɗiya diinaaji], o wonaana jeyaaɗo e sirkooɓe ɓeen.

16:121.t: jettatnooɗo dokke makko ɗin. [Alla] suɓike mo, O feewni mo e laawol poocciingol.

16:122.t: Min ngokki mo ka aduna moƴƴere. Kaŋko oon ka laakara, ko o jeyaaɗo e moƴƴuɓe ɓeen.

16:123.t: Refi min mbahayini e maaɗa, won´de: " Jokku diina Ibraahiima ka naayaaki e diinaaji mehre o jeyanooka e sirkooɓe ɓeen".

16:124.t: ngandee [mawningol fii] aseweere nden ko waɗanaa, ko ɓeen luutondirɓe e mayre. Pellet, Joomi maa, ko ñaawoyoowo hakkunde maɓɓe Ñande Darngal, e ɗuum ko ɓe luutondiratnoo fii mum.

16:125.t: Noddir e diina Joomi maa kan ñeeñal e waaju moƴƴu. Wennjiraa ɓe e noone ɓurɗo moƴƴude. Pellet, Joomi maa, ko Kaŋko ɓuri anndude on majjuɗo e laawol makko ngol, ko Kaŋko kadi ɓuri anndi feewɓe ɓeen.

16:126.t: Si on yagginay, haray yagginiree yeru no waɗiranoɗon non. Ko si on muññike, pellet ko ɗuum ɓuri moƴƴan´de muññiiɓe ɓeen.

16:127.t: Muñño! Muñal maa ngal ko sabu Alla tan. wota a suno fii maɓɓe. wota wonu ɓittorɗo e ɗuum ko ɓe pewjata.

16:128.t: Pellet, Alla no won´di e ɓeen hulɓe [Mo] e ɓeen moƴƴinooɓe.

17:1.t: Senaare wondani oon doƴnuɗo Jeyaaɗo makko on jehma, iwde ta juulirde hormante haa ka juulirde woɗɗitiinde, nden nde min mbarkini banŋe mun,fii yo min kollu mo immorde e aayeeje amen. Pellet, Ko Kaŋko woni Nanoowo, ji’oowo.

17:2.t: Min njnniino Muusaa deftere nden, men mbaɗi nde peewal, wonan'de ɓiɗɓe Israa’iila ɓen, won'de : "Wata on njogito ga Am kooloraaɗo".

17:3.t: [Ko onon yo] ɓiɗɓe ɓe ɓe min mbaɗɗinnoo wonnudude e Nuuhu.Pellet, o laatino jeyaaɗo yettoowo.

17:4.t: Min mbahyinino e ɓiɗɓe Israa’iila ɓe to deftere [won'de] : "On mbonnayat ta leydi laabi ɗiɗi, on townitoyto kadi townitaare mawnnde".

17:5.t: Si fodoore gootel e ɗin ɗiɗi arii, min ngurta e mon jiyaaɓe Amen, marɓe doole tiiɗɗe, ɓe njiloo hakkunde galleeji ɗi. Ɗuum wonii fodoore huuwoyteende =golloteende.

17:6.t: Refti min nduttitanani on n on doole ɗen e hoore maɓɓe; min Ɓeydi on jawɗe e ɓiɗɓe,min mbaɗa on gorol ɓurngol heewde.

17:7.t: Si on moƴƴinii, ko ko'e mon moƴƴinanɗon ; si on mbonnii kadi, ko ko’e mon [bonnannɗon]. Si fodoore sakkitiinde nden arii, ko fii yo ɓe hoynu j'eece mon ɗen, e fii yo no ɓe naatiraa ka juulirde wano ɓe naatirnoo e mayre ka laawol adanol, e fii yo ɓe muncu yeru woo ko ɓe townani muncudee.

17:8.t: Hino jortaa ka Joomi mon yurmee on.Si on fillitike (non),min fillitoo. min mbaɗanii yedduɓe ɓe Jahannama on tonngorde.

17:9.t: Pellet, ndee Alqur’aanaare no fewnat e ko ɓuri e nuunɗude,hende wewlinira=weltanira gooŋɗinɓe,ɓen gollooɓe moƴƴuɗi ɗin, won'de, no woodani ɓe njoɓdi mawndi.

17:10.t: E won'de pellet, ɓen ɓe gooŋɗinaa laakara on, men maranii ɓe lepte muusuɗe.

17:11.t: Neɗɗo no toroo bone, wano o tororta non moƴƴere,neɗɗaŋke on wonii ko heñiiɗo.

17:12.t: Min mbaɗii jemma on e ñalawma on Aayeeje ɗiɗi, min momti aaya jemma on, min mbaɗi aaya ñalawma on hentiiɗo, fii yo on ɗaɓɓu ɓural immorde e Joomi mon, e fii yo on ngandu limoore duuɓi, e hasboore. Kala huunde, min n fensitirii nde fensitudee.

17:13.t: Kala neɗɗaŋke, min mbaɗɗinii mo talkuru makko ndun ka daande makko. Men njaltinanoyat mo Ñande Darngal, deftere, o hawra e mayre ko nde fontaande.

17:14.t: Janngu deftere maa nden, hoore-maa yonante hannde kasboowo.

17:15.t: Mo feewii, haray pellet, ko hoore-makko o feewani ; mo majii kadi, haray pellet, ko o majji kon yantate hoore-makko. Woŋkii ronndotaako bone wokki goo. Men ngonaani leptooɓe, haa min immina Nulaaɗo.

17:16.t: Si min faandike halkude saare, Men y Njamirat neeminaaɓe mayre ɓen, ɓe faasinqinoo e mayre, konngol (lepte) ngol jojja e mayre, Men munca nde muncudee.

17:17.t: Heewii gire ɗe min kalki ɓaawo Nuuhu! Joomi maa Yonii Humpitiiɗo, ji’oowo junuubi=bakkatuuji jeyaaɓe makko ɓen.

17:18.t: Kala mo faala yaawnaneede, min n njaawnanat mo ton huunde ko min muuyi, wonan'de on mo min njɗi, refti min mbaɗana mo Jahannama, o naatoya nge ko o ñiŋaaɗo, goɗɗinaaɗo [yurmeende].

17:19.t: On paalaaɗo laakara, o gollani ɗum golle mum, hara kaŋko ko o gooŋɗinɗo ;ɓeen ɗoon, golle maɓɓe ɗen ngonii jaarnaaɗe.

17:20.t: Kala (maɓɓe),miɗen ɓeydana ; ɓee ɗoo e ɓee ɗoo, immorde e dokkal Joomi maa. Dokkal Joomi maa ngal wonaani kaɗaa ngal.

17:21.t: Ndaarii no min ɓurniri yoga maɓɓe e dow yoga, ko laakara on ɓuri mawnude darjaaji,ɓuri mawnude kadi ɓural.

17:22.t: Wota a waɗan Alla deweteeɗo goɗɗo; njooɗoyoɗaa ko a ñiŋaaɗo noppaaɗo.

17:23.t: Joomi maa yamirii :"wota on ndew ko wonaa Kaŋko, jipnaaɓe ɓ,moƴƴagol [e maɓɓe]:si nayewu goɗɗo e maɓɓe yottike ma,maa ɗum ɓe ɗiɗo non;wota a wi’i ɓe "eh=uf!" wota a wikko ɓe =wota a furo,layan ɓe konngol teddungol.

17:24.t: Njankinanoɗaa ɓe njurmeɗaa ɓe, mbi’aa: « Joomi an, yurme ɓe’e, wano ɓe ne’irnoo kam non hari ko mi tosokum ».

17:25.t: Joomi mo'on no andi ko woni ka nder woŋkiiji mon, si tawii on ngonnno moƴƴuɓe ; pellet Kaŋko o wonanii ruttotooɓe ɓe cuhroowo.

17:26.t: Jonnu jom ɓadondiral haqqee makko o, e ɓilliiɗo, e seteejo haqqee makko on ; wota a bonnu bonnere.

17:27.t: Pellet bonnooɓe ɓe, ko siɗɓe seytanuuji ɗi ; seytaane non wonii jedduɗo Joomi mum.

17:28.t: Si a ɗuurniima ɓe fii ɗaɓɓugol yurmeende immorde ka Joomi maa, nde jortiɗaa ɗum, wi'i ɓe konngol newingol.

17:29.t: Wota a waɗ junngo maa ngo ko lmbaango, ka daande maa ; wota a fortu ngo kadi kala portugol, haa njooɗoɗaa ko a pelniiɗo, nimsuɗo.

17:30.t: Pellet Joomi maa, no yaacnana arsike, on mo O muuyi. O ɓittina. Pellet Kaŋko O wonii kumpitiiɗo, ji’oowo jeyaaɓe makko.

17:31.t: Wote on mbare ɓiɓɓe mon ɓen kulol ɓilla=ba'asal, ko minen ngarsikata ɓe, won'dude e mon ; pellet bargol ɓe ngol, wonii goopol manngol.

17:32.t: Wota on ɓatto jina=fijrde nde, pellet ɗuum wonii paŋkare e laawol bon'ngol.

17:33.t: Wota on mbar woŋkii, ki Allah harmini kin [bargol], si wonaa sabu hakkee. Mo tooñaama waraama, min waɗanii heftuɓe e makko ɓe doole wota non o fantin ka bargol. Pellet Kaŋko o wonii ballaaɗo.

17:34.t: Wota on ɓatto jawle Alyatiim, si wonaa ɓattagol ɓurngol moƴƴude, haa sagatalaaku makko timma ; kuumnee aadi ndin; pellet, aadi ndin wonii laɓnditoytee ndi.

17:35.t: Kuuɓnee ɓetu ngu si petat, manndikiron manndakke=peeson peese peewɗe, ko ɗum moƴƴi, ko kañum ɓuri moƴƴude battane.

17:36.t: Wota a rewindo e ko a anndaa fii mum. Pellet nanɗe ɗen, e giiɗe ɗen e ɓernde nden, ɗiiɗoo fow ngonii laɓnditoyteeɗi ka makko.

17:37.t: Wota a yaaru e leydi ñaaƴa bunnga, ko fii pellet an a yulataa leydi ndin, a yottotaako pelle ɗe njuuteendi.

17:38.t: ɗe fof, bone majji on ngonii gañaaɗi to Joomi maa.

17:39.t: Ɗuum, ko goɗɗum e ko Joomi maaɗa wahayini fa'ade e maa, immorde e Ñeeñal wota a waɗ deweteeɗo goo wond'ude e Alla, sakko mberleɗaa ka ndeer jahannama ko a pelaaɗo daɗaaɗo.

17:40.t: E mati Joomi mon suɓani on ɓiɓɓe worɓe, O jogitoo immorde e malaa'ikaaji ɗi rewɓe? Pellet, onon hoɗon layde konngol mawnungol!

17:41.t: Gooŋɗii min fensitii e nder ndee Alqur'aanaare fii yo ɓe mbaactor, ɗum ɓeydaani ɓe si wonaa woɗɗitagol.

17:42.t: " Maaku : « Si tawno no won'di e makko, deweteeɗi wano ɓe mbi’iri ni ɗi ɗaɓɓayno laawol feewde de Jom Arsi o."

17:43.t: Senaade wonanii mo, o Toowii gaayi e ko ɓe mbi'ata Toowal mawnngal.

17:44.t: No subunhinan'de mo kammuuli ɗin jeeɗiɗi e leydi ndin e ɓe won'ɓe e majji, alaa e hay e hu'unde si wonaa hende Subunhinaade sabu Yettugol mo, kono on faamataa cubunhinaali maɓɓe ɗin, pellet, Kaŋko O wonii munñiiɗo cuhroowo.

17:45.t: Si a janngii Alqur'aanaare nden min maɗat hakkunde maa e ɓeen ɓe mgooŋɗinaa laalara on heedo suuɗiingo.

17:46.t: Min mbaɗi aɗi e dow ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗeen cokooɗe fii wata ɓe paamu nde [Alqur'aanaare nden] e ka noppi maɓɓe kadi teddeele, si a jaŋtike Joomi maaɗa ka ndeer Alqur'aanaare Kaŋko Tun ɓe huccinay ɓabbe maɓɓe ɗen ko ɓe dogooɓe.

17:47.t: Ko Minen ngnndi ko ɓe keɗotoo kon, tuma ɓe keɗotoo fa'ade e maaɗa [yo Nulaaɗo], e tuma ɓe cowndondirta=ndeeydata, tuma nde tooñooɓe ɓe mbi'ata: «On jokkaani si wonaa gorko mbilɗaaɗo=bilaaɗo».

17:48.t: Ndaarii [yo Nulaaɗo] ko honno ɓe piyiranay maa mise=yeruuji, ɓe majjii ɓe kattantaake [heɓde] laawol.

17:49.t: Ɓe mbi'i: «E hara si mon mgonii ƴi'e e nguɗu, haray ko min immintinoyteeɓe tagoore hesre?»

17:51.t: Ma ɗuum tagoore tawa nde mawni e ɓerɗe mon, ɓe mbi'a: 'Ko hommbo ruttata amen?" Maaku: "Ko On takɗo on ka laawol adanol". Ɓe tura ko'e maɓɓe ɗe fa'ade e maa, ɓe mbi'a: "Ɗuum ko honde tuma"?, Maaku: 'No tijjaa nde tawata ɓadike".

17:52.t: Ñannde o noddata on nootoɗon njetton mo cikkon on ñiiɓaano [ka leydi] si wonaa seeɗa.

17:53.t: Maakan jiyaaɓe aan ɓe: "Yoo ɓe lay ko ɓuri moƴƴude, pellet, Seytaane o bonnat hakkunde maɓɓe, pellet, Seytaane wonanii neɗɗaŋke gaño laaɓtuɗo".

17:54.t: Joomi mon ko o ganndo fii mon, si o yiɗii o yurmoo on, maa ɗum si o yiɗii olepta on. Min nulaani ma e dow maɓɓe fawtiiɗo.

17:55.t: Ko Joomi maa anndi fii ɓe wonɓe ta kammuuli e ta leydi, pellet, Min ɓurnii woɓɓe e Annabaaɓe ɓe e dow woɓɓe, Min Jonni Daawuuda Jabuura.

17:56.t: Maaku: "Noddee ɓe ɓe aaƴiɗon [ko deweteeɓe] gaanin makko, ɓe maraa huncugol lorra kan gaayi mo'on wonaa waylugol kadi".

17:57.t: Ɓen, ɓe ɓe ngoni noddude, heɓe ɗaɓɓude ɗoworgal fa'ade e Joomi maɓɓe, ko hommbo e maɓɓe ɓuri ɓadaade, heɓe njoortii yurmende makko on heɓe kuli lepte makko ɗe, pellet, lepte Joomi maa ɗe ɗe laatike ko deentaaɗe.

17:58.t: Alaa e saare si wonaa minen ko min halkatɓe nde ko adii ñande darngal, maa ko min leptatɓe nde lepte cattuɗe, ɗuum ɗo wonii ko winndaa ɗum to Deftere.

17:59.t: Haɗaani min nde min nula aayeeje ɗe, si wona sabu yeddiino ɗe adiiɓe ɓen, Min okki Samuuda Ngeelooba ba yi'teemba ɓe tooñi ba, Min nuliraani Aayeeje ɗe si wonaa hulɓinirɗe.

17:60.t: [Janto] Tuma nde min wi'anno maa: "Pellet, Joomi maa o huɓindima yimɓe ɓe, Min mbaɗiraani nde yi'annde nde Min kollumaa si wonaa fitina wona'de yimɓe ɓe e lekki huɗaaki ki ka Alqur'aana, Miɗen kulɓina ɓe kono ɓeydataa ɓe si wonaa bewre mawnde.

17:61.t: Nde min n Daalannoo Maleykaaji ɗi cujjanee aadama, ɓe cujji si wonaa Ibliisa o wi'i: " mi sujjanta on mo talɗa e loopal?".

17:62.t: O wi'i: "A yi'ii oo mo teddinɗaa e dow am, pellet, si A neeɓnanii kan haa ñande darnga mi bonnat ɓiɓɓe makko ɓe si wonaa seeɗaaɓe.

17:63.t: [Alla] Daali: "Yahu, kala jokkuɗo ma e maɓɓe pellet, ko jahannama woni njoɓdi mon, njoɓdi yonoori".

17:64.t: Dillinir on mo kattanaɗaa e maɓɓe hito maa o, pooɗa e dow maɓɓe pucci maa e seppooɓe maa, rentu e maɓɓe jawle e ɓiɓɓe foduɓe, [kono] Seytaane fodaani ɓe si wonaa hodo.

17:65.t: Pellet, Jiyaaɓe am ɓe a maraa doole e hoore maɓɓe, Joomi maa yonii kooloraaɗo.

17:66.t: Ko Joomi mon woni sogganatɗo on laaɗe ɗe e maayo, fii yo on ɗaɓɓu immorde e ɓural makko , pellet, Kaŋko ko O jurmotooɗo on.

17:67.t: Si lorra heɓii on to maayo, majja ɓeen ɓe noddatno ɗon, si wonaa Kaŋko [Alla] nde danndi on ka njorndi ɗurnoɗon, neɗɗaŋke on wonii te o seeraani won'de heewuɗo jeddugol.

17:68.t: Enee, on kooli mutintaa on ka baŋe njorndi maaɗum o nula e mon damagariire [toɓo koccu], refti heɓantaake on fawtiiɗo.

17:69.t: Ma kooli o nduttaraa on e maggo laawol goo o accita e dow mon bippooru immorde e keneeli o yoolira on sabu ko njedduno ɗon ko, refti on keɓantaake jokkitiratɗo e dow amen cukkoowo.

17:70.t: Gooŋɗii, min teddinii ɓiɗɓe aadama ɓe, min ronndike ɓe ka njorndi e ka maayo min arsiki ɓe immorde e laaɓuɗi min n ɓurni ɓe e dow ko heewi e ɓen ɓe min tagi ɓurnudee.

17:71.t: Ñannde min noddiroyta kala yimɓe gardiiɗo maɓɓe on,kala on jonnitiroyaaɗo deftere makko nde ka ñaamo makko ɓe ɗon ɓe janngay deftere maɓɓe nde ɓe tooñirtaake hay yeru gaarayol hun tamaro.

17:72.t: Kala on gon'ɗo e [ngurndan aduna] ko o bunɗo, haray kaŋko, ko ka laakara o ɓurata wumde e majjude laawol.

17:73.t: Fii kala ɓe eɓɓii nde ɓe fitinatmaa gaayi nde hu'unde nde min n wahayini e maaɗa fii yo a fekindo e amen ko wonaa ɗun [ko min n tellini e maa] on tuma ɓe njogitoto ma sehlaajo.

17:74.t: Si tawiino min tabintinaanoma, gooŋɗii a do'ii ooña'ade e maɓɓe hu'unde seeɗaare.

17:75.t: On tuma min meeɗinteno cowale [lepte] ka nguurndam e cowale [lepte] kumayde refti heɓantaake ma ballo e hoore Amen.

17:76.t: Fii kala ɓe eɓɓiino dillinngol ma ka leydi fii yo ɓe yaltine e mayri, on tuma ɓe ñiiɓataano ɓatte maa si wonaa seeɗa.

17:77.t: Ɗum ko Sunna ɓe ɓe min n nuli ko adimaa immorde e Nulaaɓe amen, a heɓantaa Sunna amen on mbattiigu.

17:78.t: Ñiiɓu juulde nde ka mortagol na'ange nge haa ka niɓre jemma, Juulde subaha nde, pellet, Juulde subaha nde wonii seedeteende.

17:79.t: Ka jemma tinno e makko ko ɓeydaari maaɗa, no jortaa nde Joomi maaɗa immintinat ma e darorɗe yettiniinde.

17:80.t: Ma'aku: "Jooma, naadira naatirgal goonga yaltiniraa mi jaltirgal goonga, mbaɗanaa mi immorde ka maaɗa doole ballal".

17:81.t: Maaku: "goonga o arii mehre nde fuuyii, pellet, mehre nde wonii fuuyoore".

17:82.t: Miɗen tellina ka Alqur'aana hu'unde nde konde cellal e yurmeende wona'nde gooŋɗinɓe ɓe, ɓeydataa tooñooɓe ɓen si wonaa hayre.

17:83.t: Si min n neeɓnii e neɗɗaŋke on o ɗuurnoo o townaa balaaje makko, si bone heɓii mo o wona hattuɗo e taƴiiɗo.

17:84.t: Maaku: "mo kala yo golluɗo e laawol mum, ko Joomi mon woni gannduɗo on ɓurɗo feewde laawol".

17:85.t: Heɓe laɓdo maa fii fittaandu, maaku: "Fittaandu ndu ko e fiyaake Joomi an, on okkaaka e ganndal si wonaa seeɗaé.

17:86.t: Mi woondii, si Miɗen njiɗnoo min naɓatno nde hu'unde nde min wahyini fa'ade e maaɗa, refti heɓantaake ma fawtiiɗo ɗum e hoore amen.

17:87.t: Ko woni tan, ko Hinnayee immorde ka Joomi maa, pellet, ɓural makko ngal e dow maa wonii mawngal.

17:88.t: Maaku: "Mi woondii, si yimɓe ɓe e jinnaaji ɗi kawtitii fii yo ɓe ngaddu yeru ndee Alqur'aanaare, ɓe mgaddataa yeru mayre, hay si wonii woɓɓe maɓɓe ko wallindratɓe e woɓɓe".

17:89.t: Gooŋɗii min ɓannginanii yimɓe ɓen e ndee Alqur'aanaare immorde e kala misal, ɓurɓe ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓe calii, si wanaa jeddugol.

17:90.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "min ngoŋɗintaa ma, haa ɓullitanaa men e lesdi ɓunndu".

17:91.t: Mu ɗum laatano maa ngesa immorde e tamorooje e inabuuje ɓullitaa caatli ɗi hakkunde majje ɓullitugol.

17:92.t: Ma ɗum liɓaa kammu ngu e hoore amen wano aaƴorɗaa non kunte, maa ɗum ngddaa Alla e Maleykaaji ɗi [men] kuccandira.

17:93.t: Ma ɗum laatano maa suudu immorde e cuɗaaje [kanŋe], maaɗum ƴawaa ka kammu, men ngooŋɗintaa ƴawugol maaɗa ngol haa njippinaa e amen deftere men jannga nde. Maaku: "Senaade Jom an, hara mi wonu, ko wonaa ɓanndinke Nulaaɗo?!".

17:94.t: Haɗaani yimɓe ɓe nde ɓe ngooŋɗinta tuma nde peewalngal arnoo ɓe, si wonaa fii ɓe mbi'i i'ii: "E hara Alla nulay ɓanndiŋke Nulaaɗo?!"

17:95.t: Maaku: "Si tawiino laatinooma lesdi maleykaaji heɓe njaha ko ɓe deeƴɓe, min njippinatno e maɓɓe immorde ka kammu Malayla Nulaaɗo".

17:96.t: Maaku: "Alla yonii ceediiɗo hakkunde am e mon, pellet Kaŋko o wonii kumpitiiɗo deenɗo jeyaaɓe makko ɓen".

17:97.t: Oon mo Alla feewni ko oon woni peewuɗo, ɓe o majjini ɓe a heɓantaaɓe wallooɓe ko woori mo. Min mooɓay ɓe ñande darnga e dow je'ece maɓɓe ɗe ko ɓe wumɓe e muumɗuɓe= fahdube ɓe e faaɗuɓe, ja'aƴndee maɓɓe nden ko jahannama tuma kala nge rocci min ɓeydana ɓe huɓɓunge.

17:98.t: Ɗuum ko njoɓdi maɓɓe, sabu kamɓe ɓe njeddii aayeeje amen ɗe, ɓe mbi'i i: "E hay si min ngonii ƴi'e e mbuɗu e hara minen ko min immintinteeɓe tagoore?!" hesre.

17:99.t: Enee, ɓee nji'aani, won'de Alla O Takɗo kammuuli ɗi e leydi ndi ko kattanɗo nde o tagata yeru maɓɓe, o waɗani ɓe lajal [caate] sikke alaa e maggal. Tooñooɓe ɓe calii si wonaa jeddugol.

17:100.t: Maaku: "Sinndo onon hoɗon marnoo ngaluuji yurmeende e Joomi am on, on tuma, on njogitotono kulol nafkugol, neɗɗaŋke on wonii nguddo".

17:101.t: Gooŋɗii min n ngkkiino Muusaa aayeeje jeenay ɓannguɗe, lanndii ɓiɓɓe Israa'iila ɓen tuma nde o arnoo ɓe Fir'awna wi'ani mo: "min dey miɗo sikkumaa ko an yo Muusaa ko a mbilɗaaɗo".

17:102.t: Maaku: "Gooŋɗii haɗa anndi jippinaani ɗee si wonaa Jeyɗo kammuuji ɗi e leydi ndi aayeeje [yi'eteeɗi]. Min dey miɗo sikkumaa ko an yo Fir'awna ko a kalkiiɗo".

17:103.t: O faalaa nde o dillinta ɓe ka lesdi min n njoooli mo e ɓe won'du ɓe e makko ɓe denndaangal.

17:104.t: Min Daalani ɓaawo makko ɓiɓɓe Israa'iila ɓe: "Hoɗee ka leydi, si fodoore sakkitiinde nden arii, min ngaddana on ko on muuɓiiɓe=fiiliibe".

17:105.t: Ko sabu Goonga min telliniri nde, ko sabu Goonga nde tellii, Min nuliraani ma si wanaa [ko a] beltinoowo=beltinoowo e jertinoowo.

17:106.t: E Qur'aanaare min n ɓanngini nde fii yo a janngannde yimɓe ɓe e dow deeƴere, min njippini nde jippin'de.

17:107.t: Maaku: "ngooŋɗinee nde, maaɗum wota on ngoŋɗine, pellet, ɓen okkaaɓe ganndal ko adii nde si [nde] janngaama e taweende maɓɓe ɓe suuyiray wokkuɗe ko ɓe sujjooɓe".

17:108.t: Ɓe mbi'a:Senaade woodanii Joomi amen,nde wonnoo Fodoore Joomi amen nden ko waɗoore.

17:109.t: Heɓe suuyira wokkuɗe ɓe ngulla [Alqur'aana on] ɓasda ɓe yankinaare.

17:110.t: Maaku: "Noddiree mo Alla maa noddiro mo jurmotooɗo, kala no noddirɗon Mo, ko Kaŋko Inɗe Moƴƴe ɗen heeranii, wota a fenñin juulde maaɗa nden wota a suuɗnde nde ɗaɓɓu hakkunde ɗuum laawol.

17:111.t: Maaku: jettooje ɗe ngoodanii Alla o mo jogitaaki ɓiɗɗo laatanaaki mo kafidaaɗo e Laamu laatanaaki mo tedduɗo mo o huykinantoo, Mawnin Mo Mawnin'dee.

18:1.t: Jettooje ngodanii Alla, On jippinɗo e dow Jeyaaɗo makko on deftere nden o waɗanaani nde ooñaare.

18:2.t: Feewnde fii yo o [Nulaaɗo on] hulɓinir lepte cattuɗe immorde ka makko o weltinira gooŋɗinɓe ɓen, ɓe no golla Moƴƴuɗi ɗin won'de no woodani ɓe njoddi moƴƴiri.

18:3.t: Ko ɓe ñiiɓooɓe e ndeer makko [dokke] poomaa.

18:4.t: O reentina ɓen wi"iɓe: "Alla jogitike ɓiɗɗo".

18:5.t: Ganndal alanaaɓe e mun, wonaa baabiraaɓe maɓɓe woodani, mawnii konngol gon'ngol e yaltude e kunnduɗe maɓɓe, ɓe kaalaani si wonaa fenaande.

18:6.t: Mbele jo'o aan a tanpinat hoore-maa e dow batteeji maɓɓe, si ngooŋɗinaani ndee Yewtere ka suno.

18:7.t: Minen min mbaɗii ko woni ko ka hoore leydi cuɗaari mayri, fii yo min mjarribo ɓe ko hommbo e maɓɓe ɓurata moƴƴin'de golle.

18:8.t: Minen ko min waɗooɓe ko woni kon e hoore mayri boowol joorungal.

18:9.t: Kaa a sikku no yimɓe fammeere=wimmba nden e binndi ɗin, ɗuum wonu immorde e aayeeje amen kaawniiɗe?

18:10.t: Tuma nde sukaaɓe ɓen cornoo to wimmbo, ɓe mbi'i: "Joomi amen okku men immorde ka maaɗa Hinnayee=yurmeende newinanaa amen kadi e fiyaake amen peewal.

18:11.t: Min piyi e dow noppi maɓɓe ɗi to ndeer wimbo he limoore duuɓi.

18:12.t: Refti min n immintini ɓe fii yo min penñinir gonndal ko honnde e mojobe=pelle ɗen ɗiɗi ɓuri moftude [limoore] ko ɓe ñiiɓi kon dummunne.

18:13.t: Minen Miɗen pillanaade ma kumpital fii maɓɓe e Goonga, ɓen ɗoon, ko sukaaɓe gooŋɗinɓe Joomi maɓɓe min ɓeydani ɓe Peewal.

18:14.t: Min kaɓɓi e dow ɓerɗe maɓɓe tuma nde ɓe darinoo, ɓe mb'i: "Joomi amen ko Jeyɗo o kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin, men noddataa ko woori Mo deweteeɗi, gooŋɗii haray men mb'ii ontuma [konngol] pantungol.

18:15.t: Ɓee yimɓe amen, ɓe jogitike ko woori Mo deweteeɗi, ko haaanunoo ko yo ɓe ngddu e dow maɓɓe dalil ɓannguɗo. Ko hommbo ɓuri tooñde ko foti e on pekindiiɗo fenaande o fawi e Alla.

18:16.t: Tuma nde mgoɗɗitinoɗon ɓe e ko ɓe ndewata ko ko woori Alla, ɓe coroyi to wimbo Joomi mon fontani on e Yurmeende makko nden o newinani on e fiyaake mon neweende.

18:17.t: Haɗa yi'a naange nge si nge ƴellitike henge naayora ka wimbo maɓɓe seŋgo ñaamo, si henge mutude nge mutirana ɓe ka seŋgo nano, kamɓe heɓe e yaajeende e ɗum, ko jeyaaɗum e kaawisaji Alla, on mo Alla feewni ko on woni peewɗo, kala mo,o majjini a heɓantaa mo keeɗo perwnoowo.

18:18.t: Haɗa sikka ɓe ko ɓe finɓe, tawi kamɓe ko ɓe ɗaaniiɓe, Miɗen mbylitira ɓe seŋgo ñaamo e seŋgo nano, rawaandu maɓɓe ndu no fori koyɗe ndun ɗe ka dammbugal, si a ƴellitike e maɓɓe a ruŋtotono e maɓɓe ndogaa a heewatno kulol immorde e maɓɓe.

18:19.t: Ko nii Min immintiniri ɓe fii yo ɓe laɓnondir hakkunde maɓɓe, bi'oowo wi'i e maɓɓe: "No foti heewde ko ñiiɓɗon?" Ɓe mbi'i: "Min ñiiɓii ñallal maa goɗɗum e ñallal." Ɓe mbi'i: "Ko Joomi mon woni ngannduɗo emmbere ko ñiiɓuɗon, nulee goɗɗo e mon won'dude e ɗii kaaki=ceede mon ɗoo ka saare, yo o ndaaru ko hommbo e maɓɓe ɓuri laaɓde ñaamitee, yo o addan on ñaametee immorde e on ɗon, yo o molto wata go'oto tin fii mon.

18:20.t: Pellet, kamɓe si ɓe ƴellitike e mon ɓe piɗat on, ma ɓe ndutta on e laawol maɓɓe ngol, on tuma on maletaake poomaa.

18:21.t: Ko nii min n njaltiniri fii maɓɓe, fii yo ɓe nganndu pellet, Fodoore Alla nde ko nde Goonga, Pellet, Darnga sikke alaa e maggal. Tuma nde ɓe pooɗondiratnoo hakkunde maɓɓe fiyaake maɓɓe ɗen, ɓe mbi'i'i: "Mahee e hoore maɓɓe maadi, ko Joomi maɓɓe woni gannduɗo fii maɓɓe." Ɓe foolɓe e fiyaake mu'un mbi'i i: "Min njogitoto e dow maɓɓe Juulirde."

18:22.t: Aray ɓe mbi'a: "Ko ɓe tato nayaɓo maɓɓe ko rawaandu maɓɓe ndu." Ɓe mbi'a kadi: "Ko ɓe njowo njeegaɓo maɓɓe ko rawaandu maɓɓe ndu ko fampaangol e niɓe." Ɓe mbi'a kadi: "Ko ɓe njeeɗiɗo njeetataɓo maɓɓe ko rawaandu maɓɓe ndun." Maaku: "Ko Joomi an woni gannduɗo limoore maɓɓe, anndaa ɓe si wonaa seeɗaaɓe." Wata a weeñju fii maɓɓe si wonaa yewtere feeñnde, wota a lanndo fii maɓɓe hay e gooto e maɓɓe.

18:23.t: Wota a wi'an huunde: "Min mi mbaɗay ɗum janngo."

18:24.t: Si wonaa si Alla Muuyii, janto Joomi maaɗa si a yejjitii, maaku: "No tijjaa nde Joomi an Feewnan mi ko ɓuri ɓadaade immorde e ɗum Peewal."

18:25.t: Ɓe ñiiɓi ka wimbo maɓɓe duuɓi teemeɗɗe tati, ɓe ɓeydi jeenay.

18:26.t: Maaku: "Ko Alla woni gannduɗo emmbere ko ɓe ñiiɓi, ko Kaŋko heeranii ko wirnii ko ka kammuuji e ka leydi kaawes ko yi'iri wa makko e ko naniri, alanaa ɓe ga makko giɗo, o kafidaa e ñaawoore makko he hay gooto.

18:27.t: Janngu ko wahayinaa e maaɗa ko immorde e deftere Joomi maa nden, alaa wattitoowo Daaluyeeji=konngudi Makko ɗin, a heɓataa ga makko fattorde.

18:28.t: Tabintin woŋkii maaɗa kin won'dude e ɓen noddooɓe Joomi maɓɓe ka bimmbi e ka kiikiiɗe heɓe faandii Jaati makko Kin, wota gite maa ɗe njawtu ga maɓɓe hara haɗa fa'andii cuɗaari nguurndam aduna, wota a ɗofto on mo Min mbelsindini ɓerɗe mun ga jaŋtagol Min o njokki beleeɗe makko fiyaake makko on woni halkaare.

18:29.t: Maaku Goonga ka immorde ka Joomi mon, mono faalaa yo o gooŋɗin mono faalaa yo o yeddu, minen min n keblanii tooñooɓe ɓe Yiite no hunnditi ɓe ɗenɗe magge ɗen si ɓe ɗaɓɓii faabo, ɓe faaboree Ndiyam mba'uɗam no sila taynaaɗo ɗam juɗa je'ece ɗe, bonii njaram bonii werde.

18:30.t: Pellet, ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli moƴƴi ɗin, Minen Min njeebataa njoɓdi kala moƴƴinɗo golle.

18:31.t: Ɓeen ɗoon no woodani ɓe Aljannaaji ñiiɓal caatli no ila ley maɓɓe, hiɓe cuɗiree ton immorde e jawɗe kanŋe ɓe ɓornoo comci haakɗuɗi ɗewluɗi e jalbuɗi ko ɓe soɓɓindiiɓe=tuugiibe ton e hoore julle, moƴƴii mbarjaari moƴƴii kadi fooftorde.

18:32.t: fiyan ɓe yeru,worɓe ɗiɗo min mbaɗani goɗɗo e maɓɓe gese ɗiɗi inab Menhunndintini “kurliriɗe ɗe tamarooje Min mbaɗi hakkunde majje remuru.

18:33.t: Ɗeen gese ɗiɗi kala mgaddi ñaametee majje, ɗe tooñaani hay e huunde e ɗuum, Min ce'eki hakkunde majje [gese ɗen ɗiɗi] caangol.

18:34.t: Wonani mo dimɗe, o wi'ani gon'diijo makko on tawi himo yewtude mo: "Miin miɗo ɓurmaa jawdi e teddude gorol".

18:35.t: O naati ka ngesa makko tawi ko o tooñɗo hoore-makko, o wi'i: "Mi sikkaani ba re'ay poomaa".

18:36.t: Mi sikkaani kadai Darnga ngal daroto, mi wooɗndii si mi artira le ka Joomi am, maa mi taw sanne, waylitorde ɓurnde ba moƴƴude.

18:37.t: Gon'diijo o makko on wi'i mo, tawi homo yewtude mo: "Enee, a yeddii On Takɗo ma immorde mbullaari=leydi refti e toɓɓere [maniiyu] refti O fotndumaa gorko".

18:38.t: Kono min ko Kaŋko Alla woni Joomi am, mi kafidataa e Joomi am hay gooto.

18:39.t: Ko haanunoo tuma nde naatuɗaa ka ngesa maaɗa mbi'aa: "Ko Alla muuyi ko doole alaa si wanaa Alla". Si a yi'ii kam min miɗo ɓurmaa famɗude jawdi e ɓiɗɓe.

18:40.t: No jortaa nde Joomi am okkoyta kam moƴƴere ɓurnde ngesa maa ba O nula e mabba lepte immorde ka kammu ba wonta boowal ɓowrungal.

18:41.t: Maa de ndiyam mabba ɗa wonta ɓeeɓuɗam, hara a hattantaa ɗaɓɓugol ɗam.

18:42.t: Dimɗe makko ɗen bonnaa o weeti homo waylita newe makko ɗen e dow ko o nafki kon e mabba, tawi kammba ko fukkiiba e daƴƴe mabba, homo wi'a: "Ee haaniina,hara mi kafidaano e Joomi an hay e gooto".

18:43.t: Laatanaaki mo fedde nde no walla mo ga Alla, o wonaani poolɗo.

18:44.t: No toon Giggol Alla Goongawol ngol ko Kaŋko moƴƴi mbarjaari moƴƴi battane.

18:45.t: Fiyan ɓe yeru nguurndam aduna ɗam no wa'i wa ndiyam Min njippiniɗam immorde ka kammu jillondiri e majjam puɗi leydi ndin, ɗi wonti munciiɗi keneeli no jarooɗi, Alla wonii ko o kattanɗo e dow kala hu'unde.

18:46.t: Jawdi ndi e ɓiɗɓe worɓe ɓe ko cuɗaari nguurndam aduna, moƴƴi keddotooɗi ɗin ko ɗi ɓuri moƴƴude mbarjaari ka Joomi maaɗa e moƴƴude yela.

18:47.t: Ñannde min n naɓata pelle ɗen a nji'a leydi ndin ko feeñndi, min mooɓa ɓe Min ngaccataa immorde e maɓɓe hay e gooto.

18:48.t: Ɓe kolliree ka Joomi maa [ko ɓe] saffewol, [O Daalana ɓe] gooŋɗii on arii e amen wano min n tagirnoo on non, ka laawol adanol, ko woni on aaƴino won'de min n waɗanaani on fodoore.

18:49.t: Deftere nde wallinee, a nj'a bonɓe ɓe ko hulɓe ko woni kon e mayre, ɓe mbi'a: "Ee bone amen, ko heɓi ndee deftere nde ɗalataa tosokum wonaa njanum si wonaa nde moftii ɗum, ɓe tawa ko ɓe ngolli ko no weeɓitaa, Joomi maaɗa tooñataa hay e gooto.

18:50.t: Tuma nde Min mb'annoo maleykaaji: "cujjanee Aadama, ɓe cujji si wonaa Ibliisa o laatike jeyaaɗo e jinnaaji ɗin o yalti e Yamiroore Joomi makko. E on jogitoto mo e ɓiɗɓe makko ɓen yiɗɓe ga Am, hara kamɓe ko ɓe añɓe mo'on, bonanii tooñooɓe ɓe battudi.

18:51.t: Mi tawnaani ɓe tagugol kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndi wonaa tagugol ko'e maɓɓe kadi, Mi wonaani jogitotooɗo majjinooɓe ɓe sembinooɓe.

18:52.t: E ñannde O Daalata: "Noddee kafidaaɓe Am ɓe, ɓen ɓe ngaaƴiɗon, ɓe nodda ɓe, ɓe njaabotaako ɓe min n mbaɗi hakkunde maɓɓe halkorde".

18:53.t: Bonɓe ɓen nji'a Yiite ngen ɓe pellita won'de kamɓe ko ɓe ukketeeɓe e magge, ɓe keɓataa gaay magge yiiltorde.

18:54.t: Gooŋɗii Min fensitanii yimɓe ɓen e ndeer ndee Alqur'aanaare immorde e kala yeru, neɗɗaŋke on wonii homo ɓuri kala huunde wennjugol.

18:55.t: Haɗaani yimɓe ɓen nde ɓe gooŋɗinta ɓe insinanoo Joomi maɓɓe tuma nde Peewal ngal arnoo e maɓɓe, si wonaa nde arata e maɓɓe sunna aranɓe ɓen maaɗun nde arata e maɓɓe lepte ɗen ko ɗe peeñuɗe.

18:56.t: Min Nuliraani Nulaaɓe ɓe si wonaa ko weltinooɓe e jeertinooɓe, ɓe heeferɓe heɓe wennjana meere nden fii yo ɓe fuynir nde Goonga kan, ɓe njogitii aayeeje Am ɗen e ko ɓe mjeertiniraa kon jalnori.

18:57.t: Alaa potatɗo tooñde on waajuraaɗo aayeeje Joomi makko o ɗuurii=fali e gaayi majje o yejjiti ko juuɗe makko ɗen ardini kon. Minen Min mbaɗii e ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen cokooɗe fii wota ɓe faamu nde, ka noppi maɓɓe kadi pahu, hay si a noddii ɓe fa'ade e Peewal ɓe peewataa on tuma haapoomaa.

18:58.t: Ko Joomi mon woni cuhroowo ko O Jom yurmeende e on, sinndo O nangitirno ɓe ko ɓe paggitii kon O yaccinanatno ɓe lepte ɗe, ko woni, no woodani ɓe fodoore ɓe heɓataa ga mayre fattorde.

18:59.t: Ɗeen ca'e, Min kalkuno ɓe tuma nde ɓe tooñnoo min mbaɗani halkeede maɓɓe nden Fodoore.

18:60.t: Tuma nde Muusaa maakannoo sagata makko on: "Mi seerataa haa mi yottoo ka fottirde maaje ɗe ɗiɗi, ma de mi wuloo jamaanu.

18:61.t: Tuma nde ɓe njottoyinoo hakkonde majje ɓe njejjiti li'ingu maɓɓe, ngu jogitii laawol maggol ka maayo wuddere.

18:62.t: Nde ɓe lummbunoo o [Muusaa] maakani sagataa makko on: "Addan en sojjaari=bottaari men ndi, gooŋɗii en kawrii e nduu yahdu men ɗoo tampere.

18:63.t: O wi'i: "A yi'ii, nde cornoɗen ka fetere, min mi yejjiti ɗoon li'ingu o yejjintinaani kam fii maggil si wonaa Seytaane nde mi anndita ngu jogitii laawol maggol nder maayo no haawnori".

18:64.t: [Muusaa] maaki: "Ko ɗoon ko ngonɗen ɗaɓɓude kon [woni], ɓe nduuttii e ɓatteeji maɓɓe fillitagol.

18:65.t: Ɓe tawoyi jeyaaɗo immorde e jeyaaɓe Amen min n ngokki mo jurmeende immorde ka amen, min nganndini mo immorde e amen Ganndal.

18:66.t: Muusaa maakani mo: "Enee [a accay] mi jokkete fii yo a anndinam goɗɗum e ko ngandinaɗaa kon peewal ewal"?

18:67.t: [Khadiru] maaki: "Pellet, aan a hattantaa muñal won'dugol e an".

18:68.t: Ko honno muñuirtaa e dow kon ko a huɓindoraa ɗum ganndal?

18:69.t: [Muusaa] maaki: "A tawat kam n si Alla Muuyi ko mi munñiiɗo, mi yeddataa yamiroore maa".

18:70.t: O maaki: "Si a jokkat kam wota a lanndo kan gaayi hu'unde haa mi yeewte immorde e mayre jaŋta".

18:71.t: Ɓe njahi haa de ɓe mbaɗɗnoo ka laana o yulika, [Muusaa] maaki: "A yulii ka fii yo ka yoolu yimɓe makka?! gooŋɗii a addii hu'unde mawnde".

18:72.t: [Khadiru] maaki: "Enee, mi wi'aano ma pellet, an a hattantaa muñal won'dugol e am".

18:73.t: [Muusaa] maaki: wota a jogoram ko mi yejjiti kon, wota a hewtinan e fiyaake am on satteende".

18:74.t: Ɓe njehi haa nde ɓe pottunoo e suka o wari mo! P maakani [mo]: "E a war woŋkii laaɓuki tanaa [yoɓtanagol] woŋkii, gooŋɗii a addii hu'unde añiinde".

18:75.t: [Khadiru] wi'i: "Enee, mi wi'aano ma pellet, an a hattantaa muñal won'dugol e am".

18:76.t: [Muusaa] maaki: "Si mi lanndike ma gaayi hu'unde ɓaawo ɗii, wata a won'dino e am, gooŋɗii a timminii ngantu e am.

18:77.t: Ɓe njehi haa ɓe njaltiti e yimɓe saare, ɓe ɗaɓɓiri ɓe ñaametee ɓe calii wernude ɓe, ɓe tawi e ndeer mayre maadi faalaa fukkaade [Khadiru] o darnindi , o [Muusaa] maaki: "Sinno a yiɗno a ƴettatno njoɓdi e ɗum".

18:78.t: [Khadiru] maaki: "Ko ɗum woni ceerdigal hakku- nde am e ma'a, mi yeewtu maa firo k ko a hattanaana munñaade e dow mum".

18:79.t: Si ko laana ka, ka laatanike miskineeɓe ngollo- ɓe ka maayo, mi faalaa aybin'de ka, hari laatike ɓaawo maɓɓe laamɗo homo nannga kala laana o jaɓta.

18:80.t: Si ko suka on mawɓe makko ɓe ngoni gooŋɗinɓe , min kuli wata o fawu ɓe bewre e keeferaaku.

18:81.t: Men paalaa nde Joomi maɓɓe waɗtitanta ɓe ɓurɗo mo moƴƴude laaɓɗo e ɓurɗo ɓattaade yurmeende.

18:82.t: Si ko maadi ndin, ndi laatanino sukaaɓe ɗiɗo won'ɗuɓe ka saare, laatii ley mayri ngalu maɓɓe kamɓe ɗiɗo, hari baaba maɓɓe laatinoke moƴƴo, Joomi maaɗa Faalaa nde ɓe njottotoo sagatalaagu maɓɓe, O yaltina ngalu maɓɓe ngu [ɗuum] ko Yurmeende immorde ka Joomi maa, mi waɗiraani ɗum e yamirooree am, ɗuum ko firo kon ko a hattanaani munñaade e dow mum.

18:83.t: Heɓe fa'umaa laɓndaade fii Julqarnayni, maaku: "Aray mi jannga e taweede mon e ɗum jaŋta.

18:84.t: Minen, Min weeɓinanno mo ka leydi, Min ngokki mo immorde e kala hu'unde sabu.

18:86.t: Haa nde o yottinoo ka mutirde na'ange ngen o tawi henge muta e loope ɓaleeje, o tawi ton yimɓe : Min mbi'i'i: "Ko aan yo jom galaaɗi ɗiɗi, ko si a leptay ma si a jogitoto e maɓɓe ko moƴƴi.

18:87.t: O wi'i: Si tawii ko on tooñuɗo min lepta mo, refti o ruttee ka Joomi makko o lepta mo lepte añiiɗe".

18:88.t: Si tawii ko on gooŋɗinɗo o golli ko moƴƴi no woodani mo njoɓdi moƴƴiri ndin, aray min n mbi'ana mo e fiyaake amen on neweende.

18:90.t: Haa de o yottinoo ka ƴellitorde na'ange nge, o tawi henge ƴellitoo e dow yimɓe, Min mbaɗanaani ɓe ga magge heeɗo.

18:91.t: Ko wano nii, gooɗii Min kuɓindike ko woni kon ka makko e ganndal.

18:93.t: Haa nde o yottinoo hakkunde heedooji ɗi ɗiɗio tawi ga majji yimɓe ɓe ɗeɓataa faamde konngol.

18:94.t: Ɓe mbi'i: eey ma Julqarnayni, pellet, Yaajuuja e Maajuuja ko bonnooɓe ka leydi. Enee, min waɗante njeenaari fii yo a waɗ hakkunde amen e maɓɓe heedo?

18:95.t: O wi'i: "Ko Joomi am weeɓinani kan kon ɓuri moƴƴude, walliree kan doole mi waɗa hakkunde mo'on e maɓɓe heedo".

18:96.t: Ngaddanee kam kunte njamɗe haa nde o feppi- ndirnoo hakkunde naɗe ɗen ɗiɗi, o wi'i: "pifee haa nde o waɗnoo ɗum yiite, o wi'i: ngaddanee kam sila mi wancina e dow mum".

18:97.t: Ɓe kattantaa ƴellitagol ndi, ɓe hattantaa kadi julgol ndi.

18:98.t: O wi'i: ɗum ɗoo ko Yurmeende immornde e Joomi am, si Fodoore Joomi am nden arii o waɗat [heedo] ngo ɗiggungo, Fodoore Joomi am nde laatike ko nde Goonga".

18:99.t: Min ɗala yoga e maɓɓe nden ñalnde no yolloo e yoga, wuttaa ka allaadu Min mooɓa ɓe mooɓudee.

18:100.t: Min weeɓitanat(holliray) Jahannama nden ñannde yedduɓe ɓen weeɓitugol=holllirgol.

18:101.t: Ɓeen ɓe gite mue'n laatii e wirngallo gaayi jaŋta Aan, ɓe laatiɓe kattantaa nangol.

18:102.t: Enee, ɓen yedduɓe cikku ɓe njogoto jeyaaɓe Am ɓen ga Am, Minen Min heblanii Jahannama on fii yedduɓeɓen wona werde.

18:103.t: Maaku: "Taw si min kumpitay on fii ɓurɓe hayrude(pertude) golle?"

18:104.t: Ko ɓeen ɓe golle mu'en yeebii ka ngurdam aduna hara kamɓe heɓe cikka heɓe moƴƴin'de golle.

18:105.t: Ko ɓeen ngoni yedduɓe aayeeje Joomi maɓɓe ɗen e kawroygol e makko, golle maɓɓe ɗen bone Min ñiiɓinantaaɓe Ñande Darngal Ɓetu.

18:106.t: Jahannama ko ɗum woni njoɓdi maɓɓe, sabu ko ɓe njeddi kon ɓe jogitii aayeeje am ɗen e Nulaaɓe am ɓen njalkitde.

18:107.t: Pellet, ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli moƴƴi ɗin laatanto ɓe Aljannaaji Firdawsi Werdi(jipporde).

18:108.t: Ko ɓe duumotooɓe ndeer ton, ɓe ɗaɓɓataa gani makko waylitorde.

18:109.t: Maaku: "Sinno maayo ngo laatino ndaha fii Daaluyeeji Joomi am ɗi, maayo ngo re'ayno ko adii ndee re'ata Daaluyeeji Joomi am ɗin, sinno Min addii yeru maggo e ɓeydude".

18:110.t: Maaku: "Pellet min, ko mi ɓanndiŋke yeru mon, no wahayineede e am. Pellet, deweteeɗo mon o ko deweteeɗo Gooto, kala jortiiɗo kawroyde e Joomi makko yo o gollu golle moƴƴe wota o kafidu e dewal Joomi makko hay e gooto".

19:2.t: Jaŋto Yurmeende Joomi maaɗa jeyaaɗo makko on Jakariyaa.

19:3.t: Tuma nde o noddunoo Joom makko noddaannu suuɗiindu.

19:4.t: O maaki: "Jooma, min dey ƴi'e ɗen lo'ii e am hoore nden ranwi puri, mi laataaki non ɗawaaɗo ka toragol ma Jooma.

19:5.t: Min dey mi hulii lomtotooɓe ɓen ɓaawo am, cuddiiɗo am on laatike dimaro okkam immorde ka maaɗa ɓiɗɗo.

19:6.t: O rona kam, o rona kadi e ɓeynguure Yaaquuba nde waɗaa mo Joomi weltoraaɗo.

19:7.t: Eeyma Jakariyaa Minen Min mbeltinirii ma suka innde makko ko Yahyaa Min mbɗanaani mo ko adii tokoraajo.

19:8.t: O maaki: "Jooma ko honno laatoranta kam suka sonnaajo am on laatike dimaro min kadi mi yottike e nayewu yooruɗo tere?"

19:9.t: [Maleka on] wi'i: "Ko nii Joomi maaɗa Daaliri: Ɗum no neewii e Am gooɗii Mi Tagiino ma ko adii, hari a laataaki huunde".

19:10.t: O maaki: "Jooma waɗanam ma'ande". O Daali: "ma'ande maaɗa nden ko wota a wowlidu e yimɓe ɓen jemmaaji tati potondirɗi".

19:11.t: O yalti hakkunde yimɓe makko ɓen immorde ka ganngunal o joopii fa'ande e maɓɓe, ɗum woni subunhinee bimmbi e kiikiiɗe.

19:12.t: Eeyma Yahyaa nanngir deftere nden doole, min n ngokki mo ñeeñal ko o suka.

19:13.t: E Yurmeende immorde ka amen ko o laaɓuɗo o laatike kuloowo [Alla].

19:14.t: Ko o ɗigganɗo jipnaaɓe mo ɓen o wonaani ndunndarankeejo gaaƴiiɗo.

19:15.t: Kisal e makko ñande o jibinaa e ñande o maayata e Ñande o immintintee ko o guuruɗo.

19:16.t: Jaŋto ka deftere Mariyama tuma nde o woɗɗitinoo immorde e yimɓe makko ɓen [o yaari] e nokkuure funnaangeyaŋkoore.

19:17.t: O jogitii ga maɓɓe wirngallo, min Nuli e makko Ruuhu amen o nanndintinanii mo e ɓanndiŋke fotondirɗo.

19:18.t: O maaki: min mi moolorii jurmoteeɗo On immorde e maaɗa si tawii a laatike ko a kulɗo [Alla].

19:19.t: O wi'i: "Pellet, min ko mi Nulaaɗo Joomi maaɗa fii yo mi okke suka laaɓɗo.

19:20.t: O wi'i: "Ko hono laatoranta kam suka hara ɓanndiŋke memaani kam mi laataaki kadi jeenoowo(pijoowo)".

19:21.t: O wi'i: "ko nii Joomi maaɗa Daaliri: "Ɗuum no newii e am e fii yo min mbaɗ mo ma'ande fii yimɓe ɓen e Yurmeende immornde e amen ɗum laatike fiyaake Ñaawaaɗo".

19:22.t: O roondii mo, o pottidodi e makko e nokkuure woɗɗitiinde.

19:23.t: Ŋata(qatwere) on fiɗi mo e jullere tamarohi, o wi'i: "Ee hara noon mi maayno ko adii ɗum mi laatoo hu'unde yejjitaande".

19:24.t: O noddi mo immorde e ley makki, [o wi'i] wota a suno gooŋɗii Joomi maaɗa waɗii ley maaɗa caatngol.

19:25.t: Yeƴu(dimmbu) fa'ade e maaɗa jullere tamarohi kin nde liɓa e ma,aɗa ɓennduɗe teɓeteeɗe.

19:26.t: Ñaam yaraa ɓuɓɓinaa gite, si a yi'ii goɗɗo immorde e ɓanndiŋke wi'u: "Miin dey mi takkanii Hinnorante(jurmotooɗo korka mi wowlidata e neɗɗaŋke hannde".

19:27.t: O radi e makko ka yimɓe makko, homo tammbii mo ɓe wi'i: "Ko an yo Mariyama gooŋɗii a addii hu'unde hawnii nde".

19:28.t: Eyma banndiraawo Haaruuna baaba maa laatanooki neɗɗo bonɗo neene maaɗa kadi laataaki jinoowo.

19:29.t: [Mariyama] joopii e makko, ɓe mbi'i:"Ko hono min njewtirta e on sanfaajo gonɗo e woofordu(liir) gondo e tiiggu".

19:30.t: [Iisaa] maaki: "Miin dey ko mi jiyaaɗo Alla o okkii kam deftere nden o waɗii kam annabaajo".

19:31.t: O waɗi kam Barkinaaɗo nokku kala ka mi woni, o wasiyii kam Juulde nden e Jakka on fodde miɗo wuuri.

19:32.t: Ko mi ɗigganɗo yumma am, o waɗaani kam ndunndarankeejo malkisaaɗo.

19:33.t: Kisal on wonii e am ñande mi jibinaa e ñande mi maayata e ñande mi immintintee ko mi guuruɗo.

19:34.t: On ko Iisaa geɗal Mariyama Daalol Goongawol ngol heɓe cikkitoo fii mu'um.

19:35.t: Haananaa Alla nde o jogitotoo ɓiɗɗo senaare e wonanii mo, si O ñaawii fiyaake o daalanay mo tan: "Won" o wona.

19:36.t: Pellet, ko Alla Woni Joomi am e Joomi mon, mdewee o. Ko ɗum woni Laawol poocciingol".

19:37.t: Pelle ɗe luutondiri hakkunde majji, bone wonanii ɓen yedduɓe ceedagol ñalaande mawnde.

19:38.t: Kaawee ko nanirta yi'ira wa maɓɓe Ñande ɓe aroyta e amen, kono tooñooɓe ɓen hannde heɓe e ndeer majjere ɓanngunde.

19:39.t: Kulɓinir ɓe ñande Nimse, tuma nde fiyaake on ñaawaa hara kamɓe hiɓe e ndeer welsindaare hara ɓe gooŋɗinaa.

19:40.t: Minen min ndonat lesdi ndi e ɓen wonɓe e dow mayri, ko ka amen ɓe nduttetee.

19:41.t: Jaŋto ka deftere Ibraahiima, pellet, kaŋko o laatino Goonguɗo annabaajo.

19:42.t: Tuma nde o maakannoo bem makko: "eeyma baaba ko holɗum ndewantaa ɗum ko nanataa yi'ataa hara duncantaa ma hay e hu'unde?

19:43.t: Eeyma baaba min dey gooɗii arii am immorde e Ganndal kon ko araani e maaɗa, jokkam mi fewne e Laawol po'occiingol.

19:44.t: Eeyma baaba, wota a rew Seytaane, pellet, Seytaane laatike jedduɗo jurmotooɗo.

19:45.t: Eeyma baaba, min dey miɗo huli wota meeme Lepte immorde ka jurmotooɗo laatanoɗaa Seytaane giɗo.

19:46.t: [Baaba makko] wi'i: "Enee, an a añ deweteeɗi am ɗin nee Ibraahiima, pellet, si a accaani mi fiɗete selam dummunne [juutuɗo].

19:47.t: [Ibraahiima] maaki: "Kisal e maaɗa aray mi inminanomaa ka Joomi am, pellet, Koŋko O Laatike Newaniiɗo kam.

19:48.t: Mi martoo(deestoo) on e kon ko ndewoton ga Alla, mi toroo Joomi am no gasa mi wonataa tampirɗo toragol Joomi am.

19:49.t: Tuma nde o martinoo(deestinoo) ɓe e ko ɓe ndewata kon gaAlla, min n ngokki mo Ishaaqa e Yaaquuba kala [gooto e maɓɓe] Men waɗi [mo] Annabaajo.

19:50.t: Min ngokki ɓe immorde e Yurmeende amen, min mbaɗani ɓe mantoore toownde.

19:51.t: Jaŋto ka deftere Muusaa, pellet, kaŋko o laatinoke laɓɓinɗo o laatinoke kadi Nulaaɗo Annabiijo.

19:52.t: Min noddi mo ka senŋgo ñaamo [fello] Tuuri Min ɓattini mo gunndeteeɗo.

19:53.t: Min ngokki mo immorde e Yurmeende amen musiɗɗo makko on Haaruuna Annabiijo.

19:54.t: Jaŋto ka defftere Ismaa'iila, pellet, kaŋko o laatinoke gooŋɗuɗo fodoore o laatinoke kadi Nulaaɗo Annabiijo.

19:55.t: O laatino himo yamira yimɓe makko ɓen Juulde e askal on, o laatino kadi beltoraaɗo ka Joomi makko.

19:56.t: Jaŋto ka deftere Idriisa, pellet, kaŋko o laatino goonguɗo Annabiijo.

19:57.t: Men ɓamti mo e nokkuure Toownde.

19:58.t: Ko ɓeen ngoni ɓeen, ɓe Alla Neemini e dow mu'en immorde e Annabaaɓe ka geɗal ɓebibbe Aadama e ɓen ɓe Men mbaɗɗinnoo wond'ude e Nuuhu e geɗalɓe Ibraahiima e Israa'iila e ɓen ɓe Min peewni min n cuɓii si janngaama e dow maɓɓe aayeeje Hinnorante ɓe fukko koɓe sujjooɓe e wullooɓe.

19:59.t: Lomtii ɓaawo maɓɓe lomtotooɓe, ɓe njeeebi Juulde nden ɓe njokki welamuuji ɗin aray ɓe kawroya e bone.

19:60.t: Si wonaa on tuubuɗo o gooŋɗini o golli ko moƴƴi, ɓen ɗon ɓe naatat Aljanna on ɓe tooñiroy- taake hay e huunde.

19:61.t: Aljannaaji Adan ɗin ɗi jurmotooɗo o Fodi jeyaaɓe makko ɓen e birnagal, pellet Kaŋko, Fodoore Makko nden laatike ko aroore.

19:62.t: Ɓe nanataa ndeer ton rayrayti si wonaa kisal no woodani ɓe arsike maɓɓe on nder ton bimmbi e kiikiiɗe.

19:63.t: Oon Aljanna mo Men ndoninta immorde e jeyaaɓe amen ɓen, on laatiiɗo kulol [Alla].

19:64.t: Min njippotaako si wonaa e Yamaruyee Joomi maaɗa, no woodani mo ko woni kon hedde yeeso amen e ko woni kon ɓaawo amen e ko woni kon hakkunde ɗum, Joomi maaɗa laataaki yejjitoowo.

19:65.t: Jooma kammuuli ɗin e lesdi ndin e ko woni kon hakkunde majji, rew mo monñitor dewal makko. Taw si haɗa anndani mo tokoraajo?

19:66.t: Neɗɗaŋke on no wi'a: "Eyoo, e jaka si mi maai aroyay ka mi yaltinee tawa ko mi guurɗo?"

19:67.t: Enee, neɗɗaŋke on annditaani Menen Men Tagiino mo ko adii, hari o wonaali hay e hu'unde.

19:68.t: Mi woondirii Joomi maaɗa min mooɓat ɓe sanne e Seytanuuji ɗin, refti min ngadda ɓe sara Jahannama ko ɓe jiccii ɓe.

19:69.t: Refti min n ɗo'ofa immorde e kala fedde ko hommbo e maɓɓe ɓurnoo saɗtude dartagol e dow jurmotooɗo e o.

19:70.t: Refti ko minen nganndi ɓeen ɓurɓe haan'dude e sumugol e magge.

19:71.t: Alaa hay e gooto e mo'on si wanaa o joloyat e magge, ɗum laatike e dow Joomi maaɗa ko ñaawaɗum Teeŋtinaa.

19:72.t: Refti min ndaɗna ɓen hulunooɓe [Alla] min n ɗala tooñooɓe ɓen ko ɓe jicciiɓe ndeer ton.

19:73.t: Si janngaama e taweede maɓɓe aayeeje amen Ɓannguɗe ɗe yedduɓe ɓe mb'a gom- ɗimɓe ɓen: "Ko honnde e feddeeji ɗi ɗiɗi ɓuri moƴƴude darnde ɓuri moƴƴude kadi batu".

19:74.t: Heewii ko min kalki ado maɓɓe immorde e gire tawi ko kamɓe ɓuri fotude mirannji suudu e mba'adi.

19:75.t: Maaku: "On laatiiɗo e ndeer majjere nde yo jurmotooɗo fortan mo fontudee, haa si ɓe yi'ii ko ɓe fodaa kon, si tawii ko lepte ɗen maa si ko Darngal ngal, aray ɓe annda on m bonuɗo nukkuure e ɓurɗo lo'ude konu".

19:76.t: Alla no ɓeydana ɓen feewɓe Peewal, Moƴƴi heddotooɗi ɗin ɓuri moƴƴude mbarjaari ka Joomi maaɗa ɓuri moƴƴude kadi ruttorde.

19:77.t: Enee, a yi'ii on jedduɗo aayeeje amen ɗe, o wi'i: "Maatun mi okkee jawdi e ɓiɗɗo".

19:78.t: Enee o ƴelliti e ko wirnii kon, kaa jogiti ka jurmotooɗo e Aadi?

19:79.t: Wonaa non, aray Min mbinnda ko o wi'ata kon min ɓeydana mo immorde e Lepte ɗen ɓeydude.

19:80.t: Min ndonna mo e ko o wi'ata ko, o ara e Amen ko o weddiiɗo(gooto).

19:81.t: Ɓe njogitii ga Alla deweteeɗi fii yo ɗi laatano ɓe semmbe.

19:82.t: Wonaa non, maɓe njeddu dewugolɓe ngol, ɓe laatanoo ɓe añɓe.

19:83.t: Enee a yiaani minen min Nulii Seytanuuji e dow yedduɓe ɓen hiɗi ƴuuna ɓe ƴuunudee.

19:84.t: Wata a hawjan ɓe, pellat, limonayɓebe kala limugol.

19:85.t: Ñande Min mooɓoyta hulooɓe [Alla] ɓe ka jurmotooɗo Teddinaaɓe.

19:86.t: Men cogga bonɓe ɓe haa ka Jahannama ko ɓe jolooɓe.

19:87.t: Ɓe maraa tefoore nden si wonaa on jogitiiɗo ka jurmotooɗo Aadi.

19:89.t: Gooŋɗii on mgaddii hu'unde pankarɗii nde.

19:90.t: Kammuuli ɗin no do'a(ɗesa) se'ekaade immorde e ɗuum leydi ndin feera pelle ɗe nduuya fii unagol.

19:92.t: Haananaa jurmotooɗo de o jogitotoo ɓiɗɗo.

19:93.t: Alaa ko woni e kammuuli e leydi si wanaa o aray e jurmotooɗo hombo woni jeyaaɗo.

19:94.t: Gooɗii o moftii ɓe o limii ɓe kadi e limugol.

19:95.t: [Gooto] Kala e maɓɓe aray Mo Ñande Darngako o woddiiɗo(teeldɗo).

19:96.t: Pellet, ɓeen gooɗinɓe ngolli ko moƴƴi ko aray ka jurmotooɗo waɗanaɓe Giggol.

19:97.t: Anndu ko min n newiniri nde ka ɗenngal maaɗa; ko fii yo a weltinir nde hulooɓe [Alla] ɓen njertiniraa nde yimɓe saɗtuɓe weeñre.

19:98.t: Heewii ko min kalki ado maɓɓe e gire taw si hiɗa so'a e maɓɓe immorde e goɗɗo, maa haɗa nana ɓe hito?

20:2.t: Min Telliniraani Alqur'aanaare nde e maaɗa fii yo a tampu.

20:3.t: Si wonaa waaju wonan'de on kuloowo [Alla].

20:4.t: Ko Jippinaande immorde e oon takɗo leydi ndi e kammuuji toowuɗi ɗin.

20:5.t: Jurmotooɗ o O fotii e dow Arsi he.

20:6.t: No woodani mo o ko woni ko e kammuuji ɗin e ko woni kon e leydi ndi e ko wini kon hakkunde majji kannji ɗiɗi e ko woni ko e les leydi.

20:7.t: Si a fenñinii konngol ngol, pellet, Kaŋko homo Anndi ko feeñi e ko o suuɗi.

20:8.t: Alla deweteeɗo alaa si wonaa Kaŋko, no woodani mo Inɗe moƴƴe ɗe.

20:9.t: taw si arii e maaɗa yewtere fii Muusaa.

20:10.t: Tuma nde o yi'inoo yiite, o wi'ani ɓeynguure makko nden: "Ñiiɓee, min de mi haynike jayngol mbele-jo'o mi addanat on immorde e maggol docotal ma mi tawa ka [moggo] yiite tinndinoowo.

20:11.t: Tuma nde o aunoo e maggol o noddaa; "eyma Muusaa".

20:12.t: [Alla Daalano mo] Min dey ko miin Woni Joomi maaɗa poortu paɗe maa ɗen; pellet an, haɗa ka aynde(caatngol) Tuwaa Laɓɓinaande(seninangol).

20:13.t: Miin mi Suɓike ma Jento ko wonaa Wahyineede ko.

20:14.t: Pellet, ko miinn Woni Alla deweteeɗo alaa si wonaa miin n rewam; ñiiɓi e Juulde nde fii Annditugol am.

20:15.t: Pellet, Darnga ko aroowa Miɗo ɗeɓa suuɗude ngo fii yoɓe kala woŋkii ko ki gollu no.

20:16.t: Wota faddo ma e gaayi maggal on mo gooŋ- ɗinaani ngo o jokki mbeleeɗe makko o halkii.

20:17.t: Ko holɗuum woni ka ñaamo maaɗa an Muusaa?

20:18.t: O maaki: "Ndu ko tuggordu am miɗo tuggoo ndu miɗo liwtirana ndu dammi am ɗin, miɗo mari kadi haajuuji gɗɗi e mayru".

20:20.t: O weddi ndu, tawi kayru ko ndu mbooɗdi won'ndi e yahde.

20:21.t: O Daali: "Nanngu ndi wota a hul min ngartira ndu e mba'adi mayru araniri ndi".

20:22.t: Naatnu junngo maaɗa ngo ka ndeer seŋgo maa; ngo yalta ko ngo raneewo ko aldaa e rafi ɗum ko Aaya goo.

20:23.t: Fii yo min n kollle immorde e aayeeje amen aawɗe ɗe.

20:24.t: Yah to Fir'awna, pellet, kaŋko o bewi.

20:25.t: O maaki: "Jooma Yaacnanam ɓernde am nde.

20:27.t: Piɓtaa fiɓnde nde e ɗemngal am.

20:28.t: Fii yoo ɓe pahmu konngol am ngol.

20:29.t: Mbaɗanaa kam ballo jeyaaɗo ka ɓeynguure am.

20:32.t: Tawnaa mo e ndeer fiyaake am o.

20:33.t: Fii yo mon cenine ko herwi.

20:35.t: Pellet, aan a wonii kumpitiiɗo min .

20:36.t: O Daali: "Gooŋɗii a okkaama toraare maaɗa nde aan Muusaa".

20:37.t: Gooŋɗii n neeminiino ma e laawol goɗngol.

20:38.t: Tuma de min mbahayinnoo fa'ade e yumma maa ko wahayinaa ko.

20:39.t: [Men Daali] weddo mo to ndeer hontoore weddo ɗum nde kadi ka ndeer diidere, yo diidere nden kadi weddoyo mo ka maayo ; ƴetta mo gaño am e gaño makko, mi werni e maaɗa Giggol immorde ka am e fii yo a ne'e e dow ndeenka am.

20:40.t: Tuma de banndiraawo maaɗa on yahynoo; o wi'a: "Enee, yo mi tinndin on e on mo no ne'a mo?" min ngartirmaa ka yumma maaɗa fii yo gite makko ɗen ɓuuɓu hara o sunaaki. Mbarɗaa woŋkii min ndaɗumaa immorde e saɗteende nde, min njarribimaa jarrabuyeeje ñiiɓɗaa duuɓi ka yimɓe Madyana refti ngarɗaa ka fodoore aan Muusaa.

20:42.t: Yah aan e musiɗɗo maa on won'dude e aayeeje am ɗe wota on derfu e jaŋtagol Lam.

20:43.t: Njehee ka Fir'awna, pellet, kaŋko o bewi.

20:44.t: Mbianee mo konngol newiingol mbele-jo'o kaŋko o waajitoto ma o hula.

20:45.t: Ɓe maaki: "Joomi amen, minen dey moɗen kuli nde murtata e hoore amen maa de o bewata".

20:46.t: O Daali: "Wota on kule, pellet, miin miɗo won'di e mooɗon miɗo Nana Miɗo Yi'a".

20:47.t: Ngare ee e makko, mbi'on: "minen ko min Nulaaɓe Joomi maaɗa, accit won'dude e amen ɓiɗɓe Israa'iila ɓe wota a leptu ɓe, gooŋɗii min ngddanii e ma aaya immorde ka Joomi maaɗa, kisal wonii e oon jokkuɗo Peewal ngal.

20:48.t: Gooŋɗii Wahayinaama e amen; won'dema, Lepte ɗe no fawii ka jennuɗo ɗuurni.

20:49.t: [Fir'awna] wi'i: "eeyma o Muusaa, ko hommbo woni Joomi mooɗon?"

20:50.t: [Muusaa] maaki: "Joomi amen, ko on Okkuɗo kala hu'unde tagoore mayre refti o feewni.

20:51.t: [Fir'awna] wi'i: "Ko holno gire arane ɗen pewndori?"

20:52.t: [Muusaa] maaki: "ganndal ɗum no ka Joomi am e ndeer Deftere, Joomi am majjataa o yejjitataa".

20:53.t: Oon baɗanɗo on leydi ndi weƴƴitaandi, o naadani on e ndeer mayri laabi, O jippini immorde e kammu ngu ndiyam Min njaltiniri ɗam nooneeji immorde e puɗi ceertuɗi.

20:54.t: Ñaamee ngaynon neemoraaɗi mo'on ɗi. Pellet, no e ndeer ɗum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo] Aayeeje fii joomiraa- ɓe kakkillaaji ɗin.

20:55.t: Ko immorde e mayri Min Tagi on, ko e ndeer mayri Min nduttata on, ko immorde e mayri kadi Min njaltinoyta on laawol goɗgol

20:56.t: Gooŋɗii Min kolli mo aayeeje Amen ɗen kala majje, o jeddi i o salii.

20:57.t: [Fir'awna] wi'i: "enee, a ar ka amen fii yo a njaltinir min ka leydi amen mbilewu maaɗa ngun aan Muusaa?"

20:58.t: Maa min ngaddane mbilewu yeru maggu, waɗ fodoore hakkunde amen e maaɗa hara men lunndataako nde wonaa an kadi [lunndotoo nde] e nokkuure fotondirnde.

20:59.t: [Muusaa] maaki: fodoore mooɗon nden ko ñande saɗɗugol ngol, yo yimɓe ɓen mooɓindire mbeetaa(fenynyaange).

20:60.t: Fir'awna ruŋiti o mooɓi pewje makko ɗen refti o ari.

20:61.t: Muusaa maakani ɓe: "On boniraama, wota on 'pekindo fenaande fawon e Alla sakko O mehira on Lepte, gooŋɗii sooyii on pekindiiɗo.

20:62.t: Ɓe pooɗondiri fiyaake maɓɓe on hakkunde maɓɓe, ɓe vuuɗi cowndi ɗin.

20:63.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Pellet ɓee ɗiɗo ko wileeɓe heɓe paalaa yaltinirnde on ka leydi mon e mbilaaku maɓɓe ngu ɓe itta laawol mon ɓurngol l ngol.

20:64.t: Mooɓitee pewje mo'on ɗe refti ngaron ko on lappol, gooŋɗii malaama hannde on poolɗo.

20:65.t: Muusaa maaki: "Ko si tawii ko onon mbeddotoo ma si ko minen ngonata adotooɓe weddaade.".

20:66.t: [Muusaa] maaki: "ko woni, (mbedde), tawi ɓoggi maɓɓe e cawoy maɓɓe koy no wa'itana mo sabu mbilewu maɓɓe ngun woni ko e yahde.

20:67.t: Muusaa so'i kulol ka woŋkii makko.

20:68.t: Min Daali: 'Wota a hul, pellet ko an woni pooloowo on.

20:69.t: Weddo ko woni ko ka ñaamo maaɗa ɗum moɗay ko ɓe moƴƴini ko, pellet, ko ɓe moƴƴini ko ko pewje mbile bileejo on maletaake nukkuwoo ka o ardi.

20:70.t: Wileeɓe ɓe mbernaa ko ɓe sujjuɓe, ɓe mbi'i: "Min ngooŋɗinii Joomi Haaruuna e Muusaa".

20:71.t: [Fir'awna] wi'i: Eyoo, on gooŋɗinii mo ko adii mi duŋanaade(sakkitaade) on? Pelet, ko kaŋko woni mawɗo mo'on on anndinɗo on mbilewu ngu, mi wooɗndii, maa mi taƴa juuɗe mon ɗen e koyɗe mon ɗen taƴa luutindira, maa mi feta on e julle tama aray anndon ko hommbo e amen ɓuri lepte caɗtuɗe e heddotooɗe.

20:72.t: [wileeɓe ɓe] mbi'i: "Min ɓurnataa ma e dow koo ko ari e amen immorde e ɓannganguyeeji, e On Takɗo min, [an Fir'awna] ñaawu ko ñaawataa ko, pellet, ko ñaawataa ko ka ngurndan aduna ɗoo".
