20:73.t: Minen dey, men ngooŋɗinii Joomi amen fii yo o yawtan men goopi amen e kon ko dooluɗaa men e mu'un immorde e mbilewu nguyn, ko Alla woni Moƴƴo keddotooɗo.

20:74.t: Pellet on mo ari ka Joomi mu'un hara ko o bonɗo; haray pellet, no woodani mo Jahannama o maayataa e nder magge o wuurataa kadi .

20:75.t: mo ari ka makko ko o gooŋɗinɗo hara gooŋɗii o golliino moƴƴi ɗi, haray ɓen ɗon no woodani ɓe Darjaaji Toowɗi ɗin.

20:76.t: Aljannaaji ñiiɓal no doga e ley majji caatli ɗi, ko ɓe duumotooɓe ndeer ton, ko ɗum woni njoɓdi on laɓɓiniiɗo.

20:77.t: Gooɗii Min mbahaynii fa'ade e Muusaa roƴdu e jeyaaɓe Am ɓe waɗan ɓe laawol yooru ngol ka maayo joorngol wota a hul hewtiteede wota a hul [yoolagol].

20:78.t: Fir'awna jokkitiri ɓe konooli makko ɗi, suumi ɓe ka maayo ko suumi ɓe kon.

20:79.t: Fir'awnan majjini yimɓe makko ɓe, o fewnaani [ɓe].

20:80.t: Eey monɓiɗɓe Israa'iila gooŋɗii Min danndiino on e gaño mon on, Min podi on kadi ka baŋŋe ñaamo [fello] Tuuri ngon, Min njippini e mooɗon Manna= ɗacce njumri e doobe .

20:81.t: Ñaamee immorde e laaɓɗi ko Min arsiki on kon, wota on bew e nder mu'un sakko Tikkere Am nden njippo e mo'on, on mo tikkere am jippii e mu'un gooŋɗii haray o halkike.

20:82.t: Pellet, Min ko Mi keewuɗo Yawtanngol wonan'de on tuubuɗo o gooŋɗini o golli ko moƴƴi refti o feewi.

20:83.t: Ko holɗum heñinmaa ga yimɓe maa ɓen aan Muusaa?

20:84.t: [Muusaa] maaki: "Ɓeeɗoo, hieɓe iwtiri ɓaawo am, mi heñike ka Maaɗa Joomi fii yo A welto.

20:85.t: [Alla] Daali: "Pellet, Mennen gooŋɗii Men njarribike=finninii yimɓe maaɗa ɓen ɓaawo maaɗa, Saamiriiyu majjinii ɓe".

20:86.t: Muusaa ruttii ka yimɓe makko ɓen ko o tikkuɗo suniiɗo; o maaki: "Ko onon yo yimɓe, enee, Joomi mo'on Fodanaani on Fodoore Moƴƴere, kaa ko aadi ndin juutani on? Kaa on faandi nde jippotoo e mo'on Tikkere immorde ka Joomi mooɗon si lunndi ɗon fodoore am nden?"

20:87.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Min lunndaaki fodoore maaɗa nde e sago amen, kono minen men ndonndinaama teddeendi e cuɗaaje yimɓe ɓen men wernii ɗe, ko nii Saamiriiyu kadi welirni".

20:88.t: O yaltinani ɓe ɓanndu ngaari marn hito= huunaango, ɓe mbi'i: "Ko ko'ol woni deweteeɗo mon e deweteeɗo Muusaa on, o yejjiti [mo ɗoo]".

20:89.t: Enee, ɓee yiaani wonan'dema ruttataako e maɓɓe konngol, ndi maranaa ɓe kadi lorra wonaa fii non [pooɗugol] nafa.

20:90.t: Gooɗii Haaruuna maakaniino ɓe ko adii: "Ko onon yo yimɓe, pellet, on njarribora kol, pellet, Joomi mooɗon ko jurmotooɗo o jokkee kam ɗoftoɗon yamiroore am nden".

20:91.t: Ɓe mbi'i i: "Min ceerataa ko min ñiiɓuɓe e [dewal] makkol haa Muusaa ruttoo e amen".

20:92.t: [Muusaa] maaki: "eeyma Haaruuna, nde nji'iɗaa ɓe majjii ko haɗmaa,

20:93.t: de njokkitataa mi? Kaa a yeddii yamirooe am on?!"

20:94.t: [Haaruuna] maaki: "eeyma ɓiy neene am, wota a nanngu wahre am nde wonaa hoore am nden kadi, miin dey, mi hulu wata a wi'i: Mi seerdii hakkunde ɓiɗɓe Israa'iila ɓe, mi heɗaaki konngol maaɗa ngol".

20:95.t: [Muusaa] maaki: "Ko hol ɗuum woni fiyaake maaɗa on an Saamiriiyu?"

20:96.t: [Saamiriiyu] wi'i: "Mi yi'ii ko ɓe yiaani ɗum, mi nokki nokkannde e batte nulaaɗo on [Jibriila] mi wernii ɗum ko nii suɗirani lam woŋkii am.

20:97.t: [Muusaa] maaki: "Yahu, pellet, no woodanmaa ka ngurndam nde wowlataa wanaa meemondiral, pellet, no woodanmaa kadi Fodoore a lunndataako nde, ndaarii fa'ade e dewteeɗo maa, on mo ñalluɗaa ufinaade e hoore mun, mi woondii mi sumat mo refti mi ƴaroo mo ka maayo e ƴaragol".

20:98.t: Pellet, deweteeɗo mon On ko Alla, On Mo Deweteeɗo alaa si wanaa Kaŋko, Ganndal makko Yaajanii kala hu'unde.

20:99.t: Ko wano nii Men polloranay maa immorde e kumpital ko feƴƴunoo kon, gooŋɗii Men ngaddanii ma immorde ka Amen jaŋta.

20:100.t: Mo ɗuurike e mayre pellet, o ronndoto Ñande Darngal teddeele [bakkaatu].

20:101.t: Ko o luttinteeɗo e ndeer majje, bonanii ɓe donngal Ñande Darngal.

20:102.t: Ñaande wuttoytee ka alaadu Min mooɓa bonɓe ɓen nden Ñalnde ko mbuliiɓe [gite].

20:103.t: Heɓe sowndondira hakkunde maɓɓe [ɓe mbi'a] on ñiiɓaani si wonaa [balɗe] sappo.

20:104.t: Ko Minen ngoni Annduɓe ko ɓe wowlata kon, tuma nde koohooɓe maɓɓe e laawol wi'ata: "On ñiiɓaani si wonaa ñallal".

20:105.t: Heɓe lanndaade ma fii pelle ɗen, maaku: "Joomi am ƴaroto ɗe e ƴaragol".

20:106.t: O acca [leydi] ndi ko ndi boowal ɓowrungal.

20:107.t: A yi'ataa e mayri ooñannde wonaa tintiire.(naɗde).

20:108.t: Ko nden Ñande ɓe njokkata noddoowo on ko aldaa e celugol mo,, hitooji ɗi yankinanoo Hinnorante On hara a nanataa si wnaa ñu'umbaangol.

20:109.t: Nden Ñande tefoore nden nafataa, si wonaa on mo Hinnorante On sakkiti ɗum O weltori konngol makko.

20:110.t: Homo Anndi ko woni ko yeeso maɓɓe e ɓaawo maɓɓe ɓe kuɓindortaa ɗum ganndal.

20:111.t: Je'ece ɗen yankinanii guruɗo Dartiiɗo On, gooŋɗii sooyii on donndiiɗo tooñe.

20:112.t: On mo ngolli immorde e moƴƴi ɗin hara ko o gooŋɗinɗo o hulaa tooñe wonaa uytaneede kadi.

20:113.t: Ko nii Min Telliniri nde Alqur'aanaare Aarabuure Men fensiti kadi e nder mayre immorde e kammbaaji ɗin mbela-jo'o kamɓe ɓe kulat maa nde fuɗɗanoo ɓe waaju.

20:114.t: Alla Laamɗo Goonguɗo On Toowii, wata a heñor Alqur'aanaare nden ko adii nde timmintee e maaɗa wahayu mayre, maaku: "Joomi ɓeydanam Ganndal".

20:115.t: Gooŋɗii min ngaadondiri e Aadama ko adii o yejjiti Min keɓanaani mo pellital.

20:116.t: Tuma Nde Men Daalannoo maleylaaji ɗi cujjanee Aadama, ɓe cujji si wanaa Ibliisa o salii.

20:117.t: Men Daali: "eeyma Aadama, pellet, ooɗoo ko o gaño maa aan e sonnaajo maa on, wota o yaltin on dey ka Aljanna sakko tampaa".

20:118.t: Pellet, no woodanmaa nde a heegetaake nder ton a holataa kadi.

20:119.t: Pellet, an a ɗomɗetaake nde ton e wuletaake kadi.

20:120.t: Seytaane sonwonsini faade e makko; o wi'i: eeyma Aadama,hara yo mi tinndine e leggal luttineede ngal e laamu ngu follotaako ngu?"

20:121.t: Ɓe ñaami e maggal, feeñani ɓe mettefooji maɓɓe ɗin, ɓe naati e suddirgol e dow maɓɓe immorde e kaaki Aljanna o, Aadama yeddi Joomi makko o majji.

20:122.t: Refti Joomi makko Suɓii mo, o Tuubini mo o Feewni [mo].

20:123.t: O Daali: "njippee toon, onon fof yoga e mo'on ko añɓe yoga. Si tawii tun aroyii e mo'on immorde e am peewnoowo kala jokkuɗo Peewal Am ngal o majjataa o malkisataake kadi".

20:124.t: Kala ɗurniiɗo gaayi jaŋtagol lam, haray pellet, no woodani mo ngurndam ɓilluɗam Men mooɓoya mo Ñalnde Darngal ko o bumɗo.

20:125.t: O wi'a: "Joomi, ko fii holɗum mooɓanɗaa lam ko mi bumɗo, goŋɗii mi laatinoke ji'oowo?"

20:126.t: O Daala: "Ko wano nii arnoo e maaɗa Aayeeje Amen ɗen njejjituɗaa ɗe, ko wano nii kadi hannde njejjitirteɗaa".

20:127.t: Ko wano nii min njoɓirta on ɓurtinɗo ɗo o gooŋɗinaa aayeeje Joomi makko ɗen, pellet, ko Lepte Laakara ɗen ɓuri saɗtude ko ɗen kadi heddotoo.

20:128.t: Kaa hara ɓannganaali ɓe no foti hewde ko Men halki ado maɓɓe immorde e gire? Heɓe yaha e koɗooli maɓɓe, pellet, no e ɗuum aayeeje wonan'de joomiraaɓe kakkillaaji ɓen.

20:129.t: Sinno wonaano Daalol aditii ngol immorde ka Joomi maaɗa [Lepte] ɗen laatotono duumiiɗe e lajal innaangal.

20:130.t: Munño e dow ko ɓe kaalata ko, subuhinor jettugol Joomi maaɗa ko adii ƴellitagol naange ngen e ko adii mutugol magge e ka saa'iiji jemma subuhino e ka seraaji ñallal belajo'o a weltoto.

20:131.t: Wota a yawtin de gite maa ɗe fa'ade k ko Min ndakmini ɗum nooneeji immorde e maɓɓe, cuɗaari ngurndam aduna fii yo Min njarribor ɓe e ɗum, Arsike Joomi maaɗa on ɓuri moƴƴude ko on kadi keddotoo.

20:132.t: Yamir ɓeynguure maaɗa nden Juulde nden munñitoraa e ɗum, Min laɓndaaki ma arsike ko Minen arsikaymaa. Battane [moƴƴe] ɗen kadi wonanii hulooɓe Alla ɓen.

20:133.t: Ɓe mbi'i'i: "Ko hɗnno ara e amen Aaya immorde ka Joomi makko?" Enee, hara araani e maɓɓe ɓanngal ko woni ko e ɗeri adani ɗin?

20:134.t: Sinndo Minen Min kalkirno ɓe Lepte ko adii ɗum, ɓe mbi'atno: "Joomi amen, ko hannoo Nualaa e amen Nulaaɗo men njokka Aayeeje Maa ɗen, ko adii nde Men koyata men hesra.

20:135.t: Maaku: "Gooto kala [e amen] no habbitii, [onon kadi] habbitee aray anndon ko hommbo woni jom Laawol Pocciingol ngol ko hommbo kadi feewi".

21:1.t: Ɓattiimo yimɓe ɓe hasboore maɓɓe nde, te kamɓe heɓe e ndeer welsindaare ko ɓe ɗuurniiɓe.

21:2.t: Arataa e maɓɓe waajo immorde ka Joomi maɓɓe ko fuɗɗaa si wonaa ɓe jentike nde kamɓe heɓe pija.

21:3.t: Ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗe ko belsandiiɗe ɓe tooñɓe suuɗa cowndi(gunndo) [wi'a] enee, h oo wonu si wanaa ɓanndiŋke yeru mo'on, kaa on ngarat ee mbilewu hara onon hoɗon nji'a (ndaara)?!

21:4.t: O maaki: "Joomi am no anndi Konngol ngol ka kammu e ka Leydi Kaŋko ko o Nanoowo gannduɗo on.

21:5.t: Ko woni, ɓe mbi'i i'u: "Ko nde jiiɓu-jaaɓu koyɗi, toode, o fekindi nde, ko woni, kaŋko ko o jimoowo, awa yo o addan en aayewal wano aranɓe ɓen Nuliranoo non".

21:6.t: Gooŋɗinaani ado maɓɓe immorde e saare Min kalki nde. Enee, hara ko kamɓe gooŋɗita?

21:7.t: Min Nulaani ado maaɗa si wonaa worɓe Min Wahayina e maɓɓe, lanndee yimɓe defte ɓe si tawii wonii on anndaa.

21:8.t: Min mbaɗaani ɓe ɓalli ɓe ñaamataa ñaametee, ɓe laataaki kadi luttinteeɓe.

21:9.t: Refti Min nGoonginani ɓe Fodoore nde Min danndi ɓe won'dude e ɓen ɓe Min Muuyi, Min kalki fantinɓe ɓen.

21:10.t: Gooŋɗii Min njippinii fa'ade e mooɗon deftere no e ndeer mayre jaŋtawol mooɗon. Kaa on kakkiltaa.

21:11.t: Heewii ko Min kalki immorde e saare laatinoonde ko tooñunde Min puɗɗi ɓaawo mayre yimɓe goo.

21:12.t: Tuma nde ɓe so'unoo Lepte amen ɗen, tawi kamɓe heɓe ndoga ɗe.

21:13.t: Wota on ndogu, nduttee fa'ade e ko neeminaɗon kon e mu'un e koɗanɗe mo'on, mbelejo'o on lannditoyte.

21:14.t: Ɓe mbi'a: "Eeyoo, bone amen, pellet, minen min laatinoke tooñɓe".

21:15.t: Seerataa ndun noddaandu maɓɓe, haa Men mbaɗa ɓe coñateeri ko ɓe mayɓe.

21:16.t: Min tagaani kammu ngun e leydi ndin e ko woni kon hakkunde majji ko Min fijooɓe.

21:17.t: Sinndo Min 'a'andino nde Min njogotoo fijindaaru, Min njogitotono ɗum immorde ka Amen si tawii Min laatike waɗooɓe.

21:18.t: Ko woni, Miɗen mberloo Goonga ka e dow mehre nden ka munca nde, tawa kayre ko nde fuuyoore, no woodani on bone kon ko cifotoɗon.

21:19.t: Ko Kaŋko woodani ko woni ko ka kammuuji e ka leydi ɓen wonɓe ka Makko kadi ɓe mawnittaako ga rewugol Mo, ɓe hasrintaaka kadi.

21:20.t: Heɓe cubhinoo jemma e ñaloma ɓe ngaamataa.

21:21.t: Kaa ɓe njogiti deweteeɗi ka leydi kannji hiɗi immintina [mayɓe ɓen].

21:22.t: Sinndo laatino e majji [kammuuli ɗi e leydi ndi] deweteeɗi ko wonaa Alla ɗi bonayno. Senayee wonanii Alla Jom Arsi kin ga koɓe cifotoo.

21:23.t: O laɓndetaake ko o gollata ko, kamɓe ko ɓe laɓnditoyteeɓe.

21:24.t: Kaa ɓe njogiti gaanin makko deweteeɗi? Maaki: "ngaddee daliili mon on, ko ndee woni jaŋta ɓe won'ɗuɓe e am e jaŋta ɓen adiiɓe kam". Ko woni, ɓurɓe ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe ɓe anndaa Goonga kan kamɓe ko ɓe ɗurniiɓe.

21:25.t: Min Nulaani ado maaɗa immorde e Nulaaɗo si wonaa Min mbahayinii e makko; pellet, deweteeɗo alaa si wanaa Min ndewee Kam.

21:26.t: Ɓe mbi'i wi'i: "jurmotooɗo O jogitike ɓiɗɗo". Senaare woodanii mo, ko woni, [ɓen ko ɓe] jiyaaɓe teddinaaɓe.

21:27.t: Ɓe adortaa mo konngol ngol, kamɓe ko Yamiroore makko nden ɓe ngollata.

21:28.t: Homo Anndi ko woni ko yeeso maɓɓe e ko woni ko ɓaawo maɓɓe, ɓe tefanoytaa si wanaa on mo o Weltanii, kamɓe immorde e kulol makko ko ɓe jootuɓe.

21:29.t: Kala e maɓɓe kadi bi'iɗo: "min ko mi deweteeɗo gaanin makko". On ɗo Min njoɓat mo Jahanna- ma ko wano nii Min njoɓirta tooñooɓe ɓen.

21:30.t: Enee, ɓen yedduɓe yiaani won'dema kammuuji ɗi e leydi ndi ɗi laatinoke kippondirɗi, Min ngudditi ɗi Min mbaɗi immorde e ndiyam ɗam kala hu'unde wuuru nde. Kaa ɓe ngonɗintaa?

21:31.t: Min mbaɗi aɗi ka leydi pelle fii wata nde ooñodo e maɓɓe, Min mbaɗi aɗi e mayri ɗate jaacuɗe, mbelejo'o kamɓe ɓe peewat.

21:32.t: Min mbaɗi kammu ngun kippuɗi reenaandi, kamɓe ko ɓe ɗurniiɓe ga aayeeje amen ɗe.

21:33.t: Ko Kaŋko woni On Takɗo jemma on e ñalawma on e na'ange nge e lewru ndun kala majji hiɗi fubboo(lummboo) ka fuluku.

21:34.t: Min mbaɗanaani ɓanndunke ado maaɗa luttineede, enee, si a maayii ko kamɓe ngoni luttinteeɓe ɓen?

21:35.t: Kala woŋkii meedat maayɗe nde, Min njarribora on bone on e moƴƴere nde njarrabagol, ko ka amen kadi nduttotoɗon.

21:36.t: Si ɓen yedduɓe nji'ii ma, ɓe njogitortaa ma si wanaa jalkitde [ɓe mbi'a] "Enee, hara ko oo woni on jaŋtotooɗo deweteeɗi mo'on ɗin?" hara kamɓe ko ɓe yedduɓe jantagol jurmotooɗo On.

21:37.t: NeɗɗakTagaama immorde e hawjere, aray Mi holla on Aayeeje Am ɗen wata on kawju.

21:38.t: Heɓe mbi'a: "Ko honnde tuma woni ndee Fodoore, si tawii ko on gooŋɗuɓe?"

21:39.t: Sinndo ɓen yedduɓe ngandiino tuma tawi ɓe ittataa Yiite nge ka je'ece maɓɓe wanaa kadi ka ɓabbe maɓɓe kadi, kamɓe ɓe wonaani walloyteeɓe.

21:40.t: Ko woni, nge aray e maɓɓe e juhayee nge muga ɓe, hara ɓe kattantaake mdttugol nge, ɓe wonaani kadi neeɓnoyateeɓe.

21:41.t: Gooŋɗii Nulaaɓe goo jalkitanooma ado maaɗa, jippii e ɓen jalkituɓe ko ɓe laatinoo heɓe njalkita.

21:42.t: Maaku: "Ko hommbo reenata on jemma e ñalawma immorde e jurmotooɗo On, ko woni, kamɓe gah jaŋta Joomi maɓɓe ko ɓe ɗurniiɓe.

21:43.t: Kaa no woodani ɓe reweteeɓe ɓe no dannda ɓe gaanin Amen? Ɓe kattantaake wallude hay woŋkiiji maɓɓe, wanaa kamɓe ngoni wondateeɓe immorde e Amen.

21:44.t: Ko woni, Min ndakmitii ɓee e baabiraaɓe maɓɓe ɓen haa ngurndam ɗam juutani ɓe. Enee, ɓee nji'aani won'de Menen Meɗen ara e leydi ndin Min ustira ndi immorde e seraaji mayri? Kaa ko kamɓe ngoni foolooɓe ɓen.

21:45.t: Maaku: "Anndu ko mi woni jeertinirde on ko Wahyu on, [kono] paho on nanataa noddaandu ndu, si ɓe njertinaama".

21:46.t: Mi woɗndii si meemii ɓe seeɗa immorde e Lepte Joomi maa ɗen, maa ɓe mbi'a: "Ee-yoo, bone amen pellet, minen min laatinoke tooñɓe".

21:47.t: Min mbaɗa manndikirɗe(peesirɗe) Nuunɗal ngal fii Ñande Darngal hara woŋkii woo toñiroytaake hay e hu'unde, hay si laatii ko yeru gabbun pamarun Min ngaddat kum Min njonii Hasbooɓe.

21:48.t: Gooŋɗii Min ngokkii Muusaa e Haaruuna Serndoore nden e ndayngu e jaŋta wonan'de hulooɓe ɓen.

21:49.t: Ɓe hulayɓe Joomi maɓɓe ka wirnii hara kamɓe immorde e Darngal ngal ko ɓe kuli.

21:50.t: Ndee [Alqur’aanaare] ko nde Jaŋta, ko nde barkinaande Min nJippiniinde. Kaa onon ko on yeddatɓe nde?

21:51.t: Goŋɗii Min ngkkii Ibraahiima Peewal makko ngal ko adii, Min laatike kadi Annduɓe mo.

21:52.t: Tuma nde o maakannoo baaba makko e yimɓe makko ɓe: "Ko holɗum woni ɗii nanndonlaaji nate mahiiɗe, ɗin ɗi ufiniɗon e [dewal] mu'un?"

21:53.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Min taw baabiraaɓe amen ɓe no rewde ɗi".

21:54.t: O maaki: "Gooŋɗii on laatike onon e baabiraaɓe mon ɓe e ndeer majjere ɓanngunde ngonɗon".

21:55.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Enee, ko Goonga kan addanɗaa min, kaa an ko e fijooɓe ɓe njeyaɗaa?"

21:56.t: Maaku: "Ko woni, Joomi mo'on ko Jooma kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin oon Tagkɗoɗi, min komi jeyaaɗo e seediiɓe ɓe e dow ɗuum".

21:57.t: Mi wooɗndirii Alla, maa mi fewja fii ɗii sanamuuji mo'on ɓaawo duŋtagolmo'on ko on ruŋii ɓe.

21:58.t: O waɗi ɗi kunte, si wanaa mawndu majji ndun, mbelejo'o kamɓe ɓe nduttoto e mayru.

21:59.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Ko hommbo waɗi ɗu'un e deweteeɗi amen ɗin? Pellet, on ko o jeyaaɗo e tooñɓe ɓen.

21:60.t: Ɓe mb'i: "Min naniino suka no jaŋtoo ɗi ko Ibraahiima o wi'etaa".

21:61.t: Ɓe mi'i: "ngaddee mo yeeso gite yimɓe ɓe, belejo'o ɓe ceedoto".

21:62.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Enee, Ibraahiima ko an waɗi ɗu'um ɗoo e deweteeɗi amen ɗin?"

21:63.t: O maaki: "Ko woni, ko mawndu majji ndun golle ɗum, lanndeeɗi si tawii ɗi laatike hiɗi kaala".

21:64.t: Ɓe nduttii fa'ade e woŋkiiji maɓɓe, ɓe mb'i: "Pellet, ko onon ngoni tooñɓe ɓen".

21:65.t: Refti ɓe nguggini ko'e maɓɓe ɗen [ɓe mbi'i:] gooŋɗii haɗa anndi ɗi'i wonaa layatɗi.

21:66.t: O maaki: "Enee, on ndewat gaanin Alla kon ko nafataa on hay e hu'unde lorrataa on kadi?"

21:67.t: Bis mo'on e kon ko ndewoton ga Alla. Kaa on kakkiltaa?

21:68.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Sunnee mo, mballee deweteeɗi mo'on ɗin, si tawii ko on gollooɓe".

21:69.t: Min Daali: "eeyma yiite, laato ɓuuɓol e kisal e dow Ibraahiima".

21:70.t: Ɓe pa'andii mo pewje Min mbaɗi ɓe pertube ɓen.

21:71.t: Min danɗdi mo [Min ndan ɗi kadi] Luutu fa'ade e ndin leydi ndi Min mbarkini e mu'un wonan'de tageefooji ɗin.

21:72.t: Min ngkki mo Ishaaqa e Yaaquuba ka ɓeydugol, kala maɓɓe Min mbaɗi [ɓe] moƴƴuɓe.

21:73.t: Min mbaɗi ɓe Almaamiiɓe heɓe pewna e Yamiroore Amen Min mbahayini fa'ade e maɓɓe gollugol moƴƴi ɗin e ñinnugol Julde nden e okkugol Jakka on, ɓe laatinoke ko ɓe ndewat ɓe Min.

21:74.t: E Luutu Min ngokki mo Ñeeñal e Ganndal, Min ndanɗni mo immorde e nden Saare nde [yimɓe mu'un] laatinoo no golla soɓuɗi ɗin, pellet, kamɓe ɓe laatinoke yimɓe bon'ɓe faasiqiiɓe.

21:75.t: Min naatni mo e ndeer Yurmeende Amen, pellet, kaŋko ko o jeyaaɗo e moƴƴuɓe ɓen.

21:76.t: E Nuuhu tuma nde o noddunoo ko adii, Min njaabinani mo kaŋko e ɓeynguure makko nden immorde e saɗteende mawnde nden.

21:77.t: Moen mballi mo immorde e ɓen yimɓe jedduɓe Aayeeje Amen ɗen. Pellet, kamɓe ɓe laatino yimɓe bon'ɓe, Min njooli ɓe, ɓe fof maɓɓe.

21:78.t: E Daawuuda e Sulaymaana tuma nde ɓe ñaawatnoo fii ngesa ba tuma nde bonnunoo e ndeer mabba dammi yimɓe ɓen Men woni seediiɓe ñaawoore maɓɓe nden.

21:79.t: Min 'aamini nde Sulaymaana [ñaawoore nden] go'oto-kala e maɓɓe Min ngokki Ñeeñel e Ganndal Min eelti wond'ude e Daawuuda pelle ɗen heɗe cubhinoo e colli ɗin kadi, Min laatike golluɓe.

21:80.t: Min nganndini [Daawuuda] moƴƴinngol mekeñaaji fii mo'on, fii yo ɗi ndeen on immorde e hare mo'on. Taw si onon ko on jarnooɓe?

21:81.t: [Min eeltani] Sulaymaana henndu ndu ko ndu bippooru hindu doga e yamiroore makko, fa'ade e ndin leydi ndi Min mbarki e mu'un. Min laatike Annduɓe kala hu'unde.

21:82.t: No e Seytanuuji ɗin, ɗin ɗi no mutana mo, ɗi ngolla golle ga ɗum. Min laatanike ɗi Reenooɓe.

21:83.t: [Jaŋto kadi fii] Ayyuuba tuma nde o noddunoo Joomi makko, [O maaki:] "Min dey memii kam lorra kan, ko aan woni ɓuroowo Yurmeede yurmtooɓe ɓen".

21:84.t: Min njaabinani mo Min kuñci ko heɓi mo kon immorde e lorra, Min ngkkiti mo ɓeynguure makko nden e yeru maɓɓe wond'ude e maɓɓe kadi, ɗum ko Yurmeende immorde ka amen e waaju wona nde rewooɓe ɓen.

21:85.t: [Jaŋto kadi fii] Ismaa'iila e Idriisa e Jalkifli, ɓen fow ko e muñɓe ɓen ɓe njeyaa.

21:86.t: Min naadi ɓe e ndeer Yurmeende Amen nden, pellet, kamɓe ko ɓe jeyaaɓe e moƴƴuɓe ɓeen.

21:87.t: [Jaŋto kadi fii] Jannuuni tuma nde o yahnoo ko o tikkuɗo o sikki won'de Min njarribtaaka e hoore makko, o noddi ka niɓe; "Won'de deweteeɗo alaa si wanaa An Senaare wonanii Ma, min dey mi laatike jeyaaɗo e tooñuɓe ɓen".

21:88.t: Min njaabinani mo, Min ndaɗndi mo immorde e suno ngo, ko wano nii kadi Min danndirta gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

21:89.t: [Jaŋto kadi fii] fii Jakariyaa tuma nde o noddunoo Joomo makko, [o maaki:] Jooma, wota A ɗalam bajjo, ko aan woni Ɓurɗo Moƴƴude ronooɓe ɓen.

21:90.t: Min njaabinani mo, Min ngokki mo Yahyaa, Min moƴƴinani mo sonnaajo makko on, pellet, kamɓe ɓe laatinoke hiɓe yaccoo e [gollugol] moƴƴi ɗin hiɓe nodda Min ka reerɗeende e kulol ɓe laatinoke yannkinaniiɓe Min.

21:91.t: [Jaŋto kadi fii] oya [cuddiiɗo] deennooɗo farju makko on Min wutti e makko immorde e Fittaandu amen, Min mbaɗi mo kaŋko e geɗaljo makko on Ma'ande wona nde winndere nden.

21:92.t: Pellet, ɗee mofte mo'on ko mofte go'ote, ko Min ngoni Joomi mo'on Rewee Lam.

21:93.t: Ɓe taƴi fiyaake maɓɓe on hakkunde maɓɓe, ɓe fof ko fa'ade ka am ɓe nduttoytoo.

21:94.t: Kala golluɗo immorde e moƴƴuɗi ɗin hara kaŋko ko o gooŋɗinɗo, dullugol alaa fii golle makko ɗen, pellet, Minen Min mbinndanay mo.

21:95.t: No harmani saare nde Mon kalki ɗum, won'de kamɓe ɓe mduttataako [ton].

21:96.t: Haa si udditoyaama Ya'ajuuja e Ma'ajuuja, hara kamɓe immorde e kala naɗel heɓe cortoo.

21:97.t: Fodoore Goongaare nde ɓadike, tawi kayre puttini giiɗe ɓen yedduɓe, [ɓe mbi'a:] "Eeyoo bone amen, gooŋɗii min laatinoke e nder welsindaare immorde e ɗu'um, ko woni, men laatike tooñɓe.

21:98.t: Pellet, onon e ko ndewoton kon ga Alla, ko on doccote Jahannama. Onon, ko on joloyayɓe e magge.

21:99.t: Sinndo ɓee laatinoke reweteeɓe ɓe njolataano e magge. Ɓe fof maɓɓe ko ɓe luttinteeɓe e ndeer magge.

21:100.t: No woodani ɓe e ndeer magge haraango, kamɓe ɓe nanataa ndeer ton.

21:101.t: Pellet, ɓeen ɓe moƴƴi ɗi adanii ɗum immorde ka amen ɓeen ɗoon ko ɓe woɗɗintinteeɓe ga magge.

21:102.t: Ɓe nanoytaa wuuɗaango magge kamɓe heɓe e ndeer ko woŋkiiji maɓɓe lokaa(wooɗa) ko, ko ɓe duumotooɓe.

21:103.t: Suninoytaaɓe ɗenƴere mawnde nde, Maleykaaji ɓen no jaɓɓooɓe [ɓe mbia:] "Ko ndee woni Ñalaande mo'on, nden nde laatinoɗon hoɗon podee".

21:104.t: Ñande Min taggoyta kammu ngun wano taggugol ɗerol defte. Ko wano Min puɗɗori non ka arannde tagoore Min nduttirta nde, [ɗum] ko Fodoore e dow amen, pellet, Minen Min laatike gollooɓe.

21:105.t: Gooŋɗii Min mbinndiino ka Jabuura ɓaawo Alluwal deenangal ngal, pellet, leydi ndin ko jeyaaɓe Am moƴƴuɓe ɓen ndonoyta ndi.

21:106.t: Pellet,no e ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo] jottingol wonan'de yimɓe rewooɓe ɓen.

21:107.t: Min Nuliraani ma si wonaa Yurmeende wonan'de winndire nde.

21:108.t: Maaku: "Anndu ko Wahayinaa e am, wonan'dema Deweteeɗo mon On ko O Deweteeɗo Gooto. Enee, hara onon ko on jebbiliiɓe?".

21:109.t: Si tawii ɓe mduŋtiima, maaku: "Mi anndinii on e dow potondiral, pellet, mi anndaa si no ɓadii maa ɗum si no woɗɗi ko ko podaɗon".

21:110.t: Pellet, Kaŋko himo Anndi ko feeñi ko e konngol ngol, homo Anndi kadi ko cuuɗoton.

21:111.t: Mi anndaa non, mbelejo'o ɗuum ko jarrabuyee mo'on, e dakamme haa e dummunne.

21:112.t: Maaku: "Jooma, Ñaawir Goonga kan ko Joomi amen jurmotooɗo o woni ballitorteeɗo On e dow ko cifotoɗon".

22:1.t: Eey monyo yimɓe, kulee Joomi mo'on, pellet, dillannde Darnga ngo ko hu'unde mawnde.

22:2.t: Ñande nji'oton ngal, njejjitoyay kala muyninoowo ko o muyninaynoo ko, fukka kala cowiiɗo ko o sowiinoo kon, a yi'at yimɓe ɓen no manndili, hara kamɓe ɓe manndiaa, kono Lepte Alla ɗen ko saɗtuɗe.

22:3.t: No e yimɓe ɓe on mo no wennja e fii Alla ko aldaa e ganndal, o jokka kala Seytaane canndallo.

22:4.t: Winndaama e hoore-makko won'de pellet, kala belduɗo e makko pellet, o majjinat mo, o ɗowa mo haa ka Lepte Sa'iiri.

22:5.t: Ey mon yimɓe, si tawii on e cikkatiima immorde e immital ngal, pellet, Minen Min Tagii on immorde e mbullaari refti e toɓɓere maniiyu, refti e heɗɗere refti e husre timmunde tagoore e nde wonaa timmunde tagoore fii yo Min ɓannginan on, Miɗen Ñiiɓina ka renngaaji ko Min Muuyi kon haa e happu innaaɗo, refti Min njaltini on ko on boobooɓe, refti fii yo on njotto sagatalaaku mo'on no e mo'on ɓen ɓe no maaya no e mo'on kadi ɓen ɓe no nduttee fa'ade ka ɓuri ja'asde e nguurndam ɗam fii wota ɓe nganndu ɓaawo ganndal hay e hu'unde. A yi'at leydi ndin ko yo'orundi si Min njippinii e dow mayri ndiyam ɗan ndi dilla ndi ƴura ndi fuɗina immorde e kala noone wooɗuɗo.

22:6.t: Ɗum, ko tawde pellet, Alla ko Kaŋko woni Goonga kan, pellet, O wurtinat maayɓe ɓen, tawde pellet, ko O kattanɗo e dow kala hu'unde.

22:7.t: Pellet, Darngal ngal ko aray ngal sikke alaa e maggal, won'de pellet, Alla immintinay ɓen won'ɓe ka genaale.

22:8.t: No e yimɓe ɓen on mo no weeñdaa e fii Alla ko aldaa e ganndal wonaa peewal wonaa deftere nurɗunde(jalbunde).

22:9.t: Hkfɗo balaaji mu'un [mawnintiniiɗo] fii yo o majjin gah Laawol Alla ngol, no woodani mo ka aduna koyeere Min meeɗinoyay mo kadi Ñande Darngal Lepte cumoowe ngen.

22:10.t: Ɗum ko sabu ko juuɗe maaɗa ɗen ngardini kon. E won'de pellet, Alla wonaani Tooñoowo jeyaaɓe ɓen.

22:11.t: No e yimɓe ɓen on mo no rewa Alla e dow selindaare; si moƴƴere heɓii mo o tabitira sabu ɗuum si jarrabuyee kadi heɓii mo o waylitoo e ye'eso makko, o hayrii aduna on e La'akara on ko ɗum tigi woni hayrere ɓanngunde nden.

22:12.t: Homo rewa gah Alla ko lorrataa mo e ko nafataa mo kadi. Ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo], ko ɗum woni majjere woɗɗunde nden.

22:13.t: Homo rewa on mo lorra mum no ɓuri ɓadaade diini nafa mum kan, bonii welddiɗo bonii kadi wuuridaaɗo.

22:14.t: Pellet, Alla homoo naatna ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli moƴƴi ɗin Aljannaaji no ila sengo ley majji caatlii ɗi, pellet, Alla homo waɗa ko o faandii ko.

22:15.t: On gonɗo no sikka won'de Alla wallataa mo ka aduna e ka La'akara; yo o fortu ɓoggol fa'ade ka kammu refti o taƴa ngol yo o ndaaru taw si pewje makko ɗen ittay ko tikkani ko.

22:16.t: Ko wano nii Min nJippiniri ɗe Aayeeje ɓannguɗe. Pellet, Alla homo Feewna on Mo o muuyii.

22:17.t: Pellet, ɓen gooŋɗinɓe e ɓen Yahuudinkooɓe e Saabi'iyaŋkooɓe e Annasaaraŋkooɓe e Majuusiŋkooɓe e ɓen sirkooɓe, pellet, Alla O ceerndoowo hakkunde maɓɓe Ñande Darngal. Pellet, Alla e dow kala hu'unde ko O Seediiɗo.

22:18.t: Enee a yi'aali, won'dema Alla no sujjan'de Mo ɓe won'ɓe ka kammuuji e ɓe won'ɓe ka leydi, na'ange nge kadi e lewru ndun e koode ɗen e pelle ɗen e leɗɗe ɗen e daabeeji ɗin e ko ɗuuɗi immorde e yimɓe ɓen, ko ɗuuɗi kadi wajibike e mu'un Lepte ɗen. Kala mo Alla hoyni alanaa mo teddinoowo, pellet Alla homo golla ko o muuyi kon.

22:19.t: Ɓee ɗoo ɗiɗo ko weeñdondirɓe, ɓe mbeñdondirii fii Joomi maɓɓe ɓen yedduɓe non, taƴanoyte ɓe comci immorde e Yiite fatuɗam yuppee ka dow ko'e maɓɓe.

22:20.t: Haɗam honciniree(tayniree) ko woni kon ka deedi maɓɓe e guri ɗin kadi.

22:22.t: Tuma kala ɓe cokli jaltugol ndeer ton immorde e suno, ɓe nduttee e ndeer magge, [ɓe mbii’anee:] meeɗee Lepte cumoowe nge.

22:23.t: Pellet, Alla naatna ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolle moƴƴi ɗin Aljannaaji no ila e ley majji caatɗlii ɗin, ɓe cuɗiree ndeer ton immorde jawe kanŋe e lu'ulu'uuje koltu maɓɓe on nder ton ko hariire.

22:24.t: Ɓe peewnaama fa'ade e ko laaɓi immorde e konngol ngol, ɓe peewnaa kadi fa'ade e Laawol jettiniingol ngol.

22:25.t: Pellet, ɓeen yedduɓe heɓe faddaade gah Laawol Alla ngol e Juulirde Horminnde nden, nden nde Min mbaɗani ɗum yimɓe ɓen, no fota ter ñiiɓuɗo on e mayre e liigotooɗo on. Kala paalaaɗo ooñorde e mayre tooñe, Min meeɗinat mo immorde e Lepte mu'usɗe.

22:26.t: E tuma nde Min nJippinnoo Ibraahiima nokku Suudu ndun, [Min Daali:] Wota a kafidu e Am hay e hu'unde, laɓɓin Suudu Am ndun fii wanngotooɓe ɓen e darotooɓe ɓen [juula] e rukƴooɓe cujja ɓen.

22:27.t: Noddin e yimɓe ɓen fii Hajju ngun, ɓe ngarat e maaɗa ko ɓe seppooɓe e dow kala ɗehiimba reedu, ɓe ngarat immorde e kala laawol goɗɗungol.

22:28.t: Fii yo ɓe seedo nafoore maɓɓe, ɓe njaŋtoo Innde Alla e ndeer ñalɗi ganndaaɗi e dow ko o arsiki ɓe kon immorde e muumi neemoraaɗi, ñaamee e majji, ñamminon kadi baaso ɓilliiɗo on.

22:29.t: Refti yo ɓe ittu tuundi maɓɓe ndi, yo ɓe kuuɓnu takke maɓɓe ɗen, yo ɓe mbanngo Suudu rimɗinaa- ndu ndu.

22:30.t: Ɗuum [ko njamiraɗon], kala mawninɗo Hurumji Alla ɗi tawat ɗuum ko moƴƴere makko ka Joomi makko. Daginanaama on neemoraaɗi ɗin, si wonaa kon ko janngaa e taweede mo'on, ngoɗɗitee coɓɗii ɗi immorde e sanamuuji, ngoɗɗitoɗon kadi konngol fenaande ngol.

22:31.t: Newaniiɓe Alla ɓe ngonaani sirkanooɓe Mo, kala sirkanɗo Alla no wa'ita wa si o pukkiiɗo immorde ka kammu sonndu biftoo mo ma henndu ruuyida e makko [liɓoya] e nokkure woɗɗunde.

22:32.t: Ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo hollii] kala mawninɗo Ma'andeeji Alla ɗin, pellet ɗum, ko e kulol ɓerɗe ɗen jeyaa.

22:33.t: No woodani on e majji nafaaji haa e dummunne innaaɗo, refti nokku majji on ko ka cuudu Ndimuru.

22:34.t: Min mbaɗanii kala mofte laawol fii yo ɓe njaŋto Innde Alla e dow ko O arsiki ɓe kon immorde e muumi neemoraaɗi. Deweteeɗo mon on ko Deweteeɗo Gooto ko Kaŋko njebbilatoɗon, weltinir ɗoftiiɓe ɓen.

22:35.t: Ɓeen [tawɓe] si Alla jaŋtaama ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen kulay, e muññiiɓe ɓen e dow kon ko heɓi ɓe e ñinnooɓe Julde nden heɓe nafka goɗɗum e ko Min arsiki ɓe kon.

22:36.t: E gelooɓi [fayɗi] ɗin Min mbaɗanii on ɗi jeyaaɗum e Ma'andeeji Alla no woodani on e majji moƴƴere, njaŋtee Innde Alla e dow majji ko ɗi saffiniiɗi si becce majji ɗen yanii ñaamee immorde e majji ñamminon kadi yonndiniiɗo e weeɓitotooɗo, ko wano nii, Min eeltirani on ɗi mbelajo'o onon on j Njaarnay.

22:37.t: Hewtoytaa Alla tebbuuli majji wonaa ƴiiƴe majji kadi, kono heewtoy mo kulol ngol immorde e mo'on. Ko wano nii O eeltani on ɗi fii yo on mawni Alla e dow ko o feewni on ko, weltin moƴƴinɓe ɓen.

22:38.t: Pellet, Alla O solnanay(duñanat) ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe, pellet, Alla o yiɗaa kala kodoowo keewɗo jeddi.

22:39.t: Duŋanaama ɓeen wonaaɓe haɓeede [joɓtagol] sabu kamɓe ko ɓe tooñaaɓe, pellet, Alla ko o kattanɗo e dow wallude ɓe.

22:40.t: Ɓeen yaltinaaɓe ka galleeji mu'en ko aldaa e goo- nga si wonaa fii tun ɓe wi'ii: "Joomi amen ko Alla". Sinndo wonaano Alla duñirde yimɓe ɓe yoga e maɓɓe yoga, yirbinteno dewirɗi ruhbaaniyankooɓe ɓen e dewirɗi Annasaara en e dewirɗi Alyahuuda en e Juulirɗe ɗe Innde Alla jaŋtetee e ndeer mu'un ko heewi. ma Alla wallu ɓen wallooɓe mo, pellet, Alla ko o cemmbuɗo Tedduɗo.

22:41.t: Ɓeen tawɓe si Min newinanii ɓe ka leydi ɓe ñiiɓnat Juulde nde ɓe totta askaal o ɓe njamira ko moƴƴi ko ɓe kaɗa ko boni ko Ko Alla woodani ɓattane fiyakuuji ɗi.

22:42.t: Si ɓe njennii ma, gooŋɗii yeddiino ado maɓɓe yimɓe Nuuhu ɓe e Aadiŋkooɓe ɓe e Samuudiŋkooɓe ɓe.

22:43.t: E yimɓe Ibraahiima ɓe e yimɓe Luutu ɓe.

22:44.t: E yimɓe Madyana ɓe Muusaa kadi fennaama, Mi neeɓnani yedduɓe ɓen refti Mi nanngi ɓe, ko honno yagginngol Am ngol wonirnoo?

22:45.t: No foti hewde e ce'e ɗee Min kalki ɗum tawi ko nde tooñnde, hara hende ngajjii e kippudiiji majje, e woyndu jirbundu e kuɓeeje toowɗee [eggaande].

22:46.t: Enee, hara ɓee njhaani ka leydi sakko laatanooɓe ɓerɗe ɓe haqqilira ɗe, ma noppi ɓe nanira ɗi? Pellet, [ko woni kon] wonaa gite ɗe mbumi, kono ko ɓerɗe gonɗe ɗe e nder becce ɗen mbumi.

22:47.t: Heɓe ɗaɓɓire yaccinaneede Lepte ɗe, [e ɗuum le] Alla luutndataako fodoore makko nde. Pellet ñallal ka Joomi maaɗa ko wano duuɓi wuluure no limorton non.

22:48.t: No foti heewde e saare nde min neeɓnani ɗum hara kayre ko nde tooñude, refti Mi nannginde ko fa'ade ka Am woni ruttorde nden.

22:49.t: Maaku: "eymon yo yimɓe, nganndee min ko mi jeertinoowo on ɓannguɗo".

22:50.t: Ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli moƴƴi ɗin no woodani ɓe haforanal e arsike tedduɗo.

22:51.t: Ɓeen yacciiɓe [fii bonnugol] e aayeeje amen ɗen, ɓe ndoŋkintaa [Min] ko ɓen ɗon woni yimɓe Jahiimaawe ngen.

22:52.t: Min Nulaani ado maaɗa immorde e Nulaaɗo wonaa kadi Annabaajo si wonaa si o janngii Seytaane wernoto e ndeer njangin makko kin. Alla itta ko Seytaane wernii kon, refti Alla tabintina aayeeje makko ɗen. Alla ko O ganndo Ñeeñɗo.

22:53.t: Fii yo o waɗuko Seytaane wernotoo ko njarraboye wonan'de ɓeen ɓe nawnaare woni ka ɓerɗe mu'uen ɓe ɓerɗe mu'uen njo'ori ɓen. Pellet, tooñooɓe ɓen ɓe wonii e luural goɗɗungal.

22:54.t: Fii yo ɓeen okkaaɓe Ganndal ngal nganndu pellet, ko [Alqur'aanaare nden woni] Goonga kan immorde ka Joomi maaɗa ɓe gooŋɗina nde, ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen yankinanoo ɗum. Pellet Alla Feewnat ɓen gooŋɗinɓe fa'ade e Laawol Pocciingol.

22:55.t: Ɓeen yedduɓe ceerataa heɓe e nder sikke [fii Alqur'aana] haa Darngal ngal ara e maɓɓe e juhayee maa ɗum ara e maɓɓe Lepte Ñalaande saɗtunde.

22:56.t: Laamu ngu nden Ñande ko Alla heeranii O Ñaawoyat hakkunde maɓɓe, ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli ko moƴƴi ɗin heɓe e ndeer Aljannaaji Neemiiɗi.

22:57.t: Ɓeen yedduɓe, ɓe penni kadi aayeeje amen ɗen, ɓen ɗon no woodani ɓe lepte koynooje.

22:58.t: Ɓeen ferɓe e Laawol Alla refti ɓe waraa maa ɗum ɓe maayi Alla arsikoyay ɓe arsike moƴƴo. Pellet, Alla ko Kaŋko woni ɓuri Moƴƴude Arsikooɓe.

22:59.t: Ma O naatnoyɓe naatirgal ngal ɓe welaa ɗum. Pellet, Alla ko O gannduɗo Muññiiɗo.

22:60.t: Ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo], kala leptuɗo yeru ko o leptaa ko, refti bewaa e hoore-makko ma Alla wallu mo. Pellet, Alla ko O Yaafotooɗo cuhroowo.

22:61.t: Ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo], ko fii pellet, Alla hono naatna jemma on e ndeer ñalorma on, hiMo naada kadi ñalawma on e ndeer jemma on. Pellet, Alla ko o Nanoowo ji'oowo.

22:62.t: Ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo], ko fii pellet, Alla ko Kaŋko woni Goonga kan pellet, kon ko ɓe noddata gaanin makko ko ɗuum woni meere nden. Pellet, ko Kaŋko woni Toowuɗo mawnuɗo on.u

22:63.t: Enee, a tinaani won'dema Alla o jippinii ndiyam immorde ka kammuuji, leydi ndin wonti hecciɗundi? Pellet, Alla ko oNewiiɗo kumpitiiɗo.

22:64.t: Ko Kaŋko woodani ko woni kon ka kammuuji e ka leydi. Pellet, Alla ko Kaŋko woni Galo jettiniiɗo on.

22:65.t: Enee, a tinaani wonan'dema Alla eeltani on ko woni kon ka leydi, laaɗe ɗen no ndogira ka maaje Yamaruyee makko on, homo jogitii kammu ngun fii wata ngu yanu e hoore leydi ndin si wonaa e duŋayee mkko. Pellet, Alla ko o newaniiɗo yimɓe ɓen jurmotooɗo ɗo [ɓe].

22:66.t: Ko Kaŋko woni on guurnuɗo on refiti o wara on refti o wurnitoya on. Pellet neɗɗaŋke on ko o keewɗo jeddi.

22:67.t: Min mbaɗanii kala mofte laawol ngol ɓe ndewata e mu'un, wata ɓe pooɗondir e maaɗa e fiyaake on, noddu fa'ade ka Joomi maaɗa. Pellet, an haɗa e hoore Laawol Pocciingol.

22:68.t: Si ɓe mbeñdi ma, Maaku: "Ko Alla woni gannduɗo ko ngolloton kon".

22:69.t: Alla Ñaawat hakkunde mo'on Ñande Darngal fii kon ko luutondirton fii mu'um.

22:70.t: Enee, a anndaani won'dema Alla homo Anndi ko woni kon ka kammu e ka leydi, pellet, ɗuum no e ndery Deftere. Pellet, ɗum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo] no newanii Alla.

22:71.t: Heɓe ndewa ga Alla kon ko Dalil jippinaaka e fii mu'um, e kon ko ganndal alanaa ɓe e mu'um. Alanaa tooñooɓe ɓen balloowo.

22:72.t: Si jannganaama ɓe aayeeje amen ɗeen ɓannguɗe a ngandat e je'ece ɓen yedduɓe mettinaare heɓe ɗeɓa yanude e ɓen jannganayɓe ɓe aayeeje amen ɗen. Maaku: "Yo mi habru on ko ɓuri bon'de e ɗum mooɗon [ko jaŋtanaɗon ko] ko Yiite ngen Alla fodii nge ɓeen yedduɓe bonii ruttorde.

22:73.t: Eey mon yimɓe, yeru fiyaama keɗtee mo, pellet ɓeen ɓe noddoton gaAlla, ɓe tagata hay mbu'ubu, hay sinndo ɓe mooɓondiriino fii ɗum. Si coongil(mbuubu)ngil jattii ɓe goɗɗum ɓe kattantaake jaɓtugol ngil ɗum. Ɗaɓɓuɗo on e ɗaɓɓaaɗo on fof no lo'i.

22:74.t: Ɓe mawniniraani Alla no O haani Mawninirde non. Pellet, Alla ko cemmbuɗo Tedduɗo.

22:75.t: Alla no suɓoo immorde e Maleykaaji ɗi Nulaaɓe e yimɓe ɓen kadi. Pellet, Alla ko O Nanoowo ji'oowo.

22:76.t: Homo Anndi ko woni kon yeeso maɓɓe e ko woni ko ɓaawo maɓɓe, ko faade ka Alla fiyakuuji ɗin ruttetee.

22:77.t: Eey mon yo ɓen gooŋɗinɓe, ndukƴee cujjon ndewon Joomi mo'on, ngollon ko moƴƴi kon mbelejo'o onon on maloyte.

22:78.t: Mbaɗee Jihaadi fii Alla no Jihaadi haaniri non, Kaŋko OSuɓiima on o mbaɗanaani on ɓitteende ka nder diina, diina baaba mooɗon Ibraahiima ko Kaŋko inni on juulɓe ko adii [ndee Alqur'aanaare] e nder mayre kadi, fii yo Nulaaɗo on laato seedo e hoore-mo'on onon kadi ngonon seeditoytooɓe e hoore yimɓe ɓe. Ñiiɓnee e Juulde nden totton askal on njogitee Alla, ko Kaŋko woni Giɗo mooɗon moƴƴii giɗo moƴƴii balloowo on.

23:2.t: Ɓeen hulooɓe ka ndeer Juulde maɓɓe koɓe yankiniiɓe.

23:3.t: E ɓeen ɗurniiɓe ga rayrayti( bolle mehre).

23:5.t: E ɓeen reenɓe farjuuji maɓɓe ɗi.

23:6.t: Si wonaa e dow suddiiɓe maɓɓe ma ɓe ñaame maɓɓe ɗe njeyi(horbe), haray kamɓe ɓe ngonaa feleteeɓe.

23:7.t: OOn mo ɗaɓɓi ɓaawo ɗum, haray ko ɓeen ngoni jaggitooɓe ɓen.

23:8.t: E ɓeen aynuɓe koolaaje maɓɓe e aadiiji maɓɓe ɗi.

23:9.t: E ɓeen ɓe kañun koɓe reenɓe e dow Juulde maɓɓe ɗen.

23:10.t: Ɓee [siforɓe ɗii sifaaji ɗoo] ko kamɓe ngoni ronooɓe ɓen.

23:11.t: Ɓeen ronoyatɓe Firdawsi on kamɓe ko ɓe duumotooɓe e ndeer makko.

23:12.t: Gooŋɗii Min tagii neɗɗaŋke on immorde e lasili loopal.

23:13.t: Refti Min mbaɗi mo toɓɓere [maniiyu] e ndeer ñiiɓirde kuɓindiinde.

23:14.t: Refti Min Tagi toɓɓere nde heɗɗere, Min Tagi heɗɗere nden huyre, Min Tagi huyre nde ƴi'e, Min koltini ƴi'e ɗeteewu. Refti Min puɗɗanii mo Tagoore woo, barkanii Alla Moƴƴo Takɗo.

23:15.t: Refti onon ɓaawo ɗuum ko on maayooɓe.

23:16.t: Refti pellet, onon Ñande Darngal on imminoyte.

23:17.t: Gooŋɗii Min Tagii dow mooɗon ɗati jeeɗiɗi, Min ngonaani kadi welsindiiɓe gaayi tagoore nde.

23:18.t: Min njippini immorde ka kammu ndiyam e emmbere [haaju tagoore nde], Min ndewni ɗam ka leydi, pellet, Minen ko Nden Hattanɓe e dow naɓugol ɗam.

23:19.t: Min puɗɗani on sabu majjam gese immorde e tamarooje e inabuuje, no woodani on ndeer ton dimɗe ɗuuɗuɗe ko e majje ñaamoton.

23:20.t: E leggal ngal no yalta immorde to Tuuri Siinaa hangal fuɗina guƴam [nebban wujeteeɗam] e li'am [maafirɗam] wonan'de ñaamooɓe.

23:21.t: Pellet, no woodani on e neemoraaɗi ɗi tasakuyee, Miɗen njarna on boɗɗum e ko woni kon ka deedi majji, no woodani on e majji nafooje keewɗe, ko immorde e majji kadi ñaamoton.

23:22.t: Ko e hoore-majji e hoore laaɗe ɗe ndoonndeteɗon.

23:23.t: Gooŋɗii Min Nulii Nuuhu e yimɓe makko ɓe o maaki : eey mon yo yimɓe am, ndewee Alla. Deweteeɗo alanaa on ko woori mo. Enee, on kulatah?".

23:24.t: Hooreeɓe mbatu ngun mbii'ani ɓen yedduɓe immorde e yimɓe makko ɓen: "Oo wonaani si ko o ɓanndiŋke yeru mo'on homo faalaa nde o ɓurnotoo e dow mooɗon. Sinndo Alla muuyino O jippinayno Malaa'ikaaji, min naniraani ɗum baabiraaɓe amen aranɓe ɓen".

23:25.t: Kaŋko o wonaani si wonaa ko o gorko mo jinna woni e mu'um, habbitee mo tun haa seeɗa.

23:26.t: O maaki: "Joom am, wallam e ko ɓe njennimi kon".

23:27.t: Min wahayini fa'ade e makko yo o lesu laana kan e dennka amen e Wahayu Amen, si Yamiroore amen nden arii huɓɓinirde nden pullitike [ndiyam] naatu e ndeer makka immorde e kala nooneeji ɗin ɗiɗi-ɗiɗi. E koreeji ma, si wonaa ɓeen konngol ngol aditii e mu'um, wata a haaldu e am fii ɓen tooñuɓe, pellet, kamɓe ko ɓe yooleteeɓe.

23:28.t: Si a fotondirii aan e ɓeen won'ɗuɓe e maaɗa e dow laana kan, haray maaku: "Yettoore ndeen ko Alla woodani, On dannduɗo Min immorde e yimɓe tooñooɓe ɓen".

23:29.t: Maaku: "Joomam, jippinam e jipporde barkinaande ko Aan woni moƴƴo Jippinoowo".

23:30.t: Pellet, no e ndeer ɗum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo] sayeeje, haysi men laatike ko min njarribotooɓe.

23:31.t: Refti Min 'uɗɗi ɓaawo maɓɓe yiirde woɓɓe goo.

23:32.t: Min Nulii e maɓɓe Nulaaɗo jeyaaɗo e maɓɓe, ɗum woni ndewee Alla, dewateeɗo on ko woori Mo. E on kulatah [Mo]?!".

23:33.t: Batu e yimɓe makko ɓen yedduɓe ɓe penni kawroygol e Laakara on, Min neemini ɓe ka ngurdam aduna wi*i: "Oo wonaani si wonaa ɓannduŋke yeru mooɗon homo ñaama ko ñaamoton kon homo yara kadi ko njaroton kon".

23:34.t: Mi wooɗndii si on ɗoftike ɓannduŋke yeru mo'on, pellet, onon on tuma ko on hayruɓe(pertube).

23:35.t: Enee, o 'oton wonan'dema onon si on maayii on laatike mbullaari e ƴi'e, wonan'dema onon ko on yaltinoyteeɓe?!

23:37.t: [Ɓe mbi'i:] "Ɗum wonaani si wonaa nguurdam amen aduna, miɗen maaya min nguura kadi, minen min ngnaani immintinoyteeɓe".

23:38.t: Kaŋko o wonaani si wonaa ko o gorko pekindiiɗo fenaande fawi e Alla, minen non, min mgnaami gooŋɗinatɓe mo.

23:39.t: O maaki: "Joom am, wallam e ko ɓe njeddii kam kon".

23:40.t: O Daali: "Seeɗanii tan, Mi wooɗndii ɓe ngontat nimsuɓe".

23:41.t: Haacaango ngon nanngi ɓe e Goonga, Min mbaɗi ɓe duuño, halkaare wonanii yimɓe tooñooɓe ɓen.

23:42.t: Refti Min puɗɗi ɓaawo maɓɓe gire woɓɓe goo.

23:43.t: Mofte woo lajal majje ngal adotaako ɗe, ɓe neeɓnantake kadi.

23:44.t: Refti Min Nuli Nulaaɓe amen ɓen ko ɓe jokkondirɓe, tuma kala ari e mofte Nulaaɗo majje on ɓe njedda mo Min njokkini yoga e maɓɓe yoga, Min mbaɗi ɓe yewtereeji, woɗɗineede wonanii yimɓe ɓe gooŋɗintaa ɓen.

23:45.t: Refti Min Nuli Muusaa e musiɗɗo makko on Haaruuna wond'ude e aayeeje amen ɗen e hujja ɓannguɗo.

23:46.t: Fa'ade e Fir'awna e mbatu mu'um ngun, ɓe mawnintinii ɓe laatii yimɓe townitiiɓe.

23:47.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Enee, hara min ngooŋɗinat yimɓe ɗiɗo yeru amen, hara yimɓe maɓɓe ko maccuɓe amen?"

23:48.t: Ɓe njeddi ɓen ɗiɗo, ɓe laatii jiyaaɓe e halkaaɓe ɓen.

23:49.t: Gooŋɗii Min ngokkiino Muusaa Deftere nde mbelejo'o kamɓe ɓe peewa.

23:50.t: Min mbaɗi geɗal Mariyama on e neene makko Ma'ande, Min werni ɓe fa'ade e tulde joomiraare ñiɓrude e callungol.

23:51.t: Eey mon yo Nulaaɓe, ñaamee immorde e laaɓuɗi ɗin ngollon ko moƴƴi, pellet Min, Miɗo Anndi ko ngolloton kon.

23:52.t: E pellet, kaa Diina mo'on ko Diina woota, ko Min woni Joomi mo'on lulee Kam.

23:53.t: Ɓe taƴi fiyaake maɓɓe on hakkunde maɓɓe dente, kala fedde no farnora ko woni kon ka mayre.

23:54.t: Ɗalu ɓe e siwrere nde haa e dummunne.

23:55.t: Enee, hara ɓe cikku wonan'dema ko Min ɓeydiri ɓe kon immorde e jawdi e ɓiɗɓe.

23:56.t: Min njaccinana ɓe e moƴƴereeji, ko woni ɓe tin'aa.

23:57.t: Pellet, ɓern ɓe kañum immorde e kulol Joomi maɓɓe ko ɓe hulɓe.

23:58.t: E ɓen ɓe kañum ko ɓe gooŋɗinɓe sayeeje Joomi maɓɓe ɗen.

23:59.t: E ɓeen ɓe kañum ɓe nhonah sirkanooɓe Joomi maɓɓe.

23:60.t: E ɓen okkayɓe ko ɓe ngokkaa kon, hara ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen ko hulɗe [Alla], wonan'dema kamɓe ko fa'ade ka Joomi maɓɓe ɓe nduttoytoo.

23:61.t: Ɓeen [sifaaɓe ɗii sifaaji ɗoo] heɓe yaccoo e moƴƴereeji ɗi, hara kamɓe ko ɓe adotooɓe e majji.

23:62.t: Min pawaani woŋkii si wonaa fodde bawɗe makki, no ka amen Deftere wowlaynde Goonga kan, hara kamɓe ɓe tooñoytaake.

23:63.t: Ko woni, ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗe no e welsungo immorde e ɗum, no woodani ɓe kadi golle ga ɗuum ko kamɓe ngollate ɗe.

23:64.t: Haa si Min nanngirii neeminaaɓe maɓɓe ɓen Lepte ɗen njaka yoo kamɓe heɓe haaca.

23:65.t: Wata on haacu hannde, pellet onon, on wallataake immorde e amen.

23:66.t: Gooŋɗii Aayeeje Amen ɗen no janngee e taweede mooɗon, laatiɗon hoɗon nduttoo e dow codduli mooɗon.

23:67.t: Ko on mawnintiniiɓe sabu [jeyeede makka] hoɗon kiira haalde bonɗi.

23:68.t: Enee, teskaaki konngol ngol, kaa hara ar e maɓɓe ko araani e baabiraaɓe maɓɓe adinooɓe ɓe?

23:69.t: Kaa ɓe nganndaani Nulaaɗo maɓɓe on, hara kamɓe ko ɓe faaytuɓe mo?

23:70.t: Kaa hara ɓe mb'ay feetere no e makko? Ko woni, o addanii ɓe Goonga kan ɓurɓe heewde e maɓɓe ko añɓe Goonga kan.

23:71.t: Sinndo Alqur'aana jokkuno beleeɗe maɓɓe ɗen, kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin bonayno e ɓen wonuɓe e majji, ko woni, Min addaniiɓe waaju maɓɓe ngun, kamɓe koɓe ɗurniiɓe ga waaju maɓɓe ngun.

23:72.t: Kaa a tori ɓe njeenaari? [Awa] ko njeenaari Joomi maaɗa ndin ɓuri moƴƴude, ko Kaŋko woni Moƴƴo Arsikoowo.

23:73.t: Pellet, an haɗa noddude fa'ade e Laawol Pocciingol.

23:74.t: E pellet, ɓen ɓe mgooŋɗinaani Laakara on ko ɓe seluɓe e Laawol ngol.

23:75.t: Sinndo Min Yurmino ɓe, Min hunci ko heɓi ɓe kon immorde e lorra, ɓe duumotono e ndeer bewre maɓɓe heɓe wemmboo.

23:76.t: Gooŋɗii Min nanngirii ɓe Lepte ɗen, ɓe koykinanaaki Joomi maɓɓe ɓe yankinaaki.

23:77.t: Haa si Min ngudditii e dow maɓɓe dammbugal marungal Lepte saɗtuɗe, e jaka, kamɓe e nyder ɗum ko ɓe taƴii ɓe.

23:78.t: Ko Kaŋko woni On uɗɗanƊo on nanɗe ɗen e giiɗe ɗen e ɓerɗe ɗen, fanɗii ko njeettoton.

23:79.t: Ko Kaŋko woni On Takɗo on ka leydi ko fa'ade ka makko mooɓoyteɗon.

23:80.t: Ko Kaŋko woni on mo no wurna O wara no woodani mo luutindirgol jemma on e ñalawma on, enee, kaa on hakkiltah?

23:81.t: Ko woni, ɓe mbii' yeru ko aramɓe ɓe mb'inoo ko.

23:82.t: Ɓe mb'i: "Enee, si min maayii min ngonii mbullaari e ƴi'e, hara minen ko min immintinoyteeɓe?"

23:83.t: Gooŋɗii min podanooma ɗum minen e baabiraaɓe amen ko adii, ɗum wonaani si wonaa tinndi adinooɓe.

23:84.t: Maaku: "Ko hommbo leydi ndi woodani e ɓeen wonɓe e mayri, si tawii hiɗon nganndi?

23:85.t: Aray ɓe mbi'a: "Ko Alla woodani" maaku: "Enee, on mbaajitotaako?"

23:86.t: Maaku: "Ko hommbo woni Jom kammuuji ɗin jeeɗiɗi e Jom Arsi mawki kin?"

23:87.t: Aray ɓe mbi'a: "Ko Alla" maaku: "Enee, on kulatah [Alla]?"

23:88.t: Maaku hommbo woni e Junngo Mu'um Laamu kala hu'unde hara Kaŋko homo walla O walletaake, si tawii on laatike hoɗon nganndi?

23:89.t: Aray ɓe mbi'a: "Ko Alla woodani" maaku: "Enee, ko honno mbilirteɗon ?"

23:90.t: Ko woni, Min ngaddanii ɓe Goonga kan, pellet kamɓe ko ɓe fenɓe.

23:91.t: Alla jogitaaki ɓiɗɗo, deweteeɗo laataaki wond'ude e Makko, e jaka [si waɗum waɗuno] kala deweteeɗo yaadayno e ko o tagi kon, yoga e maɓɓe townitotono e dow yoga. Senayee wonanii Alla e ga kon ko ɓe cifotoo.

23:92.t: Gannduɗo ko wirnii kon e ko seedaa ko O Toowii e gai ko ɓe cirkata kon.

23:93.t: Maaku: "Jooma am si A hollii kam ko ɓe podaa kon".

23:94.t: Jooma am, wota A waɗam e yimɓe tooñooɓe ɓen.

23:95.t: Pellet, Minen fii yo Min holle ko Min fodi ɓe kon ko Min Hattanɓe [ɗum].

23:96.t: Duñir nden hu'unde ɓurnde moƴƴude [hu'unde] bonunde nden, ko Minen nganndi ko ɓe scfoto kon.

23:97.t: Maaku: "Jooma, mi moolorii ma immorde e kodooje Seytanuuji ɗi".

23:98.t: Mi moolorii ma Jooma am nde ɗi tawata kam.

23:99.t: Haa si maayde arii e goɗɗo e maɓɓe nden, o wi'a: "Jooma am nduttee kam".

23:100.t: Mbelejo'o min, mi ngollay ko moƴƴi e ndeer kon ko mi accunoo, ɗum waɗataa, ngol ko kanngol ko kaŋko wowli ngol, no hedde ɓaawo maɓɓe heedo haa Ñande nde ɓe imminoytee.

23:101.t: Si wuttaama ka alaadu, askaaji alah hakkunde maɓɓe nden Ñande, ɓe lanndandirtah .

23:102.t: Kala on mo jisti(teddi) manndake (peesirgal)muuɗum, haray ko ɓen ɗon ngoni maloyteeɓe ɓen.

23:103.t: Kala mo manndake [moƴƴi] muɗum hoytii, (hoyi)haray ko ɓen ɗon ngoni hayruɓe pittaali muuɗum, ko ka ndeer Jahannama woni ko ɓe luttintee.

23:104.t: Yiite ngen no sunna je'ece maɓɓe ɗen, hara kamɓe e ndeer magge ko ɓe ñirɓiniiɓe.

23:105.t: Enee, hara Aayeeje Am ɗen laataaki no janngee e taweede mo'on, laatiɗon hoɗon njedda ɗe?

23:106.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Joomi amen, ko malkiso amen ngon foolii min, min laatinoke yimɓe majjuɓe."

23:107.t: Joomi amen, yaltin min e magge, si min ruttike hara pellet, minen ko min tooñɓe.

23:108.t: O Daala: "Ñiiɓee e ndeer magge wota on kaalanam".

23:109.t: Pellet, laatinoke fedde e jiyaaɓe Am ɓen hiɓe mbi'a: "Joomi amen, min ngooŋɗinii haforan men njurmeƊaa men ko Aan ɓuri Moƴƴude Yurmeteeɓe ɓeen".

23:110.t: NJogitiɗon ɓe jalnori(jalkigol), haa ɓe njejjintini on jaŋta Am, laatiɗon hoɗon njala ɓe.

23:111.t: Min Mi yoɓii ɓe hannde sabu ko ɓe muññinoo kon, pellet, kamɓe ko kamɓe ngoni malaaɓe ɓeen.

23:112.t: O Daali: "No foti heewde ko ñiiɓɗon ka leydi, limoore duuɓi?"

23:113.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Min ñiiɓii ñallal maaɗum yoga e ñallal, lanndo limooɓe ɓeen."

23:114.t: O Daali: "On ñiiɓaani si wonaa seeɗa, sinndo onon on laatino hoɗon nganndi."

23:115.t: Enee, on cikku wonan'dema ko Min Tagiri on ko puyndan, hara onon on mduttetaake fa'ade ka Amen?!

23:116.t: Alla Toowii Laamɗo Goonguɗo On, dewetee- ɗo alah si wonaa Kaŋko Jooma Arsi Tedduki kin.

23:117.t: Kala nodduɗo wond'ude e Alla deweteeɗo goo, daliil alanah mo e ɗum, anndu pellet, hasboo- re makko ko ka Joomi makko, pellet Kaŋko, O malnatah heeferɓe ɓeen.

23:118.t: Maaku: "Jooma am, Yaafo Yurmo ko Aan Ɓuri Moƴƴude Yurmeteeɓe ɓen."

24:1.t: Simoore, Min njippinii nde Min farlii nde, Min njippini e ndeer mayre aayeeje ɓannguɗe mbelejo'o onon on mbaajitoto.

24:2.t: Debbo jinoowo on e gorko jinoowo on foccee gooto kala e maɓɓe paatawol(looci) teemedere, wota njurmeende maɓɓe nanngu on e fii Diina Alla ka, si tawii on laatike hoɗon ngooŋɗini Alla e Ñalaande Laakara nden. Yo seedo foccugol ɓe ngol jamaa immorde e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

24:3.t: Gorko jinoowo on o resataa si wonaa debbo jonoowo maaɗum cirkoowo, debbo jinoowo on resata mo si wonaa gorko jinoowo ma cirkoowo, ɗum harminaama e dow gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

24:4.t: E ɓen ɓe no tukka rewɓe saŋiiɓe ɓen refti ɓe ngaddaani seedeeɓe nayo, piyee ɓe paatawol(lo'oci) cappanɗe jeetati. Wota on njaɓan ɓe ceedagol poomaa. Ɓen ɗon, ko kamɓe ngoni Faasiqiiɓe ɓen.

24:5.t: Si wonaa ɓen tuubuɓe ɓaawo ɗuum ɓe moƴƴini. Pellet, Alla ko O cuhroowo jurmeteeɗo.

24:6.t: E ɓeen ɓe no tukka sonnaaɓe maɓɓe ɓen hara laatanaaki ɓe seedeeɓe si wonaa wonkiiji maɓɓe ɗin, ko yo goɗɗo e maɓɓe seedo seedeeji nayi [o woondira] Alla pellet, kako ko e googuɓe ɓen o jeyaa.

24:7.t: Jowaɓun ɗum, won'dema yo kuddi Alla wonu e dow makko si o laatike jeyaaɗo e fenooɓe ɓeen.

24:8.t: Ɓe nduñira e [sonnaajo on] lepte ɗen, nde o seedotoo seedeeji nayi [o woondira] Alla, pellet [gorko on] ko e fenooɓe ɓen o jeyaa.

24:9.t: Jowaɓum ɗum, ko nde Alla tikkata e dow makko si [gorko on] laatike ko e gooŋuɓe ɓen o jeyaa.

24:10.t: Sinndo wonaano Ɓural Alla ngal e dow mooɗon e Yurmeende Makko nden, e wonan'dema Alla ko O jaɓoowo tuubuubuye Ñeeñɗo.

24:11.t: Pellet, ɓeen adduɓe penaale ɗen ko ɓe jamaa jeyaaɗo e mooɗon, wota on cikku ɗum ko bone mo'on; ko woni ɗum ko moƴƴere mo'on. No woodani kala neɗɗo immorde e maɓɓe ko o faggitii kon e bakkaat, on fawtiiɗo [bakkaat on] immorde e maɓɓe, no woodani mo Lepte mawɗe.

24:12.t: Ko haɗno oo tuma nde nanɗon ɗum, worɓe gooŋɗinɓe ɓen e rewɓe gooŋɗinɓe ɓen ɓe njananee ka wonkiiji maɓɓe ko moƴƴi, ɓe mbi'a: "Ɗum ko penaale ɓannguɗe nii".

24:13.t: Ko haɗno ko nde ɓe ngaddata e ɗum seedeeɓe nayo, si ɓe ngaddaani seedeeɓe ɓen; haray ɓeen ɗon, to Alla ko kamɓe ngoni fenooɓe ɓen.

24:14.t: Sinndo wonaano ɓural Alla ngal e yurmeende makko nden e dow mooɗon e aduna e yo La'akara Lepte mawɗe meematno on fii kon ko ukkiɗon e muuɗum.

24:15.t: Tuma nde werloraynoɗon ɗum ɗenmɗe mooɗon, wowliron kunnduɗe mooɗon kon ko ganndal alana on e muuɗum sikkon ɗum kadi ko newiiɗum, hara non ɗum ko mawnuɗom ka Alla.

24:16.t: Ko haanunoo tuma nanɗon nde, mbi'on: "Haanaa min nde min wowlata e dum, Senayee woodanii ma, ɗum ko fenaande mawnde nii".

24:17.t: Alla no waajaade on fii wota on fillo sugu [ndee fenaande] poomaa, si tawii on laatike gooŋɗinɓe.

24:18.t: Alla no ɓannginannde on Aayeeje ɗen Alla ko O ganduɗo ñeeñɗo.

24:19.t: Pellet, ɓeen yiɗɓe yo bone ɗen sa'ako e [hoore] ɓen gooŋɗinɓe; no woodani ɓe Lepte muusɗe ka aduna e ka Laakara. Alla no Anndi, onon on nganndah.

24:20.t: Sinndo wonaano Ɓural Alla ngal e dow mooɗon e Yurmeende makko nden e tawde pellet, Alla ko o Newiiɗo jurmotooɗo o.

24:21.t: Eey mon ɓen gooŋ ɗinɓe, wota on mjokku ɗate Seytaane ɗen, kala jokkuɗo ɗate Seytaane ɗen, pellet, o yamirat [mo] ko boni kon e ko añaa kon. Sinndo wonaano Ɓural Alla ngal e dow mooɗon e Yurmeende Makko nden; hay e gooto e mooɗon laaɓataano poomaa, kono Alla homo laɓɓina on mo o muuyi. Alla ko O Nanoowo gannduɗo.

24:22.t: Wota joomiraaɓe ɓural ngal e yaajeende nde e mooɗon wooɗndu wonan'dema ɓe okkortaa ɓadondiraaɓe ɓen e ɓilliiɓe ɓen e ferɓe ɓen ka Laawol Alla, yo ɓe yaafo. Kaa on yiɗaa yo Alla yawtan on? Alla ko o jawtoowo Yurmeteeɗo.

24:23.t: Pellet, ɓeen wonɓe tukkude [sonnaaɓe] saŋiiɓe welsindiiɓe gooŋɗinɓe, ɓe huɗaama ka aduna e ka Laakara no woodani ɓe Lepte mawɗe.

24:24.t: Ñande seedoytoo e dow maɓɓe ɗemɗe maɓɓe ɗen e juuɗe maɓɓe ɗen e koyɗe maɓɓe ɗen, ko ɓe laatinoo kon heɓe ngolla.

24:25.t: Nden Ñande Alla huuɓinanay ɓe [njoɓdi] Diina maɓɓe Goongaha kan, ɓe ngannda pellet, Alla ko Kaŋko woni Goonga Ɓannguka kan.

24:26.t: Rewɓe soɓɓe ɓen ko fii worɓe soɓɓe ɓen. Worɓe soɓɓe ɓen ko fii rewɓe soɓuɓe ɓen. Rewɓe laaɓɓe ɓen ko fii worɓe laaɓɓe ɓen, worɓe laaɓuɓe ɓen ko fii rewɓe laaɓuɓe ɓen. Ɓee ɗoo ko hisnaaɓe e kon ko ɓe wowlata, no woodani ɓe haforaneede e arsike tedduɗo.

24:27.t: Eey mon yo gooŋɗinɓe, wota on naat e cuuɗi tanaa cuuɗi mo'on ɗin haa duŋinoɗon calminon e dow yimɓe majji ɓen, ko ɗum ɓuri moƴƴannde on. Mbelejo'o jo'o onon on mbaajitoto.

24:28.t: Si on tawaani ndeer ton goɗɗo, wota on naat toon haa duŋaneɗon, si on mbi'aama: "Yiltee" yiltee, ko ɗuum ɓuri laaɓannde on. Alla non homo Anndi ko ngolloton kon.

24:29.t: Bakkaatu fawaaki on nde naatoton e cuuɗi ɗi koɗiraaka hara no e ndeer majji miranhoy mo'on, Alla non homo Anndi ko ngonɗon e feññinde e ko ngonɗon e suuɗude.

24:30.t: Maakan worɓe gooɗinɓe ɓen yo ɓe meeru ndaarɗe maɓɓe ɗen ɓe ndeena farjuuji maɓɓe ɗin, ko ɗuum ɓurata laɓɓinnde ɓe. Pellet, Alla ko o kumpitiiɗo ko ɓe ngollata.

24:31.t: Maakan rewɓe gooŋɗinɓe ɓen yo ɓe meernu ndaarɗe maɓɓe ɗen, ɓe ndeena farjuuji maɓɓe ɗin, wota ɓe peññin cuɗaari maɓɓe ndin si wonaa ko feeñi kon e mayri. Yo ɓe fawu tiggaaje maɓɓe ɗen ka becce maɓɓe, wota ɓe feññinan cuɗaari maɓɓe ndin si wonaa genndiraaɓe maɓɓe ɓen ma baabiraaɓe maɓɓe ma baabiraaɓe genndiraaɓe maɓɓe ma ɓiɗɓe maɓɓe, ma ɓiɗɓe genndiraaɓe maɓɓe ma musiɗɓe maɓɓe, ma ɓiɗɓe musiɗɓe maɓɓe, ma ɓiɗɓe banndiraaɓe maɓɓe, ma sonnaaɓe maɓɓe, maaɗum ɓen ɓe ɓe jeyiri ñaame maɓɓe ma ɓen worɓe jokkooɓe ɓe haaju mun alaa e rewɓe, ma boobo mo ƴellitaaki e awraaji sonnaaɓe ɓen. Wata ɓe tappindir koyɗe maɓɓe ɗen fii yo Annde ko ɓe suuɗi kon immorde e cuɗaari maɓɓe. Tuubee ruttoɗon ka Alla on fow mo'on, ko onon yo gooŋɗinɓe mbelejo'o jo'o on malete.

24:32.t: Ndesinee ɓe ndesaani ɓeen e mooɗon e moƴƴuɓe ɓen immorde e muccuɓe mooɗon e horɓe mooɗon, si ɓe laatike waasɓe Alla alɗinat ɓe immorde e Ɓural makko ngal, Alla ko o jaacɗo gannduɗo.

24:33.t: Ɓe keɓaani fehre desugol ɓeen yo ɓe cabbo haa Alla alɗinira ɓe Ɓural makko ngal. Ɓeen ɗaɓɓatɓe soottaade e ɓen ɓe ñaame mooɗon njeyi, coottaadede ɓe si on nganndii e maɓɓe moƴƴere, njonnee ɓe immorde e jawdi Alla ndin, ndin ndi O jonni on, wota on waawnu horɓe mooɗon ɓen e fii jeeno, si ɓe faandike saŋaade, wota on ɗaɓɓu jawkal ngurndam aduna, kala waawnuuɗo ɓe pellet, Alla ɓaawo baawnugol ɓe ko O cuhroowo jurmiteeɗo.

24:34.t: Gooŋɗii min njippinii e mooɗon aayeeje ɓannguɗe e misal immorde e ɓeya wulinooɓe ko adii on e waaju wonan'de hulooɓe [Alla] ɓen.

24:35.t: Ko Alla woni annoore kammuuli ɗin e leydi ndin, sifa annoore makko nde ko wano tuɗɗere hara no e mayre pitilol(lampu), pitilol ngol wona e ndeer biiniiri, biiniiri ndin hara hindi wa'i wa hoodere jalbunde hinde huɓɓa immorde e leggal barkinaangal nebbantewal ngal wonaa funnaangeyaŋkowal ngal wonaa hirnaangeyaŋkowal nebbam maggal ɗam no ɓadoo jalbude, hay si yiite memaani ɗam, annoore e hoore annoore, Alla no feewnira annoore makko nde oon mo o muuyi, Alla no piyana yimɓe ɓen mise, Alla ko o gannduɗo kala hu'unde.

24:36.t: E nder cuuɗi ɗi Alla duŋii(sakkiti) yo darne Innde makko jaŋtee e ndeer majji Subunhinanee mo ndeer majji ka bimmbi e ka kiikiiɗe.

24:37.t: Worɓe ɓe njulaaku e njeyngu maapintaa ɗum ga jaŋtagol Alla e ñimnugol Juulde nden e tottu- gol askal on, heɓe kuli Ñalaande nde waylitoytoo e muuɗum ɓerɗe ɗen e jiiɗe ɗen.

24:38.t: Fii yo Alla yoɓoyɓe ko ɓuri moƴƴude ko ɓe ngollunoo kon, O ɓeydana ɓe e Ɓural makko ngal. Alla no arsika on mo O muuyi ko Aldaa hasboore.

24:39.t: Ɓen yedduɓe, golle maɓɓe ɗen no mba'i wa merere won'nde e boowal, ɗomɗaaɗo on no sikka ko nde ndiyam, haa si o arii e mayre o tawataa hay e hu'unde, o tawa Alla ka makko O huuɓinana mo hasboore makko nden, Alla ko O jaawɗo Hasboore.

24:40.t: Ma ko wano niɓe e maayo luggungo, no suddi ngo bempeƴƴe no dow maggo bempeƴƴe no dow majje duule, niɓe yoga e majje no e dow yoga, si o yaltinii junngo makko ngon o ɓadotaako ji'igol ngo. oon mo Alla waɗanaani annoore hara o alaa annoore.

24:41.t: Enee, a yiaani wonan'dema Alla no subuhinanaade Mo ɓen wonɓe ka kammuuli e ka leydi e colli ɗin kadi ko saffiniiɗi? Gooto kala e ɗii gooŋɗii anndii juulde mu'um nden e subuhinaali mu'um ɗin, Alla ko O gannduɗo ko ɓe ngollata.

24:42.t: Ko Alla heeranii Laamu kammuuli ɗin e leydi ndin, ko fa'ade ka Alla woni waɗtinirde nden.

24:43.t: Enee, a nji'aani won'dema Alla homo sogga duulere, refti o hawtindira nde, refti o waɗa nde fawondirnde haɗa yi'a toɓo ngon no yalta e ndeer mayre, ngo jippoo immorde ka kammu, immorde e pelle no e ndeer mayre marmalle homo heewtina ɗe on mo o Muuyi, homo pottina ɗe on mo o muuyi? Ndaneeri maƴe mayre no do'a naɓde giiɗe ɗen.

24:44.t: Alla homo waylita jemma on e ñalawma on, pellet, na wonii e ɗum tasakuyee wonan'de joomiraaɓe jiiɗe ɓen.

24:45.t: Ko Alla tagii kala kullel immorde e ndiyam, no e majji yaarooji reedu muuɗum, no e majji yaarooji koyɗe muuɗm no e majji kadi yaarooji [koyɗe] nayi. Alla homo Taga ko o muuyi, pellet, Alla ko kattanɗo kala hu'unde.

24:46.t: Gooŋɗii Min njippinii Aayeeje ɓannguɗe, Alla no feewna on mo O muuyii fa'ade e Laawol Pocciingol ngol.

24:47.t: Heɓe mbia: "Min gooŋɗinii Alla e Nulaaɗo on, min ɗoftike, refti huccita fedde goo e maɓɓe, ɓaawo ɗuum, ɓen wonaani gooŋɗinɓe".

24:48.t: Si ɓe noddaama fa'ade ka Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on fii yo o ñaawu hakkunde maɓɓe, tawa fedde goo e maɓɓe ko ɓe ɗuurniiɓe.

24:49.t: Si tawii ko kamɓe mari goonga ka, ɓe ngara e makko ko ɓe ɗoftiiɓe.

24:50.t: Enee, ko nawnaare woni ka ɓerɗe maɓɓe, kaa ɓe sikkiti, kaa ɓe hulu wota Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on tooñu ɓe? Ko woni, ɓee ko kamɓe woni tooñooɓe ɓen.

24:51.t: Anndu ko woni konngol gooɗinɓe ɓen si ɓe noddaama faade ka Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on fii yo o ñaawu hakkunde maɓɓe, ko nde ɓe mbi'ata: "Min nanii men ɗoftike." Ɓen ɗon ko kamɓe woni malaaɓe ɓen.

24:52.t: Kala ɗoftiiɗo Alla e nulaaɗo makko on o kuli Alla o rentii [e Lepte makko ɗen] haray ɓen ɗon ko kamɓe ngoni malaaɓe ɓen.

24:53.t: Ɓe ngooɗndiri Alla, e hattirde goondooje maɓɓe, si a yamirii ɓe ma ɓe njaltu sanne. Maaku: "wota on ngooɗndu, ɗoftaare no nganndaa, pellet, Alla ko kumpitiiɗo ko ngolloton"

24:54.t: Maaku: "Ɗoftee Alla ɗoftoɗon Nulaaɗo on". Si ɓe nduŋtiima anndu ko fawii mo ko, ko o roondaa kon, no fawii on ko ndoonda ɗo kon, si on ɗoftike mo on peewat, fawaaki Nulaaɗo on si wonaa jottinngol ɓanngungol.

24:55.t: Alla Fodii ɓen gooŋɗinɓe e mooɗon ɓe ngolli moƴƴi ɗin o lomtinat ɓe ka leydi wano O lomtinirnoo non ɓen adiiɓe ɓe, ma O weeɓinan ɓe diina maɓɓe ka O welanaa ɓe, ma O wattitan ɓe ɓaawo kulol maɓɓe ngol hoolaare, Yo ɓe ndewam wota ɓe cirkanam hay e hu'unde. Kala jedduɗo ɓaawo ɗum haray ɓen ɗon ko kamɓe woni faasiqiiɓe ɓen.

24:56.t: Ñiiɓee e Juulde totton askal on ɗoftoɗon kadi nulaaɗo on, mbela jo'o on njurmete.

24:57.t: Wota a sikku ɓeen yedduɓe ɓe laawoto ka leydi, jaaƴorde maɓɓe nden ko ka Yiite, pellet, bonii wattnde.

24:58.t: Eey mon yo gooŋɗinɓe, yo sakkintino e mooɗon ɓen ɓe ñaame mooɗon jeyi, e ɓen ɓe njottaaki koyɗol immorde e mooɗon, laabi tati ko adii Juulde Peeral nden, e tuma mballinton conci mooɗon ka njollooro e ka ɓaawo Juulde geeƴe ko awraaji mooɗon tati non. Bakkaatu fawaaki on fawaaki ɓe ɓaawo majji, jinndooɓe hakkunde mooɗon, yoga e mooɗon e dow yoga. Ko wano nii Alla ɓanngini- rani on aayeeje ɗen Alla ko O gannduɗo Ñeeñuɗo.

24:59.t: Si sukaaɓe mooɗon njottike kellefuyee, yo ɓe cakkitinono wano duŋinornoo non ɓen adiiɓe ɓe, ko wano nii Alla ɓannginiranta on sayeeje makko ɗen, Alla ko O gannduɗo Ñeeñɗo.

24:60.t: E sonnaaɓe jottiiɓe ɓen, ɓen ɓe njoortaaki desal bakkaatu fawaaki ɓe nde ɓe wallinta conci maɓɓe ɗin hara ɓe wonaa feññinɓe cuɗaari, ko nde ɓe nantotoo ɓuri moƴƴannde ɓe, Alla ko O Nanoowo gannduɗo.

24:61.t: Bakkaat fawaaki bumɗo on, bakkaatu fawaaki laƴoowo on, bakkaat fawaaki ñawɗo on, fawaaki e wonkiiji mooɗon nde ñaamoton ka cuuɗi mooɗon maaɗum ka cuuɗi baabiraaɓe mooɗon, maaɗum ka cuuɗi neeniraaɓe mooɗon, maaɗum ka cuuɗi musiɗɓe mooɗon, maaɗum ka cuuɗi banndiraaɓe mooɗon, maaɗum ka cuuɗi bappiraaɓe mooɗon, maaɗum ka cuuɗi yaayiraaɓe mooɗon, maaɗom ka cuuɗi kaawiraaɓe mooɗon, maaɗum ka cuuɗi neeniraaɓe mooɗon ka dewol, maaɗum ɗin ɗi jogiɗon cottirɗe muuɗum, maaɗum giɗo mooɗon. Bakkaat fawaaki on nde kawtoton ñaamon maaɗum ñaamon ko on sertuɓe. Si on naatay e cuuɗi salminee e dow woŋkiiji mooɗon, salminango immorde ka Alla barkinaango laaɓngo, ko wano nii Alla ɓannguniranta on aayeeje ɗen mbelejo'o onon on kaqqilay.

24:62.t: Anndu gooŋɗinɓe ɓen ko ɓen gooŋɗinɓe Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on, si ɓe laatike hiɓe wonndi e makko e dow fiyaake moftuɗo, ɓe njahatah haa ɓe duŋinoo e makko, pellet, ɓen ɗaɓɓirayɓe ma duŋayee ko ɓen ɗon woni gooŋɗinɓe Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on, si ɓe ɗaɓɓirii ma duŋayee fii yoga e fiyaake maɓɓe, duŋano on mo yiɗɗaa [duŋanaade] e maɓɓe, imsinanoɗaa ɓe ka Alla. Pellet, Alla ko cuhroowo jurmeteeɗo.

24:63.t: Wota on mbaɗ noddugol Nulaaɗo on hakkunde mooɗon wano noddugol yoga e mooɗon yoga. Gooŋɗii Alla no Anndi ɓeen sortotooɓe e mooɗon e moltagol, ɓen wonɓe lunndaade yamaruyee makko on, yo ɓe rento fii wata fitina hiɓu ɓe maaɗum Lempte mu'usuɗe heɓa ɓe.

24:64.t: Ko non woniri, pellet, ko Alla heeranii ko woni kon ka kammuuli e ka leydi gooŋɗii homo Anndi ko ngonɗon e hoore mu'um kon, Ñande ɓe nduttetee fa'ade ka makko p yeetoo ɓe ko ɓe ngollunoo kon. Alla ko O gannduɗo kala hu'unde.

25:1.t: Mawnii On Jippinɗo Seerndoore nden e dow jiyaaɗo makko on fii yo wonan winndire nden jeertinoowo.

25:2.t: Oon mo woodanii ɗum Laamu kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin, o jogitaaki ɓiɗɗo laatanaaki mo kadi kafidaaɗo ka Laamu. O tagii kala hu'unde O eɓɓindiinde e eɓɓugol.

25:3.t: Ɓe njogitii ga makko deweteeɗi ɗi tagaani hu'unde kannji ko ɗi tagaaɗi, ɗi maranah ko'e majji lorra wonaa nafa ɗi marah maayde wonaa ngurndam wonaa ummital.

25:4.t: Ɓeen yedduɓe mbi'i: "Ndee [Alqur'aanaare] wonaani si wona pene ɗi o fekindii ɗum, walli mo e hoore majje yimɓe goo". Gooŋɗii ɓe ngaddii tooñe e bagamma.

25:5.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Ko nde tinndi adinooɓe o mbinnditi ɗi hiɗi fidanee mo bimmbi e kiikiiɗe".

25:6.t: Maaku: "Jippinii nde on gannduɗo ngunndoo on ka kammuuli e ka leydi, pellet, Kaŋko o Laatike cuhroowo jurmeteeɗo meteeɗo".

25:7.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Ko heɓi oo Nulaaɗo, homo ñaama ñaametee homo yaha kadi ka lokooji(jeereeji)°? Ko haanunoo ko nde jippintee e makko Maleykaaji o laatoo wond'ude e makko jeertinoowo".

25:8.t: Ma werlee e makko ngal, ma laatanoo mo ngesa o ñaama e mabba. Tooñooɓe ɓen mbi'i: "on njokkaani si wonaa gorko mbilɗaaɗo."

25:9.t: Ndaarii [yo Nulaaɗo] ko honno ɓe piyiranat maa mise, ɓe majjii ɓe hattantaake [heɓude] laawol.

25:10.t: Mawnii on tawɗo si O muuyii O waɗane moƴƴere, no e ɗum gese no ila ley majje canɗe ɗen, o waɗane kadi kuɓeeje.

25:11.t: Ko woni, ɓe njeddu Darngo ngo, Min heblorani ɓen jedduɓe Darngal ngal Yiite ooynge.

25:12.t: Si nge yi'ii ɓe immorde e nokkuure woɗɗunde nananee nge tikkere e faraango.

25:13.t: Si ɓe mbernaama e ndeer magge e nokkuure ɓittunde ko ɓe sinndindiraaɓe, ɓe nodda ton halakuyee.

25:14.t: Wota on noddu hannde halkaare wootere, noddee halkaaje buy.

25:15.t: Maaku: "Enee, ko ɗuum ɓuri moƴƴude, kaa ko Aljanna luttoowo on, on mo hulooɓe Alla ɓen podaa? O laatanike ɓe njoɓdi e wattinirde.

25:16.t: No woodani ɓe ndeer ton ko ɓe mbelaa, ko ɓe ñiiɓooɓe, ɗuum laatike e dow Joomi maaɗa Fodoore lannditeteende.

25:17.t: Ñande O mooɓidoyta ɓe e ko ɓe ndewatnoo kon gaanin Alla, O Daala: "Enee, ko onon majjini ɓee Jiyaaɓe Am, kaa ko kamɓe majji Laawol ngol?"

25:18.t: Ɓe mbi'a: "Senaarre wonanii ma, haananah min nde min njogitotoo gaanin Maaɗa immorde e deweteeɗi, kono, A dakmintinii ɓe e baabiraaɓe maɓɓe ɓen haa ɓe njejjiti waajo nguo ɓe laatii yimɓe halkiiɓe."

25:19.t: Gooŋɗii ɓe njeddi on, sabu ko mbi'oton kon, ɓe kattanta yiltugol [Lepte ɗen] wonaa wallude, kala tooñɗo e mooɗon Meon meeɗinat mo Lepte mawɗe.

25:20.t: Min Nulaali ado maaɗa immorde e Nulaaɓe si wonaa kamɓe heɓe nafoo ñaametee heɓe seenoo kadi ka luumaaji, Min mbaɗi yoga e mooɗon fitina yoga, fii yo on muñño. Joomi maaɗa laatike ko o ji'oowo.

25:21.t: Ɓen ɓe njortaaki hawroyde e amen mbi'i: "Ko hannoo jippinee e makko Maleykaaji ɓen, ma min nji'a Joomi amen?" Gooŋɗii ɓee mawnintinike ka wonkiiji maɓɓe, ɓe townitii townitaare mawnunde.

25:22.t: Ñande ɓe nji'oyta Maleykaaji ɓen weltaare alanaa bonɓe ɓen nden Ñande, ɓe mbi'a: "Heedo heedaango".

25:23.t: Min ardini faade e ko ɓe ngollunoo kon immorde e gollal, Min mbaɗi ngal punndi saraandi.

25:24.t: Yimɓe aljanna ɓe nden Ñande ɓuri moƴƴude ñiiɓirde ɓuri labeede kadi ñallirde.

25:25.t: E Ñande nde kummu ngun seekorta duule ɗen Malaa'ikaaji ɓen njippinee jippineede.

25:26.t: Laamu goongaawu ngun nden ñalnde ko Hinnorante On ngu woodani, laatoo ñalnde saɗtunde e dow yedduɓe ɓen.

25:27.t: E Ñande tooñɗo on ŋatoyta junngo makko ngon, o wi'a: "Eeh jalla min, mi jogitino wond'ude e Nulaaɗo on Laawol.

25:28.t: Eeh bone am haaniino min, mi njogitanooki kaariijo sehilaajo.

25:29.t: Gooŋɗii o majjinii lam gaayi deftere nden ɓaawo nde arii a am, Seytaane laatike ko o jaasinoowo neɗɗaŋke on.

25:30.t: Nulaaɗo on maaka: "eeyma Jooma pellet, yimɓe am ɓen ɓe njogitike ndee Alqur'aanaare wikkaande(accaande)".

25:31.t: Ko wano nii, Min mbaɗirani kala Annabaajo gaño immorde e bonɓe ɓen, Joomi maaɗa yonii peewnoowo e ballo.

25:32.t: Ɓeen yedduɓe mbi'i: "Ko hanno Alqur'aanaare nden jippinee e makko e jumla gooto?" Ɗuum ko wano nii, fii yo Min tabintinir nde ɓernde maaɗa nden Min rewnindira nde rewnindirgol.

25:33.t: Ɓe ngaddantaa ma yeru, si wonaa Min ngaddanii ma Goonga kan e ko ɓuri moƴƴude firo.

25:34.t: Ɓeen mooɓoyteeɓe e dow je'ece muuɗum fa'ade ka Jahannama, ko ɓen ɗon woni ɓurɓe bon'de nokkuure e ɓuruɓe majjude kade laawol.

25:35.t: Gooŋɗii Min ngokkii Muusaa deftere nden, Min mbaɗi wond'ude e makko Musiɗɗo makko on Haaruuna ballo.

25:36.t: Men Daali: "njahee ka ɓen yimɓe fennuɓe Aayeeje Amen ɗen, Min njirbini ɓe jirbinndee".

25:37.t: E yimɓe Nuuhu tuma nde ɓe njeddunoo Nulaaɓe ɓen, Min njooli ɓe Min mbaɗi ɓe Ma'ande fii yimɓe ɓe, Min keblani tooñooɓe ɓen Lepte mu'usɗe.

25:38.t: E Aadiŋkooɓe ɓen e Samuudiŋkooɓe ɓen e yimɓe ɓunndu ndun e gire ɗuuɗuɗe hakkunde ɗuum.

25:39.t: Gooto kala e maɓe Min piyani ɗum mise, gooto kala e maɓɓe min kalki ɗum kalkugol.

25:40.t: Gooŋɗii ɓe ngarii e nden saare toɓaande toɓo bonngo. Kaa ɓe laataaki heɓe nji'a ɗe? Ko woni, ɓe laatinoke ɓe njoortaaki Immotal.

25:41.t: Si ɓe nji'ii ma, ɓe njogitotaako ma si wonaa jalnori. Enee, ko oo Alla Immini Nulaaɗo?

25:42.t: Fii kala hari o ɓadike(ɗesi) majjinnde en gaayi deweteeɗi me'en ɗin si tawiino wonaa ko muññi ɗen kon e dow majji. Aray ɓe nganndoyat tuma ɓe nji'ata Lepte ɗen ko hommbo ɓurɗo majjude laawol.

25:43.t: Enee, a tinii on jogitiiɗo deweteeɗo makko on beleeɗe makko ɗen. E hara ko an laatotoo e dow makko pawtiiɗo.

25:44.t: Kaa a sikku won'de ko ɓuri heewde e maɓɓe heɓe nana ma heɓe kakkila? Anndu kamɓe ɓe ngonaani si wanaa wano neemoraaɗi, toode, ko kamɓe ɓuri majjude laawol.

25:45.t: Kaa a tinaani fa'ade e Joomi maaɗa honno O fortiri ɗowdi ndin? Sinndo O Muuyuno O waɗatno ndi deeƴundi, refti Min mbaɗi na'ange ngen tinndinatnge e mayri.

25:46.t: refti Min tami ndi ka amen tamannde newiinde.

25:47.t: Ko Kako woni oon baɗanɗo on jemma on koltu e ɗoyngol ngol fooftere, O waɗi ñalama on ngal saakorɗo.

25:48.t: Ko Kaŋko woni On gaccituɗo keni ɗin ko ɗi weltinooji hakkunde Yurmeende makko nden, Min njippini immorde ka kammu ndiyam laaɓɗam.

25:49.t: Fii yo Min nguurnitir ɗam leydi maayndi, Min njarrnaɗam kadi kon ko Min tagi neemoraaɗi e yimɓe ɗuuɗuɓe.

25:50.t: Gooŋɗii Min pennsitii nde hakkunde maɓɓe fii yo ɓe mbaajito, salii ɓurɓe ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓen si wonaa jeddugol.

25:51.t: Sinndo min muuyuno min Nulatno e kala saare jeertinoowo.

25:52.t: Wota a ɗofto yedduɓe ɓe haɓ e maɓɓe hare jihaadi mawnde.

25:53.t: Ko Kaŋko woni oon jillindirɗo maaje ɗen ɗiɗi, ngooɗoo ko welngo ƴem ngooɗoo kadi ko haaɗngo tak, O waɗi wirngallo hakkunde majje, e heedo heedaango.

25:54.t: Ko Kaŋko woni on Takɗo ɓanndunke immorde e ndiyam ɗam, O waɗi mo dammbe e esiraawo, Joomi maaɗa laatike ko o kattanɗo.

25:55.t: Heɓe ndewa gah Alla kon ko nafataa ɓe lorrataa ɓe, jedduɗo on laatike ko o teeɗiiɗo Joomi makko.

25:56.t: Min Nuliraali ma si wonaa ko a beltinoowo e jeertinoowo.

25:57.t: Maaku: "Mi naamaaki on e dow ɗum njoɓdi si wonaa on njiɗuɗo jogitaade fa'ade ka Joomi makko Laawol".

25:58.t: Wakkilo e On guuruɗo mo maayataa subuhinoɗaa won'dude e jettugol mo, O yonii e ɗum kumpitiiɗo bakkatuuji jeyaaɓe makko.

25:59.t: On Takɗo kammuuli ɗin e leydi ndin e ko woni kon hakkunde majji, e ndeer balɗe jeego'o refti O fotondiri ka dow Arsi, jurmotooɗo On lanndo Mo ko O kumpitiiɗo.

25:60.t: Si wi'anaama ɓe: "cujjanee jurmotooɗo On" Ɓe mbi"a: "Ko hommbo woni jurmotooɗo On? Enee, hara men sujjanay kon ko yamirɗaa min?" Ɗuum ɓeydi ɓe foɗɗitaare.

25:61.t: Mawnii oon baɗuɗo ka kammu burjuuji(buurti) o waɗi e ndeer majji pitilol e leelewal jalbungal.

25:62.t: Ko Kaŋko woni On baɗuɗo jemma on e ñalawma on lontondirayɗi fii on faandiiɗo annditugol maaɗum o faandii jaarnugol.

25:63.t: E jiyaaɓe jurmotooɗo e On, ɓen yahooɓe ka leydi ko no newiri, si majjuɓe ɓeen ewnike ɓe, ɓe mbi'a: "kisal ".

25:64.t: E ɓeen waalooɓe sujjannde Joomi maɓɓe e daragol [juula].

25:65.t: E ɓeen wi'ooɓe: "Joomi amen woɗɗintinan men Lepte Jahannama ɗen, pellet, Lepte magge ɗen ko duumiiɗe".

25:66.t: Pellet, ɗeen bonii ñiiɓirde e darorde.

25:67.t: E ɓeen tawɓe si ɓe nafkii ɓe fantintaa ɓe ɓittintaa kadi, [ɓe] ngoni ñiiɓɓe hakkunde ɗuum.

25:68.t: E ɓeen ɓe ndewaani wond'ude e Alla deweteeɗo goo, ɓe waraani fittaandu ki Alla harmini kin si wonaa sabu goonga, hara ɓe njinataa. Mo waɗii ɗuum o hawray e bakkaat.

25:69.t: Sowanoyte mo Lepte ɗen Ñande Darngal, o luttinoyee e ndeer majje ko o koynaaɗo.

25:70.t: Si wonaa ɓen tuubuɓe ɓe gooŋɗini ɓe golli golle moƴƴe, haray ɓen ɗon Allalomtinay bonɗi maɓɓe ɗin moƴƴi. Alla wonii ko O cuhroowo Jurmeteeɗo.

25:71.t: Kala tuubuɗo o golli ko moƴƴi haray pellet, kaŋko o ruttoto ka Alla ko o jaɓanaaɗo tuubuubuyee.

25:72.t: E ɓeen ɓe seeditotaako penaale ɗen si ɓe rewii ka rayrayti ɗin [wowletee] ɓe feƴƴay ko tedduɓe

25:73.t: E ɓeen tawɓe si ɓe waajoraama aayeeje Joomi maɓɓe ɗen ɓe hippotaako e dow majje ko ɓe faaɗuɓe e wumuɓe.

25:74.t: E ɓeen wi'ooɓe: "Joomi amen, okku men immorde e sonnaaɓe amen e geɗalɓe amen ɓuuɓendan gite, waɗaa min wonan'de hulooɓe Alla ɓen ñentinteeɓe".

25:75.t: Ɓenɗon ɓe njoɓoyte huɓeere nden sabu ko ɓe muññii kon, ɓe hawroya ndeer ton e hiwraango e salminaango.

25:76.t: Ko ɓe ñiiɓooɓe ndeer ton moƴƴii ñiiɓirde e darorde.

25:77.t: Maaku: "Jeyɗo lam On haajaaka e mooɗon sinndo wonaano du'aaji mo'on ɗin, gooɗii on fenniino aray ɗe laatoo duumiiɗe [Lepte laakara].

26:2.t: Ɗeen ko aayeeje Deftere ɓanngunde nde.

26:3.t: Mbelejo'o an a tampiniray hoore maaɗa kin fii ɓe laataaki gooŋɗinɓe.

26:4.t: Si Min muuyii Min njippinat e maɓɓe immorde ka kammu aaya daaɗe maɓɓe ɗen ñalla ko ɗe yankinaniiɗe mo.

26:5.t: Arataa e maɓɓe waaju immorde ka jurmotooɗo on fuɗɗaangu si wonaa ɓe laatike ɗuuriiɓe ngu.

26:6.t: Gooŋɗii ɓe njeddii aroyay e maɓɓe kabaruuji ko ɓe laatinoo koɓe njalkitano.

26:7.t: Enee, ɓe nji'aani fa'ade e leydi ndin, no foti heewde ko Min puɗini e mayri immorde e kala noone tedduɗo?

26:8.t: Pellet, wonii e ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo] aaya, ɓurɓe heewɓe e maɓɓe laataaki gooŋɗinɓe.

26:9.t: Pellet, Joomi maaɗa ko Kaŋko woni tedduɗo Jurmeteeɗo On.

26:10.t: Jaŋto tuma nde Joomi maaɗa noddunoo Muusaa, ɗum woni ar e yimɓe tooñooɓe ɓe.

26:12.t: O maaki: "Joom am , min miɗo huli wota ɓe njeddam.

26:13.t: Ɓernde am nden ɓittoo hara ɗemngal am ngal wellitaaki, awa Nul to Haaruuna.

26:14.t: No woodani ɓe e dow am bakkaat miɗo huli fii wota ɓe mbaram.

26:15.t: O Daali: "Wonaa non, njahee onon ɗiɗo, Miɗen ngon'di e mooɗon ko Min heɗiiɓe".

26:16.t: Aree ka Fir'awna wi'on: "Minen dey ko min Nulaaɓe Jooma winndere nden."

26:17.t: Ɗuum woni accitu ɓiɗɓe Isra'iila ɓen wond'ude e amen.

26:18.t: O wi'i: "Enee, min ne'aano ma ka amin ɗoo hari ko a boobo, ñiiɓuɗaa ka amin ɗoo duuɓi e ngurndam maaɗam?"

26:19.t: NGolluɗaa gollal maaɗa ngal ngollunoɗaa ngal, an ko e yedduɓe ɓen njeyaɗaa.

26:20.t: O maaki: "Mi waɗii ɗum, ontuma min ko mi jiyaaɗo e majjuɓe ɓeen".

26:21.t: Mi dogi on, tuma nde mi kulunoo on, Joomi am okkin mi Ganndal o waɗin mi jiyaaɗo e Nulaaɓe ɓen.

26:22.t: Ɗum ko neema mo mbajitirtaa mi ɗum, fii a maccinɗinii ɓiɗɓe Israa'iila ɓen.

26:23.t: Fir'awna wi'i: " Ko hommbo jeyi winndere nde?"

26:24.t: O maaki: "Ko Jooma kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndi e ko woni kon hakkunde majji, si on laatike yananaaɓe."

26:25.t: O wi'ani ɓeen wonɓe banŋe makko: "Enee; on leɗataako?"

26:26.t: O maaki: "Joomi mooɗon e Jooma baabiraaɓe adiiɓe ɓen."

26:27.t: [Fir'awna] wi'i: "Pellet, Nulaaɗo mooɗon on Nulaaɗo fa'ade e mooɗon ko o kaangaaɗo."

26:28.t: O maaki: "Ko Jooma funna'ange e hirna'ange e ko woni kon hakkunde majji, si on laatike kakkilooɓe."

26:29.t: [Fir'awna] wi'i: "Mi wooɗndii si jogitike deweteeɗo tan am, mi waɗete jiyaaɗo dummbaaɓe ɓeen".

26:30.t: O maaki: "enee, hay si mi addanii ma hu'unde ɓanngunde?"

26:31.t: [Fir'awna] wi'i: "Awa addu ɗum, si tawii ko e gooŋɗu ɓe ɓe njiyaaɗaa."

26:32.t: O wernii tuggordu makko ndu, jaka ko ndu mbooɗdi (ngoolwa) ɓannguba.

26:33.t: O yaltini junngo makko ngo, jaka yoo ko ngo ranwungo wonan'de ndaarooɓe ɓe.

26:34.t: [Fir'awna] wi'ani mbatu ngu fee makko: "Pellet, ooɗoo ko bileejo keewɗo ganndal".

26:35.t: Homo fa'andii jaltinirgol on ka leydi mooɗon mbilewu makko ngu. Ko hulɗun njamirɗon?

26:36.t: Ɓe mbi'i : "Neeɓnu mo e musiɗɗo makko on, nulaa e ca'e ɗen mooɓooɓe (wileeɓe)".

26:38.t: Wileeɓe ɓen mooɓaa fii fodoore ñalaande anndaande.

26:39.t: Yimɓe ɓen mbii'anaa: "Taw si onon ko on mooɓike(ndenndi)"

26:40.t: Mbelejo'o lajo'o minen min njokkay wileeɓe ɓen, si ɓe laatike ko kamɓe ngoni foolɓe ɓen.

26:41.t: Tuma nde wileeɓe ɓen ngrnoo; ɓe mbi'ani Fir'awna: "Enee, no woodani min njoɓdi si tawii ko min ngoni foolɓe ɓe?"

26:42.t: O wi'i : "Eyyo, on tuma on njeyaama e ɓaɗtinaaɓe ɓen".

26:43.t: Muusaa maakani ɓe: "mbeddee, ko mbernoton kon".

26:44.t: Ɓe liɓi ɓoggi maɓɓe e cawoy maɓɓe kon, ɓe mbi'i: "Sabu teddungal Fir'awna, ko minen ngoni foolooɓe ɓe".

26:45.t: Muusaa wernii tuggordu makko ndu, tawi kayru hundu moɗa ko ɓe fekindii ko.

26:47.t: Ɓe mbi'i : "Min ngoŋɗinii Jeyɗo Winndere nde,

26:49.t: [Fir'awna] wi'i: "Enee, on ngooŋɗinat mo, ko adii mi duŋanaade on? Pellet, ko kaŋko woni mawɗo mooɗon anndinɗo on on mbilewu ngu, kono a nganndon, mami taƴ juuɗe mooɗon e koyɗe mooɗon [taƴa] luutindira. Mami fetu on, on fof mooɗon".

26:50.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Tanaa alaa, minen ko fa'ade ka Joomi amin min nduttotoo".

26:51.t: Minen miɗen tamƴinii nde Joomi amin yawtani min ngoopi amin ɗin,tawde min laatike adiiɓe gooŋɗinnde ɓen.

26:52.t: Min mbahayini fa'ade e Muusaa: "Ɗuum woni roƴidu e Jiyaaɓe Am ɓeen. Pellet, onon ko on jokkiteteeɓe".

26:54.t: [O wi'i:] Pellet, ɓee ko ɓe mojobum pamarum.

26:56.t: Enen non en fof ko en reentiiɓe.

26:57.t: Min njaltini ɓe immorde e gese e caatli.

26:59.t: Ko wano nii, Min ndonini ɗum ɓiɗɓe Israa'iila ɓen.

26:61.t: Tuma nde jamaaji ɗin ɗin yi'ndirnoo, yimɓe Muusaa ɓe mbi'i: "Enen en hewtoyte".

26:62.t: O maaki: "Ɗuum waɗataa, pellet, Joomi am no won'di e am o feewnat kam".

26:63.t: Min mbahayini e Muusaa, ɗum woni piyir tuggordu maaɗa ndu maayo ngon, ngo seekii ceekol kala seekol na foti e tulde mawnde.

26:65.t: Min ndaɗni di Muusaa e won'ɗuɓe e makko ɓe fof maɓɓe.

26:66.t: Refti Min njooli heddii ɓe ɓe.

26:67.t: Pellet, wonii e ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo] aaya, ɓurɓe heewude e maɓɓe laataaki gooŋɗinɓe.

26:68.t: Pellet, Joomi maaɗa, ko Kaŋko woni Tedduɗo jurmeteeɗo.

26:70.t: Tuma nde o wi'annoo baaba makko e yimɓe makko ɓe; ko holɗum ndewoton?

26:71.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Miɗen rewde sanamuuji, min ñallat ufnanaade ɗi".

26:72.t: O maaki: "mati i hiɗi nanana on, nde noddoton".

26:73.t: Maa hiɗi nafa on ma ɗi lorra on?

26:74.t: Ɓe mb'i: "Ko woni, men tawii baabiraaɓe amen ɓe konii ɓe ngolliratnoo".

26:75.t: O maaki: "Enee, on nji'ii kon ko ngonɗon e rewde?"

26:76.t: Onon e baabiraaɓe mon adinooɓe ɓe.

26:77.t: Pellet, kamɓe ko ɓe añɓe am, si wonaa Jooma winndire nden.

26:78.t: On Talɗo kam, ko Kaŋko feewnata kam.

26:79.t: On ko Kaŋko ñamminta kam O yarnan-mi.

26:80.t: Si mi nawnii, ko Kaŋko sellinta kam.

26:81.t: E oon barayɗo kam refti o wurnitan mi.

26:82.t: Oon mo mi tamƴinii kadi nde O yaafatoomi goopi am ɗin Ñande [njoɓdi] Diina ka.

26:83.t: Joomam, okkam Ganndal wattidaa mi e moƴƴuɓe ɓe.

26:84.t: Mbaɗanaa kam jaŋto moƴƴo ka sakkitiiɓe ɓen.

26:85.t: Mbaɗaa mi jiyaaɗo e ronooɓe Aljanna Neemaaji ɗin.

26:86.t: Njaafɗaa baaba am, pellet, kaŋko o laatinoke jiyaaɗo e majjuɓe ɓeen.

26:87.t: Wota A hersinoyam Ñande ɓe Immital.

26:88.t: Ñande nde jawdi e ɓiɗɓe nafataa.

26:89.t: Si wonaa on arduɗo ka Alla e ɓernde hisnde.

26:90.t: Aljanna oon ɓatinanee hulooɓe Alla ɓeen.

26:92.t: Ɓe wi'nee: "Honto woni ko laatinoɗon kon hoɗon ndewa".

26:93.t: Ga Alla? Taw si ɗi walla on ma ɗi wallat hoore majji?

26:94.t: Ɓe kippee e ndeer magge kamɓe e bewɓe ɓen.

26:95.t: E konnuuji ibliisa ɗiin ɗi fof majji.

26:96.t: Ɓe mbi'i tawi kamɓe heɓe wennjondira ndeer ton:

26:97.t: "Min woondirii Alla, min woniino e ndeer majjere ɓanngunde.

26:98.t: Tuma nde min njeddunoo on e Jooma winndere nde"

26:99.t: Majjinaani min si ngonaa bonɓe ɓen.

26:102.t: Sinndo no woodannoo min ndutteede, min laatoo jiyaaɓe e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

26:103.t: Pellet, wonii e ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo] aaya, ɓurɓe heewɓe e maɓɓe laataaki gooŋɗinɓe.

26:104.t: Pellet, Joomi maaɗa, ko Kako woni Tedduɗo jurmeteeɗo.

26:105.t: Yimɓe Nuuhu ɓen njeddii Nulaaɓe ɓen.

26:106.t: Tuma nde Nuuhu musiɗɗo maɓɓe on mbiannoo ɓe: "Enee, on kulataa [Alla]?"

26:107.t: Min dey, ko mi nulaaɗo e mooɗon koolaaɗo.

26:109.t: Mi toraaki on e dow ɗum njoɓdi, njoɓdi am ndin fawaaki si wonaa Jooma winndere nde.

26:111.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Enee, hara men ngooŋɗinte, ja'asɓe ɓen no njokkumaa?"

26:112.t: O maaki: "Ko holɗum woni ganndal am e ko ɓe ngonoo e gollude?".

26:113.t: Hasboore maɓɓe nde fawaaki si wonaa e Joomi am, sinndo hoɗon so'aynoo.

26:114.t: Min mi ngonaani raɗotooɗo gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

26:115.t: Min mi ngonaani si wonaa jerrtinoowo ɓannguɗo.

26:116.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Min woondii si a accaani aan Nuuhu, ma a laato sanne jiyaaɗo e rajmeteeɓe ɓen".

26:117.t: O maaki: "Joom am, pellet, yimɓe am ɓen ɓe fenni kam".

26:118.t: Ñaawu hakkunde am e maɓɓe ñaawoore, ndanndaa mi e ɓeen wonnduɓe e am joyaaɓe e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

26:119.t: Min danndi mo e ɓeen won'ɗuɓe e makko ka ndeer laana ƴoltiika(loowaaka).

26:120.t: Refti Min yooli ɓaawo [maɓɓe] heddiiɓe ɓen.

26:121.t: Pellet, wonii e ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo] Aaya, ɓurɓe heewde e maɓɓe laataaki gooŋɗinɓe.

26:122.t: Pellet, Joomi maaɗa, ko Kaŋko woni Tedduɗo jurmeteeɗo.

26:124.t: Tuma nde Huudu musiɗɗo maɓɓe on wi'annoo ɓe: "Enee, on kulataa [Alla]?"

26:125.t: Min dey, ko mi Nulaaɗo e mooɗon koolaaɗo.

26:127.t: Mi toraaki on e dow ɗuum njoɓdi, njoɓdi am ndin fawaaki si wonaa Jooma winndere nde.

26:128.t: Enee, on mahat Ma'ande e kala tulde hoɗon pija?

26:129.t: Njogitoɗon kuɓeeje a wi'ayma onon ko on luttinteeɓe [ka aduna].

26:130.t: Si on njaggitii, njanggiton ko ndunndarankooɓe.

26:132.t: Kulee oon ɓeydirɗo on ko ngannduɗon.

26:133.t: O ɓeydiri on neemoraaɗi e ɓiɓɓe worɓe.

26:135.t: [O maaki] min dey, miɗo hulani on Lepte Ñalaande mawnde.

26:136.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "No fotana min ter, si a waajike ma si a laataaki jiyaaɗo e waajotooɓe ɓeen".

26:137.t: Pellet, ɗuum wonaani si wonaa jikku adinooɓe ɓeen.

26:139.t: Ɓe njeddi mo, Min kalki ɓe. Pellet, wonii e ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo] Aaya, ɓurɓe heewude e maɓɓe laataaki gooŋɗinɓe.

26:140.t: Pellet, Joomi maaɗa, ko Kaŋko woni Tedduɗo jurmeteeɗo.

26:142.t: Tuma nde Saalihu musiɗɗo maɓɓe on wi'annoo ɓe: "Enee, on kulataa [Alla]?"

26:143.t: Min dey, ko mi Nulaaɗo e mooɗon koolaaɗo.

26:145.t: Mi toraaki on e dow ɗuum njoɓdi, njoɓdi am ndi fawaaki si wonaa Jooma winndere nde.

26:146.t: Enee, hara on ngaccete e koo ko woni ɗoo ko on hooliiɓe?!

26:148.t: E remuruuji e tamarooje hara dukke majje ko ɓennduɗe.

26:149.t: Hoɗon lesa pelle ɗeen [mbaɗon] cuuɗi ko on haawitiiɓe.

26:151.t: Wota on ɗofto jamaruyee fantinooɓe ɓeen.

26:152.t: Ɓeen bonnooɓe ka leydi hara ɓe moƴƴintaa.

26:153.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Pellet, an ko a jiyaaɗo wilaaɓe ɓeen".

26:154.t: An a wonaani si wonaa ɓannduŋke yeru amen, awa addu aaya, si tawii a laatike jiyaaɗo e gooŋɗuuɓe ɓen.

26:155.t: O maaki: "baaɗoo ko naaqawa, no woodani mba yarannde, no woodani on onon kadi yarannde ñalaande anndaande".

26:156.t: Wota on memir mba ko boni, sakko nannga on Lepte Ñande Mawnde.

26:157.t: Ɓe mborii mba, ɓe ngonti nimsuɓe.

26:158.t: Lepte ɗen nanngi ɓe. Pellet, ngonii e ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo] Aaya, ɓurɓe heewde e maɓɓe laataaki gooŋɗinɓe.

26:159.t: Pellet, Joomi maaɗa, ko Kako woni Tedduɗo Jurmeteeɗo.

26:160.t: Yimɓe Luutu ɓeen njeddi Nulaaɓe ɓen.

26:161.t: Tuma nde Luutu musiɗɗo maɓɓe on wi'annoo ɓe: "Enee, on kulataa [Alla]?"

26:162.t: Min dey, ko mi Nulaaɗo e mooɗon koolaaɗo.

26:164.t: Mi toraaki on e dow ɗum njoɓdi, njoɓdi am ndin fawaaki si wonaa Jooma winndere nde.

26:165.t: Enee, on ngarat e worɓe ɓe immorde e winndere nde?!

26:166.t: Ɗalon ko Joomi mooɗon tagani on kon immorde e sonnaaɓe mooɗon? Ko woni, onon ko on yimɓe yawtuɓe Keerol.

26:167.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Min ngooɗndiri si a accaani aan Luutu, ma a laato sanne jiyaaɗo e yaltiteeɓe ɓen".

26:168.t: O maaki: "Min dey, miɗo jiyaa e añɓe ɓen golle mooɗon ɗen".

26:169.t: Jooma, danndam min e ɓeynguure am ndeen kon ko ɓe ngollata.

26:170.t: Min danndi mo e ɓeynguure makko nden, ɓe fof maɓɓe.

26:171.t: Si wonaa jiidiraare(nayeejo debbo) nden ka halkaaɓe ɓen.

26:172.t: Refti Min oƴƴi heddii ɓe ɓen.

26:173.t: Min toɓini e dow maɓɓe toɓo, bonii toɓo jeertinaaɓe ɓen.

26:174.t: Pellet, wonii e ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo] aaya, ɓurɓe heewuɓe e maɓɓe laataaki mgooŋɗinɓe.

26:175.t: Pellet, Joomi maaɗa, ko Kako woni Tedduɗo Jurmeteeɗo.
