26:176.t: Yimɓe fitaare(sutu) nden njeddiino Nulaaɓe ɓeen.

26:177.t: Tuma nde Su'aybu wi'annoo ɓe: "Enee, on kulataa [Alla]?"

26:178.t: Min dey, ko mi Nulaaɗo e mooɗon koolaaɗo.

26:180.t: Mi toraaki on e dow ɗuum njoɓdi, njoɓdi am ndin fawaaki si wonaa Jooma winndere nde.

26:181.t: Kumnee ɓetu ngu, wata on laato jiyaaɓe e ustooɓe ɓeen.

26:183.t: Wata on ustan yimɓe ɓen piiji maɓɓe ɗin, wota on lancito ka leydi hara ko on bonnooɓe.

26:184.t: Kulee oon Takɗo on, o tagoore adinoongu ngun.

26:185.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Pellet, an ko a jiyaaɗo wilaaɓe ɓen.

26:186.t: Aan a wonaani si wonaa ɓannduŋke yeru amen, tawde miɗen cikkumaa ko a jiyaaɗo e fenooɓe ɓeen.

26:187.t: Awa fukku e dow amen kunte kammu ngun, si tawii a laatike jiyaaɗo e gooŋɗuɓe ɓeen.

26:188.t: O maaki: "Ko Joomi am woni gannduɗo ko ngolloton kon".

26:189.t: Ɓe njeddi mo, nanngi ɓe Lepte ñalaande ɗowdiinde nden. Pellet, ɗen laatino Lepte ñalaande mawnde.

26:190.t: Pellet, wonii e ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo] aaya, ɓurɓe heewɓe e maɓɓe laataaki gooŋɗinɓe.

26:191.t: Pellet, Joomi maaɗa, ko Kaŋko woni Tedduɗo Jurmeteeɗo.

26:192.t: E pellet, kayre ko nde jippinaande Joom winndere nde.

26:194.t: E ɓernde maaɗa fii yo a laato jiyaaɗo e jeertinooɓe ɓen.

26:196.t: Pellet, kayre hende ka ɗeri aranɓe ɓeen.

26:197.t: Enee, hara laatanaaki ɓe Ma'ande, nde tawata anndiino nde ɓiɓɓe Israa'iila annduɓe ɓen?

26:198.t: Sinndo Min njippinno nde e dow yoga e ajamiyaŋkooɓe ɓen.

26:199.t: o janngi nde e dow maɓɓe, ɓe laatotaako gooɗinɓe nde.

26:200.t: Ko wano nii Min naatniri ɗum e ɓerɗe bonɓe ɓen.

26:201.t: Ɓe ngooŋɗintaa nde, haa ɓe nji'a Lepte mu'usuɗe ɗen.

26:202.t: Ɗe ngara e maɓɓe e juhayee, hara ɓe so'aa.

26:203.t: Sakko ɓe mbi'a: "Taw si ko min neeɓnanteeɓe?"

26:204.t: Enee, ko Lepte amen ɗen ɓe keñorta?

26:205.t: A tinii si Min ndakmitii ɓe duuɓi.

26:206.t: Refti ari e maɓɓe ko ɓe laatinoo heɓe podee.

26:207.t: Nafaali ɓe ko ɓe laatinoo kon heɓe ndakmitoo.

26:208.t: Min kalkatanii saare woo, si wonaa hara no woodani nde jeertinooɓe.

26:212.t: Pellet, kannji ko ɗi follateeɗi ga keɗagol ngol.

26:213.t: Wota a noddu deweteeɗo goo wond'ude e Alla, sakko laatoɗaa jiyaaɗo e Lepteteeɓe ɓen.

26:214.t: Jeertin gorol maaɗa ɓurɓe ɓadaade ɓen.

26:215.t: Lesɗinan balbe maaɗen, wona nde ɓen jokkuɓe ma immorde e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

26:216.t: Si ɓe njeddii ma, haray maaku: "Min dey, ko mi danndiiɗo ko ngolloton".

26:218.t: On jioowo ma saha de darotoɗaa.

26:219.t: E baylitogol maaɗa e hakkunde sujjooɓe ɓeen.

26:220.t: Pellet, ko Kaŋko woni Nanoowo gannduɗo On.

26:221.t: Taw si mi humpitay on ko e hommbo Seytanuuji ɗin njippotoo?

26:222.t: Hiɗi njippoo e dow kala fekindotooɗo bakkodinɗo.

26:223.t: Hiɗi mbernoo nanɗe ɗen, ko ɓurɓe heewude e majji ko penooji.

26:224.t: Yimooɓe ɓeen ko jokkata ɓe, ko bewɓe ɓeen.

26:225.t: Enee, a tinaani won'dema kamɓe heɓe yinoo e kala aynde?

26:226.t: E tawde kamɓe heɓe wowla ko ɓe ngollataa.

26:227.t: Si wonaa ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe ɓe njaŋtii Alla ko ɗuuɗi ɓe yoɓtii ɓaawo ɓe tooñaama. Aray ka ɓeen tooñuɓe annday ko honde e waylitorde ɓe mbaylitotoo.

27:1.t: Taa Siin, ɗeen ko aayeeje Alqur'aanaare nden e deftere ɓanngunde.

27:2.t: Ko nde Peewal e welo-welo wonan'de gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

27:3.t: Ɓeen ɓe no ñiiɓa e Juulde nden ɓe totta askal on, kamɓe heɓe njananaa fii Laakara on.

27:4.t: Pellet, ɓeen ɓe ngooŋɗinaani Laakara on, Min cuɗanii ɓe golle maɓɓe ɗen, kamɓe heɓe mbumo.

27:5.t: Ko ɓeen ngoni ɓen, ɓe woodani ɗum Lepte bonɗe ɗen, kamɓe ka Laakara ko kamɓe ngoni hayruɓe ɓeen.

27:6.t: E pellet, an haɗa lonnginee Alqur'aanaare nden immorde ka Ñeeño gannduɗo.

27:7.t: Tuma nde Muusaa maakannoo ɓeynguure makko nden: "Min dey, mi haynike yiite, mi addana on ka nge woni ɗon kumpital ma mi addana on docotal kuɓɓungal, bela jo'o onon on itwoto.

27:8.t: Tuma nde o arnoo e magge, o noddaa: Ɗuum woni barkinaama on wonɗo ka yiite e ɓen wonɓe banŋe magge, e Senaare wonanii Alla Jooma winndere nden.

27:9.t: Eey ma Muusaa, ko woni, ko Min woni Alla Tedduɗo Ñeeñɗo On.

27:10.t: Liɓu tuggordu maaɗa ndun, Tuma nde o yi'unoo ndu hundu dilla, a wi'ayma kayru ko ndu mbooɗdi, o hucciti ko o doguɗo o yiltitaake. Ko an yo Muusaa: "Wata a hul, Min dey Nulaaɓe ɓen kulataa to Am".

27:11.t: Si wonaa oon tooñɗo, refti o lomtini ko moƴƴi ɓaawo bone ɗen. Pellet, Min ko Mi cuhroowo Jurmeteeɗo.

27:12.t: Naatnu junngo ma ngon ka jiiba maaɗa, ngo yaltay ko ngo ranewo ko aldaa e bone, [ɗum no jeyaa] e ndeer aayeeje jeenay nulaaɗe e Fir'awna e yimɓe makko ɓen, pellet, kamɓe ɓe laatike yimɓe faasiqiiɓe.

27:13.t: Tuma nde arnoo e maɓɓe Aayeeje amen ɗen ko yi'eteeɗe, ɓe mbi'i: "Ɗu'um, ko mbilewu ɓanngungu".

27:14.t: Ɓe njeddi [aayeeje ɗen], tawi wonkiiji maɓɓe ɗin no yananaa fii majje, tooñe e mawnintinaare. Ndaaru ko honno laatornoo battane yedduɓe ɓen.

27:15.t: Gooŋɗii Min ngokkii Daawuuda e Sulaymaana Ganndal ɓe maaki: "Yettoore nden woodanii Alla On ɓurnuɗo min e dow ɗuuɗuɓe immorde e jeyaaɓe makko gooŋɗinɓe ɓen".

27:16.t: Sulaymaana roni Daawuuda, O maaki: "eey mon yimɓe, min nganndinaama haala colli ɗin, men okkaama immorde e kala hu'unde, Pellet, ɗumɗoo ko ɗum woni ɓural ɓanngungal".

27:17.t: Sulaymaana mooɓanaa koneeli makko ɗi immorde ka jinnaaji e ka yimɓe e ka colli, kamɓe ko ɓe yuɓɓinaaɓe.

27:18.t: Haa nde ɓe ngrnoo e aynde korndolli ɗin, korndolil mbi'i i'i: "eey mon korndolli, naatee ka koɗanɗi mooɗon, fii wata Sulaymaana e koneeli mu'um ɗin muncu on, tawa kamɓe ɓe tinaa".

27:19.t: [Sulaymaana] moosi ko o jaluɗo immorde e konngol maggi ngol, o maaki: "Jooma, lonnginam no mi yettira neema maaɗa mo neeminɗaa e dow am on, e jibibinɓe lam ɓen, e nde mi gollata ko moƴƴi mbeltoraa ɗum, naatnaami ka Yurmeende Maaɗa wond'ude e jiyaaɓe Ma moƴƴuɓe ɓe".

27:20.t: O ƴewtii colli ɗin, o maaki: "Ko heɓi kam, mi yiaani Hud-huda. Kaa ndu laati jiyaandu e wirniiɗi ɗin?"

27:21.t: Maa mi lepta ndu sanne lepte caɗtuɗe ma maa mi hirsandu sanne, ma ndu addana kam hujja ɓannguɗo.

27:22.t: Ndu ñiiɓe ko woɗɗaani, ndu wi'i: "mi huɓindike ko a huɓindaaki ɗum, mi addanii ma immorde to Saba'i kumpital yananaangal".

27:23.t: Min dey, mi tawii sonnaajo no laamii ɓe homo okkaa immorde e kala hu'unde, no woodami mo kadi jullere [laamu] mawnde.

27:24.t: Mi tawii mo kaŋko e yimɓe makko ɓen heɓe cujjana na'ange nge ga Alla; Seytaane no cuɗaniɓe golle maɓɓe ɗen o faddii ɓe ga Laawol ngol, kamɓe ɓe peewataa.

27:25.t: Ko haɗata ɓe cujjana Alla oon jaltinoowo ko suuɗii kon ka kammuuli e ka leydi homo Anndi ko cuuɗoton e ko peñinton.

27:26.t: Alla, Deweteeɗo alaa si wonaa Kaŋko Jooma Arsi Tedduki kin.

27:27.t: O maaki: "Aray min ndaara si a gooŋɗu, maaɗum si laati jiyaaɗo e fenɓe ɓen".

27:28.t: Yahdu e nduu talkuru am mbernoɗaa ndu ka maɓɓe, refti kuccaa ɓe ndaaraa ko holɗum ɓe nduttata.

27:29.t: [Sonnaajo on] wi'i: "eey mon mbatu, min dey wernaama ka am talkuru teddundu".

27:30.t: Pellet, nduu ko immorde e Sulaymaana, pellet, ko woni e mayru ko: "Innde Alla kuuɓuɗo Yurmeende keeriiɗo Yurmeende Oon".

27:31.t: Wota on townitano kam, ngaree e am ko jebbiliiɓe.

27:32.t: O wi'i: "eey mon mbatu, mbaɗtee kam e feere e ɗee fiyaake am, mi laataaki taƴoowo fiyaake haa tawteɗon e am".

27:33.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Enen ko en jooma doole e jooma hare caɗtuɗe, fiyaake ɗen ko ka maaɗa woni, ndaaru ko holɗum njamirtaa".

27:34.t: [Debbo on] wi'i: "Pellet, laamɓe ɓen si ɓe naatii e saare ɓe mbonnat nde, ɓe mbaɗa tedduɓe mayre ɓen hoyɓe, ko wanonii ɓe ngollirta.

27:35.t: Awa miin, mi nulay e maɓɓe neldaari, mi ndaara ko holɗum nulaaɓe ɓen nduttodata.

27:36.t: Tuma nde ɓe arnoo ka Sulaymaana, o maaki: "Enee, on ɓeydiray kam jawdi, kon ko Alla okkimmi, no ɓuri moƴƴude diini kon ko O okki on, ko woni, onon hoɗon farnora neldaari mooɗon ndin".

27:37.t: Rutto ka maɓɓe, mamen ngaddana ɓe koneeli ɗi ɓe maraa feere muuɗum, mamen njaltin ɓe ton ko ɓe ja'asɓe hara kamɓe ko hoyɓe.

27:38.t: O maaki: "eey mon mbatu, ko hommbo e mooɗon addanta kam jullere laamu makko nden, ko adii ɓe arude ka am ko ɓe jebbiliiɓe?"

27:39.t: Ngaari jinna ndin wi'i: "Min, mi addante nde ko adii a immaade e darnde maaɗa nden, e pellet, min e dow ɗum ko mi cemmbuɗo koolaaɗo".

27:40.t: Oon mo woni ka mu ganndal immorde ka deftere wi'i: "Min mi anndante nde ko adii a nde ndarɗe maaɗa ɗen ruttotoo e maaɗa". Tuma nde o yi'unoo nde ko nde ñiiɓunde ka makko, o maaki: "Ɗum ɗoo, ko immorde e Ɓural Joomi am, fii yo o ndarndo lam si mi jarnay [mo] maaɗum si mi yeddat [mo], kala jarnuɗo anndu ko o jarni kon wonanay wonkii makko kin, kala yedduɗo kadi pellet, Joomi am ko o Galo Tedduɗo".

27:41.t: O maaki: "Faytinanee mo jullere laamu makko nden, ndaaren si on annditat, kaa o laatoto jiyaaɗo e ɓen ɓe anndittaa".

27:42.t: Tuma nde o arnoo, [o] wi'aa: "Enee, ko nii jullere maaɗa nden wa'i?" O wi'i: "Awi'ayma ko kayre tigi nii". Min ndokkaama ganndal ko adii mo, min laatii jebbiliiɓe.

27:43.t: Faddii mo, ɗum ko o laatinoo homo rewa ga Alla, pellet, kaŋko o laatinoke jiyaaɗo e yimɓe yedduɓe.

27:44.t: Wi'anaa mo: "Naatu ka huɓeere". Tuma nde o yi'unoo nde o sikki ko nde duneere(tewru), o ñori dense (korle)makko ɗen. [Sulaymaana] maaki: "Pellet, ndee ko huɓeere newɗiniraande ndaarorɗe". [Debbo on] wi'i: "Jooma, min dey mi tooñii woŋkii am, mi jebbilanike Alla Jooma winndire nden, wond'ude e Sulaymaana".

27:45.t: Gooŋɗii Min Nulii fa'ade e Samuudinkooɓe ɓen musiɗɗo maɓɓe on Saalihu, ɗum woni rewee Alla. Tawi kamɓe ko ɓe feddeeji ɗiɗi hiɓe beeñondira.

27:46.t: O maaki: "Ko onon yo yimɓe am, ko fii holɗum heñornton bone ɗen ko adii moƴƴere nden?" "Ko haɗi imsinanao Alla mbelejo'o onon on njurminoyte".

27:47.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Min kiitinorii ma e ɓen won'ɗuɓe e maaɗa". O maaki: "kiite mooɗon on ko ka Alla woni, ko woni, onon ko on yimɓe fitneteeɓe"

27:48.t: Laatinoke ka saare ton worɓe njeenayo heɓe mbonna ka leydi ɓe moƴƴintaa.

27:49.t: Ɓe mb'i: Ɓe ngooɗndirii Alla, ma min waalanan mo ka suudu kaŋko e ɓeynguure makko nden refti ma min wi'an jeyɓe mo ɓen; men tawaaka bargol yimɓe makko ɓen, e pellet, menen ko men gooŋɗuɓe".

27:50.t: Ɓe kodi hodoore Minen kadi Min pewji fewjoore, tawi kamɓe ɓe so'ataa.

27:51.t: Ndaaru, ko honno laatorno battane hodo maɓɓe ngon, Minen Min njirbinno ɓe kamɓe e yimɓe maɓɓe ɓen ɓe fof maɓɓe.

27:52.t: Ɗin cuuɗi maɓɓe ko jeewuɗi sabu ko ɓe tooñunoo kon. Pellet, wonii e ɗum Ma'ande wonan'de yimɓe haqqilooɓe ɓen.

27:53.t: Min danndi ɓen gooŋɗinɓe, ɓe ngoni hulooɓe [Alla].

27:54.t: E Luutu, tuma nde o wi'anno yimɓe makko ɓen: 'Enee, on aray paŋkare ɗen hara hoɗon cutii?"

27:55.t: Eyoo, onon on ngarat e worɓe ɓen ka tuuyo ngccon rewɓe ɓen?! Si ko woni, onon ko on yimɓe majjaaɓe.

27:56.t: Jaabawol yimɓe makko ɓen ngonaano si wonaa ko ɓe mbi'i : "Yaltinee yimɓe Luutu ɓen ka hoɗo (wura) mooɗon ; kamɓe ko ɓe yimɓe laɓɓintintooɓe".

27:57.t: Min daɗndi mo kaŋko e yimɓe makko ɓen, si wonaa debbo makko on; [on ɗon] Min hoddiranii mo ko o jiyaaɗo e halketaaɓe ɓen.

27:58.t: Min toɓini e dow maɓɓe toɓo, bonii toɓo jeertinaaɓe ɓen.

27:59.t: Maaku: Yettoore nden ko Alla woodani, kisiyee wonii e jiyaaɓe makko ɓen ɓe O suɓii. Enee, ko Alla ɓuri moƴƴude, kaa ko ɗin ɗiɓe sirkanta?

27:60.t: Kaa ko hommbo tagi kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin O jippinani on immorde ka kammu ndiyam? Min puɗiniri ɗam gese joomiraaje ŋari. Wonantaa on nde puɗinon leɗɗe majje. Enee, hara deweteeɗo no woodi wond'ude e Alla? Ko woni, kamɓe ko ɓe yimɓe ooñotooɓe.

27:61.t: Kaa ko hommbo waɗi leydi ndin ñiiɓndi, O waɗi hakkunde mayri calluɗi O waɗani ndi pelle o waɗi hakkunde maaje ɗen ɗiɗi heedo?, hara na woodi deweteeɗo [goo] wond'ude e Alla? ko woni, ɓurɓe ɗuuɗude ɓen e maɓɓe ɓe nganndaa.

27:62.t: Kaa ko hommbo jaabato ɓittiiɗo on si o noddi mo o hunca bone ɗen o waɗa on lontiiɓe ka leydi? Na woodi Koreweteeɗo goo wond'ude e Alla? Famɗii ko mbaajitoɗon.

27:63.t: Kaa ko hommbo feewnata on ka niɓe njoorndi e ka maayo, e ko hommbo accitata keni ɗin wewlinirayɗi fii Yurmeende Makko nden? Enee, ko deweteeɗo goo wond'ude e Alla? Alla Toowii ga ko ɓe cirkata kon.

27:64.t: Kaa ko hommbo woni puɗɗuɗo tagoore nde refti O rutta ngu, e ko hommbo arsikata on immorde ka kammu e ka leydi? Enee, ko deweteeɗo goo wond'ude e Alla? Maaku: "Addee daliili mooɗon on si tawii ko on gooŋɗuɓe".

27:65.t: Maaku: "Anndaa ko wirnii kon ɓen wonɓe ka kammuuli e ka leydi si wonaa Alla. Ɓe so'ataa kadi ko honnde tuma ɓe immintinoytee".

27:66.t: Ko woni, ganndal maɓɓe ngal hattii fii Laakara on, ko woni, kamɓe heɓe e sikke fii [Laakara], ko woni, kamɓe ko ɓe wumuɓe fii ɗum.

27:67.t: Ɓeen yedduɓe mbi'i: " Enee, hay si min laatike mbullaari e baabiraaɓe amen ɓen kadi, e hara minen ko min yaltinoyteeɓe?"

27:68.t: Gooŋɗii min podanooma ɗum minen e baabiraaɓe amen ko adii, ɗum wonaani si wonaa tinndi adinooɓe.

27:69.t: Maaku : "njehee ka leydi ndaaron ko honno battane bonɓe ɓen laatornoo".

27:70.t: Wota a suno fii maɓɓe, wota a laato e ɓitteende immorde e ko ɓe peewjata kon.

27:71.t: Heɓe mb'a: "Ko honnde tuma woni ndee Fodoore, si on laatike gooŋuɗɓe?"

27:72.t: Maaku: "No tijjaa de tawata ɓadanike on yoga e kon ko ɗaɓɓuɗon yaccinaneede".

27:73.t: Pellet, Joomi maaɗa ko O Jom Ɓural e dow yimɓe ɓeen, kono ɓurɓe ɗuuɗude ɓen e maɓɓe ɓe njaarnataa [Alla].

27:74.t: Pellet, Joomi maaɗa hiMo Anndi ko ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen coomi e ko ɗe 'eññinta ko.

27:75.t: Alaa e birniikum ka kammu e ka leydi si wonaa [fii makkun] no e ndeer deftere ɓanngunde.

27:76.t: Pellet ndee Alqur'aanaare, hende filloo e dow ɓiɗɓe Israa'iila ɓen fii hu'unde nde ɓe ɓuri luutondirde nden e fii muuɗum.

27:77.t: Pellet, kayre ko nde peewal e Yurmeende wonan'de gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

27:78.t: Pellet, Joomi maaɗa O ñaawirat hakkunde maɓɓe Ñaawoore makko ngal, ko Kaŋko woni Tedduɗo gannduɗo.

27:79.t: Wakkilo e Alla, pellet, an haɗa e hoore Goonga ɓannguka ka.

27:80.t: Pellet, an a nanintaa maayɓe ɓen, a nanintaa fa'aɗuɓe ɓen noddaandu ndun si ɓe ɗuurnike ɓe nduŋitii.

27:81.t: An a wonaani peewnoowo wumɓe ɓen e ga majjere maɓɓe nde. A nanintaa si wonaa ɓen gooŋɗinɓe Aayeeje Amen ɗen hara kamɓe ko ɓe jebbiliiɓe.

27:82.t: Si konngol ngol yanii e dow maɓɓe, Min yaltinana ɓe daabewa immorde ka leydi himba kaalana ɓe won'nde yimɓe ɓen laatike ɓe yananaaka aayeeje Amen ɗen.

27:83.t: E ñande Min mooɓoyta immorde e kala mofte dental jeyaaɓe e ɓen yennooɓe Aayeeje Amen ɗen hara kamɓe heɓe coggee.

27:84.t: Haa si ɓe ngarii, O Daala: "Eyoo, on yenniino Aayeeje Am ɗen, hara on huɓindoraali ɗi ganndal. Kaa ko holɗum wonɗon e gollude?"

27:85.t: Konngol [Lepte] ngol yani e maɓɓe sabu ko ɓe tooñi ko, kamɓe ɓe kaalataa.

27:86.t: Enee, hara ɓe yiaani, Minen Min mbaɗii jemma on fii yo ɓe deeƴu e maako, e ñalawma on nji'irɗo? Pellet, wonii e ɗum Aayeeje wonan'de yimɓe gooŋɗinooɓe ɓen.

27:87.t: E Ñande wuttoytee ka alaadu, ɗenƴoo ɓen wonɓe ka kammuuli e ɓen wonɓe ka leydi, si wonaa ɓen ɓe Alla muuyi, gooto kala e maɓɓe aray e makko hara ko ɓe hoykiniiɓe.

27:88.t: Haɗa tina pelle ɗen, cikka ko ɗe fenndiiɗe, hara le kannje heɗe wuloo wulagol duule ɗen, ɗuum ko kuugal Alla, On ŋarɗinɗo kala hu'unde, pellet, Kaŋko ko O kumpitiiɗo ko ngolloton kon.

27:89.t: Mo ardii e moƴƴere nden haray no woodani mo ko ɓuri nde moƴƴude, hara kamɓe ko ɓe hooliiɓe immorde e ɗenƴere nden Ñande.

27:90.t: Mo ardii kadi e bone ɗen, j'eece maɓɓe ɗen kippete ka Yiite. Yalli on yoɓete si wonaa kon ko laatinoɗon hoɗon ngolla?

27:91.t: Anndu ko mi yamiraa ko yo mi rewJooma ndii leydi ndi Alla harmini ɗum, no woodani mo kala hu'unde. Mi yamiraama kadi yo mi laato jiyaaɗo e jebbiliiɓe ɓeen.

27:92.t: E yo mi janngu Alqur'aanaare ndeen, mo feewii ko hoore-makko o feewani, mo majjii kadi maaku: "Min dey, ko mi jiyaaɗo e jeertinooɓe ɓeen.

27:93.t: Maaku kadi: "jettooje nden ngoodanii Alla, aray O holla on Aayeeje makko ɗeen ngaanndon ɗe". Joomi maaɗa wonaani belsindiiɗo ga e kon ko ngolloton.

28:2.t: Ɗee ko aayeeje deftere ɓanngunde nden.

28:3.t: Moɗen janngira e maaɗa hoore goonga, kumpital Muusaa e Fir'awna, wonan'de yimɓe gooŋɗinooɓe ɓen.

28:4.t: Pellet, Fir'awna townitino ka leydi; o waɗi yimɓe mayri ndin pecce-pecce: homo lo'ina fedde goo e maɓɓe, o hirsa ɓiɓɓe maɓɓe worɓe ɓen o acca rewɓe maɓɓe ɓen. Pellet, ko e bonnooɓe ɓen o jiyanoo.

28:5.t: Miɗen faandinoo moƴƴagol e lo'inanooɓe ɓen ka leydi; Min mbaɗa ɓe koohooɓe, Min mbaɗa ɓe kadi ronooɓe ɓen.

28:6.t: Min kuɓindina ɓe e leydi ndin, Min kolla Fir'awna e Haamaana e koneeli maɓɓe ɗin, kon ko ɓe kulaynoo.

28:7.t: Min mbhayini e yumma Muusaa, wonn'de: "Muynin mo". Si a hulanoyii mo, ko yo a bugoyo mo ka maayo. Wata a hulu, wata a suno; pellet, Men ruttay mo ka maaɗa, Min mbɗoya mo gooto e Nulaaɓe ɓen".

28:8.t: Yimɓe Fir'awna ɓen kocci mo, fii yo laatano ɓe gaño e suno. Pellet, Fir'awna e Haamaana e koneeli maɓɓe ɗin, ɓe laatino woopɓe.

28:9.t: Debbo Fir'awna on wi'i: "(Kun entum ko) ɓuuɓeendi gite am e an kadi! Wota on war mo, hino gasa ka o nafata en, maa jogitoren mo ɓiɗɗo". Hari ɓe so'aani.

28:10.t: Ɓernde yumma Muusaa nden wonti yeewnde. Haa o eɓɓi feññin'de fii makko, si wonaano Min tabintinnde ɓernde makko nden, fii yo o laato e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

28:11.t: [Yumma Muusaa] wi'ani banndiraawo makko on: "Jokkitu mo"; o haynii mo ka de'estii, ɓe so'aa-anndude.

28:12.t: Min karminani mo ko adii, (enɗi) muynirɗi ɗin, (banndiraawo makko on) mbi'i: "On ngaccat mi tinndina on fii yimɓe suudu, ɓe ne'ana on mo, hara kadi ko laaɓanat ɓe mo?"

28:13.t: Min ndtti mo ka yumma makko, fii yo ɓernde makko ɓuuɓu, hara o sunaaki, e fii yo o anndu pellet, fodoore Alla nden, ko goonga. Kono ɓurɓe ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe ngaanndaa.

28:14.t: Nde o yottinoo sagatalaaku makko ngun, o fotondi- ri, Min ngokki mo faamu e ganndal. Ko wano non Min njoɓirta moƴƴinooɓe ɓen.

28:15.t: O naatiri e saare nden, feewndo welsindaare yimɓe mayre; o tawi worɓe ɗiɗo no haɓa ton: goɗɗo on ko jiyaaɗo e leñol makko, oya on ko jiyaaɗo e ayɓe makko ɓen. Jeyaaɗo e leñol makko ngol ɗaɓɓiri faabo e hoore jiyaaɗo e gaño makko on. Muusaa uttii mo, nde gayni fii makko. [Muusaa] maaki: "Ɗum ɗoo, ko jiyaaɗum e kuuɗe seytaane. Pellet, ko o gaño, majjinoowo ɓannguɗo".

28:16.t: O maaki: "Joomi am, mi tooñii hoore-am; haforanam." O haforani mo. Pellet, ko Kaŋko woni Haforoowo, jurmotooɗo On.

28:17.t: O maaki: "Joomi am, sabu ko neeminɗaa ko e am, mi wonataa ballo bomɓe ɓe".

28:18.t: O wonti kulɗo ka saare, homo habbii [nanngeede]. Tawi faabinornooɗo mo on hanki, homo faabinora mo [hannde kadi]. Muusaa maakani mo: "Pellet, ko a bewɗo ɓannguɗo".

28:19.t: Nde Muusaa faandinoo nanngugol tawɗo on ko gaño maɓɓe kamɓe ɗiɗo, o wi'i: "ey ma yo Muusaa, a faala bargol lam, wano ittirnoɗaa woŋkii non haŋki? A faandaaki, si wonaa wonugol dunndarankeejo ka leydi, a faandaaki jeyeede e moƴƴinooɓe ɓeen".

28:20.t: Gorko iwri ka ɓuri woɗɗude e saare nden, homo yaccoo, o wi'i: "eey ma Muusaa, mbatu ngun no fewjana fii bargol maa. Yaltu (e leydi ndin). Ko mi jiyaaɗo e laaɓanooɓe ma".

28:21.t: O yalti ton, ko o kulɗo, himo tijjii [nanngeede]. O maaki: "Joomi am, danɗndam e yimɓe tooñooɓe ɓeen".

28:22.t: Nde o feewtunoo hella Madyana, o maaki: "Hino hasii ka Joomi am fewnirta lam, e laawol pocciingol ngol".

28:23.t: Nde o hewtunoo ka ɓunndu Madyana, o tawi ɗon dental yimɓe, heɓe njarna [daabeeji maɓɓe], o tawi gaanin maɓɓe, rewɓe ɗiɗo, no sogga [dammi maɓɓe], o maaki: "Ko holɗum habbi-ɗon?" Ɓe mb'i: "Min njarnataa haa aynooɓe ɓen nde'estoo, baaba amen, ko mawɗo nayeejo".

28:24.t: O yarnani ɓe [dammi ɗin], refti o huccitiri ka ɗowdi, o maaki: "Joomi am, min ko njippinɗaa e am woo e moƴƴere, ko mi katonjiɗo".

28:25.t: Gooto e [jiwɓe] ɓen ari e makko, homo yahra hersa, o wi'i: "Baaba am no nodde, fii yo o yoɓe njoɓdi kon ko njarnan-ɗaa men". Tuma o hewtunoo ka [mawɗo] on, o sifanii mo fii [makko], o maaki: "Wota a hul, a daɗii yimɓe tooñooɓe ɓen".

28:26.t: Gooto e [jiwɓe] ɓen wi'i: "Ƴettu mo golle, yo baaba. Pellet, ko ɓuri moƴƴude e mo ƴettataa golle, ko doolnuɗo koolniiɗo".

28:27.t: [Mawɗo] on maaki: "Miɗo yiɗi desingol ma gooto e jiwɓe am ɓen ɗoo ɗiɗo, e hoore yo a golla-nam duuɓi jeetati. Si a timminii sappo, haray ko e sago maa; mi faalaaka saɗtinannde ma. A tawat kam, si Alla jaɓii, ko e moƴƴinooɓe ɓen mi jeyaa".

28:28.t: [Muusaa] maaki: "Ɗum wonii hakkunde am e mon. Happu woo e majji ɗiɗi, ɗi mi huuɓni, haray ɓiɗteede alanaa e kam. En waɗii Alla pawtiiɗo e ko wowluɗen kon".

28:29.t: Nde Muusaa timminnoo happu ngun, o yahdi e ɓeydnuure makko, o haynii yiite ka senngo (fello) Tuuri, o maaki ɓeunguure makko nden: "ngonee ɗoo, min mi haynike yiite. Mbelejo'o mi addana on e magge kumpital maa te'annde(docotal) yiite ngen, mbelejo'o itworon".

28:30.t: Nde o heewtunoo nge, o noddiraa ka fonngo ñaamo aynde, ka tummbere barkinaande, ka (takko) lekki, won'nde: "eey ma Muusaa! Ko Miin woni Alla, Jeyɗo winndere nden".

28:31.t: Kadi: "Bugo tuggordu maa ndun"; nde o tinunoo hundu dillira wa mboddi,o huccitiri dogudu, o yeƴƴitaaki. [O noddaa]: "Ko an yo Muusaa! Artu, wota a hul; ko a jiyaaɗo e hooliiɓe ɓeen.

28:32.t: Naatnu juungo maa ngon ka jayba maa, ngo yaltat ranewo, ko aldaa e ñawu. Bakaa e maaɗa, juuɗe maa ɗen, fii kulol ngol. Ɗiin ko hujjaaji ɗiɗi, immorde ka Joomi maa, haa e Fir'awna e dental mum, pellet, ɓeen laatike yimɓe faasiqiiɓe".

28:33.t: O maaki: "Joomi am, mi ittiino wonkii e maɓɓe, miɗo huli nde ɓe mbarata kam.

28:34.t: Ko musiɗɗo am on Haaruuna, ɓuri kam laaɓude ɗemngal. Immindin-mo e am, ko ballitoo kam, gooŋɗiam-mi; miɗo huli nde ɓe fennata kam".

28:35.t: [Alla] daali: "Min cemmbinirat tere maa ɗen, musiɗɗo maa on, Min mbaɗana on hujja (e cemmbe); ɓe hewtirtaa on ɗiɗo, sabu aayeeje Amen ɗe [Min nuli e] mo'on, e ɓen jokkuɓe on foolɓe".

28:36.t: Nde Muusaa addunoo e maɓɓe aayeeje Amen ɗen ɓannguɗe, ɓe mbi'i: "Ɗum wonaani, si wonaa mbilewu fekindaangu. Min naniraani ɗum baabiraaɓe amen adinooɓe ɓen".

28:37.t: Muusaa maaki: "Ko Joomi am ɓuri anndude on arduɗo e peewal, immorde to makko, e on mo battane moƴƴe woodani ka La'akara. Pellet, O malnataa tooñooɓe ɓen".

28:38.t: Fir'awna wi'i: "eey mon dental, mi anndanaa on deweteeɗo, si wonaa min. Eey ma yo Haamaana, huɓɓinanam [yiite] e loopal ngal, mahiranaa kam huɓeere toownde, no gasa ka mi ƴellitoo e Deweteeɗo Muusaa On; tawde miɗo sikki mo e fenooɓe ɓen".

28:39.t: O townitii ka leydi, kaŋko e koneeli makko ɗin, ko aldaa e goonga. Ɓe cikki won'de ɓe ruttitetaako ka Amen.

28:40.t: Men nanngi mo, kaŋko e koneeli makko ɗin, Min mbugii ɓe ka maayo. Tasko, ko honno battane tooñɓe ɓen mba'unoo.

28:41.t: Min mbaɗi ɓe ardiiɓe, noddoo ɓe e Yiite. Ñande Darngal, ɓe walletaake.

28:42.t: Min njokkintiniri ɓe ka aduna ɗoo, kuddi. Ñalnde Darngal, ko ɓe jiyaaɓe e woɗɗintinoyteeɓe [e yurmeende Alla].

28:43.t: Gooŋɗii Min ngokkii Muusaa Deftere nden, ɓaawo nde Min kalkunoo gire arane ɗen, ko nde ndayginorde yimɓe ɓen, e peewal e yurmeende. Mbelejo'o, ɓe mbaajitorat.

28:44.t: A tawanooka ka senngo hiirnaange, fewndo Min mbahyinnoo e Muusaa yamiroore nden, a jeyanooka kadi e seediiɓe ɓen.

28:45.t: Kono Minen ngoni ni tagkɓe gire, duuɓi maɓɓe juuti. A hoɗaano kadi e yimɓe Madyana ɓen, haɗa janngana ɓe Aayeeje Amen; ko Minen ngoni nulɓe.

28:46.t: A tawanooka ka senngo Fello Tuuri, fewndo Min noddunoo; ko yurmeende immorde ka Joomi maa [woni ko Min nulir-maa], fii no njeertiniraa yimɓe, ɓe reentinoowo araali e maɓɓe, ado maaɗa, mbelejo'o, ɓe mbaajitoto.

28:47.t: Si wonaano fii yo lepte yanir e maɓɓe, sabu ko juuɗe maɓɓe ardini, ɓe wi'ayno: "Joomi amen, ko haɗno imminaa Nulaaɗo e amen? Min njokka nun aayeeje Maa ɗen, men njeyee e gooŋɗimɓe ɓen".

28:48.t: Nde o addirannooɓe goonga kan, immorde ka amen, ɓe mb'i: "Ko haɗno o okkee yeru ko Muusaa okkanoo kon?" Kere ɓe njeddaano ko Muusaa okkanoo kon ko adii? Ɓe mbi'i'i: "Ko bileeji ɗiɗi, ɗi no wallindira!" Ɓe mbi'i kadi: "Ko min yedduɓe fof e mun".

28:49.t: Maaku: "ngadee deftere immorde ka Alla, hara hende ɓuri ɗee ɗiɗi feewde, mi jokkaynde, si on laatike goongunɓe".

28:50.t: Si ɓe njaabaaki ma, anndu ko mbeleeɗe maɓɓe ɓe njokkata. Ko hommbo ɓuri majjude ɓuri oon jokkirɗo mbeleeɗe mun, ko aldaa e peewal immorde ka Alla? Pellet, Alla feewnata yimɓe tooñooɓe ɓen.

28:51.t: Gooɗii Min hewtinii ɓe Konngol ngol, mbelejo'o, ɓe mbaajitora.

28:52.t: Ɓen ɓe Min ndokki Deftere [Tawreeta] nden, ko adii [Alqur'aana] ndee, ko ɓe gooŋɗinɓe nde.

28:53.t: Si nde janngaama e dow maɓɓe, ɓe mbi'a: "Min ngooŋɗinii nde. Ko nde goonga immorde ka Joomi amen. Pellet min woniino jebbiliiɓe, ado mayre".

28:54.t: Ɓeen ɗon, ɓe jonniroyte njoɓdi maɓɓe ndin, laabi ɗiɗi, sabu ko ɓe muñinoo kon, heɓe nduñiraynoo moƴƴere nden, bone on, e hu'unde nde Min ngarsiki ɓe nden, heɓe nafqa.

28:55.t: Si ɓe nanii meerente, ɓe ɗuurnoo e ɗum, ɓe mbi'a: "Ko minen golle amen ngoodani, ko onon kadi golle mon nhoodani. Kisal wonii e mo'on. Min ɗaɓɓataa wonndugol e majjuɓe ɓen".

28:56.t: Pellet, an (Nulaaɗo), a feewnata mo njiɗɗaa; kono Alla no feewna on Mo O muuyi. Ko Kaŋko ɓuri anndude feewɓe ɓen.

28:57.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Si min njokkidii peewal ngal e maa, men biftete ka leydi amen". E Min hoɗiniraali ɓe e nokku horminaaɗo, koolniiɗo, mo dimɗe noone kaka addetee e mun, arsike immorde ka Amen? Si ko woni, ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe, ɓe nganndaa.

28:58.t: Ɗuuɗii ko Min kakli, e yimɓe ca'e, bewrunooɓe nguuree mum, e homo non galleeji maɓɓe ɗin, koɗiraaka ɓaawo maɓɓe, si wonaa seeɗa. Min laatii wonn'de ronooɓe ɓeen.

28:59.t: Joomi maa siforaali won'de kalkoowo yimɓe ca'e, haa O immina e leñol maɓɓeɗen, Nulaaɗo, ko janngana ɓe aayeeje Amen ɗen. Min siforaali kadi kalkugol yimɓe ca'e, si wonaa hara yimɓe majje ko tooñuɓe.

28:60.t: Kala ko ngokkaɗon e hu'unde, ko dakamme nguurndam aduna e cuɗaari mun; ko ko woni ka Alla kon, ɓuri moƴƴude, woni kadi ko luttata. E on haqqiltaa?

28:61.t: Eey mon Min podi fodaari moƴƴuri, ndi o hawrata e mu'un, wa'ata wa on mo Min ndakmitiri dakamme nguurndam aduna, refti hara kaŋko on, Ñalnde Darngal, ko e tawneteeɓe (ka Yiite) ɓen o jeyaa?

28:62.t: Ñande O noddoyta ɓe, O wi'a: "Ko hoɗo kafidaaɗi am, ɗin ɗi ngaaƴoratnoɗon woni?"

28:63.t: Ɓen ɓe Konngol jojji e Mu'um wi'a: "Joomi amen, ko ɓee ngoni ko min bewinnoo. Min bewinirno ɓe, wano men bewirnoo. Min daɗndinike e Maaɗa. Wonaa minen ɓe ndewatnoo".

28:64.t: [Ɓe] mb'anee: "Noddee non kafidaaɗi mon ɗin". Ɓe nodda ɗi, kono ɗi njaabotaako ɓe. Ɓe nji'a lepte ɗen, (ɓe njeloo) sinno hara ɓe peewuno.

28:65.t: Ñande O noddoyta ɓe, o wi'a: "Ko holɗum njaabinoɗon Nulaaɓe ɓen?"

28:66.t: Lamitorɗi ɗin mbumiɗana ɓe nden ñande, ɓe lamndondirtaa.

28:67.t: Si ko tuubuɗo, o gooŋɗini, o golli moƴƴuɗi, hino hasii ka o jeyee e malaaɓe ɓeen.

28:68.t: Joomi maa no taga ko o muuyi, O suɓoo; suɓagol alanaa ɓe. Senaade woodanii Alla! O toowii e kon ko ɓe cirkata!

28:69.t: Joomi maa no anndi ko ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen cuuɗata, e kon ko ɓe peññinta.

28:70.t: Ko Kaŋko Alla woni, Mo deweteeɗo alaa, si wanaa Kaŋko. Ko Kaŋko jettooje nhoodani aduna e La'akara. Hino woodani Mo ñaawoore nden. Ko ka Makko rutteteɗon.

28:71.t: Maaku: "njeewtee kam, Si Alla waɗiranii on jemma on, duumiiɗo haa Ñande Darngal, ko deweteeɗo hommbo, tanaa Alla, addanta on ndayngu? E on nanataa?"

28:72.t: Maaku: "njeewtee kam, Si Alla waɗiranii on ñalorma on, duumiiɗo haa Ñande Darngal, ko deweteeɗo hommbo, tanaa Alla, addanta on jemma, mo deeƴoton e mun? E on nji'ataa?"

28:73.t: Hino jeyaa e yurmeende Makko, O waɗiranii on jemma e ñalawma; fii no deeƴiron e (jemma) on, e no ɗaɓɓiron ( e ñalawma on), ɓural makko, e no mbelajo'o njettiron [Mo] .

28:74.t: Ñande O noddoyta ɓe, O wi'a: "Ko holto kadidaaɗi(renndidiiɗi) am, ɗin ɗin ngaaƴoratnoɗon ngoni?"

28:75.t: Min ɗoofi e kala mofte, seedotooɗo, Min mbi'a: "ngddee hujjaajji mon ɗin". Ɓe ngnndi wonn'de goonga kan, ko Alla woodani; ko ɓe fekindotonoo kon majjitora ɓe.

28:76.t: Pellet,Qaaruuna ko e yimɓe Muusaa ɓen jeyanoo,kono o bewi e maɓɓe.Min ngokki mo ngaluuji tawat-ɗi coktirɗe mum,no teddana jamaa doolnuɗo.Nde yimɓe makko ɓeen,mbiatno mo:Wata a weltor townitaare.Pellet Alla yiɗaa weltortooɓe toownitaare.

28:77.t: Ɗaɓɓir ko Alla okku-maa kon, galle laakare ɗen. Wota a yejjit geɗal maa ngal aduna. Moƴƴir no Alla moƴƴorii non e maaɗa. Wata a ɗaɓɓu bonnugol ka leydi. Anndu pellet, Alla yiɗaa bonnooɓe ɓen".

28:78.t: O wi'i: "Ko mi okkiraa ɗum, ko e hoore ganndal ngal mi jogii". E o anndaa wonn'de gooŋɗii Alla kalkiino gire, adiiɓe mo, ɓurɓe doole, ɓuri mo ɗuuɗude jawle? Ɓe lamndoytaake fii bakkaat maɓɓe, kamɓe bomɓe ɓen!

28:79.t: O yaltitiri e yimɓe makko ɓen, cuɗaari makko ndin. Yiɗuɓe nguurndam aduna ɓen mbi'i: "Hara nun min keɓayno sugu koo ko Qaaruuna okkaa. Kaŋko on, pellet, ko o jom-geɓal mawnungal".

28:80.t: Okkaaɓe ganndal ɓen kan mbi'i: "Ee bone mon! Ko mbarjaari Alla ndin ɓuri moƴƴannde on gooŋɗinɗo o golli ko moƴƴi". Kono hawrataa e ɗuum, si wonaa muññiiɓe ɓen.

28:81.t: Min mutindini mo e galle makko ɗen, ka leydi. Fedde woo alanaa mo, ko paaboo mo gaanin Alla, o wonaano paabotooɗo hoore-mum.

28:82.t: Ɓen yelinooɓe nokku makko on haŋki mum, ɓe mbaɗti wiide: "Ee bone! Alla no wertana arsike on, Mo O muuyani e jiyaaɓe Makko ɓen, O ɓiɗtinana [Mo O muuyani]. Si wonaa Alla moƴƴinoo e amen, O mutinayno men. Ee bone! Jaka O malnataa yedduɓe ɓen".

28:83.t: Ɗen galle laakara, Min mbaɗanii ɗe ɓen ɓe yiɗaa townitaare ka leydi, wonaa kadi bonnugol. Battane moƴƴe ɗen, ko fii gooŋɗuɓe ɓen.

28:84.t: Kala garduɗo e moƴƴere, hino woodani mo ko ɓuri nde moƴƴude; kala kadi garduɗo e bonannde, (yo o anndu) huuwuɓe bonɗi ɗin yoɓetaake, si wanaa ko ɓe huuwaynoo kon.

28:85.t: Pellet, jippinɗo Alqur'aana on e maaɗa, ko duttoo-wo ma ka woowaandi maa. Maaku: "Ko Joomi am ɓuri anndude arduɗo e peewal, e gonɗo e majjere ɓanngunde".

28:86.t: A wonaano tamƴininooɗo jippineede deftere nden e maaɗa. Si wonaa tun, ko yurmeende immorde ka Joomi maa. Wota won muk, balloowo heeferɓe ɓen.

28:87.t: wota ɓe palo ma kadi e aayeeje Alla ɗen, ɓaawo ɗe jippineede e maaɗa. Noddu (yimɓe ɓen) fa'ade e Joomi maa, wota a won muk, jiyaaɗo e sirkooɓe ɓen.

28:88.t: Wota a rewudu e Alla, deweteeɗo goo. Deweteeɗo goo alaa, si wonaa Kaŋko. Hu'unde fof re'ay, si wonaa Jaati Maako Kin. Ko Kaŋko woodani ñaawugol; ko ka Makko kadi ndtteteɗon.

29:2.t: E yimɓe ɓen cikku ɓe ngaccirte nii, fii ɓe wi'ii: "Min ngooŋɗinii!" Hara ɓe pitninaaka?

29:3.t: Gooŋɗii, Min pitninii ɓen adinooɓe ɓe. Maa Alla feññin, fii gooŋɗuɓe ɓen, maa O feññin kadi, fii fenooɓe ɓen.

29:4.t: Kaa golluɓe bonɗi ɓen cikku, won'nde ɓe laawoto Min? ko ɓe ñaawata kon bonii!

29:5.t: Kala tawɗo homo njortii kawroygol e Alla, ko pellet, lajal Alla ngal, ko hewtaygal. Ko Kaŋko woni Nanoowo, nganduɗo on.

29:6.t: Kala kadi tiiɗniiɗo, ko hoore-makko o tiiɗnanii, tawde pellet, Alla ko jon'diniiɗo e tageefo ngon.

29:7.t: Ɓeen non gooŋɗinɓe, ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe, ma Min momtan ɓe bonɗi maɓɓe ɗin, Min njoɓitra ɓe, ko ɓuri moƴƴude e ko ɓe ngollatnoo kon.

29:8.t: Min njamirii neɗɗaŋke on, moƴƴugol e mawɓe makko ɓen. Si ɓe ndoolii maa fii cirkangol Kam, ko a alanaa ɗum ganndal, wota a ɗofto ɓe ! Ko ka Am, woni ruttorde mon, Mi habra on, ko ngollatno ɗon.

29:9.t: Ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe Alla, ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe, ma Min mbaɗtiduɓe e moƴƴuɓe ɓen.

29:10.t: Hino e jimɓe ɓen, wi'oowo: "Min ngooŋɗinii Alla"; hara non si o tampiniraama fii Alla, o waɗat lorra yimɓe ɓen, wano lepte Alla ɗen. Si ballal kadi immorii ka Joomi maa, pellet, ɓe mbi'ay: "Miɗen ngo'dunoo e mo'on!" Kere wonaa Alla ɓuri anndu'de ko woni e ɓerɗe tageefo ngon?

29:11.t: Ma Alla anndin fii gooŋɗinɓe ɓen, ma O feññina kadi fii naafiqiiɓe ɓeen.

29:12.t: Heeferɓe ɓen wi'ani gooŋɗinɓe ɓen: "Jokkee laawol amen ngol, men fawtoto fii goopi mon ɗin". Kono ɓe ngonaani fawtotooɓe hay hu'unde e goopi maɓɓe. Pellet, ko ɓe fenooɓe.

29:13.t: Kono maa ɓe paawtoo fii teddeendi bakkaat maɓɓe ɗin, e teddeendi goo, wond'ude e teddeendi maɓɓe ndin. Ko maa ɓe lamndoyee, Ñande Darngal, ga e kon ko ɓe fekindotonoo.

29:14.t: Gooŋɗii Min nulii Nuuhu e yimɓe makko ɓen, o ñiiɓi hakkunde maɓɓe, duuɓi ujunere, ŋakkuɗum duuɓi cappanɗe jowi. Waame on nanngi ɓe, hari ko ɓe tooñɓe.

29:15.t: Min ndaɗndi mo, kaŋko e yimɓe laana kan; Min mbaɗi ka kaawisa tageefo ngo.

29:16.t: (Jaŋto) kadi Ibraahiima, nde o wi'annoo yimɓe makko ɓen: "ndeewee Alla, kulon Mo; ko ɗum ɓuri moƴƴann'de on, si woni hoɗon nganndi".

29:17.t: Anndee ko ndewoton kon ga Alla, ko sanamuuji, hoɗon taƴa fenaande. Pellet, ɗin ɗi ndewoton ga Alla, ɗi waawaa on arsikude; ɗaɓɓiree arsike on ka Alla, rewon mo, ƴetton Mo. Ko ka makko woni rutteteɗon.

29:18.t: Si on njeddi i, haray mofte adinooɓe kadi njeddiino (Nulaaɓe mum). Alaa ko fawii e Nulaaɗo on, si wonaa yottingol ɓannginngol.

29:19.t: E ɓee yiaani no Alla fuɗɗorta tagoore ngum, refti o ndttat ngu? Pellet, ɗum wonii ko newanii Alla.

29:20.t: Maaku: "Yiilee ka leydi, ndaaron no O puɗɗori tagoore. refti Alla tagoore sakkitoru ngum. Pellet, Alla ko kattanɗo kala hu'unde".

29:21.t: Homo lepte mo o muuyani, o yurmo mo O muuyani; ko ka makko rutteteɗon.

29:22.t: On wonaani laawotooɓe ka leydi, wonaa ka kammu; alanaa on ga Alla, woni giɗo, wanaa ballo.

29:23.t: Ɓeen yedduɓe aayeeje Alla ɗen, e hawroygol e makko ngol, ɓen taƴike e yurmeende Am, ɓen ɗon, hono woodani ɓe lepte mu'usuɗe.

29:24.t: Jaabawol yimɓe makko ɓen wonaano, si wonaa wiide ɓe: "Waree mo, maa sunnon mo". Kono Alla daɗndi mo e yiite ngen. Pellet, wonii e ɗum, Ma'andeeji, wonan'de yimɓe gooŋɗimɓe.

29:25.t: O maaki: "nganndee ko ndewoton kon ga Alla, ko sanamuuji, fii yiɗindiro hakkunde mon, ka nguurndam aduna, hooti non, Ñande Darndal, yoga mon yeddoyay yoga, yoga mon kadi huɗo yoga, hara non, jaaƴorde mon nden, ko ka Yiite, hara wallooɓe alanaa on".

29:26.t: Luutu gooŋɗini mo. O maaki: "Min on, ko mi feroowo ka Joomi am, ko Kaŋko woni Fooluɗo, Ñeeño On".

29:27.t: Min njeɗi mo Ismaa'iila e Yaaquuba, Min mbaɗi e geñngol makko ngol, Annabaaku e Daftere. Min ngokki mo mbarjaari makko ndin aduna, pellet, kaŋo on ka La'akara, ko o jeyaaɗo e moƴƴuɓe ɓen.

29:28.t: (Jaŋto) kadi luutu, nde o maakannoo yimɓe makko ɓen : " E on aray e paŋkare, ɗe gooto e winndere nden adaaki on e mun?

29:29.t: E on aray jottagol e worɓe ɓen? paloɗon kadi e laawol? Ngollaton ko mbatirdu mon ko añinii?" Kono jaabawol yimɓe makko ɓeen wonaano, si wonaa wiide ɓe: "Addan men lepte Alla ɗen, si tawii ko a jeyaaɗo e gooŋɗuɓe ɓeen".

29:30.t: O maaki: "Joomi am, wallam e hoore yimɓe bonnooɓe ɓeen".

29:31.t: Tuma nde Imminaaɓe Amen ɓen addannoo Ibraahiima welo-welo ngon, ɓe mb"i: "Minen, ko men halkooɓee yimɓe ndee saare. Tawde pellet, yimɓe mayre laatike tooñooɓe".

29:32.t: O maaki: "Kono Luutu no ton!" Ɓe mbi'i: "Ko minen ɓuri anndude fii won'ɓe ton. Ko ma men daɗndu mo, kaŋko e yimɓe makko ɓen, si wonaa debbo makko on, o jeyaama e helketeeɓe ɓeen".

29:33.t: Tum nde imminaaɓe Amen ɓen keewtunoo ka Luutu, o saɗtiraa fii maɓɓe, ɓernde makko ɓiɗtorii fii maɓɓe. Ɓe mbi'i: "Wota a hul, wota a suno. Ko men daɗndooɓe ma an e ɓeynguure maa nde, si wonaa debbo maa on, o jeyaama e halkaaɓe ɓen.

29:34.t: Ko moen njippinooɓe lepte e yimɓe ndee saare, immorde ka kammu, sabu ko ɓe yaltunoo e ɗoftaare kon".

29:35.t: Gooŋɗii Min ngaccii e nden (saare), Ma'ande ɓanngunde, wonan'de yimɓe haqqilooɓe ɓeen.

29:36.t: (Min nuli) kadi e Madyana, musiɗɗo maɓɓe on, Shu'aybu. O maaki: "Ko onon yo yimɓe am, ndewee Alla, jortoron Ñalannde sakkitiinde nden, wota woniri e leydi ndin, bonnooɓe".

29:37.t: Kono ɓe njeddi i mo. Dillannde nden nanngi ɓe, ɓe waɗtini ka koɗooli maɓɓe, ko ɓe jicciiɓe-maayi.

29:38.t: (Meon kalki) kadi Aadi'en, e Saamuda'en. Gooŋɗii caambbeje maɓɓe ɗin ɓannganii on. Seytaane cuɗinani ɓe, golle maɓɓe ɗen, ndu sakkii ɓe e laawol ngol; tawi le, ko ɓe reentunooɓe.

29:39.t: (Min kalki) kadi Qaaruuna, e Fir'awna e Haamaana. Gooŋɗii le, Muusaa addanii ɓe ɓanngannduyeeji, kono ɓe toownitii ka leydi, ɓe wonaano laawotooɓe.

29:40.t: Kala maɓɓe, Min leptirno bakkaatuuji mum ɗin: no e maɓɓe, ɓe Min ngurti henndu e mum; no e maɓɓe, ɓe haacaango kalki; no e maɓɓe, mo Min mutini ɗum ka leydi, no e maɓɓe kadi, ɓe Min yoolunoo. Kono non, Alla siforaali tooñoowo ɓe; si ko woni, ko kamɓe tooñuoo ko'e maɓɓe.

29:41.t: Misal ɓen jogitiiɓe ga Alla deweteeɗi, ko wano marijaawowal(njomblo) saccungal suudu. Ko ɓuri lo'ode non e cuuɗi ɗin, ko suudu marijaawo. Sinno ɓe annduno!

29:42.t: Pellet, Alla no anndi kala hu'unde nde ɓe noddata ga makko. Ko Kaŋko woni Foolɗo, Ñeeño On.

29:43.t: Ɗii ko yeruuji ɗe Min piyanta yimɓe ɓen; ko woni tun, paamataa ɗen, si wonaa annduɓe ɓen.

29:44.t: Alla tagirii kammuuli ɗin e leydi ndin, e hoore goonga. Pellet, wonii ɗum, Ma'ande, wonan'de gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

29:45.t: Janngu ɗum ko waayinaa e maaɗa ka deftere, ñiiɓaa e juulde nden. Pellet, juulde nden no haɗa paŋkare e ko añinii. Ko jantagol Alla ngol ɓuri (hu'unde kala) mawnude. Alla no anndi ko ngolloton kon.

29:46.t: Wota on weeñir yimɓe defte ɓen si wonaa e no ɓuri e moƴƴirde, si wonaa hara ko ɓen tooñɓe e maɓɓe. Mbi'on: "Min ngooŋɗinii nden njippinaande e amen e ɗen njippinaaɗe e mon. Deweteeɗo amen On e deweteeɗo mon On ko gooto, menen non, ko Min jebbilanii ɓe Mo".

29:47.t: Ko wano non Min njippiniri e maaɗa Deftere nden. Ɓeen ɓe Min ngokki Deftere nden, heɓe mgooŋɗini nde. Hino e maɓɓe on gooŋɗinɗo nde. Yeddataa Aayeeje Amen ɗen, si wonaa heeferɓe ɓen.

29:48.t: A wonaano haɗa janngatnoo deftere ado mayre, a winndirtaano ñaamo maa ngon. Harayno, bonnooɓe ɓen cikkittono.

29:49.t: Si ko woni, ko nde Aayeeje ɓannguɗe e ɓerɗe ɓen okkaaɓe ganndal. Yeddataa aayeeje Amen ɗen, si wonaa tooñɓe ɓeen.

29:50.t: Ɓe mb'i: "Hanno jippinee e makko Ma'andeeji immorde ka Joomi makko?" Maaku: "aayaaji ko joomam addata, anndee min, ko mi jeertinoowo ɓannguɗo".

29:51.t: Kere yonaani ɓe won'de Min njippinii e maaɗa deftere nden hende janngee e maɓɓe? Wonii e ɗuum, yurmeende e waaju wonan'de yimɓe gooŋɗinooɓe.

29:52.t: Maaku: "Alla yonii hakkunde am e mooɗon seedee Hino anndi ko woni kon ka kammuuli e ka leydi. Ɓen non gooŋɗimɓe meere nden ɓe yeddi Alla, ko ɓen ngoni oni sooyɓe ɓen.

29:53.t: Heɓe kawjirane lepte ɗen. Si wonaano fii lajal innaangal, lepte ɗen ngardiratno e maɓɓe juhal, hara kamɓe ɓe so'aa-anndude.

29:54.t: Heɓe lawjirane lepte ɗen, hara non pellet, Jahannama ko fiiltiinge heefereɓe ɓeen.

29:55.t: Ñande lepte ɗen suddiroyta ɓe senngo dow maɓɓe e ka ley koyɗe maɓɓe, O daala[na ɓe]: "Meeɗee ko ngollatnoɗon kon!"

29:56.t: Eey mon jiyaaɓe Am gooɗinɓe! Nganndee leydi Am ndin ko yaajundi. Ko Min ngoni ko ndewoton!

29:57.t: Kala woŋkii meeɗay maayde. refti ko ka Amen ndutteteɗon.

29:58.t: Ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe, ma Min koɗnu ɓe ka Aljanna e cuuɗi ɗi canɗi ilata senngo ley majji, koɓe duumotooɓe ton. Iskin(heskey)° moƴƴere njoɓdi gollunooɓe,

29:59.t: ɓeen muññiiɓe, ɓe tuugii e Joomi maɓɓe.

29:60.t: Heewii e ruugatɗi ɗi yooɓotaako arsike majji! Ko Alla arsikata ɗi wond'ude e onon. Ko Kaŋko woni Nanoowo, gannduɗo.

29:61.t: Pellet, si a laɓndiima ɓe: "Ko hommbo tagi kammuu- li ɗiin e leydi ndin, O elti na'ange nge e lewru ndu?" Ma ɓe mbi'u: "Ko Alla". Ko holno ɓe ferlitoraa (e gooŋɗingol ngol)?

29:62.t: Alla no yaacnana arsike on mo o muuyi e jiyaaɓe makko ɓen, Homo ɓittana mo. Pellet, Alla ko gannduɗo kala hu'unde.

29:63.t: Pellet, si a lanndike ɓe: "Ko hommbo jippiniri ndiyam ka kammu ɗam O wuurnitiri leydi ndin ɓaawo ndi yoorde?", ma ɓe mbi': "Ko Alla". Maaku: "Yettoore woodanii Alla!". Si ko woni, ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe kaqqiltaa.

29:64.t: Ɗam nguurndam aduna wonaani, si wonaa mbeleeɗe e fijindaaru. Pellet, ko hoɗo La'akara ngon woni nguurandam. Sinno ɓe annduno.

29:65.t: Si ɓe waɗɗike ka laana, ɓe nodda Alla ɓe laɓɓinano mo noddaandu ndun. Tuma nde o daɗndi ɓe ka njoorndi, on tuma ɓe cirka.

29:66.t: No ɓe yeddira ko Min ngokki ɓe kon, awa yo ɓe dakmito! Aray kaɓe ngannda.

29:67.t: E ɓee nji'aani won'de Min mbaɗii hormorde hoolniinde, yimɓe ɓen no ci'ifee(mbifte) bannge maɓɓe? E ko meere nden ɓe ngooŋɗinta ɓe njedda neemaaji Alla ɗin?

29:68.t: E ko hommbo ɓuri tooñide wa on pekondiiɗo fenaande e hoore Alla, maa o fenni goonga kan nde ka arnoo e makko? E wonaa ka Jahannama woni jaaƴorde yedduɓe ɓen?

29:69.t: Ɓeen tiiɗnorɓe e (weltingol) Min, ma Min peewnirɓe e laawi Amen, ko pellet, Alla no won'di e moƴƴinooɓe ɓeen.

30:3.t: ka ɓuri ɓadaade e lesdi ndin, kamɓe kadi ɓaawo ɓe poola, ɓe fooloyooɓe,

30:4.t: e ndeer duuɓi seeɗaaji. Ko Alla woodani fiyaaku (poolal ngal) ado e ɓaawo (maggal). Nden ñalaande, gooŋɗinɓe ɓen mbeltota.

30:5.t: ballal Alla ngal. Homo walla mo O muuyi. Ko Kaŋko woni pooloowo, jurmotooɗo.

30:6.t: [Ɗuum] ko fodoore Alla. Alla luutndotaako fodoore makko nden. Kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓen ɓe nganndaa.

30:7.t: Heɓe nganndi ko feeñi e nguurndam aduna, kono kamɓe e fii La'akara on, ko ɓe welsindiiɓe.

30:8.t: E ɓee miijitaaki fii ko'e-maɓɓe? Alla tagiraali kammuuji ɗin e lesdi ndin e ko woni hakkunde ɗin ɗiɗi, si wonaa goonga e lajal innaangal. Nganndee ko ɗuuɗi e yimɓe ɓeen, ko yedduɓe kawroygol e Joomi maɓɓe.

30:9.t: E ɓee njillaani ka leydi ɓe taskoo ko honno battane ɓeen adinooɓe ɓe mbi'noo? Ɓeen ngonno ɓurɓe ɓe doole ɓe remi e leydi ndin ɓe nguuri e mayri ɓuri ko ɓee nguuri e mayri kon. Nulaaɓe maɓɓe ɓen addani ɓe ɓanngannduyeeji. Alla wonaani tooñoowo ɓe, kono non ko ko'e maɓɓe ɓe ngonno e tooñude.

30:10.t: Refti ko wonunoo battane bonnuɓe ɓen, ko bonan'nde fii ɓe njeddii Aayeeje Alla ɗen, ɓe laatii e jalkitgol ɗe.

30:11.t: Ko Alla fuɗɗi tagoore nde; refti o rutta nde; refti ko ka makko rutteteɗon.

30:12.t: Ñande Darnga ngal darii, bonɓe ɓen taƴoto.

30:13.t: Woodantaaɓe e kafidiiɗi maɓɓe ɗin tefooji, ɓe ngoniino yedduɓe kafiduɓe ɓe.

30:14.t: Ñande Darnga ngal darii,nden ñande ɓe ceertoyat.

30:15.t: Si ko ɓen gooŋɗimɓe ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe, ɓen ɗon ngonoyat e beeli (Aljanna) heɓe caɗnee(mbeltine).

30:16.t: Si tawii non ko ɓen yedduɓe ɓe njeddi aayeeje amen ɗen e kawrugol ngol e La'akara, ɓen ɗon ko tawnoyteeɓe e lepte ɗen.

30:17.t: Cubbunhinanee Alla, tuma kiiroton e tuma mbeetoton.

30:18.t: Ko Kaŋko jettooje ngoodani ka kammuuji e ka leydi, e kiikiiɗe e saaga ñalloton.

30:19.t: Homo yaltina ko wuuri e nder ko maayi, o yaltina kadi ko maayi e ndeer ko wuuri. Homo wuurnita leydi ndin ɓaawo ndi yoorde. Ko wano non yatainirte- ɗon (e genaale mon).

30:20.t: Hino jeyaa e Ma'andeeji makko ɗin: won'de O tagii on immorde e mbum-mbuldi, refti jaka ko on ɓanndiŋke sa'akotooɓe [e leydi ndin].

30:21.t: Hino jeyaa e Ma'andeeji makko ɗin : won'de O tagiranii on e woŋkiiji mon ɗin, resondirɓe, fii yo on ndeeƴ e maɓɓe, O waɗi hakkunde mon giggol e yumeende. Wonii e ɗuum, Ma'andeeji wonan'de yimɓe miijitotooɓe.

30:22.t: Hino jeyaa e Ma'andeeji makko ɗin: tagugol kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin, e luutondirgol ɗemɗe mon e mbaadiiji mon. Wonii e ɗuum, Ma'andeeji anduɓe ɓeen.

30:23.t: Hino jeyaa e Ma'andeeji makko ɗin: ɗoyngol mon ngol jemma e ñalawma, e ɗaɓɓugol mon ɓural makko. Wonii e ɗum, Ma'andeeji wonan'de yimɓe nanooɓe.

30:24.t: Hino jeyaa e Ma'andeeji makko ɗin: Homo hollira on maje ɗeen kulol e tama'u (toɓo), Homo jippinira ka kammu ndiyam, O wuurnitira ɗam leydi ndin ɓaawo ndi yo'orude. Wonii e ɗum, Ma'andeeji, wonan'de yimɓe haqqilooɓe.

30:25.t: Hino jeyaa e Ma'andeeji makko ɗin: nde kammu ngun e leydi ndin daroto e yamiroore makko. Refti si O noddii on noddaandu ka leydi, e jaka onon hoɗon yalta (e genaale mon).

30:26.t: Hino ɗum woodani (Laamu, e takgoll e toppitagol) ɓeen wonɓe ka kammuuji e ka lesdi: kala maɓɓe ko ɗoftiiɓe mo.

30:27.t: Ko Kaŋko woni puɗɗuɗo tagoore, refti O ruttita nde; ko ɗuum ɓuri newanaande mo. Homo woodani sifa ɓurɗo toowude ka kammuuji e ka leydi. Ko Kaŋko woni on poolɗo, Ñeeñɗo on.

30:28.t: O piyanii on yeru immorde e ko'e-mon: hara no woodani on e ɓen ɓe njeyruɗon ñaame mon, immorde e kafidal e kon ko min arsiki on, hara hoɗon pota e ɗuum, hoɗon kulira ɓe wano kulirton ko'e-mon? Ko woni nii Min pensitirta Aayeeje ɗen, wonan'de yimɓe haqqilooɓe.

30:29.t: Si ko woni, tooñɓe ɓen njokkirii beleeɗe maɓɓe ɗen ko aldaa e ganndal. Ko hommbo feewnata mo Alla majjini? Alanaa ɓe wallooɓe.

30:30.t: Feewtinir yeeso maa ngon e diina kan ñiiɓugol [e mun]. [Ɗuum] ko tagoore Alla ngu O tagiri yimɓe ɓen e mum - waɗtitugol alaa e tagoore Alla nde -. Ko ɗuum woni diina focciika kan; kono ɓurɓe ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓen nganndaa.

30:31.t: Hara ko on ruttotooɓe e makko; kulon Mo, ñinnon juulde nden, wota on njeye e sirkooɓe ɓen.

30:32.t: (wano) ɓeya senndunooɓe diina mum kan, ɓe woni pecce-pecce, kala fedde no weltora ko woni ka mum kon.

30:33.t: Si saɗteende memii yimɓe ɓeen, ɓe noddira Joomi maɓɓe ko ɓe ruttitiiɓe e makko; refti si o meeɗinii ɓe yumeende immorde e makko, e jaka fedde goo e maɓɓe no kafida e Joomi mun,

30:34.t: Yoɓe yeddu ko min ngokki ɓe kon. "Awa dakmitee, arma nganndon".

30:35.t: Kaa Min njippin e maɓɓe hujja (Deftere), hara honde yeewta fii ko ɓe cirkatnoo kon?

30:36.t: Si Min meeɗinirii yimɓe ɓen neema, ɓe weltoroo mo. Si bone memirii ɓe sabu ko juuɗe maɓɓe ɗen ardiniri kon, e jaka heɓe taƴoo.

30:37.t: E ɓe nkiaani won'de Alla no yaacnana arsike on mo o muuyani, O ɓillina? Wonii e ɗuum, Ma'andeeji wonan'de yimɓe gooŋɗinooɓe.

30:38.t: Jonnu jom-ɓadiido o hakke makko on, e ɓilliiɓe e ɓii-laawol. Ɗuum ɓuri moƴƴude wonan'de ɓeen faalaaɓe yarluyee Alla on; ko ɓeen ngoni maloyteeɓe ɓen.

30:39.t: Kala ko njonnuɗon e riba, fii on ɓeydor e jawɗe yimɓe ɓen, ɗuum ɓeydotaako ka Alla, kala non ko ngokkuɗon e Jakka, mo faandoriɗon welayee Alla, ɓen ɗon, ko sowanoyteeɓe [njoɓdi] ɓeen.

30:40.t: Ko Alla woni takɗo on, refti o arsiki on, refti o wara on, refti o wuurnita on. Hara no e kafidaaɗi mon ɗin waɗayɗi goɗɗum e ɗum? Senayeewoo-dani Mo! O toowii e kon ko ɓe cirkata.

30:41.t: Bone on feeñiri ka njoorndi e ka maaje, sabu ko juuɗe yimɓe ɓen faggitii kon; fii yo O meeɗin ɓe yoga e ko ɓe ngolli; mbelajo'o, ɓe nduttoto.

30:42.t: Maaku: "Yiilee ka leydi, ndaaron ko honno battane adinooɓe ɓen wa'anoo. Tawno ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe ko sirkooɓe".

30:43.t: Feewtinir ye'eso maa ngon e diina po'occiiɗa kan, ado ñalaande arde immorde ka Alla nde ruttetaake. Nde ñalnde, ɓe seeday:

30:44.t: Kala jedduɗo, haray geddi makko ɗin no fawii mo. Kala non golluɗo moƴƴere, haray ko ko'e-maɓɓe ɓe kebilani (Aljanna),

30:45.t: fii yo O yoɓ ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli moƴƴuɗi, e ɓural makko ngal. Kaŋko On, O yiɗaa he'eferɓe ɓen.

30:46.t: Hino jeyaa e Ma'andeeji makko ɗin: Wurtugol Mo keneeli ɗin wewlinooji, e fii yo O meeɗin on e yurmeende makko nden, e no laaɗe ɗen dogira e yamiroore makko, e fii yo o ɗaɓɓu e ɓural makko. Mbelajo'o, on njettat[Mo].

30:47.t: Gooŋɗii Min nulii ado maaɗa Nulaaɓe haa e yimɓe maɓɓe ɓen, ɓe addani ɓe ɓanngannduyeeji. Min njottii e ɓen bonnuɓe; tawi no jojji e Amen paabagol gooŋɗiiɓe ɓen.

30:48.t: Ko Alla woni nuloowo keneeɗi ɗin, ɗi cogga duule ɗen; O saakitira ɗuum ka weeyo no o yiɗiri; O waɗta ɗuum taƴe-taƴe. A yi'ay toɓo ngon no yalta hakkude mun. Si O heewtinii ngo e on mo o muuyi e jeyaaɓe makko ɓen, e jaka kamɓe heɓe weltoo.

30:49.t: Gooŋɗii ɓe laatinoke ado (toɓo) ngon jippineede e maɓɓe, ko taƴinooɓe.

30:50.t: Ndaarii e battane yurmeende Alla nden, no o wuurnitorta leydi ɓaawo ndi yoorude. Pellet, waɗoowo ɗuum On, ko guurnitoowo maayɓe ɓen, Kaŋko Ko O kattanɗo kala hu'unde.

30:51.t: [Hay] si Min nulii henndu, ɓe yi'i [gese maɓɓe] ɗen no soyɗi, ɓe njokkay ɓaawo ɗuum, heɓe njedda.

30:52.t: Pellet, an a nanintaa maayɓe ɓen, a nanintaa fa'aɗuɓe ɓeen kadi noddaandu ndun, si ɓe nduŋtiima ɓe huccinii ɓabbe (maɓɓe).

30:53.t: A wonaani pewnoowo wumɓe ɓen e majjere maɓɓe. A nanintaa si wonaa ɓeen gooŋɗimɓe Aayeeje Amen ɗen, hara ko ɓe jebbiliiɓe.

30:54.t: Ko Alla woni takɗo on e lo'ere, refti O waɗi ɓaawo lo'ere nde semmbe, refti o waɗi ɓaawo cemmbe ɗen lo'ere e puri(dandanndi). Homo taga ko O muuyi, Ko Kaŋko woni gannduɗo, kattanɗo.

30:55.t: Ñande Darngal nal darotoo, bonɓe ɓen ngooɗndat ɓe ñiiɓaani si wonaa saanga. Ko wano nii ɓe wonanoo ferliseede (e goonga).

30:56.t: Okkaaɓe ganndal e gooŋɗinal ɓeen mbi'a: "Gooŋɗii on ñiiɓii e ko Alla winndi kon, haa ñande ummital. Ko ndee woni ñalaande ummital, kono onon on nganndaano".

30:57.t: Nden ñande, ngantooji ɗin nafoytaa tooñuɓe ɓeen, wonaa kamɓe woni ko ɗaɓɓiretee welayee [Alla].

30:58.t: Gooŋɗii Min piyanii yimɓe ɓen e nde Alquraanaa- re, kala misal. Pellet, si a addanii ɓe Aaya, ɓen yedduɓe mbi'at: "On ngonaani, si wonaa meerenteeɓe".

30:59.t: Ko wano nii Alla notira e ɓerɗe ɓe ɓe nganndaa.

30:60.t: Muñño, pellet, fodoore Alla nden, ko goonga. Wota ɓe njananaaka ɓe koyfine.

31:2.t: Ɗee, ko aayeeje deftere ñeñaande nde.

31:3.t: Ko nde peewal e yurmeende wonan'de moƴƴinooɓe ɓe,

31:4.t: ɓeen ñiiɓnooɓe juulde nden, ɓe totta askal on, hara kamɓe ko ɓe yananaaɓe (fii La'akara).

31:5.t: Ko ɓeen ngoni e peewal immorde e Joomi maɓɓe ɓe, ko kamɓe ngoni malaaɓe ɓen.

31:6.t: Hino woodi e yimɓe ɓen, soodiroowo mbeleeɗe konnguɗi haa o majjira e laawol Alla ngol ko aldaa e ganndal, o jogitora (aayeeje) ɗen jalnitgol. ɓeen ɗon, hino woodani ɓe lepte koynooje.

31:7.t: Si aayeeje Amen ɗen njanngaama e makko, o huccitira(runtora) townitaare, wa si tawii o nanaani ɗe, wa si tawii ko pahu woni e noppi makko. weltanir-mo lepte mu'usɗe.

31:8.t: Pellet, ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe golli moƴƴi ɗin, hino woodani ɓe Aljannaaji neema.

31:9.t: Ko ɓe duumotooɓe ton, ɗuum ko fodoore Alla goongunde. Ko Kaŋko woni On poolɗo, Ñeeñɗo.

31:10.t: O tagirii kammuuji ɗin ko aldaa e tugaale, ɗe nji'oton; o wernii ka leydi pelle fii wota ndi dillidu e mon; o saaki e mayri kala ruugayngel. Min njippiniri ndiyam ka kammu, Min puɗini e mayri kala nooneeji tedduɗi.

31:11.t: "Ɗuum ɗoo ko tagoore Alla. Kollee Kam ko ɗi (ndewoton ɗin) ga Makko tagi?" Si ko woni, tooñɓe ɓeen no e majjere ɓanngunde.

31:12.t: Gooŋɗii Min ngokkii Luqmaan ñenƴal: "Won'de yettu Alla. Kala jettuɗo, haray ko hoore-makko o yettani; kala noon jedduɗo, anndu pellet, Alla ko Galo, jettiniiɗo".

31:13.t: Jaŋto tuma Luqmaana wi'annoo geɗal makko on, hari homo waajoo mo: "Ko an ɓinngel am, wota a sirkan Alla. Pellet, sirku on ko tooñe mawɗe".

31:14.t: Min njamirii neɗɗaŋke on [ɗoftagol] jibinɓe mo ɓen; yumma makko saawirii mo lo'ere e hoore lo'ere: entugol mo ngol, ko e ndeer duuɓi ɗiɗi. "Won'de yettam e jipnaaɓe maa ɓen. Ko ka am woni waɗtinirde nden".

31:15.t: Si ɓe tiiɗnorii ma fii cirkangol Kam e ko a alanaa ɗum ganndal, wota a ɗofto ɓe; won'ndir e maɓɓe ka aduna ɗoo moƴƴere. Jokku laawol on duttiiɗo e am. Refti ko ka Am woni ruttorde mon, mi yeetitoo on, ko ngollatnoɗon.

31:16.t: "eeyma ɓinngel am, anndu ɗe [golle bonɗe maa moƴƴe], si fotii wa abbere, immorde e nenndi foññe, ɗum wona e fetere, maa ka kammuuji maa ka leydi, Alla artirat nde. Pellet, Alla ko Newiiɗo, kumpitiiɗo.

31:17.t: Eey ma ɓinngel am, ñiiɓnu juulde nden, yamiraa moƴƴere, haɗaa ŋiñere(pankare), muñño-ɗaa e ko heɓu-maa. Pellet, ɗum ko jeyaaɗum e fiyakkuji mawɗi.

31:18.t: Wota fal yimɓe ɓen ye'eso maa ngon, wota a yahru ka leydi ñaaƴagol. Pellet, Alla yiɗaa kala ñaaƴotooɗo mantoo.

31:19.t: Hakindo e yahdu-maa ndun, joltinaa(ustu) hito maa ngon; ko ɓuri añeede e hitooji ɗin, pellet, ko lu'ukaadu bamɗi.

31:20.t: E on nji'aani won'de Alla eeltanii on ko woni kon ka kammuuji e ka leydi? O huuɓitiri on neemaaji makko peeñuɗi e suuɗiiɗi. Hino woodi e yimɓe ɓen, on wennjiroowo e fii Alla, ko aldaa e gannndal, wonaa peewal, wonaa Deftere jalbunde.

31:21.t: Si ɓe mbianaa:"njokkee kon ko Allah Jippini", ɓe mbi'a: "Si ko woni, min njokkay ko men tawri kon baabiraaɓe amen ɓen"; e hay si tawii seytaane wonii hino nodda ɓe e lepte dulboowe ngen!

31:22.t: Kala jebbilɗo ye'eso mun ngon fa'ade e Alla, hara ko o moƴƴinɗo, gooŋɗii o jaggiima e ɓoggol tiiɗungol. Ko ka Alla woni battane fiyakuuji ɗin.

31:23.t: Kala kedduɗo, wota ke'eferaaku makko sunine. Ko ka amen woni ruttorde maɓɓe, Min kumpita ɓe ko ɓe ngollatnoo noo. Pellet, Alla ko gannduɗo jaati ɓerɗe.

31:24.t: Min ndakmitat ɓe seeɗa, refti Min forsaɓe e lepte tekkuɗe.

31:25.t: Pellet, si a lamndike ɓe : "Ko hommbo tagi kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin?" Ma ɓe mbi'i'u: "Ko Alla!" Maaku: "Jettooje ngoodanii Alla!". Kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe nganndaa.

31:26.t: Ko Alla woodani kala ko woni kammuuji e ka leydi. Pellet, Alla, ko Kaŋko woni Galo, jettiniiɗo.

31:27.t: Hay si tawii ko woni ka hoore leydi kon e leɗɗe, [settiraama] karambi, maayo ngo ɓeydora (wontugol ndaha) ɓaawo ɗuum, yeru maaje jeeɗiɗi, konnguɗi Alla ɗin lannataa. Pellet, Alla ko poolɗo, Ñeeñɗo.

31:28.t: Tagugol on e immintingol wonaani, si wonaa wa (takgol) woŋkii gooti. Pellet, Alla ko Nanoowo, ji'oowo.

31:29.t: E a yiaani won'de Alla no naatna jemma on e ndeer ñalawra on, O naatna ñalawma kadi e ndeer jemma on, O eltii kadi na'ange ngen e lewru ndun, kala majji no doga haa e lajal innaangal? E won'de Alla ko kumpitiiɗo ko ngolloton kon.

31:30.t: Ɗuum [ko jaŋtaa ɗoo], ko tawde pellet, Alla ko Kaŋko woni Goonga, e won'de kon ko ɓe noddata ga makko, ko ɗuum woni mehre nden, e won'de ko Alla woni Toowɗo, Mawnɗo On.

31:31.t: E a yiaani won'de laaɗe ɗen heɗe ndogira ka maayo e neema Alla, fii yo O hollu on maandeeji makko ɗin? Wonii e ɗuum, maandeeji, wonan'de kala keewuɗo-muñal, jettoowo (neema).

31:32.t: Si tawii morlooɗe(bempejje) kippiriiɓe wa duule [maa pelle], ɓe noddat Alla, hara heɓe laɓɓinani mo dewal; tuma nde o daɗndunooɓe ka njoorndi, tawi no e maɓɓe kakindiiɗo. Jeddataa Aayeeje Amen ɗen, si wonaa kala keewɗo janfa, ke'efeera.

31:33.t: Eey mon yo yimɓe! Kulee Joomi mon, kulon ñaaande, nde baaba duncanoytaa ɓiɗɗo mun, wonaa ɓiɗɗo on kadi duncanoyta ben mun hay hu'unde. Pellet, fodoore Alla nden ko goonga. Wota nguurndam aduna hodu on, wata hodu on e Alla, (seytaane) kodoowo!

31:34.t: Pellet, ko ka Alla woni anndal Darngal, Homo jippina toɓo; Homo anndi ko woni ka ndeer renngaaji. Wo'kii (woo) anndaa ko ki faggitoto janngo, woŋkii (woo) kadi anndaa ko e leydi honndi maayata. Pellet, Alla ko gannduɗo, kumpitiiɗo.

32:2.t: Jippineede deftere nden, sikke woo alaa e Mu'um, ko immorde ka Jeyɗo winndere nden.

32:3.t: Walla ɓe mb'ay kaŋko (Muhammadu) o fekindi nde? Si ko woni, ko nde goongaare, immorde ka Joomi maa, fii yo a jerrtin yimɓe, ɓe jeertinoowo araano e mum ado maaɗa, mbelajo'o, ɓe peeway.

32:4.t: Ko Alla woni takɗo kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin, e kon ko woni hakkunde majji, e nder balɗe je'egoo. refti O fotondiri ka dow "Arski". Alanaa on gaanin makko, giɗo wonaa tefoowo. E on mbaajitotaako?

32:5.t: Homo fewja fiyaakuuji ɗin ka kammu haa ka leydi, refti ɗi ƴeenga ka makko, e ñalaande nde emmbere mum woni, duuɓi ujunere e ko limoton.

32:6.t: On [fewjoowo fii ɗum on], ko gannduɗo wirniiɗi e feeñuɗi, pooluɗo, jurmotooɗo.

32:7.t: Oon labinɗo kala hu'unde nde o tagi. o fuɗɗi tagkde neɗɗaŋke e loopal,

32:8.t: refti o waɗi geñngol makko ngol, e sortondiral, immorde ndihal [maniiyu] lo'oɗam;

32:9.t: refi o fotndindiri mo, o wutti e makko ruuhu makko on. O waɗani on nanɗe, e j'iiɗe e ɓerɗe. [Kono] famɗi ko njettonton!

32:10.t: Ɓe mbii': "E nee, si min majjii ka leydi, eyoo min ngontat e tagoore hesre?" Ko woni kamɓe e kawrugol e Joomi maɓɓe, ko ɓe yedduɓe [ɗum].

32:11.t: Maaku: "warata ta on, ko malaa'ikaajo maayde on wakkilaaɗo on. Refti ko to Joomi mon ndutteteɗon".

32:12.t: Sinno a yi'atno, tuma nde bonɓe ɓen ugginta ko'e-maɓɓe ka Joomi maɓɓe! [lƁe mbi'a]: "Joomi amen, min nji'ii min nanii, rutton min, min ngolla ko moƴƴi; minen men njananaama".

32:13.t: Sinno Min muuyuno, Min ngokkayno kala woŋkii peewal makki. Ko woni tun, konngol jojjii immorde e An : "Ma Mi hebbiniray Jahannama on jinna e yimɓe, ɓe denndaangal".

32:14.t: "Meeɗiree (lepte ɗen) sabu mbelsindagol mon kawrugol e ndee ñalaande mon ɗoo. Menen (kadi) Men yejjitii on. Meeɗiree lepte luttal, sabu ko ngollatnoɗon kon".

32:15.t: Nganndee ko gooŋɗinta Aayeeje Amen ɗen, ko ɓen tawɓe si ɓe mbaajoraama ɗe, ɓe cuuyiray sujjugol, ɓe subbuhinora jettugol Joomi maɓɓe, kamɓe ɓe townitotaako.

32:16.t: Becce maɓɓe ɗen heɗe ngoɗɗitoo e lelorɗe ɗen, hiɓe noddira Joomi maɓɓe kulol e ɗamaa'mu; e kon ko Min ngarsiki ɓe, hiɓe mbintoo.

32:17.t: Woŋkii (woo) anndaa ko maranaa ɓe e ko ɓuɓɓinta ɓernde, ɗum ko njoɓdi ko ɓe gollatnoo kon !

32:18.t: E on laatiiɗo gooŋɗinɗo wa'ay wa on faasiqe? (aa'aa), ɓe potataa.

32:19.t: Si ko ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe, hino woodani ɓe Aljannaaji weerde jipporde, sabu koɓe ngollaynoo kon.

32:20.t: Si tawii non ko ɓe faasiqiiɓe, haray femporde ɓen ɗon nden, ko ka Yiite: Tuma kala ɓe faalaa jaltugol e magge, ɓe ruttitee e magge, ɓe wi'anee: "Meeɗee lepte Yiite nge pennatoɗon ngen".

32:21.t: Ma Min meeɗinir ɓe lepte aduna, ado lepte mawɗe ɗen (La'akara),mbelajo'o, ɓe nduttitoto.

32:22.t: Alaa ɓurɗo tooñde wano baajoraaɗo Aayeeje Joomi mun ɗen, refti o ɗuurnii ɗe ! Pellet, Meonen, ko Men yoftotooɓe e bonɓe ɓen.

32:23.t: Gooŋɗii Min ngokkii Muusaa deftere nden, - wota a wonu e sikke e fii hawroygol e makko -, Min mbaɗi nde ɗoworde ɓiɗɓe Israa'iila ɓeen.

32:24.t: Min mbaɗi e maɓɓe ardiiɓe, ɗowirooɓe (yimɓe ɓen) yamiroore Amen, nde ɓe muññinoo, ɓe woni yananaaɓe e aayeeje amen ɗen.

32:25.t: Pellet, Joomi maa, ko Kaŋko senndoyta hakkunde maɓɓe, Ñande Darngal, e kon ko ɓe luutrnoo e fii mum.

32:26.t: E feeñanaani ɓe, no foti ɗuuɗude e ko Min kalki ado maɓɓe e gire, hiɓe yaha e koɗooli maɓɓe? Pellet, no e ɗum, tasakuyeeji ! E ɓee haqqiltaa?

32:27.t: E ɓe njiaani, won'de Miɗen coggira ndiyam ɗam ka leydi hokkundi, Min njaltinira ɗam remuru, ndu neemoraaɗi maɓɓe e kamɓe ñaamata e mum? E ɓe nji'ataa?

32:28.t: Hiɓe mbi'a: "Ko holnde tuma woni ngal uddital, si on laatike gooŋɗɓe?"

32:29.t: Maaku: "Ñande uddial ngal, ko heeferɓe ɓen gooŋɗinoyta nafoytaaɓe, wonaa kamɓe ngoni neeɓnanteeɓe !".

32:30.t: Ɗuurno ɓe, kaɓɓito-ɗaa. Kamɓe , ko ɓe haɓɓitiiɓe (lepte).

33:1.t: Eey ma yo Annabiijo! Hulu Alla, wota a ɗofto he'eferɓe ɓen e naafiqiiɓe ɓen. Pellet, Alla laatike gannduɗo, Ñeeñuɗo.

33:2.t: Jokku ko wahayinaa kon e maaɗa, immorde ka Joomi maa. Pellet, Alla laatike kumpitiiɗo ko nholloton kon.

33:3.t: Fawo e Alla. Alla yonii paweteeɗo e mum.

33:4.t: Alla waɗanani neɗɗaŋke ɓerɗe ɗiɗi e ndeer fulkuru makko. O waɗaali kadi resondiraaɓe mon ɓen ɓe nanndinirton, neeniraaɓe mon. O waɗaani kadi nodditirayɓe on (baaba ɓen), ɓiɗɓe mooɗon. Ɗuum mooɗon, ko kongol mon [yaltungol e] kunndule mon. Alla non, no daala goonga, ko Kaŋko woni fewnoowo e pocciingol ngol.

33:5.t: Noddiree ɓe baabiraaɓe maɓɓe ɓen: ko ɗuum ɓuri nuunɗude ka Alla. Si tawii non on nganndaa baabiraaɓe maɓɓe ɓeen, haray ko musiɗɓe mon ka diina e heftodiiɓe mon. Bakkaat fawaaki on e ko mboopoton (faayon) e mum, kono (on bakkondinay e) ko faandoriɗon ɓerɗe mon ɗen. Alla laatike kaforoowo, jurmotooɗo otooɗo.

33:6.t: Ko Annabiijo on ɓuri hanndude e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen diini ko'e maɓɓe; suddiiɓe makko ɓen, ko neeniraaɓe maɓɓe. Joomiraaɓe enɗamaaji ɓen, ko yoga maɓɓe ɓuri hanndude yoga [e ndonndi ndin] ka deftere Alla, diini gooɗinɓe ɓen e ferɓe ɓen, si wonaa hara on waɗan weldiiɓe mon [ɓe ronataa] ɓen moƴƴere. Ɗum wonii ko winndaa ka deftere.

33:7.t: Jaŋto tuma nde Min ƴettidunoo e Annabaaɓe ɓen ahadi maɓɓe, e ma'a an kadi, e Nuuhu, e Ibraahiima, e Muusaa e Iisaa ɓiɗɗo Maryama on: Min ƴettidi e maɓɓe ahadi tiiɗndi,

33:8.t: fii no [Alla] laɓndora gooŋguɓe ɓen e goonga maɓɓe kan. O hebilanii yedduɓe ɓen, lepte mu'usuuɗe.

33:9.t: Eey mon yo gooŋɗimɓe ! Ngannditee neema Alla on e dow mooɗon, tuma nde koneeli arunoo on, Min ngurti e maɓɓe henndu e konuuli, ngu on nji'aani. Alla siforii deentuɗo ko ngolloton.

33:10.t: Tuma nde ɓe ngardirannoo on, ka seŋgo dow mon e ka ley [saare] mon, e tuma nde gite ooñinoo, ɓerɗe ɗen lewwtiri ka lookoƴe, hoɗon cikka Alla (on tuma) sikke luutondirɗe.

33:11.t: Ko ɗon gooŋɗinɓe ɓen njariba, ɓe dilliniraa dillere saɗtunde.

33:12.t: Jaŋto kadi, tuma nde naafiqiiɓe ɓen, e ɓen ɓe ñawu woni e ɓerɗe mum mbi'aynoo: "Alla e Nulaaɗo Makko on fodaali men, si wonaa hodo".

33:13.t: E tuma nde fedde goo e maɓɓe wi'inoo: "Ko eey mon yo yimɓe Yathrib ! Ñiiɓirde alanaa on (ɗoo), yiltitee [ka mon]". Fedde goo e maɓɓe no waynitoo Annabiijo on, hiɓe mbi'a : "Cuuɗi amen ɗin ko na huncii", hara non wonaa ɗi hunciiɗi: ɓe faa:ndaaki, si wonaa dogugol.

33:14.t: Hay si tawno (añɓe) ɓen naatiranno ɓe ɓannge mayre, refti ɓe lanndaa fitina (jeddugol), pellet, ɓe ngonatno e mun, ɓe leelnataano e ɗuum, si wonaa seeɗa,

33:15.t: hara le gooŋɗii ɓe ahodiino e Alla ko adii, won'de ɓe ndutotaako ɓabbe. Ahadi Alla ndin non, ndi laatike lannditorteendi.

33:16.t: Maaku: "Dokgol nafataa on, si on ngogi maayde maa hare; haray ɗuim, on ndakmitetaake, si wanaa seeɗa".

33:17.t: Maaku: "Ko hommbo woni daɗndoowo on e Alla, si o fa'andanike on bone, maa si o fa'andanike on yurmeende?" Ɓe keɓantaa ko'e maɓɓe ga Alla, giɗo wonaa ballo.

33:18.t: Gooŋɗii Alla no anndi falaotooɓe ɓen e mon, e ɓeen wi'anooɓe musiɗɓe maɓɓe ɓen :"ngaree e amen", hara non ɓe arataa e hare nden, si wonaa seeɗa.

33:19.t: ko wuddan ɓe on. Si kulol ngol arii, a yi'at hiɓe ndaare, hara gite maɓɓe no yiilora wa mo maayde suddaa e mum. Si kulo ngol non yehii, ɓe laggora ɗemɗe muusuɗe, wuddangol moƴƴere nden. Ɓeen ɗon, ɓe ngooŋɗinaani, Alla bonnii golle maɓɓe ɗen. Ɗum wonii ko newanii Alla.

33:20.t: Hiɓe vikka koneeli ɗin njahataa. Hay si koneeli ɗin ngartii, ɓee [naafiqiiɓe] yelotono sinno hara nun heɓe ka ladde hakkunde yimɓe ladde ɓen, hara heɓe laɓndo fii mon. Hay si ɓe tawtodano e mon, ɓe haɓataano si wonaa seeɗa nii.

33:21.t: Gooŋɗii laatanike on e nulaaɗo Alla on, ñemtinal moƴƴal, wonan'de on joortiiɗo Alla, e Ñalaande sakkitiinde nden, o jaŋtii Alla ko ɗuuɗi.

33:22.t: Nde gooŋɗinɓe ɓen nji'unoo koneeli ɗin, ɓe mbi'i: "Ko ɗuum woni ko Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on fodi men; haray Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on goongii". Ɗuum ɓeydaani ɓe, si wonaa gooŋɗinal e jebbilaare.

33:23.t: Hino e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen, worɓe hunnuɓe ko ɓe ahodi e Alla kon : hino e maɓɓe timminɗo takke mun ɗen (haa o sahodinaa), hino e maɓɓe kadi kaɓɓitiiɗo; ɓe waɗtitaali (ahadi ndin) mbattiigu.

33:24.t: Fii yo Alla yoɓir hunnuɓe ɓen sabu gooŋɗue maɓɓe, O lepta naafiqiiɓe ɓen, si mo yiɗi, maa o jaɓana ɓe tuubuubuyee. Tawde pellet, Alla laatike kaforoowo, jurmotooɗo .

33:25.t: Alla ruttidii yedduɓe ɓen e tikkere maɓɓe nden, ɓe keɓaani moƴƴere. Alla yonii gooŋɗinɓe ɓen e hare. Alla siforii Cemmbe e Poolal.

33:26.t: O jipiini ɓen wallindirnooɓe jeyaaɓe e yimɓe defte ɓen, ka tataaji maɓɓe ɗin, O weddii ɗenƴere e ɓerɗe maɓɓe; fedde goo (e maɓɓe) hoɗon mbara, hoɗon daha kadi fede goo.

33:27.t: O ronini on leydi maɓɓe, e galleeji maɓɓe, e jawɗe maɓɓe, e leydi ndi on tippaano e mum. Alla siforiikhattanɗo kala hu'unde.

33:28.t: Eey ma yo Annabiijo ! Maakan suddiiɓe maa ɓen: "Si wonii ko nguurndam aduna paalaɗon e cuɗaari majjam, haray ngaree mi dakmita on, mi seera on [on tuma] ceergal moƴƴal.

33:29.t: Si tawii non ko Alla paalaɗon, e Nulaaɗo makko on, e galle La'akara ɗen, haray pellet, Alla maranii moƴƴimɓe ɓen e mooɗon, njoɓdi mawndi".

33:30.t: Eey mon yo suddiiɓe Annabiijo on ! Kala gadduɗo e mooɗon bone ɓannguɗo, lepte ɗen cowirante mo cowalle ɗiɗi! Ɗuum wonii ko newanii Alla.

33:31.t: Kala e mooɗon ɗoftiiɗo Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on, o golli ko moƴƴi, Min njoɓiray mo njoɓdi makko ndin laaɓi ɗiɗi, Miɗen marani mo kadi, arsike tedduɗo.

33:32.t: Eey mon suddiiɓe Annabiijo! On mba'aa wano gooto e suddiiɓe ɓeen. Si on ngooŋɗii, haray wota on yergin konngol, sakko on mo ñawu [tuuyo] woni e ɓernde mun tamƴinoo. Wowlon konngol moƴƴol.

33:33.t: Ñiiɓee ka cuuɗi mon; wota on 'eññinir cuɗaari mon, wano wirtaare majjere adinooɓe. Ñiiɓnee Juulde nden, totton askal on, ɗoftoɗon Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on. Nganndee ko Alla faandii, ko ittanta on e tuuɗe, onon yimɓe suudu [Annabiijo], O laɓɓinira on laɓɓingol.

33:34.t: Njaŋtee ko wonaa e janngeede ka cuuɗi mon, immorde e aayeeje Alla, e Sunna. Pellet, Alla laatike Newiiɗo, kumpitiiɗo.

33:35.t: Pellet, juulɓe worɓe ɓen e juulɓe rewɓe ɓen, e gomɗimɓe worɓe ɓen e gooŋɗinɓe rewɓe ɓen, e ɗoftiiɓe worɓe ɓen e ɗoftiiɓe rewɓe ɓen, e gooŋɗuɓe worɓe ɓen e gooŋɗɓe rewɓe ɓen, e muññiiɓe worɓe ɓen e muññiiɓe rewɓe ɓen, e yankiniiɓe worɓe ɓen e yankiniiɓe rewɓe ɓen, e sakkotooɓe worɓe ɓen e sakkotooɓe rewɓe ɓen, e hoorooɓe worɓe ɓen e hoorooɓe rewɓe ɓen, e worɓe reenooɓe farjuuji mum e rewɓe reenooɓe farjuuji mum, e worɓe jaŋtotooɓe Alla ko ɗuuɗi ɓen e rewɓe jaŋtotooɓe ɓen: Alla maranii ɓen, haforanal e njoɓdi mawndi.

33:36.t: Alanaa gooŋɗiɗo gorko, wanaa gooŋɗinɗo debbo, si Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on ñaawii fiyaaku, nde suɓagol e fiyaaku maɓɓe on. Kala non kedduɗo Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on, haray o majjii majjere ɓanngunde.

33:37.t: Jaŋto tuma maakanayno-ɗaa on mo Alla neemini e mun, moƴƴu-ɗaa e makko: "Jogitano suddiiɗo maa on, hoore-maa, kulaa Alla", haɗa suuɗa e fonndo maa, ko Alla feññinta. Haɗa hula yimɓe ɓen, kono ko Alla fotu-ɗaa hulude. Tuma Zaydu huntunoo e (suddiiɗo) on haaju, Min ndesin-maa mo, fii wata ɓittere wonu e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen, e (resugol) suddiiɓe nodditiraaɓe maɓɓe ɓen, si ɓen huntii e maɓɓe haaju. Yamiroore Alla nden laatike golleteende.

33:38.t: Feloore alanaa annabiijo o, e ko Alla daginani mo, ɗum ko ñaawoore Alla e ɓeen feƴƴuɓe ado makko. Ñaawoore Alla nde wonii eɓɓaande hoddiraande.

33:39.t: Ɓeen yottiinooɓe nule Alla ɗen, ɓe no kula mo, ɓe kula goɗɗo goo si wanaa Alla. Alla yonii kasboowo.

33:40.t: Muhammadu wonaani baaba hay goot e worɓe mon, ko [o] woni, ko Nulaaɗo Alla e timmoode Annabaaɓe. Alla laatike gannduɗo kala hu'unde.

33:41.t: Eey mon yo ɓen gooŋɗinɓe, jaŋtoree Alla jaŋtoore ɗuuɗunde,

33:43.t: Ko Kaŋko woni yurmeteeɗo on, -e Malaa'ikaaɓe makko ɓen (du'orana on), - fii no o yaltinira on e niɓe fa'ade e annoora. O siforii hinnotooɗo gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

33:44.t: Hiwrondiral maɓɓe ngal ñande ɓe kawrata e makko, ko "Salaam" [kisiyee], O maranii ɓe mbarjaari teddundi.

33:45.t: Eey ma Annabiijo ! Min nulirii ma [fii yo won] seediiɗo, e wewlinoowo e jeertinoowo,

33:46.t: e noddoowo fa'ade e Alla, duŋayee makko; e pitilol jalɓungol.

33:47.t: Wewlinir gooŋɗiinɓe ɓen, won'de no woodani ɓe ka Alla, ɓural mawnungal.

33:48.t: Wata a ɗofto heeferɓe ɓen e naafiqiiɓe ɓe, ɗuurno (e) lorra maɓɓe kan, pawo-ɗaa e Alla. Sabu Alla yonii ka fawee.

33:49.t: Eey mon yo ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ! Si resii rewɓe gooŋɗinɓe ɓen, refti on seerii ɓe ado on meemondirde e maɓɓe, haray alanaa on e maɓɓe, edda mo ɓe eddinotoo. NDakmitiree ɓe [njooɓa], ceeriron ɓe ceergal labangal.

33:50.t: Eey ma yo Annabiijo ! Min ndaginanii ma suddiiɓe maa ɓen ɓe njonnu-ɗaa teŋe mum ɓen, e ɓeen [horɓe] ɓe njeyru-ɗaa ñaamo maa, e ɓeen [dahaaɓe] ɓe Alla neldu-maa, e jiwɓe bappa maa, e jiwɓe yaayiraaɓe maa, e jiwɓe kaawu-maa, e jiwɓe neeniraaɓe maa, - ɓeen feridunooɓe e maa, - e suddiiɗo gooŋɗinɗo, si o yeɗii hoore-makko Annabiijo on, si Annabiijo on kadi fa'andike desgol mo : ɗum ko ko heerani maa, ga gooŋɗinɓe ɓen. Gooŋɗii Miɗen nganndi ko min parli e maɓɓe kon, e fii suddiiɓe maɓɓe ɓen, e ko ɓe njeytiri ñaame maɓɓe ɗen, fii wota ɓiɗteende wonu e maaɗa. Alla laatike kaforoowo, jurmotooɗo .

33:51.t: Hiɗa nennintina on mo nijɗɗu-ɗaa (nennintinnde) e maɓɓe, ɓaɗtinaa e maaɗa on mo yiɗu-ɗaa. E on mo ɗaɓɓu-ɗaa (belagol ka mum) e ɓen ɓe nennitu-ɗaa, bakkaaku woo fawaaki ma. Ko ɗum ɓuri ɓadaade e ko ɓuɓɓinta ɓerɗe maɓɓe, hara ɓe sunotaako, ɓe weltora kadi ko okku-ɗaa ɓe kon, ɓe fow maɓɓe. Alla no Anndi ko woni e ɓerɗe mon. Alla laatike gannduɗo, muññiiɗo.

33:52.t: Rewɓe ɓen ndagitantaako ma ɓaawo [ɓee ɗoo], wonaa nde waɗtitirtaa ɓe genndiraaɓe goo, hay si ŋari ɓen ɗoon kaawnii ma; si wonaa ɓe njeyru-ɗaa ñaamo maa ɓen. Alla laatike tommbiiɗo kala hu'unde.

33:53.t: Eey mon yo ɓen gooŋɗimɓe ! Wota on naatu ka cuuɗi Annabiijo on, si wonaa hara on nodda e ñaametee, hara wonaa yo on habbito ko ɓenndi ka makko. Kono si on noddaa ma, naatee. Si on ñaamii, sentee, hara on ɗaɓɓaali haala. Anndon ɗum mooɗon, hino lorraynoo Annabiijo on, kono o hersa (haalannde) on, Alla non ɗalataa [yamirde] goonga. Si on lanndoto (suddiiɓe makko) ɓen haaju, lanndoree ɓe ɓaawo wirngallo: ko ɗum mooɗon, ɓuri laaɓannde ɓerɗe mon e ɓerɗe maɓɓe. Haananaa on nde lorroton Nulaaɗo Alla on, wanaa nde resoton suddiiɓe maɓɓe ɓen ɓaawo makko, poomaa; pellet, waɗugol mon ɗum, wonii ko mawni ka Alla.

33:54.t: Si on peññinii hu'unde, maa on cuuɗii nde, pellet, Alla laatike gannduɗo kala hu'unde.

33:55.t: Bakkaat fawaaki ɓe e baabiraaɓe maɓɓe ɓen, wonaa kadi ɓiɗɓe maɓɓe ɓen, wonaa banndiraaɓe maɓɓe ɓen, wonaa e ɓiɗɓe banndiraaɓe maɓɓe ɓen, wonaa e ɓiɗɓe miññiraaɓe maɓɓe rewɓe ɓen, wanaa e rewɓe maɓɓe ɓen, wonaa e ɓen ɓe ɓe jeyiri ñaame maɓɓe. Kulee Alla (yo suddiiɓe). Pellet, Alla siforii ceediiɗo kala hu'unde.

33:56.t: Pellet, Alla e Malaa'ikaaɓe makko ɓen, heɓe du'anaade annabiijo on; ko onon yo ɓen gooŋɗinɓe, njuulee e makko, toranoɗon [mo] kisal.

33:57.t: Pellet, ɓeen lorrooɓe Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on, Alla huɗii ɓen aduna e La'akara, O hebilanii ɓe kadi lepte koynooje.

33:58.t: Ɓeen kadi lorrooɓe gooŋɗinɓe worɓe ɓen e gooŋɗinɓe rewɓe ɓen, e hoore ko ɓe faggitaaki, gooŋɗii ɓe ronndike fenaande e bakkaatuuji ɓannguɗi.

33:59.t: Ko Annabiijo! Maakan suddiiɓe maa ɓeen, e jiwɓe maa ɓen, e genndiraaɓe gooŋɗinɓe ɓen, nde ɓe joltinta e maɓɓe, wutteeji maɓɓe ɗin: ko ɗuum ɓurata ɓaɗtaade, nde ɓe annditetee, hara ɓe lorraaka. Alla laatike kaforoowo, jurmotooɗo .

33:60.t: Pellet, si naafiqiiɓe ɓen kaɗitaaki, e ɓeen ɓe ñawu (sikkitaare) woni e ɓerɗe mum, e fena-fenta'en ka saare Madiina, ma Min ngurtite e maɓɓe, refi ɓe kawtirtaa e maaɗa ton, si wonaa seeɗa.

33:61.t: Ko huɗaa ɓe. Kala ka ɓe tawaa, ko ɓe nanngetee ɓe, ɓe mbaree bargol:

33:62.t: Ɗum ko sunna Alla e ɓeen wulinooɓe ko adii. A keɓantaa laawol (sunna) Alla ngol, battiigu.

33:63.t: Yimɓe ɓen o laɓndo maa fii Darngal. Maaku : "ngandee ganndal daragol maggal, ko ka Alla woni". E ko anndin maa, won'de no hasii hara Darngal ngal ɓadike?

33:64.t: Pellet, Alla huɗii he'eferɓe ɓen, O kammbiranii ɓe kadi dulboowe,

33:65.t: ko ɓe luttooɓe ton poomaa. Ɓe keɓataa giɗo, wonaa ballo.

33:66.t: Ñalnde je'ece maɓɓe ɗen mbaylitetee ka Yiite, ɓe mbiay: "Ee jalla amen! Hara min ɗoftino Alla, min ɗoftii Nulaaɗo on!".

33:67.t: Ɓe mbi'a: "Joomi amen, Minen Min ɗofti hooreeɓe amen e mawɓe amen, ɓe majjini min e laawol ngol.

33:68.t: Joomi amen, tottu ɓe cowanɗe ɗiɗi e lepte ɗen, kuɗaa ɓe kuddi mawndi".

33:69.t: Ko onon yo ɓen gooŋɗinɓe! Wota on wa'u wa ɓen lorrunooɓe Muusaa, Alla woɗɗini mo e ko ɓe mbi'i kon, tawde o wonii tedduɗo ka Alla.

33:70.t: Eey mon yo ɓen gooŋɗinɓe! Kulee Alla, wowlon konngol peewungol.

33:71.t: [Si on waɗii ɗum], O moƴƴinanay on golle mon, O haforana on bakkaat mon. Kala ɗoftiiɗo Alla e Nulaaɗo makko on, haray o maliraama maloore mawnde.

33:72.t: Min mbeeɓitii hoolaare nden e dow kammuuji ɗin, e leydi ndin e pelle ɗen, ɗi kaɗitii ronndagol nde, ɗi kuli (battane) majji, neɗɗo on kan ronndii nde; tawde pellet, o wonii ɗuuɗuɗo-tooñde [hoore-mun], majjaaɗo [battane ɗum].

33:73.t: [Neɗɗo on ronndiraama ɗum], no Alla leptira naafiqiiɓe worɓe ɓen e naafiqiiɓe rewɓe ɓen, e sirkooɓe worɓe ɓen e sirkooɓe rewɓe ɓen, e (no) Alla jaɓirana gooŋɗinɓe worɓe ɓen e gooŋɗinɓe rewɓe ɓen tuububuyee. Alla laatike kafroowo, jurmotooɗo.

34:1.t: Jettooje ngoodanii Alla, On jeyɗo kala ko woni ka kammuuji e ka leydi. Hino woodani mo kadi jettooje ka La'akara. Ko Kaŋko woni Ñeeño, kumpitiiɗo.

34:2.t: Homo anndi ko naatata ka leydi, e ko yaltata e mayri, ko jippotoo iwra ka kammu e ko ƴawata e maggu. Ko Kaŋko woni jurmotooɗo otoo, jaafoto.

34:3.t: Yedduɓe ɓen mbi'i: "Darngal ngal arataa min". Maaku: "aa'a! Mi wooɗndirii Joomi am! pellet, ko aray e mon. [Joomi ma] ko ganduɗo wirniiɗi. Hu'unde wirnanaaki Mo, ko fotata e abbere jarra, woni ka kammuuji maa ka leydi. Wanaa ko ɓuri ɗum famɗude, wonaa ko ɓuri ɗuum mawnude, si wonaa no e deftere feññinnde.

34:4.t: Fii yo O yoɓoy ɓen gooɗinɓe, ɓe ngolli moƴƴuɗi. Ɓeen ɗoon, hino woodani ɓe haforaneede, e arsike tedduɗo.

34:5.t: Ɓeen non yaccii ɓe e bonnitugol aayeeje amen ɗen, ɓen ɗon, hino woodani ɓe lepte, immorde e ɓurɗe mu'usuuɗe.

34:6.t: Ɓeen okkaaɓe ganndal hino yi'ira jippiniraande nden e maaɗa, immorde ka Joomi maa, ko kañre woni goonga, hinde fewnira e laawol poolɗo, jettiniiɗo On.

34:7.t: Yedduɓe ɓen kadi mbi'i: "On ngaccay min tinndina on fii gorko, mo no kumpita on, won'de si on muncitaama kala muncitannde, on ngontoyay e tagoore hesre?

34:8.t: O fekindi fenaande e hoore Alla? Kaa hara ko jinna nanngi mo? Si ko woni, ɓen ɓe ngooŋɗinaa La'akara on, ɓe wonii e lepte e majjere woɗɗiinde (goonga).

34:9.t: E ɓee nji'aani ko woni yeeso maaɓe e ko woni ɓaawo maɓɓe immorde ka kammu e ka leydi? Si Min muuyiino, Min munnirayno ɓe leydi ndin, maa Min pukkina e maɓɓe taƴontine (lepte), immorde ka kammu. Wonii e ɗuum, Ma'ande, wonan'de kala jeyaaɗo duttotooɗo (e Joomi mum).

34:10.t: Gooŋɗii Min ngokkii Daawuuda ɓural, immorde e Amen. [Min mbi'i]: "eey mon pelle e colli, cubbunhinodee e makko. Min newinani mo (tafugol) njamndi ndin.

34:11.t: (Min mbii'ani mo won'de): "Gollu wutteeji njamndi, eɓɓaa ka tafoodi. NGollon golle moƴƴe, pellet, ko Mi deenuɗo ko ngolloton kon".

34:12.t: (Min eeltani kadi) Sulaymaana henndu ndun: dawol mayru ko yeru (yaadu) lewru, kirndol mayru kadi ko yeru (yaadu) lewu. Min koncinani mo ɓunndu sila (kire). Hino jinnaaji ɗin, golliraynooɗi ye'eso makko, e duŋayee Joomi makko. Kala ooñiingii e majji, ga e yamiroore Amen nden, Min meeɗina ngii lepte dulɓoowe nge.

34:13.t: Hiɗi ngollana mo ko o faalaa: gila e tataaji, e nanndollaaji, e looɗe wa'iɗe wa beeli, e payanɗe feŋiiɗe. "Gollee, onon ɓeynguure Daawuuda, njetton (Alla)", fanɗii e jiyaaɓe Am ɓen, jettoowo (Kam).

34:14.t: Nde Min ñaawnoo e makko maayde nden, annditaani ɗi fii maayde makko nden, si wonaa gannguuji leydi(mooƴu) ɗin, hino ñaama tuggordu makko ndun. Nde o fukkinoo, feeñani jinnaaji ɗin, won'de si ɗi nganndunoo ko wirnii, ɗi ñiiɓataano e lepte [jeyaagu] koynooje.

34:15.t: Gooŋɗii wonaniino yimɓe Saba'i ɓen e koɗooli maɓɓe ɗin, Ma'ande; gese ɗiɗi ka bannge ñaamo e ka nano. (Min wmbiani ɓe): "Ñaamee e arsike Joomi mon, njetton mo Mo. Leydi ndin ko laaɓundi, e Joomiraawo jafotooɗo".

34:16.t: (Kono) ɓe ɗuunii. Min ngurti e maɓɓe ndiyam waame, Min mbaɗtitani ɓe gese maɓɓe ɗen ɗiɗi, gese (goo) ɗiɗi, marɗe ñaametee kaaɗɗo, e (leɗɗe) duɓɓeeje, e hu'unde e jaaɓe seeɗaaje.

34:17.t: Ngool (yaggingol), Min njoɓirɓe ko ɓe njeddi kon. E hara Min njoɓay si wonaa yedduɓe ɓen?

34:18.t: Min mbaɗi hakkune maɓɓe e koɗooli ɗi Min mbaɗi barki e mum ɗin, koɗooli feeñondirɗi, Min eɓɓi e majji yaadu. (Min mbi'ani ɓe): "njehee ton jemmaaji e ñalawmaaji, ko on hooliiɓe".

34:19.t: Ɓe mbi'i'i: "Joomi amen, woɗɗindir hakkunde yaaduuji amen", ɓe tooñi ko'e maɓɓe, Min mbaɗti fillitee ɓe fii mum, Min cenndindiri ɓe hattirde e senndirgol. Pellet, wonii e ɗuum, Ma'andeeji wonan'de kala keewuɗo muñal, jettoowo (neema).

34:20.t: Gooŋɗii Ibuliisa goonginii jikke mum ɗen e maɓɓe. Ɓe njokki mo, si wonaa fedde e gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen.

34:21.t: E doole alanaa mo e dow maɓɓe, cemmbe (wurtugol), si wonaa tan, ko fii no Moen nganndira on gooŋɗinɗo La'akara e on gonɗo e sikke fii mum. Joomi maa non, e dow kala hu'unde, ko O deenɗo.

34:22.t: Maaku: "Noddee ɗin ɗi ɗaynitorɗon [ deweteeɗi] ga Alla. Ɗi njeyaa hay yeru abbere jarra, ka kammuuji wonaa ka leydi. Alanaa ɗi e ɗin (kammuuli e leydi ndin) kafidaaɗo (geɗal), alanaa mo e ɗiin, hay ballondirteeɗo".

34:23.t: Tefoore nafataa ka makko, si wonaa on Mo O duŋanii. Haa si ɗenƴere nden yaltinaama e ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen, ɓe mbi'a: "Ko holɗum Joomi mon daali?" Ɓe mb'a: "Ko goonga kan; ko Kaŋko woni Toowɗo, Mawɗo On".

34:24.t: Maaku: "Kon hombo woni arsikiroowo on ka kammuuji e ka leydi?" Maaku: "Ko Alla. Ko si ko minen maa si ko onon, ngoni e peewal maa e nder majjere ɓanngunde".

34:25.t: Maaku: "On laɓnditoytaake fii ko min mbonni, minen kadi men laɓnditoytaake fii ko ngolloton ton".

34:26.t: Maaku: "Joomi men renndinoyay en, refti o ñaawira hakkunde min goonga; Ko Kaŋko woni ñawoowo, gannduɗo On".

34:27.t: Maaku: "kollee Kam ɗin ɗi baɗtidu-ɗon e makko kafidiiɗi. Wonaa non woniri! Si ko woni, ko Kaŋko woni AllapFooluɗo, Ñeeñɗo On".

34:28.t: Min nuliraali ma, si wonaa e yimɓe ɓen fof: wewlinoowo e jeertinoowo. Kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓen, ɓe nganndaa.

34:29.t: Heɓe mbi'a: "Ko holnde tuma woni ndee Fodoore, si on laatike gooŋɗɓe?"

34:30.t: Maaku: "Hino woodani on fodoore, nde o neeɓnitantaake e mayre fotde saa'i, on ardintinantaake nde kadi!".

34:31.t: Yedduɓe ɓen mbi'i: "Min ngooŋɗintaa ndee Alqur'aanaare muk, wonaa nden adiinde nde". Sinno a tinayno tuma nde tooñɓe ɓen ndarnetee ka Joomi maɓɓe, hara yoga maɓɓe no rutta yoga konngol, lo'inanooɓe ɓen mbi'ana townitinooɓe ɓen: "Si wonaano onon nun, min ngonayno gooɗinɓe".

34:32.t: Townitinooɓe ɓenmbi'ani lo'inanooɓe ɓen: "E ko minen palinoo on e peewal ɓaawo ngal arde e mon? Si ko woni, on ngoniino bonɓe".

34:33.t: Lo'inanooɓe ɓen kadi mbi'ani townitinooɓe ɓen: "Si ko woni, ko pewje (mon) jemma e ñalawma, tuma njamiraynoɗon meon yo men njeddu Alla, min mbaɗana Mo potondirɗi". Ɓe cuuɗi nimse ɗen, nde ɓe njinoo lepte ɗen. Min mbaɗi kolombooje e daaɗe ɓen yedduɓe. Hara ɓe yoɓitete si wanaa ko ɓe ngollatnoo oo kon?

34:34.t: Min Nulaani jeertinoowo e yimɓe saare, si wanaa neeminaaɓe mayre ɓen mbiay: "Minen ko men yedduɓe ko nulidaɗon kon".

34:35.t: Ɓe mbi'i kadi: "Ko menen ɓuri ɗuuɗude jawɗe e ɓiɓɓe, men wonaani kadi lepteteeɓe".

34:36.t: Maaku: "pellet, Joomi am homo weertana arsike on, mo O muuyi, O ɓillini (mo O muuyi). Kono ɓurɓe ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓen, ɓe nganndaa".

34:37.t: Wonaa jawɗe mon, wonaa jiidi mon woni ko ɓaɗtinirta on ka Amen ɓadal. Si wonaa ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe; ɓen ɗon, hino woodani ɓe njoɓdi sowaande, sabu ko ɓe ngolli kon, kamɓe ka soorooji, ko ɓe hooliiɓe.

34:38.t: Ɓeen yaccotooɓe e doŋkingol (yimɓe ɓeen) e Aayeeje Amen ɗen, ɓen ɗon, ka ka ndeer lepte woni ko ɓe tawnoytee.

34:39.t: Maaku: "pellet, Joomi am homo weertana arsike on, mo o muuyani e jeyaaɓe makko ɓen, O ɓillini mo (O muuyi e maɓɓe). Kala non ko wintiɗon e hu'unde, Kaŋko O lomtinay nde. Ko Kaŋko woni moƴƴo Arsikoowo".

34:40.t: Ñande o mooɓtindiroyta ɓe dendaangal, refti o daalana Maleykaaji ɓin: "E ko ɓee ɗoo (yimɓe) ndewatnoo on?"

34:41.t: Ɓe mbi'a: "Senayee woodanii ma! Ko Aan woni giɗo amen ga maɓɓe. Toode ko jinnaaji ɗin ɓe ndewaynoo, ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe, ko ɗin (jinnaaji) gooŋɗini".

34:42.t: Hannde non, yoga mon waawanaa yoga nafa wanaa lorra. Min mbi'anoya ɓen tooñɓe: "Meeɗee lepte Yiite nge pennatnoɗon fii mum".

34:43.t: Si aayeeje amen ɓannguɗe ɗen janngaamma e maɓɓe, ɓe mbi'a: "oo wonaani, si wonaa gorko paalaaɗo palagol on e ko baabiraaɓe mon ndewayno rewaynoo". Ɓe mbi'i: "Ndee (Alqur’aanaare) wonaani, si wonaa fenaande fekindaande". Yedduɓe ɓen mb'ani goonga kan nde ka arnoo e maɓɓe: "Ndee wonaani, si wanaa mbilewu ɓanngu ngu".

34:44.t: Min ngaddanaani ɓee, defte ɗe ɓe janngata. Min meeɗaani nulude e maɓɓe, jeertinoowo ado maa.

34:45.t: Adinooɓe ɓe ɓen [kadi] njenniino (nulaaɓe mum). [Yimɓe maa ɓen] njottaaki sappaɓal ko Min ngkkunoo ɓen kon. Ɓen njeddi Nulaaɓe Amen ɓen, taskii no lepte am ɗen mba'unoo!

34:46.t: Maaku: "nganndee ko mi waajorta on, ko (hu'unde) wootere: "Ko nde daroranton Alla ɗiɗo ɗiɗo e gooto gooto, refti miijitoɗon. (Nganndon) wondiiɗo mon on aldaa e jinna: O wonaani, si wonaa jerrtinoowo on, e ko woni yeeso (mon), e lepte caɗtuɗe".

34:47.t: Maaku: "Mi laɓndaaki on njoɓdi, ɗuum ko fii mon. Njoɓdi am ndin wonaani, si wonaa ka Alla. Kaŋko Ko o Seediiɗo e kala hu'unde".

34:48.t: Maaku: "pellet, Joomi am ko nerlortooɗo [meere nden, hujjaaji] goonga ka, timminɗo anndugol wirniiɗi".

34:49.t: Maaku: "Goonga ka arii [Iislaamu on], mehre [ke'eferaagu] ngu alaa ka feeña, kadi, nde ruttotaako".

34:50.t: Maaku: "Si mi majjii, haray ko hoore-am mi majjani; si mi feewii kadi, ko sabu ko sabu ko Joomi am wahayini e am kon, tawde pellet, ko o nanoowo, Ɓadiiɗo".

34:51.t: Sinno a tinatno, tuma nde ɓe ɗeŋƴii, - laaworde alanaa (ɓe), - ɓe nanngiree e nokkuure ɓadiinde!

34:52.t: Ɓe mbi'a: "Min ngooŋɗinii [Darngal] ngal", e ko holno gooŋɗinal woonirani ɓe e nokku goɗɗuɗo?

34:53.t: Hara non ɓe jeddiino nde ko adii, heɓe mbernora ko wirnii e nokku goɗɗuɗo!

34:54.t: Heedee hakkunde e ko ɓe tuuyetee, wano golliranoo e nanndo maɓɓe ko adii, tawde ɓe ngoniino e sikke cikkiniiɗa.
