35:1.t: Jettooje ngoodanii Alla, Takɗo kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin, baɗɗo Malaa'ikaaji nulaaɓe, marɓe gabitanji(bibje) ɗi ɗiɗi, ɗi tati e nayi. Homo ɓesda ko o muuyi e tagu makko ngun, tawde pellet, Alla ko kattanɗo kala hu'unde.

35:2.t: Kala yurmeende nde Alla udditani yimɓe ɓen, jogitotooɗo nde alaa; kala kadi ko o jogitii, gaccitoowo ɗum alaa ɓaawo (jogitagol) makko. Ko Kaŋko woni pooluɗo, ñeeñɗo.

35:3.t: Eey mon yo yimɓe! Njaŋtee neema Alla on e mon. Hara tagoowo ko woori Alla no woodi, mo no arsikira on ka kammu e ka leydi? Deweteeɗo alaa si wonaa Kaŋko! E ko honno njilirteɗon [e kaa goonga]?

35:4.t: Si ɓe njeddii i ma, pellet Nulaaɓe (goo) yeddanooma ado maa. Ko fa'ade e Alla, woni ruttorde fiyakuuji ɗin.

35:5.t: Eey mon yo yimɓe! Ngandee pellet fodoore Alla nden ko goonga. Wota nguurndam aduna hodu on, wota (seytaane) kodoowo on hod on e fii Alla.

35:6.t: Pellet, seytaane ko gaño wonani on. Haray njogitoree mo gaño. Nganndee ko o noddirta fedde makko nden, ko no ɓe jeydiree e yimɓe dulɓoowe ngen.

35:7.t: Hino woodani yedduɓe ɓen, lepte caɗtuɗe. Ɓeya gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe, hino woodani ɓe haforaneede e njoɓdi mawndi.

35:8.t: E ko on cuɗinanaaɗo golle mum bonɗe, hara himo yi'a ɗe moƴƴuɗe? - Tawde pellet, Alla no majjina on mo o muuyi, O feewna mo o muuyi. Wota a tampinir hoore-maa, sunagol fii maɓɓe. Pellet, Alla ko gannduɗo ko ɓe ngoni gollude.

35:9.t: Ko Alla woni gurtuɗo keneeli ɗin, ɗi cogga duule, Min njarnira ɗum leydi yo'orundi; Min nguurnitira ɗum leydi ndin, ɓaawo ndi yo'orude. Ko wano non ummital ngal.

35:10.t: Kala tawɗo ko teddungal faalaa (yo o ɗaɓɓir Alla), tawde ko Alla jeyi teddungal ngal fof: ko ka makko woni ko konngol laaɓungol ƴawata, golle moƴƴe ɗen ɓamta ngol. Ɓeen fewjooɓe boneeji, hino woodani ɓe lepte caɗtuɗe. Pewje ɓen ɗen, ko bonat ɗe.

35:11.t: Ko Alla tagiri on e mbulbuldi, refti e toɓɓere (maniiyu), refti o waɗi on nooneeji. Deyel caawataa, ngel leelnataa kadi, si wonaa e anndal makko. Guurnaaɗo wuurnetaake, ɗuytetaake kadi e nguurndam makko, si wonaa no e deftere. Pellet, ɗuum ko newanii ɗum Alla.

35:12.t: Maaje ɗen ɗiɗi potataa: [Ndiyam] goo ɗoo ɗam, ko mbelɗam, laaɓungo, newiingo njaram mum, ngoo ɗaa, ko lamɗam kaaɗuɗam. Hiɗon ñaama e kala majjam, teewu keccu, hoɗon njaltina kadi hern, cuɗaari ndi ɓoornotoɗon. Hiɗa yi'a laaɗe ɗen no awja e maggo, fii yo on ɗaɓɓiron e ɓural Makko. Mbelejo'o on njettay [Mo].

35:13.t: Himo naanta jemma on e deer ñalawma on, O naatna ñalawma on e ndeer jemma on. O eleti kadi na'ange ngen e lewru ndun. Kala mun no doga haa e lajal innaangal. Ko On mooɗon woni Alla, Joomi mon: Ko Kaŋko Laamu woodani. Ɗiya ɗi noddoton ga makko, ɗi jeytaa yeru gorol tamara.

35:14.t: Si on noddu ɗi, ɗi nanataa noddaandu mon; hay si ɗi nanoy, ɗi njaabitotaako on. Ñande Darngal, ɗi njeddoyat sirku mon on. Alaa kabroowo ma, wano kumpitiiɗo On.

35:15.t: Eey mon yo yimɓe, ko onon ngoni hatonjimɓe e Alla ɓen, Alla kan, ko Kaŋko woni Galo jettiniiɗo On.

35:16.t: Si O yiɗii, o naɓa on, o adda tagu hesu.

35:18.t: Woŋki ronndotaako doŋgal woŋkii goo. Hay si teddiraaki [junuubi] kin noddii e ronndaneede, ki ronndantaake hay hu'unde, hay si ko ɓadondiraaɗo Anndu ko jeertintaa [nana waaju], ko ɓen hulirooɓe Joomi mum ka wirnii, ɓe ñiiɓi e Juulde. Kala on laɓɓiniiɗo, haray ko hoore makko o woni laɓɓinanaade. Ko ka Alla woni ruttorde nden.

35:20.t: wonaa niɓe ɗen e ndaygu ngun,

35:21.t: wonaa ɗowdi ndi e henndu wulndu ndu.

35:22.t: Wonaa kadi wuurɓe ɓen potata e maayɓe ɓen. Pellet, Alla no nanina on mo o muuyani. Wanaa an [Nulaaɗo], woni naninoowo, wonɓe ka genaale ɓeen.

35:23.t: Aan a wonaani, si wonaa jerrtinoowo.

35:24.t: Pellet, Min nulirii ma goonga, ko a beltinoowo e jeertinoowo. Alaa e mofte, si wonaa jerrtinoowo feƴƴii e maɓɓe.

35:25.t: Si ɓe njeddii ma, hari adinooɓe ɓe ɓen njedduno (Nulaaɓe mum), feewndo ɓen Nulaaɓe maɓɓe ngaddannoo ɓanngannduyeeji, e Ɗeri e feftere ndayginoore.

35:26.t: Refti nanngitir mi yedduɓe ɓen (halakuyee). Tesko no lepte am ɗen mbaɗtinirnoo.

35:27.t: E a yiaani won'de Alla jippinirii ndiyam ka kammu? Min puɗiniri ɗam dimɗe ceertuɗe noone. Hino ka pelle, ɗate daneeje e boɗeeje ceertyuɗe noone, e pete ɓaleeje.

35:28.t: Hino e yimɓe ɓen, e daabeeji ɗin, e neemoraaɗi ɗin, ɗi nooneeji mum kadi luutondiri. Anndu ko kulata Alla e jiyaaɓe makko ɓeen, ko annduɓe ɓen. Pellet, Alla ko pooluɗo, kaforoowo.

35:29.t: Ɓeen janngooɓe deftere Alla nden, ɓe ñiiɓi e Juulde, ɓe nafqii ko Min arsiki ɓe kon gunndoo e kene, heɓe njoortii njulaaku ngu sontataa.

35:30.t: Fii no [Alla] hunnirana ɓe njoɓdiiji maɓɓe ɗin, o ɓeyda ɓe e ɓural makko ngal. Kaŋko, ko o kaforoowo, gannditanoowo [on] .

35:31.t: Kon ko Min wahayini e maaɗa e deftere nden, ko ɗuum woni goonga, gooŋɗinde e ɗen won'ɗe ye'eso mayre. Pellet, Alla ko kumpitiiɗo deentuɗo jiyaaɓe makko ɓen.

35:32.t: Refti Min ndonini deftere nden, ɓen ɓe Min cuɓii e jiyaaɓe Amen. Hino e maɓɓe tooñɓe hoore-mun, mum hino e maɓɓe hakindinɗo, hino e maɓɓe foolondirooɓe e moƴƴereeji, duŋayee Alla; ko ɗum woni ɓural mawnungal ngal.

35:33.t: Aljannaaji ñiiɓal, ɗi naatata e mum, hara heɓe cuɗiree ton, jawe kaŋŋe e kaalise e lu’u-lu’u; comci maɓɓe ɗin ton, ko cooyi.

35:34.t: Ɓe mbi'a: "jettooje Ngoodanii Alla, On ittanɗo en suno. Pellet, Joomi men, ko kaforoowo, barjotooɗo.

35:35.t: On jippinirɗo en ɓural makko ngal, e galle ñiiɓal, tampere (woo) heɓataa en ton, wonaa roŋkere keɓata en ton.

35:36.t: Yedduɓe ɓen kan, ko Yiite Jahannama woodani ɓen; maayde ñaawetaake e maɓɓe, sakko ɓe maaya, ɓe koynantaake kadi lepte magge ɗen. Ko wano nii Min njoɓitirta kala jedduɗo.

35:37.t: Hara heɓe ooloo nder ton [ɓe mbi'a]: "Joomi amen, yaltin min; min ngolla moƴƴere, hara wonah ko min ngollatnoo kon". [O jaaboo ɓe]: "E min wuurnaano on yeru ko waajitotooɗo waajitoranoo e mum? Jeertinoowo kadi ari e mon? Awa meeɗee, sabu faabo alanaa tooñooɓe ɓen".

35:38.t: Pellet, Alla ko gannduɗo wirniiɗi kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin. Ko O gannduɗo ko suuɗii e ɓerɗe.

35:39.t: Ko Kaŋko woni baɗuɗo on lomtiiɓe ka leydi. Kala jedduɗo, ko e makko lorra jeddi makko yantata. Jeddugol he'eferɓe ɓen, ɓeydataa ɓe ka Joomi maɓɓe, si wanaa tikkere. Jeddugol ɓeydataa heeferɓe ɓen, si wanaa hayrere.

35:40.t: Maaku: "E on nji'ii rendiiɗi mon ndewoton ga Alla ɗin? Kollee Kam ko ɗi tagi ka leydi. Kaa hiɗi mari geɗal e [tagugol] kammuuji ɗin? Kaa Min addan ɓe deftere, nde ɓe woni e ɓanndannduyee mum? Si ko woni, tooñooɓe ɓen alaa e fodude yoga maɓɓe, si wanaa hodo".

35:41.t: Pellet, ko Alla jogitii kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin, fii wata ɗi dirtu. Hay si ɗi ndirtayno, hay gooto jogitotaako ɗi e ɓaawo makko. O laatike muññiiɗo, kaforoowo.

35:42.t: Ɓe ngoodndiri Alla, hattirde e goondooje maɓɓe, won'de si jeertinoowo arii e maɓɓe, pellet, ɓe ngonay ɓurɓe feewude wootere e mofte ɗen. Nde jeertinoowo non arunoo e maɓɓe, ɗum ɓeydaali ɓe, si wonaa woɗɗitagol.

35:43.t: [Ɓe mbaɗiri ɗum] mawnintinaare ka keydi, e pewje ɓenɗe. Pewje bonɗe ɗen non kuuɓitataa, si wonaa jom-munm en. Hara hiɓe cabbitii, si wonaa sunna (Alla) on e adinooɓe ɓen? A heɓantaa sunna Alla on battiigu, a heɓantaa sunna Alla mbaylirɗum.

35:44.t: E ɓee njiilaaki ka leydi, ɓe taskoo ko holno battane adinooɓe ɓen wonirnoo? Hari no ɓuri ɓe tiiɗude doole. Alla siforaali won'de goɗɗum no roŋkina Mo ka kammuuji maa ka leydi. Tawde pellet, ko O gannduɗo, kattanɗo.

35:45.t: Si tawno Alla nanngitirayno yimɓe ɓen ko ɓe paggitorii kon, o accataano ruugayngel e dow mayri. Ko woni tan, Homo neeɓnitana ɓe haa e lajal anndaa ngal. Si lajal maɓɓe ngal heewtii, [O nanngay ɓe], tawde pellet, Alla ko deenuɗo jiyaaɓe makko ɓen.

36:3.t: Pellet, an (Nulaaɗo), ko a jiyaaɗo e nulaaɓe ɓen.

36:6.t: Fii yo a jeertinirde nde yimɓe, ɓe baabiraaɓe mum jerrtinanooka: ɓeen ko welsindiiɓe.

36:7.t: Gooŋɗii konngol [lepte] jojjii e ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe; ɓen ɗoon gooŋɗintaa.

36:8.t: Minen Min mbaɗii ka daaɗe maɓɓe kolommbooje, ɗen ko jottiiɗe ka bokkuɗe; hara ko ɓe ŋalliniiɓe.

36:9.t: Min mbaɗi ye'eso maɓɓe heedo, ɓaawo maɓɓe kadi heedo, Min kippi ɓe (gite ɗen); mbaɗti ɓe nj'ataa [goonga].

36:10.t: Hino fota e maɓɓe, foti a jeertini ɓe, maa a jeertinaali ɓe; ɓe ngooŋɗintaa.

36:11.t: Anndu ko njeertintaa (jaɓa), ko on jokkuɗo Jaŋtoore (Alqur'aana) nden, o kuli Jom-Yurmeende On ka wirnii. Wewlinir mo kaforaneede e mbarjaari teddundi.

36:12.t: Ko Minen ngoni wuurnitooɓe maayɓe ɓen, Min mbinnda ko ɓe ngardini e batteeji maɓɓe. Kala hu'unde, Miɗen mofti nde e deftere ɓanngunde.

36:13.t: Piyan-ɓe yeru, fii yimɓe saare, tuma nde Nulaaɓe ngarunoo ɓe,

36:14.t: Nde Min nulunoo e maɓɓe, [Nulaaɓe] ɗiɗo, ɓe njeddii i ɓen, Min cammbiniri ɓen, tataɓo, ɓe mbi'i: "Minen, ko men Nulaaɓe e mo'on".

36:15.t: [Yimɓe saare nden] wi'i: "On ngonaani, si wanaa ko on ɓanndiŋke wano menen. Jom-hinaranke On jippinaani hay hu'unde, on wonaani, si wanaa ko on fenooɓe".

36:16.t: [Nulaaɓe ɓen] mbi'i: "Joomi amen no anndi pellet, ko min Nulaaɓe e mo'on.

36:17.t: Fawaaki men non, si wonaa jottingol ɓanngina".

36:18.t: [Yimɓe saare nden] mbi'iti: "Min kiitori on kataa. Si tawii non on kaɗitaaki, ma min piɗu on, lepte mu'usuuɗe kadi memira on immorde e amen".

36:19.t: [Nulaaɓe ɓen kadi] mb'iti: "Kiite mon ɗin, hiɗon ngon'di e mum. Ko si on mbaajaama (kiitinoɗon)? Tigi on, ko on yimɓe fantinooɓe!".

36:20.t: Gorko iwri ka ɓuri woɗɗude e saare nden, o ari homo yaccoo, o wi'i: "eey mon yo yimɓe am, kori njokkee Nulaaɓe ɓen,

36:21.t: Njokkee ɓen ɓe laɓndotaako on njoɓdi, ɓen ko feewnaaɓe.

36:22.t: E ko haɗata kam rewugol On takɗo Kam? Ko ka makko woni ruttorde mon.

36:23.t: E mi jogtoto deweteeɗi ga makko? Si Jom-yurmeende On muuyanii kam lorra, tefoore majji duncantaali kam hay hu'unde, ɗi ndaɗandataa kam kadi.

36:24.t: Haray miin on tuma, mi wonii e majjere ɓanngunde.

36:25.t: Min on, mi gooŋɗinii Joomi mon, nananee kam".

36:26.t: [O] wi'anaa: "Naatu Aljanna". O wi'i: "Haaniino yimɓe am ɓen ngannda,

36:27.t: ko Joomi am haforani kam, O waɗi kam e teddinaaɓe ɓeen".

36:28.t: Min njippiniraano koneeli ka kammu, e yimɓe makko ɓen, ɓaawo maako. Min ngonaanii jippinooɓe [ɗin koneeli].

36:29.t: (Halkeede maɓɓe) wonaani, si wonaa haacaango wooto, tawi ɓe laatii maayɓe-ɓutti.

36:30.t: Ee hayreede jiyaaɓe [fenunooɓe]! Nulaaɗo araali e ɓɓe, si wonaa ɓe waɗtayno mo jalnori.

36:31.t: E ɓee njiaani ɗuuɗii e gire ɗe Min kalki ado maɓɓe? Won'de ɓen ndttitotaako e maɓɓe.

36:32.t: Ɓe fof wonaani, si wanaa ko mooɓoyteeɓe ka amen.

36:33.t: Hino wonani ɓe Ma'ande: leydi yoorundi ndin, Min nuurniti ndi, Min njaltini gabbe e mayri, tawi ko e ɗen ɓe ñaamata.

36:34.t: Min mbaɗi e mayri gese tamarooje e inabuuje, Min ɓulni e mayri ɓulli(ceewle)

36:35.t: fii no ɓe ñaamira dimɗe mun ɗen e kon ko ɓe golliri juuɗe maɓɓe ɗen. E ɓe njettataa (Alla)?

36:36.t: Senaade woodanii takɗo nooneeji ɗin On fof: gila e ko leydi ndin fuɗinta kon, haa e woŋkiiji maɓɓe ɗin, e kon ko ɓe nganndaa!

36:37.t: Ma'ande goo kadi wonanii ɓe: e jemma on, Miɗen corta e makko ñalawma on, tawa ɓe ngontii e niwre.

36:38.t: E na'ange ngen, hinge doga haa e ñiiɓirde magge; ɗum ko eɓɓoore pooluɗo, gannduɗo On.

36:39.t: E lewru ndun, Min eɓɓani ndu jipporde, haa ndu waɗtinira wa baaŋal tamaro kiiɗngal.

36:40.t: Wonaa na'ange ngen woni ko haanini hewtitagol lewru ndun, wonaa jemma on woni ko aditotoo ñalaema on; kala majji non, ko e laawol mum woni dokde.

36:41.t: Ma'ande goo wonanii ɓe, won'de Min roondike geyngol maɓɓe ngol, ka laana hebbinaaka;

36:42.t: Min tagani ɓe sugu makko, ko ɓe mbaɗɗoo.

36:43.t: Si Miɗen njiɗuno, Min njoolayno ɓe; hara faabo alanaa ɓe, wanaa kadi ɓe daɗndeteeɓe,

36:44.t: si wonaa yurmeende immornde e amen, e dakmitagol haa e saanga.

36:45.t: Si ɓe mbi'anaama: "ndentee e kon ko woni yeeso mon e ɓaawo mon, mbelajo'o, on njurminte"...!

36:46.t: Aaya woo e aayeeje Joomi maɓɓe ɗen araali e maɓɓe, si wanaa ɓe ɗuurnooɗe.

36:47.t: Si ɓe mbianaama kadi: "Wintee(nafqe) e kon Alla arsiki on", yedduɓe ɓen mbi'ana gooŋɗinɓe ɓen: "E men ñamminay on tawɗo si Alla muuyuno, O ñamminayno mo? On ngonaani, si wanaa e ndeer majjere ɓanngunde".

36:48.t: Hiɓe mbi'a: "Ko holnde tuma woni ndee Fodoore, si on laatike gooŋɗuɓe?"

36:49.t: Ɓe habbaaki, si wonaa ha'acaango wooto, nanngayngo ɓe, hara hiɓe njeddondira.

36:50.t: Ɓe mbaawoytaa wasiyagol on tuma, wonaa ɓe ruttoytooɓe e yimɓe maɓɓe ɓen.

36:51.t: Wutte e alaandu, ɓe njaltira e genaale ɗen, ɓe keñora ka Joomi maɓɓe,

36:52.t: hiɓe mbi'a: "Ee bone amen! Ko hommbo immini men e genaale amen?" Ko ɗum woni ko Hinaranke On fodnoo; Nulaaɓe ɓe o gooŋɗini

36:53.t: (Ummital) ngal wonaano, si wanaa haacaango wo'oto, tawi ɓe fof ɓe ngaaddaama ka Amen.

36:54.t: Hannde non, woŋkii tooñirtaake hay hu'unde. On yoɓitirtaake, si wonaa kon ko ngollaynoɗon.

36:55.t: Yimɓe Aljanna ɓe hannde, pellet, heɓe e ndeer soklio, hiɓe neeminoo;

36:56.t: kamɓe e genndiraaɓe maɓɓe ɓen,e ley ɗowɗe, heɓe coɓɓindii e hoore danɗe.

36:57.t: Hino woodani ɓe toon, ɓiɗɓe leɗɗe, hino woodani kadi, ko ko ɓe noddata.

36:60.t: Mi ahodaano e mon, onon ɓiɗɓe Aadama, won'de wota on ndewu seytaane? Tawde pellet, ko o gaño mon ɓannguɗo,

36:61.t: [Mi yamiri on] kadi dewugol Kam. Ko ngol woni laawol pocciingol ngol.

36:62.t: Gooŋɗii o majjinii tagu ɗuuɗungu e mon. E on wonaano haqqilooɓe?

36:63.t: Ko ngee woni Jahannama, nge ngonnoɗon fodaneede ngen.

36:64.t: Naatiree nge hannde, sabu ko njeddiratnoɗon.

36:65.t: Hannde, Min notay e kunndule maɓɓe ɗen, juuɗe maɓɓe ɗen yewta Min, koyɗe maɓɓe ɗen kadi seeditoo e kon ko ɓe ngonnoo e paggitagol".

36:66.t: Si Min njiɗuno, Min mehayno gite maɓɓe ɗen, ɓe adondira e laawol ngol. Kono ko honno ɓe njiirata?

36:67.t: Si Min njɗuno kadi, Min montatno ɓe e nokku maɓɓe on; hara ɓe hattantaa feƴƴugol ɓe yiltotaako.

36:68.t: Kala mo Min njuutni nguurndam mum, Men njiltitay mo e tagoore. E ɓee haqqiltaa?

36:69.t: Min ngaanndinaali mo (kaŋko Muhammadu) gimɗi; ɗuum haananaa mo. [Deftere] nden wonaani, si wanaa jaŋtoore e janngeteende ɓanngunde,

36:70.t: fii yo o jeertin nde, on gonɗo guurɗo (ɓernde), Konngol lepte ngol jojja e he'eferɓe ɓen.

36:71.t: E ɓe yiaani, won'de Min tagiranii ɓe neemoraaɗi, e ko juuɗe Amen ngolli, hara heɓe njeyinooɗi;

36:72.t: Min eeltani ɓe ɗi: no e majji ɗi ɓe waɗɗotoo, no e majji ɗi ɓe ñaamata;

36:73.t: hino woodani ɓe toon, nafooje e njaram. E ɓee kan njettataa (Mo)?

36:74.t: Ɓe jogitorii ga Alla deweteeɗi, joortagol ɓe faabeedee.

36:75.t: Ɗi kattanaa paabagol ɓe; ko ɓe konu tawneteengu e majji.

36:76.t: Wota konngol maɓɓe sunine. Pellet, Miɗen nganndi ko ɓe cuuɗata e ko ɓe peññinta.

36:77.t: E neɗɗaŋke on yiaani, won'de Min tagirii mo e toɓɓere maniiyu? Kono tawaa mo ko o wennjoowo ɓannguɗo!

36:78.t: O fiyani Min yeru, kono o yejjiti tageede makko; o wi'i: "Ko hommbo wuurnitata ƴi'e ɗen, si ɗe ndappii?"

36:79.t: Maaku: "Ko guurnitoowo ɗe, ko takɗo ɗe on ka laawol aranol. Ko Kaŋko woni gannduɗo fii kala tagoore;

36:80.t: On mbɗanɗo on yiite, iwde e leɗɗe kecce, tawa ko e majje kuɓɓirton nge.

36:81.t: Kere takɗo kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin wonaani kaɗtanɗo tagugol yeru maɓɓe? Ɗuum ko pellet! Ko Kaŋko woni Ɗuuɗuɗo tageefo, gannduɗo.

36:82.t: Ganndon fiyaaku makko on, si o faandanike hu'unde, ko o wi'anat nde tan: "Laato", nde laatoo.

36:83.t: Senaare woodanii oon mo laamateeri kala hu'unde ngoni e juuɗe Mum! Ko ka makko rutteteɗon.

37:5.t: Jeyɗo kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin, e kon ko woni hakkunde ɗin ɗiɗi, Jeyɗo kadi puɗirɗe ɗen.

37:6.t: Min cuɗirii kammu (hikkii ngu) aduna ngun: cuɗaari koode ɗeen,

37:8.t: Ɗi kaɗtanaaka keɗitagol mbatu [Maleykaaji toowu ngu ngun; tawde hiɗi peroree e kala baŋŋe,

37:9.t: ka faɗagol (ɗi). Hino woodani ɗi kadi, lepte duumiiɗe.

37:10.t: Si wonaa ndun bifti ndu e majji, jilannde [haala], ndu rewnree hoodere tufatnde.

37:11.t: Laɓndo ɓe: si ko kamɓe ɓuri saɗtude takde kaa ko ɓen ɓe Min tagi? Min tagirii ɓe kamɓe, loopal narnungal.

37:12.t: Si ko woni, a haawi, heɓe njalnora!

37:14.t: si ɓe nji'ii ma'ande, ɓe njalkita,

37:15.t: ɓe mbii'a: "Ɗuum wonaani, si wonaa mbilewu ɓanngu ngu.

37:16.t: Eyoo si min maayii, min ngontii mbullaari e ƴi'e, haray ko min immintinoyteeɓe?"

37:17.t: Baabiraaɓe amin adinooɓe ɓeen kadi e minen?"

37:18.t: Maaku: "pellet! Hara le ko on hoynaaɓe".

37:19.t: Nganndon ɗum, ko wuttaandu wo'oturu pet, tawee jaka yoo, heɓe ndaara,

37:20.t: Ɓe mbi'a: Ee bone amen ! Ko ndee woni Ñaaande njoɓdi kuuɗe".

37:21.t: "Ko ndee woni Ñalaande ñaawoore, ko njeddatnoɗon fii mum".

37:22.t: Mooɓee tooñɓe ɓen, e nandadiiɓe maɓɓe ɓen, e kon ko ɓe ngonnoo e rewde,

37:23.t: ko woori Alla. Coggireeɓe ka laawol Jahiimi.

37:24.t: Ndarnon ɓe, tawde ko ɓe laɓnditeteeɓe".

37:26.t: Ko woni kamɓe ɓe hannde, ko ɓe jebbilii ɓe,

37:27.t: woɗɓe e maɓɓe peewtita ɓeya, ɓe laɓndondira;

37:28.t: ɓe mbi'a: "Ko onon ngoni ko ardiranaynoo men, ka ɓaŋŋe ñaamo".

37:29.t: (Koohooɓe) ɓen mbi'a: "Ko woni kon, on meeɗaano won'de gooŋɗinɓe.

37:30.t: Doole woo min ngalanaano on. Si ko woni, on ngonno yimɓe bewɓe.

37:31.t: Konngol Joomi men ngol, jojjii e min; pellet, ko en meeɗooɓe [lepte ɗen].

37:32.t: Min mbewinno on, tawde hay minen, ko min bewnooɓe".

37:33.t: Kamɓe on nden ñande, ko ɓe haawtoyteeɓe ka lepte.

37:34.t: Ko nii Minen Min ngollirtata bomɓe ɓen.

37:35.t: Kamɓe si ɓe mbi'anooma: "deweteeɗo alaa si wonaa Alla", ɓe mawnintinoo.

37:36.t: ɓe mbi'a: "Kere men ngaccitiray deweteeɗi amen ɗin, fii yimoowo kaangaaɗo?"

37:37.t: Si ko woni, (Nulaaɗo) on ko goonga ardi, o goongini nulaaɓe ɓen.

37:38.t: Pellet, ko on meeɗay ɓe lepte mu'usuuɗe ɗen.

37:39.t: On njoɓetetaake, si wonaa yeru kon ko ngollatnoɗon.

37:40.t: si wonaa jiyaaɓe Alla laɓɓinaaɓe ɓen,

37:41.t: hino woodani ɓen ɗoon, fanndaare ganndaandi:

37:44.t: e hoore danɗe, ko ɓe feewtondirɓe.

37:45.t: Hara kore heɗe mbannginii e maɓɓe, immorde e ɓulirde

37:47.t: mu'usuuɗe hoore alaa e majjam, wonaa ɗam ciwrinirteeɓe ɗam.

37:48.t: Hino woodani ɓe (toon): raɓɓuɓe ndaarɗe, yaaja giteeɓe,

37:50.t: Woɗɓe e maɓɓe peewtita ɓeya, ɓe laɓndondira.

37:51.t: Goɗɗo e maɓɓe wi'a: "Min miɗo marunoo gonndiijo,

37:52.t: wi'atnooɗo: "Kere ko a jiyaaɗo e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen?

37:53.t: Eyoo si en maayii, en wontii mbullaari e ƴi'e, tawa ko en yoɓitoyteeɓe?"

37:54.t: O wi'a: "Taw si ɗon njiɗi ƴeewde?"

37:55.t: O ƴeewa, o haynoo oya ka leri dulbunge,

37:56.t: o wi'a: "Mi wooɗndirii Alla ! A ɗeɓɓi fii no mi halkorde!

37:57.t: Si wonaano moƴƴere Joomi am nden, mi tawdeteno e [lepteteeɓe ɓeen].

37:59.t: si wonaa maayde men aranere nden, en wngonaani kadi lepteteeɓe?"

37:60.t: Pellet, ko ɗuum ɗoo woni maloore mawnude ndeen.

37:61.t: Ko fii sugu ɗuum ɗoo, woni yo gollooɓe ngollan.

37:62.t: Hara ko ɗuum ɓuri moƴƴude jipporde, kaa ko leggal "Zaqquumi" [ngal kaaɗugal]?

37:63.t: Min mbaɗii ngal jarrabuyee tooñɓe ɓen.

37:64.t: Ngal, ko leggal jaltatngal ka tummbere Dulbunge.

37:65.t: Dimɗe maggal, hono wa'i no ko'e seytanooji.

37:66.t: Kamɓe ɓe, pellet, ko e maggal ɓe ñaamirta, ɓe kebbinira ngal deedi maɓɓe.

37:67.t: Refti hino woodani ɓe e dow maggal, njaram patinaaɗam.

37:68.t: Refti ruttorde maɓɓe ndeen, ko ka Dulɓoowe.

37:69.t: Ɓe tawu baabiraaɓe maɓɓe ɓeen, ko majjunooɓe,

37:70.t: ɓe ngoni e yaccagol njokka baɗteeji maɓɓe.

37:71.t: Gooŋɗii, ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e adamɓe ɓen, majjiino, ado maɓɓe.

37:72.t: Gooŋɗii le, Min nuluno e maɓɓe, jeertinooɓe.

37:73.t: Kono ndaaru baɗtane ɓren jeertinanooɓe, no wa'anoo!

37:74.t: Si wonaa jiyaaɓe Alla, laɓɓinaaɓe ɓen.

37:75.t: Gooŋɗii Nuuhu nodduno Min, Min moƴƴii jaabotooɓe.

37:76.t: Min ndaɗni mo, kaŋko e yimɓe makko ɓeen, e suno mawnngo ngon,

37:77.t: Min mbɗi gelngol makko ngol, heddotooɓe ɓen.

37:78.t: Min ngaccani mo mantoore, e sakkitiiɓe ɓeen.

37:79.t: Kisal wonii e Nuuhu, e ndeer winndere nden.

37:80.t: Ko non woni ko Min mbarjorta moƴƴimɓe ɓen.

37:81.t: Kaŋko, ko o jeyanooɗo e jiyaaɓe Amen gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

37:82.t: Refti Min njooli heddii ɓe ɓeen.

37:83.t: Hino jeyanoo e jokkunooɓe mo ɓe Ibraahiima.

37:84.t: Tuma nde ardunoo e Joomi makko, e ɓernde hisnde.

37:85.t: Nde o maakannoo ben makko e yimɓe mum ɓeen: "Ko holɗum ndewoton?

37:86.t: E ko deweteeɗi pefindaaɗi, ko wanaa Alla, paalaɗon?

37:87.t: Ko cikkuɗon e Joomiraawo tagoore ngon?"

37:91.t: O mooltii e deweteeɗi maɓɓe ɗin, o maaki: "E on ñaamataa?

37:93.t: O naatnani, fiyirde ɗi ñaamo ngon.

37:94.t: Ɓe peewti e makko, hiɓe njaawno.

37:95.t: O maaki: "E on ndeway ko lesuɗon!,cehɗon).

37:96.t: hara le ko Alla tagi on, e ko ngolloton?"

37:97.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Mahanee mo mahdi, mbugoɗon mo ka dulɓayange".

37:98.t: Ɓe pa'andanii mo feere; kono Min mbɗi ɓe sooybe ɓen.

37:99.t: O maaki: "Min on, ko mi peroowo ka Joomi am, aray nde O feewnata kam.

37:102.t: Nde on yottinoo e makko jahal, [Ibraahiima] maaki: "Ko an ɓiɗɗo am, min mi yi'ii e ɗoyngol, won'de miɗo hirse. Ndaaru ko yi'iɗaa". [Ismaa'iila] maaki: "eey ma baaba'en, mbaɗee ko njamiraɗon kon, on tawoyay kam, si Alla jaɓii, jiyaaɗo e muñiiɓe ɓen".

37:103.t: Nde ɓe jebbilaninoo (yamiroore Alla nden), o hippiri mo tiinde nde,

37:104.t: Men noddiri mo wi'ide: "eey ma yo Ibraahiima !

37:105.t: Pellet, a gooŋɗiinii koyɗol ngol. Ko Minen Min njoɓirte moƴƴinooɓe ɓeen".

37:106.t: Pellet, ko ɗuum ɗoo woni jarrabuyee ɓannguɗo oon.

37:108.t: Min ngaccani mo mantoore, e sakkitiiɓe ɓen.

37:110.t: Ko wano nii Min njoɓirta moƴƴinooɓe ɓeen.

37:111.t: Kaŋko, ko o jiyaaɗo e jiyaaɓe Amen gooɗinɓe ɓen.

37:112.t: Min mbeltiniri Ishaaqa, Annabaajo jiyaaɗo e moƴƴuɓe ɓen.

37:113.t: Min kebbini barki e makko e Ishaaqa. Hino e geñngol maɓɓe ngol: moƴƴinɗo, e tooñuɗo hoore-mun ɓanngini.

37:114.t: Gooŋɗii Min moƴƴike e dow Muusaa e Haaruuna,

37:115.t: Min ndaɗni ɓe, kamɓe e yimɓe maɓɓe ɓeen, e ngoƴo mawnungo,

37:116.t: Min mballi ɓe, ɓe ngoni foolɓe ɓen.

37:117.t: Min ngokki ɓe deftere ɓannginnde ndeen.

37:118.t: Min peewniri ɓe, e laawol pocciingol ngol.

37:119.t: Min ngaccani ɓe mantoore, e sakkitiiɓe ɓeen.

37:120.t: "Kisal woni e dow Muusaa yo Haaruuna".

37:121.t: Ko wano nii Min noɓitirta moƴƴimɓe ɓen.

37:122.t: Kamɓe ɗiɗo, ko ɓe jiyanooɓe e jiyaaɓe Amen gooɗiinɓe ɓen.

37:123.t: Pellet, Ilyaasa kadi, ko jeyanooɗo e Nulaaɓe ɓeen.

37:124.t: Jaŋto nde o maakannoo yimɓe makko ɓen: "E on kulataa [Alla]?

37:125.t: E ko "Ba'ala" ndewoton, ngaccon ɓurɗo moƴƴude tagoore nde?

37:126.t: Woni Alla, Jeyɗo on, Jeyi baabiraaɓe mon adinooɓe ɓeen?"

37:127.t: Ɓe njeddii mo, awa non, ko ɓe tawnoyteeɓe (ka lepte).

37:128.t: Si wonaa jiyaaɓe Alla laɓɓinaaɓe ɓeen.

37:129.t: Min ngaccani mo mantoore, e sakkitiiɓe ɓen.

37:131.t: Ko wano nii Min njoɓirta moƴƴimɓe ɓeen.

37:132.t: Kaŋko, ko o jeyanooɗo e jiyaaɓe Amen gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

37:133.t: Pellet, Luutu kadi, ko jiyanooɗo e Nulaaɓe ɓeen.

37:134.t: Jaŋto nde Min ndaɗndunoo mo, kaŋko e ɓeynguure makko nden fof,

37:135.t: si wonaa nayeeja debba, tawaaɗo e luttunooɓe ɓeen,

37:136.t: refti Min oƴƴi heddii ɓe ɓeen.

37:137.t: Onon non, hoɗon ndewa e hoore-maɓɓe, dawol mon.

37:139.t: Pellet, Yuunusa kadi, ko jiyanooɗo e Nulaaɓe ɓeen.

37:140.t: Jaŋto nde o dogirnoo ka laana hebbinaaka,

37:141.t: o urbinii, o jiyaa e foolaaɓe ɓeen.

37:142.t: Liinngii ngii moɗi mo, ko o pelniiɗo.

37:143.t: Si wonaano tawde homo jeyanoo e subbunhinotooɓe ɓen,

37:144.t: o ñiiɓayno e reedu maggii, ha ñalnde ummintinoytee.

37:145.t: Min mberlii mo ka ladde, ko o ñawnɗo.

37:146.t: Min puɗini e mayre, leggal buudi.

37:147.t: Min nuli mo e ujune teemeder yimɓe, maa ko ɓuri.

37:148.t: Ɓe ngooŋɗini, Min ndakmiti ɓe haa e dumunna.

37:149.t: Laɓndii ɓe:" E ko Joomi maa woodanta ɓiɓɓe rewɓe, kamɓe kan worɓe?

37:150.t: Kaa Min tagir Maley'ikaaaji dewwɗinaaɗi, hara ko ɓe seediiɓe?"

37:151.t: Paamee, kamɓe e pepindaale maɓɓe ɗen, hiɓe mbi'a:

37:153.t: Hara O cuɓay ɓiɓɓe rewɓe ɓen e dow worɓe ɓen?

37:154.t: Ko heɓi on, si ɗon ñaawira noon?

37:157.t: Haray ngaddee deftere mon nden, si wonii ko on gooŋɗuɓe!".

37:158.t: Ɓe mbaɗi hakkunde makko e Maleykaaji, asko; hara non, Maleykaaji no nganndi, ɓen ko tawnoyteeɓe (ka lepte).

37:159.t: Senaare woodani Allah, e ko ɓe cifotoo!

37:160.t: Si wonaa jiyaaɓe Allah laɓɓinaaɓe ɓen.

37:161.t: Nganndon onon e ko ndewoton kon,

37:163.t: si wonaa tawɗo on ko naatoowo ka Dulɓaynge.

37:164.t: [Maleykaaji mbi'i'i]: "Alaa e amen, mo alanaa ɗum, darorɗe ganndaande;

37:165.t: Ko minen ngoni oni saffinaaɓe ɓeen;

37:166.t: Ko minen kadi ngoni subbunhinotooɓe ɓen.

37:168.t: "Hara deftere iwnde e adinooɓe ɓeen, no woodannoo min,

37:170.t: Ɓe njeddi nde, kono aray ɓe nganndoya !

37:171.t: Gooŋɗii Konngol Amen ardinoke, fii jiyaaɓe Amen, Nulaaɓe ɓen,

37:172.t: won'de pellet, ko kamɓe ngoni walleteeɓe ɓen,

37:173.t: e won'de ko konu Amen ngun, woni foolooɓe ɓen.

37:176.t: E hara ko lepte amen men ɗen ɓe keñorta?

37:177.t: Si ɗe njippike ka tannde (dingiral)maɓɓe, haray bimmbi waajonooɓe ɓeen bonii !

37:180.t: Senaare woodanii Joomi maa, Jeyɗo teddungal, e ko ɓe cifotoo !

37:182.t: Jettooje ngoodani Allah, Jeyɗo winndere nden!

38:1.t: Saad. Mi wooɗndirii Alqur'aana, jom waa.

38:2.t: Si ko woni, yedduɓe ɓe ngonii e townitaare e lurral !

38:3.t: Ɗuuɗii e gire ɗen Min kalki, ado maɓɓe, ɓe noddi faabo, kono tawi ko bonatno bonii.

38:4.t: Ɓe ŋalɗi, nde jeertinoowo jiyaaɗo e maɓɓe, arata ɓe. Yedduɓe ɓen mbi'i: "Oo, ko bileejo keewuɗo fenaande,

38:5.t: Kere o waɗay deweteeɗi ɗin, deweteeɗo gooto? Pellet, ɗum ko hu'unde haawniinde non".

38:6.t: Mbatu maɓɓe ngun huccitiri wiide: "Yehee, tabiton e deweteeɗi mon ɗin. Ɗuum ɗoo, ko hu'unde eɓɓanaande.

38:7.t: Min nanaali fii ɗum, e diina sakkitiika kan. Ɗum wonaani, si wonaa ko fefkindaa.

38:8.t: Kere ko e makko Jaŋtoore nden jippotoo hakkunde amen?" Si ko woni, ɓe ngonii e cikkitagol Jantoore am nden. Wurin, ko fii ɓe meeɗaali taho, lepte am ɗen!

38:9.t: Kaa ɓe njogiti ngaluuji yurmeende Joomi maa, pooluɗo, Dokko O?

38:10.t: Kaa ko kamɓe woodani laamagol kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin e ko woni hakkunde majji? Haray yo ɓe ƴeenŋu ɓe ƴawa!

38:11.t: Ko ɓe konu hoyngu no, foolet e 'peɗle ɗen!

38:12.t: Ado maɓɓe, yimɓe Nuuhu ɓen njedduno, e Aadi'en e Fir'awna jom-peme,

38:13.t: e Samuuda'en, e yimɓe Luutu ɓe, e yimɓe pitaaji ɓen; ko ɓeen ngoni fedde (fennuɓe) ɓeen.

38:14.t: Kala ɓee wonaani, si wonaa o njeddi ii Nulaaɓe ɓen. Lepte Am ɗen jojji e maɓɓe!

38:15.t: Ɓee cabbaaki, si wonaa ha'acaango gooto, ngo alaa ruttorde.

38:16.t: Ɓe mbii': "Joomi amen, yaccinan min geɗal lepte amen, ado Ñalaande hasboore nden".

38:17.t: Muñño e kon ko ɓe mbi'ata; annditaa jiyaaɗo Amen on, Daawuuda, joom doole. Ko o ɗuuɗunooɗo tuubugol.

38:18.t: Min eeltii pelle ɗen, hiɗe cubbunhinoda e makko, ka kiikiiɗe e ka bimmbi.

38:19.t: e colli ɗin, hiɗi mooɓindiraa, kala e majji no tuubana mo.

38:20.t: Min cemmbini laamu makko ngun, Min yeɗi mo Annabaaku e fasinteegal.

38:21.t: Hara kumpital wenooɓe ɓen arii maa, nde ɓe ƴawunoo ka ganngunal !

38:22.t: Nde ɓe naatunoo ka Daawuuda, o ɗenƴii ɓe. Ɓe mbi'i: "Wota a hul ! Ko wennjuɓe ɗiɗo; goɗɗo e amen tooñii oya. Ñaawir goonga hakkunde amen, wota a tooñ, tinndinaa min e laawol Pocciingol ngol.

38:23.t: Oo ko musiɗɗo am: homo jogii baali cappanɗe jeenay e jeenay, miin miɗo jogii baalii gootii. O wi'i: "Henndinam ngii"; o foolimi e yeewtere.

38:24.t: O maaki: "Pellet, o tooñirii ma laɓndagol baalii maa ngii, waɗtugol e baali makko ɗin". Ɗuuɗii ko hawtuɓe tooñindirta hakkunde maɓɓe, si wonaa ɓen gooŋɗiinɓe, ɓe ngolli moƴƴuɗi - ɓen non no fanɗi. - Daawuuda felliti, won'de Min njarribike mo. O imsinanii Joomi makko, o suuyiri sujjugol, o tuubi.

38:25.t: Min njaafanii mo ɗum. Pellet non, hino woodani mo ko amen, ɓadal e moƴƴude ruttorde.

38:26.t: Eey ma Daawuuda, Min mbaɗii ma lomto ka leydi. Ñaawir goonga hakkunde yimɓe ɓen, wota a jokku mbeleeɗe, sakko ɗe majjine e laawol Allah ngol". Pellet, ɓen majjooɓe e laawol Allah ngol, hino woodani ɓe lepte tiiɗuɗe, sabu ko ɓe yejjitiri kon, Ñalaande hasboore nden.

38:27.t: Min tagiraali kammu ngun e leydi ndin e ko woni hakkunde majji kon, meere. Ɗum ko sikke yedduɓe ɓen. Bone woodanii ɓen yedduɓe, e Yiite ngeen!

38:28.t: Ka Min mbɗay ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli moƴƴi, wano bonnooɓe ɓen ka hoore leydi? Kaa Min mbaɗay gooŋɗuɓe ɓen, wano faajireeɓe ɓeen?

38:29.t: Ko deftere barkinaande, woni ko Min njippini e maaɗa, fii no ɓe taskora aayeeje mayre, e ko joomiraaɓe haqqille ɓen mbaajitora.

38:30.t: Min njeɗi Daawuuda Sulaymaana, - jiyaaɗo moƴƴo - Ko o ɗuuɗuɗo tuubugol-ruttoo.

38:31.t: Jaŋto nde o hollanoo kiikiiɗe, pucci yooɗuɗi yaawuɗi,

38:32.t: o maaki: "Min ɓurnorii joɗgol jawdi, dii ko mi jaŋtotoo Joomi am kon, haa [na'ange] ngen mutoyii.

38:33.t: Nduttee kam ɗi". O woni e sodugol ɗi ka taape e ka daaɗe.

38:34.t: Gooɗii Min njarribike Sulaymaana, Min mbernii e jullere makko nden ɓanndu. refti o tuubi.

38:35.t: O maaki: "Joomi am, haforanam, yeɗaa kam laamu, ngu heertantaako goɗɗo goo, ɓaawo am. Pellet, ko an woni jeɗoowo On".

38:36.t: Min eeltani mo henndu ndun, tawi hindu wifira e sago makko, neweende, nokku kala to o yiɗi.

38:37.t: E seytanuuji ɗiin, mahaynooɗi e mutaynooɗi.

38:38.t: Goɗɗi ɗi, ko dummbaaɗi e peŋɗe.

38:39.t: "Ɗuum ko dokkal Amen. Okkitir, maa njogitoraa ko aldaa e laɓnditoreede".

38:40.t: Ko pellet, hino woodani mo ka amen, ɓadal e moƴƴude ruttorde.

38:41.t: Jaŋto kadi jiyaaɗo Amen on Ayyuuba, nde o noddunoo Joomi makko, won'de : "Seytaane memirii lam tampere e muuseendi".

38:42.t: [Allah wi'ani mo]: "Latir tunndawal maa ngal [ka leydi]: Ɗam ɗoo, ko lootorɗam, ɓuuɓɗam e njaram".

38:43.t: Min njeɗi mo ɓeynguure makko nden, e yeru maɓɓe tawti ɓe, yurmeende immorde e amen, e waaju wonan'de marɓe haqqille ɓen.

38:44.t: "Nanngir sookewo maa ngon, tamere huɗo, piyiraa ɗum [cuddiiɗo maa on], fii wata a firtu (woondoore nden)". Min tawu mo, muññiiɗo. O moƴƴii jiyaaɗo. Pellet, ko o ɗuuɗuɗo tuubugol-ruttoo.

38:45.t: Jaŋto kadi, jiyaaɓe Amen ɓen, Ibraahiima e Ishaaqa e Yaaquuba, joomiraaɓe semmbe e yi'anɗe.

38:46.t: Min keertinanii ɓe heertinannde, annditugol galle (laakara) ɗen.

38:47.t: E kadi ɓee ka amen, ko jiyaaɓe e suɓaaɓe moƴƴuɓe suɓaaɓe.

38:48.t: Jaŋto kadi Ismaa'iila, e Yuusa'u, e Zal-Kifli, kala maɓɓe, ko jiyaaɓe e suɓaaɓe.

38:49.t: Ɗum ko waaju. Ko pellet, hino woodani gooŋɗuɓe ɓen, ruttorde moƴƴunde.

38:50.t: Ɗuum ko Aljannaaji ñiiɓal, ɗi ɓe udditanaa dame mum,

38:51.t: hara ko ɓe soɓɓindii ɓe ton, heɓe nodda ton muuyanteeɗi ɗuuɗuɗi e njaram.

38:52.t: Hino woodani ɓe (ton): raɓɓuɓe ndaarɗe, goreeɓe.

38:53.t: Ko ɗum woni ko podaɗon, fii Ñalaande hasboore ndeen.

38:54.t: Pellet, ɗum ko arsike amen, gasugol alanaa mo.

38:55.t: Ɗuum, [ko njoɓdi maɓɓe]. Pellet, hino woodani kadi bewɓe ɓeen, ko ɓuri bonnde e ruttorde,

38:56.t: woni Jahannama, nge ɓe naatoyta. Nge bonii ndaɗɗudi!

38:57.t: Ɗuum, ko yo ɓe meeɗ: ko fatata, e ƴiƴƴiri,

38:58.t: Woɓɓe ɓen, nannduɗe e majje, ko nooneeji.

38:59.t: E hino dental naatiroyat ngal doole e mon, toolii alanaa ɓe; tawde ko ɓe naatooɓe Yiite !

38:60.t: Ɓeen mbia: bismilla alanaa mon, ko onon ndefi min ɗum". Nge bonii ñiiɓirde.

38:61.t: Ɓe mbi'a: "Joomi amen, defuɗo min ɗuim on, ɓeydan mo leptte cowalle ka Yiite".

38:62.t: Ɓeya mbi'i: "Ko haɗi men jiugol worɓe, ɓe min limtaynoo e boonɓe ɓen?

38:63.t: Hara min njogitorno ɓe toon jalnori, kaa ko gite (amen) yawti ɓe?"

38:64.t: Pellet, ka goonga, ko ɗuum woni yeddondiral yimɓe Yiite ɓeen.

38:65.t: Maaku: "Anndee ko mi jeertinoowo. Deweteeɗo woo alaa, si wonaa Allah Gooto, pooluɗo On,

38:66.t: Jeyɗo kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin, e kon ko woni hakkunde ɗin ɗiɗi, pooluɗo, kaforoowo On".

38:67.t: Maaku: "(ndee Alqur'aanaare), ko nde kabaaru mawɗo,

38:69.t: Ganndal alanaano kam, e fii mbatu ngun dowrowu, tuma nde ɓe weeñidaynoo.

38:70.t: Wahayinaaka e am, si wanaa won'de min on, ko mi jeertinoowo ɓanngina".

38:71.t: Jaŋto nde Joomi maa daalannoo Malaa'ika'en: "Min mi tagiroowo ɓanndiŋke, immorde loopal.

38:72.t: si mi fotindirii mo, Mi wuttii e makko ruuhu am on, haray suuyanee mo cujjon".

38:74.t: si wonaa Ibuliisa, o mawnintinii, o woni jiyaaɗo e yedduɓe ɓen.

38:75.t: (Allah) daali: "eey ma yo Ibuliisa, ko haɗu maa sujjangol ko Mi tagiri juuɗe am? A mawnintini kaa a jeya e townitiiɓe ɓeen?"

38:76.t: O wi'i: "Ko min ɓuri mo moƴƴude. A tagirii lam e yiite, A tagirii mo kaŋko e loopal".

38:77.t: O daali: "Yaltu ton, aan, ko a diiwaaɗo;

38:78.t: pellet, kuddi sm ndin fawike ma haa Ñande njoɓdi diina".

38:79.t: (Ibuliisa) wi'i : "Joomi am, neeɓnitanam, haa ñande nde ɓe immintintee".

38:80.t: O daali: "A jeyaama e neeɓnitanteeɓe ɓen,

38:82.t: O wi'i: "Mi wooɗndirii mawngu maa ngun ! Ma mi bewnuɓe fof maɓɓe,

38:83.t: si wonaa jiyaaɓe Maa, laɓɓinaaɓe ɓen e maɓɓe".

38:84.t: (Allah) daali: "Mi wooɗndirii goonga, ko goonga mi wowlata,

38:85.t: ma Mi hebbinire Jahannama, e ɓen jokkuɓe ma fof e maɓɓe".

38:86.t: Maaku: "Mi laɓndaaki on njoɓdi e fii ɗum; mi wonaali jeyaaɗo e sincooɓe(deftatoobe).

38:87.t: Ndee [Alqur’aanaare] wonaani, si wonaa waaju tageefo ngon.

38:88.t: Ma on nganndu (fii) kabaaru mayre, ko neeɓaa !".

39:1.t: Jippagol deftere nden, ko immorde ka Allah, pooluɗo, ñeeño oon.

39:2.t: Min njippiniirii deftere nden e maaɗa, e hoore goonga. rewu allah, laɓɓinanaa mo diina ka.

39:3.t: Ngaanndee, ko Allah woodani diina laaɓuka kan. Ɓeen non ɓe ɓeya nogitori yiɗɓe ga makko (hara hiɓe wi'a): "Min ngaalaa rewirde ɗi, si wonaa tun no ɗi ɓannira min ka Allah, ɓadal". Pellet, Allah Ñaawoyat hakkunde maɓɓe, e kon ko ɓe woni lurrude e mun. Pellet, Allah feewnata on gonɗo fewnoowo, ɗuuɗuɗo jeddugol.

39:4.t: Sinno Allah yiɗno, nde o siforta ɓiɗɗo, O suɓayno ko o yiɗi woo, e ko o tagi kon. Senaare woodanii mo ! Ko Kaŋko woni Allah, Bajjo, pooluɗo on.

39:5.t: O tagirii kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndin, goonga.Homo suddira jemma on ñalaema oon, O suddira ñalawma on jemma on. O eelti na'ange ngen e lewru ndun, kala majji no doga haa e lajal taƴaangal. Nganndee, ko Kaŋko woni pooluɗo, kaforoowo On.

39:6.t: O tagii on e fittaandu wooturu, refi Owaɗi e ndun, genndo mayru. O jippinani on e neemoraaɗi ɗin, nooneeji jeetati. Homo taga on ka teege yumma mon en, tagu ɓaawo tagu, e ndeer niɓe tati. Ko On mooɗon Allah, woni Joomi mon ! Ko Kaŋko laamu woodani. Deweteeɗo alaa, si wonaa Allah. Ko honno perlitoraɗon [e dewugol Mo]?

39:7.t: Si on njeddii, anndon Allah, ko jondiniiɗo e mon. O jaɓantaa jiyaaɓe makko ɓeen, ke'eferaaku. Si on njettii Mo noon, O weltanoo on ɗuum.Hay gooto roondantaako goɗɗo woo donngal mum. Refti ko ka Joomi mon, woni ruttorde mon; O yeetitoo on, fii kon ko gollatnoɗon. Pellet, ko O gannduɗo, ko woni e ɓerɗe.

39:8.t: Si loraa memii neɗɗo on, o noddira Joomi makko, ruttagol e makko. Refti si O okkii mo moƴƴere, immorde ka makko, o yejjita ko o noddatno kon ado ɗuum, o waɗana Allah kafidiiɗi, fii no o majjinira (yimɓe ɓeen) e laawol makko ngol. MaAku: "Dakmitor keeferaaku maa ngun, seeɗa. Pellet, ko a jiyaaɗo e yimɓe Yiite ɓeen".

39:9.t: Kaa ko on yankinotooɗo tummbo jemma, ko o cujjoowo, darotooɗo (naafe), hara homo La'akara, homo joortii yurmeende Joomi makko nden... Maaku: "Hara annduɓe ɓen fotay e ɓe nganndaa ɓen?" Anndu ko waajitotoo, ko joomiraaɓe haqqille ɓeen.

39:10.t: Maaku: "eey mon yo jiyaaɓe Am gooŋɗinɓe, kulee Joomi mon". Hino woodani moƴƴimɓe (golle) ɓen e oo aduna, mbarjaari. Leydi Allah ndin ko yaajundi. Nganndee muññiiɓe ɓeen timminirante njoɓdi maɓɓe ndin, ko aldaa e limoore.

39:11.t: Maaku: "Miin mi yamiraama dewugol Allah, laɓɓinana mo diina kan,

39:12.t: Mi yamiraa kadi, gongol arano e jebbiliiɓe ɓeen".

39:13.t: Maaku : "Miin miɗo huli, si mi yeddii Joomi am, lepte Ñalaande Mawnde".

39:14.t: Maaku: "Ko Allah mi rewata, mi laɓɓinan mo diina am.

39:15.t: ndewee ko njiɗuɗon onon, hara wonaa Kaŋko. Maaku: "Ko woni hayruɓe ɓen, ko ɓeen ɓe tawata Ñande Darngal, ɓe hayrinii ko'e maɓɓe, e ɓeynguureeji maɓɓe". Nganndee ko nden woni hayrere ɓanngunde ndeen.

39:16.t: Hino woodirani ɓe seŋgo dow maɓɓe, kippoodi Yiite, e kippoodi senngo ley maɓɓe. Ko ɗum woni ko Allah hulɓinirta jeyaaɓe Makko ɓen. Ko onon yo jiyaaɓe Am, kori kulee Kam!

39:17.t: Ɓeen woɗɗitorɓe rewugol bewnooji ɗi, ɓe nduttii e Allah, welo-welo no woodani ɓe. Wewlinir jiyaaɓe am ɓeen,

39:18.t: nanooɓe Konngol ɓeen, ɓe njokka ko ɓuri moƴƴude e maggol. Ko ɓeen woni ɓe Allah feewni ɓen, ko ɓen ngoni joomiraaɓe haqqille ɓeen.

39:19.t: E ko on mo konngol lepte jojji e mum... E ko aan daɗndata gonɗo ka Yiite?

39:20.t: Si ko ɓen hulɓe Joomi mun, hino woodani ɓe kuɓeeje [ka Aljanna] e kuɓeeje mahaaɗe dow majje, hara canɗi no ila ley majje. Ko fodoore Allah ! Allah non firtataa fodoore.

39:21.t: E a yiaani, won'de Allah saaƴinirii ndiyam ka kammu, o naadi ɗam e ndeer ɓulli ka leydi; refti o yaltinira ɗam remuru seedundu noone, refti ndu ɗayɗa, yi'aa hindu soyɗi; refti O waɗa ɗum ko muncaa. Pellet, wonii e ɗuum, waaju, wonan'de joomiraaɓe haqqille ɓeen.

39:22.t: E ko on mo Allah yaññani ɓendre mum nden, fii lislaamu, hara homo e ndaygu immorde ka Joomi makko... Bone woodanii ɓen yooruɓe ɓerɗe mum, e jantagol Allah. Ɓeen ngonii e majjere ɓanngunde.

39:23.t: Allah jippinii ko ɓuri moƴƴude e yeewtere, deftere nanndunde [ñaawooje], ɗimmitunde. Nde guri ɓen hulooɓe Joomi muyn riɓirta (nanugol nde), refti guri e ɓerɗe maɓɓe deeƴira jaŋtoore Allah nden. Ko ɗuum woni peewal Allah ngal O feewnira on mo muuyani. Kala non mo Allah majjini, haray peewnoowo mo alaa.

39:24.t: E ko on reentariiɗo yeeso mun ngon, e lepte bonɗe ɗen Ñande Darngal... Tooñuɓe ɓen mbi'anee on tuma: "Meeɗee kon ko ngonnoɗon faggitanaade".

39:25.t: Adinooɓe ɓen njeddiino, lepte ɗeen ardirani ɓe, ka ɓe tinaani.

39:26.t: Allah meeɗiniri ɓe koyeera, ka nguurndam aduna. Pellet non, ko lepte La'akara ɗen noon, ɓuri mawnude, si tawno heɓe nganndunoo!

39:27.t: Gooɗii Min piyanii yimɓe ɓeen, e ndee Alqur'aanaare, kala misal, mbelejo'o, ɓe mbaajitora.

39:28.t: Alqur'aanaare (janngeteende) e haala aarabi, nde aldaa e ooñaare, fii no ɓe ngooŋɗira.

39:29.t: Allah waɗii yeru, gorko mo lurruɓe hawti ɗum, heɓe pooɗondira mo, e gorko laaɓanɗo gorko [goo]: Hara ɓen ɗiɗo fotay e misal? Yettoore woodanii Allah! Kono ɓurɓe ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe, ɓe nganndaa.

39:30.t: Pellet, aan ko a maayoowo, kamɓe kadi ko ɓe maayooɓe;

39:31.t: refti onon, Ñande Darngal, ko to Joomi mon, njeddondiroyton.

39:32.t: E ko hommbo ɓuri tooñde wa on jedduɗo ɗo e hoore Allah, maa o yeddi goonga kan nde ko arunoo e makko? E wonaa Jahannama woni jaaƴorde yedduɓe ɓeen?

39:33.t: Oon noon garduɗo e goonga, o goongini ɗuum, ko ɓen ngoni gooŋɗuɓe ɓeen.

39:34.t: Hino woodani kala ko ɓe paaletee, ka Joomi maɓɓe; ko ɗuum njoɓdi moƴƴinooɓe ɓeen.

39:35.t: fii no Allah yaawtirana ɓe, ko ɓuri bon'de e ko ɓe golli kon, O yoɓitira ɓe njoɓdi maɓɓe ndiin, ko ɓuri moƴƴude e ko ɓe ngollaynoo kon.

39:36.t: Allah siforaali yonugol jiyaaɗo makko on? Heɓe kulɓinire ɗin ɗi wonaa mo. Kala mo Allah majjini, haray Feewnoowo alanaa mo.

39:37.t: Kala non mo Allah feewni, majjinoowo mo alaa. Allah siforaali won'de pooluɗo, Jom lepte?

39:38.t: Pellet, si a laɓndike ɓe: "Ko hommbo tagi kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin?", ma ɓe mbi'u: "Ko Allah". Maaku: "Yeewtee kam fii ɗin ɗi ndewoton ga Allah, si Allah faandanike lam lorra, hara ɗi huncanay kam lorra makko kan? Maa si o faandanike lam yurmeende, taw si ɗi haɗay kam yurmeende makko nden? Maaku: "Allah yonii kam, ko e makko hoolnotooɓe ɓen tuuginotoo".

39:39.t: Maaku: "eey mon yimɓe am, ngollee e laawol mon, min ko e [laawol am] mi ngollirta. Aray ka nganndon.

39:40.t: ko hommbo lepte koynayɗe ngaroyat e muuɗum, lepte duumiiɗe njippoo e makko.

39:41.t: Min njippinirii deftere nden e maaɗa, fii yimɓe ɓeen, e hoore goonga. Kala peewuɗo, ko hoore makko [o feewani]; kala kadi majjuɗo, ko hoore makko o majjani. A wonaani wakiil e dow maɓɓe.

39:42.t: Allah homo ƴettita pittaali ɗin, saanga maayde majji, e ɗin ɗi maayaani, ka ɗoyngol majji. O jogitoo ɗiin ɗi ñaawani maayde, O accita ɗiya, haa e lajal taƴaangal. Pellet, Ma'andeeji ngoni e ɗuum, wona nde yimɓe miijitotooɓe.

39:43.t: Kaa ɓe njogiti tefooji, ga Allah? Maaku: "Hay si tawii ɗi jiyaa hu'unde, ɗi haqqiltaa kadi?"

39:44.t: Maaku: "Tefoore nden fow, ko Allah heeranii. Ko Kaŋko woodani laamagol kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndin. refti ko ka makko ndutteteɗon".

39:45.t: Si fii Allah tun jaŋtaama, ɓerɓe ɓen ɓe ngooŋɗinaa La'akara ɓen, tamoo. Si fii ɗiya, ɗi wonaa Mo [Kaŋko Allah] jaŋtaama, e jaka yoo, heɓe wewla.

39:46.t: Maaku: "Yaa Allah, puɗɗuɗo kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndin, gannduɗo birniiɗi e peeñɗi, ko Aan ñaawata hakkunde jiyaaɓe Maa ɓeen, ko ɓe luutondiraynoo e mum".

39:47.t: Si tawno no woodanno tooñɓe ɓeen, ko woni kon ka leydi fow, e yeru mum, wond'ude e mum, ɓe sottorayno ɗum, bone lepte ɗen, Ñande Darngal; feeñirana ɓe ka Allah, kon ko ɓe tijjanooki.

39:48.t: boneeji ɗi ɓe paggitinoo ɗin peñana ɓe, ko ɓe njalkitaynoo kon huuɓita ɓe.

39:49.t: Si lorra heɓii neɗɗo on, o nodda Min. Refti si Min ngokkii mo neema, immorde ka amen, o wi'a: "nganndee ko e ganndal [am] mi okkiira ɗum". Ɗuum ko jarrabuyee kan; kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe, ɓe anndaa.

39:50.t: Gooŋɗii ɓeen adinooɓe ɓe mbi'iino ɗum. Kono kon ko ɓe paggitotonoo, nafaani ɓe.

39:51.t: boneeji ɗi ɓe paggitotonoo ɗiin memi ɓe. Tooñɓe ɓeen e maɓɓe, kon ko ɓe wonnoo e paggitagol, memoyat ɓe, ɓe wonaani laawotooɓe.

39:52.t: E ɓe nganndaa won'de Allah no yaññana arsike on mo o muuyani, O ɓillina [mo o muuyani]? Pellet, Ma'andeeji ngonii e ɗum, wona nde yimɓe gooŋɗinooɓe.

39:53.t: Maaku: eey mon yo jiyaaɓe Am fantimɓe e hoore mum, wota on taƴo yurmeende Allah nden. Pellet, Allah ko kaforoowo junubaajo ɗin fof. Ko Kaŋko woni kaforoowo, jurmotooɗo On".

39:54.t: Tuubee nduttoɗon ka Joomi mon, jebbilanoɗon mo, ado lepte ɗen arde e mon, hara on paabetaake.

39:55.t: Njokkee ko ɓuri moƴƴude e ko jippinaa e mon, immorde ka Joomi, ado lepte ɗen ado de on, juhal, hara on so'aa anndude.

39:56.t: fii wota woŋkii wi'oy: "Ee nimse am, e ko mi welsindii e fii Allah. Pellet, mi jeyano e ɓeen jalkitooɓe".

39:57.t: maa ki wi'a: "Si Alah feewnuno kam, mi wonanyno jiyaaɗo e gooŋɗuɓe ɓen".

39:58.t: Maa ki wi'a, tuma ki yi'ata lepte ɗen: "Si fehre ruttagol no woodannoo kam, mi jeyee e moƴƴinooɓe ɓeen".

39:59.t: "Gasataa ! Tawde aayeeje Am ɗen aruno e maaɗa, njedduɗaa ɗe, mawnintiniɗaa, laatiɗaa jiyaaɗo e yedduɓe ɓeen".

39:60.t: Ñande Darngal, a yi'oya fennonooɓe e hoore Allah ɓen, hino ɓawli je'ece. Wonaa ka Jahannama woni jaaƴorde mawnintiniiɓe ɓeen?

39:61.t: Allah na daɗndira gooŋɗuɓe ɓeen, sabu maloore maɓɓe nden. Bone memataa ɓeen, wonaa kamɓe ngoni sunoytooɓe.

39:62.t: Ko Allah woni Takɗo kala hu'unde, ko Kaŋko kadi woni pawtiiɗo kala hu'unde.

39:63.t: Ko Kaŋko sottirɗe kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin woodani. Yedduɓe aayeeje Allah ɓeen non, ko ɓen ngoni hayruɓe(pertuɓe) ɓen.

39:64.t: Maaku: "E ko woori Allah, njamirton mi, yo mi rew, onon ɓee majjuɓe?"

39:65.t: Gooŋɗii wahayinaama e maaɗa, e ɓen adinooɓe ma: "Si a sirkii, pellet, golle maa ɗeen bonay njeyiɗaa e hayruɓe ɓeen.

39:66.t: Alah rew Allah, njeyeɗaa e yettooɓe (Mo) ɓen.

39:67.t: Ɓe mawniniraani Allah, no O foti maninireede, hara le, leydi ndin fof, ko tamannde makko, Ñande Darngal, kammuuji ɗin kadi taggiree ñaamo makko. Senayee woodanii Mo ! O toowii e kon ko ɓe cirkanta mo.

39:68.t: Wuttee ka Allaandu, kala ko woni ka kammuuji e ka leydi kon faɗɗee, si wonaa ɓen ɓe Allah muuyani [daɗugol]. refti wuttee e mayru ɗiɗaɓol, tawa ko ɓe dariiɓe cabbitii.

39:69.t: Leydi ndin jalbira ndaygo Jeydo ndi On; taalkuru nduun wallinee, Annabaaɓe e seedeeɓe maɓɓe ɓen addee; goonga ñaawiree hakkunde maɓɓe, wonaa ɓe tooñeteeɓe;

39:70.t: woŋki kala yoɓee ko golli kon. Ko Kaŋko [Allah] ɓuri anndude ko ɓe ngollata.

39:71.t: Yedduɓe ɓen coggiroyee ka Jahannama dente-dente. Haa si ɓe heewtii nge, dame magge udditee, reenuɓe nge ɓen mbi'ana ɓe: "E Nulaaɓe jiyaaɓe e mo'on heewtaano on, janngaynooɓe aayeeje Joomi mon, e mooɗon, ɓe rentina on hawrugol e ndee ñalaande mon?" Ɓe mbi'a: "Ko non tigiri, kono Konngol lepte ngol, jojjiino e yedduɓe ɓeen".

39:72.t: [Ɓe] mbi'anee: "Naatiree dame Jahannama ɗen lutton ton. Nge bonii jaaƴorde mawnintiniiɓe ɓeen !".

39:73.t: Hulooɓe Joomi mun ɓen kadi ɗowitiree ka Aljanna, dente-dente. Haa si ɓe heewtii mo, dame makko udditee, reenuɓe mo ɓen mbi'ana ɓe: "Kisal wonii e mon, on laaɓii, naatiree mo, duumagol".

39:74.t: Ɓe mbi'a ontuma: "Jettooje ngoodanii Allah, laatinanɗo men fodoore Mum, O ronini min leydi [Aljanna] ndin, meɗen weerira e Aljanna on, kala ka min njiɗi". Mbarjaari gollunooɓe moƴƴere ɓeen moƴƴii.

39:75.t: Yi'oyaa Malaa'ikaen, heɓe taarii Arsi kin, heɓe cubbunhinora yettugol Joomi maɓɓe. Goonga ñaawiree hakkunde maɓɓe. Wi'ee on tuma: "Yettoore woodanii Allah, Jeyɗo tagoore".

40:2.t: Jippagol deftere nde, ko immorde e Allah, poolɗo, ganndo oon.

40:3.t: Kaforoowo bakkatuuji ɗin, Jaɓoowo tuubuubuyee, caɗtuɗo lepte, Joom yaajeende. Deweteeɗo alaa, si wonaa kaŋko. Ko ka makko woni ruttorde nden.

40:4.t: Alaa ko weeñdata e aayeeje Allah ɗen, si wonaa yedduɓe ɓen. Wota a hoditor ko ɓe dillirta kon ka leydi.

40:5.t: Ado maɓɓe, yimɓe Nuuhu ɓeen e peɗle ɓaawo maɓɓe, yedduno (Nulaaɓe mum ɓeen), mofte kala himmiri nanngugol Nulaaɗo mun oon. Ɓe njeddiri meere, fii no bonnitira (goonga) kan. Kono Min nanngi ɓe. Taskii no nanngal am ngal waɗtinirnoo !

40:6.t: Ko wano nii Konngol Joomi maa ngol, jojjiri e yedduɓe ɓeen : "Won'de pellet, ko ɓe yimɓe Yiite".

40:7.t: Ɓeen (Malaa'ikaaɓe) roondiiɓe Arsiki kin, e wonɓe bannge makki ɓen, hiɓe cubbunhinora yettugol Joomi maɓɓe, ɓe ngooŋɗina mo, ɓe insinorana gooŋɗinɓe ɓen (wiide): "Joomi amen, A yaññirii kala hu'unde, yurmeende e ganndal. Yawtan ɓen tuubuɓe, ɓe njokki laawol Maa ngol, daɗndaa ɓe kadi lepte Dulɓoowe ngeen.

40:8.t: Joomi amen, naaduɓe ka Aljannaaji ñiiɓal, ɗin ɗi poduɗaa ɓe, e kala moƴƴuɗo e baabiraaɓe maɓɓe, e genndiraaɓe maɓɓe, e geñngol maɓɓe. Pellet, ko Aan woni pooluɗo, Ñeeñɗo Oon.

40:9.t: Daɗndaaɓe [kuuɗe] e bonɗe ɗen. Kala mo daɗnduɗaa [kuuɗe] mum bonɗe ɗen nden Ñande, haray pellet, A yurmiii mo". Ko ɗum woni maloore mawnunde ndeen.

40:10.t: Yedduɓe ɓeen noddiroyte: "Ko tikkere Allah nden ɓuri mawnude, e dii ko tikkanɗon ko'e mon ɗum, tuma noddetenoɗon e gooŋɗinal, njeddon.

40:11.t: Ɓe mbi'a: "Joomi amen, A warii min laawi ɗiɗi, nguurnuɗaa min laawi ɗiɗi: min qirrike bakkaat amen ɗin. Taw si laawol jaltirngol hino woodi?".

40:12.t: "Ɗuum mooɗon, ko tawde si Allah tan noddanooma, on njeddon; si O kafidaama, ngooŋɗinon. Ñaawoore nden ko Allah heeranii, Toowɗo, Mawɗo On".

40:13.t: Ko Kaŋko woni kolloowo on Ma'andeeji makko ɗin, o jippinirana on toɓo ka kammu. Kono taskotaako, si wonaa nduttotooɗo [e Allah].

40:14.t: Rewiree Allah, laɓɓinirangol mo diina kan, hay si he'eferɓe ɓeen njɗaa.

40:15.t: Ko o toowuɗo darjaaji, Jeyɗo Arsi kin. Homo jippiniria wahayu oon, yamiroore makko, e on mo o muuyani e jiyaaɓe makko ɓeen, no o jeertinirde ñalnde Kawral ngal,

40:16.t: ñande ɓe feeñoyta. Hu'unde suuɗotaako Allah, e fee maɓɓe. Ko hommbo laamu woodani hannde? Ko Allah Bajjo, pooluɗo On.

40:17.t: Hannde, woŋkii kala yoɓete ko faggitii. Tooñe woo alaa hannde, pellet, Allah ko ñaawɗo ñaawoore.

40:18.t: Jeertnirtɓe, ñalaande dillere nden, tuma ɓerɗe ɗen ƴawtirta ka konondi, hara heɓe (heewuɓe) ngoƴo. Giɗo woo alanaa tooñooɓe ɓeen, wonaa tefoowo jaɓanteeɗo.

40:19.t: Homo anndi njamfa gite, e ko ɓerɗe ɗeen cuuɗi.

40:20.t: Allah ko goonga ñaawirta. Ɗi ɓe ndeewata ɗiin non, gaanin makko, hay hu'unde ɗi ñaawirtaa. Pellet, ko kaŋko woni Nanoowo, ji'oowo On.

40:21.t: Hara ɓee njiilaaki ka leydi, ɓe ndaara no battane ado mabbe ɓen wa'unoo? Ɓeen le no ɓurunoo tiiɗude doole e batteeji, ka leydi. Allah nanngitiri ɓe bakkaauuji maɓɓe ɗiin, ɓe heɓaano daɗndoowo ɓe e (lepte) Allah ɗeen.

40:22.t: Ko waɗi ɗuum, ko tawde Nulaaɓe maɓɓe ɓen ngaddatno ɓe ɓanngannduyeeji, ɓe njedda. Allah halki ɓe. Pellet, ko O Doolnuɗo, caɗtuɗo lepte.

40:23.t: Gooŋɗii Min nulirii Muusaa aayeeje Amen ɗen, e hujja ɓannguɗo.

40:24.t: haa e Fir'awna, e Haamaana, e Qaaruuna. Kono ɓe mbi'i: "Ko bileejo, ɗuuɗuɗo penaande!".

40:25.t: Nde o addannoo ɓe goonga ka, immorde e amen, ɓe mb'iti: "mbaree ɓiɗɓe worɓe gooŋɗinɓe ɓen e makko, accon rewɓe maɓɓe ɓen". Pewje he'eferɓe ɓen wonaani, si wonaa e majjere.

40:26.t: Fir'awna wi'i: "ngccee mi wara Muusaa. Yo o noddu Joomi makko ! Miɗo huli nde o waylata diina mon kan, maa o feññina bonnere e leydi".

40:27.t: Muusa maaki: "Mi moolorii Jeyɗo kam on, jeyi on, e bone kala mawnintiniiɗo, mo gooŋɗinaa ñalaande hasboore".

40:28.t: Gorko gooŋɗinɗo goo, jiyaaɗo e yimɓe Fir'awna ɓen - cuuɗunooɗo gooŋɗinal mum - :"E on waray gorko, fii o wi'i: "Joomi am ko Allah?" Hara le o addanii on ɓanngannduyeeji, immorde ka Joomi mon. Si tawii o fenu, haray fenaande makko ko kaŋko fawii; si tawii kadi o goongu, haray yoga e kon ko kammbirani on, heɓay on". Pellet, Allah feewnata on fantinoowo yeddoowo!

40:29.t: Eey yo yimɓe am, laamu no woodani on hanndi, ko on foolɓe ka leydi. Kono ko hommbo wallata en, e lepte Allah ɗen, si ɗe ngarii e men?" Fir'awna wi'i: "Mi hollataa on, si wanaa ko mi yi'i kon. Mi tindintaa on kadi, si wonaa e laawol peewal ngol".

40:30.t: Gooŋɗinɗo on wi'iti: "eey mon yo yimɓe am, min on miɗo hulani on, sugu ñalaande heɓunoonde peɗle ɗin.

40:31.t: Sugu mbowka yimɓe Nuuhu ɓeen, e Aadi'en, e Samuuda'en, e arnooɓe ɓaawo maɓɓe ɓen". Allah faandanaaki tooñde jiyaaɓe ɓen.

40:32.t: Eey mon yimɓe am, miin miɗo hulani on, Ñalaande noddindirton

40:33.t: Ñalnde nduŋtindroyton, hoɗon ndoga, hara daɗndoowo on alanaa on e Allah". Kala mo Allah majjini, haray peewnoowo alanaa mo.

40:34.t: Gooŋɗii Yuusufu ardanii on e ɓannganduyeeji, ko adii, on seeraani e sikkitagol kon ko o addani on. Haa nde o faatinoo, mbiuɗon: "Allah nultataa Nulaaɗo goo, ɓaawo makko". Ko non majjinirta kala gonɗo fantinoowo cikkitiiɗo.

40:35.t: Ɓeen weeñirooɓe e aayeeje Allah ɗen ko aldaa e hujja arɗo ɓe, [kuuɗe maɓɓe ɗen] mawnii tikkere ka Allah, e ka gooŋɗiiɓe ɓen. Ko wano non Allah notirta e ɓernde kala mawnintiniiɗo dundarankeejo.

40:36.t: Fir'awna wi'i: " eey ma yo Haamaana, mahanam sooro, no gasa mi yottoo ɗate ɗen.

40:37.t: ɗate kammuuji ɗin, mi ƴeewoya Deweteeɗo Muusaa On; sabu mi sikki mo penoowo". Ko wano non Fir'awna duɗiranaa, golle makko bonɗe ɗen; o sakkaa e laawol (peewal) ngol. Feere Fir'awna nden wonaano, si wonaa e hayrere.

40:38.t: [Gorko] gooŋɗinɗo on wi'i: "eey mon yo yimɓe am, njokkee kam, mi fewna on e laawol peewal ngol.

40:39.t: Eey mon yo yimɓe am, nganndee ɗam nguurndam aduna, ko ndakamme-hun tun, ko La'akara on woni, galle ñiiɓal ɗen.

40:40.t: Mo gollii bone, o yoɓitetaake, si wonaa yeru makko; mo gollii kadi moƴƴere, foti ko gorko maa debbo, hara ko o gooŋɗinɗo, ɓeen ɗoon naatay Aljanna, ɓe arsikoyee ton, ko aldaa e limoore.

40:41.t: Eey mon yo yimɓe am, ko waɗi si miɗo nodda on e daɗal, hoɗon nodda kam e Yiite?

40:42.t: Hiɗon nodda kam e jeddugol Allah, sirkana mo e ko mi alanaa ɗum ganndal, hara non, min miɗo nodda on e poolɗo, cuhuroowo bakkaat Oon.

40:43.t: Sikke alaa, won'de ko noddoton kam e mum kon, dewal alanaa ɗum aduna, wonaa La'akara. E won'de ruttorde men nden, ko ka Allah, e won'de ko fantimɓe ɓeen, ngoni Yiite ngen.

40:44.t: Aray nde nganndoton, ko mi yewtata on kon; mi fawa fiyaaku am on e Allah. Pellet, Allah ko deenɗo jiyaaɓe ɓen".

40:45.t: Allah daɗndi mo, boneeji ɗi ɓe pewjunoo, o fiiltii yimɓe Fir'awna ɓeen, ko ɓuri bon'de e lepte.

40:46.t: Yiite ngen, ɓe mbeeɓitoyte e magge, bimmbi e kiikiiɗe. Ñande darnga daroytoo (wi'oyte): "Naatee yimɓe Fir'awna ɓeen, ka ɓuri saɗtude e lepte".

40:47.t: Jaŋto tuma ɓe yeddondiroyta ka Yiite, lo'unooɓe ɓen wi'ana townitinooɓe ɓeen: "Minen, ko onon men jokkuunoo, taw si on duñanay men geɗal e Yiite ngeen?"

40:48.t: Townitinooɓe ɓeen mbi'a: "En fof, hiɗen e magge. Gooŋɗii Allah ñaawii hakkunde jiyaaɓe ɓen".

40:49.t: Wonɓe ka Yiite ɓen kadi mbi'ana ayninaaɓe Jahannama ɓen: "Toranee min Joomi mon, O hoynana men, ñalaande (wootere) e lepte ɗen".

40:50.t: Ɓe mbi'a: "Nulaaɓe mon ɓen ardanaano on e ɓanngannduyeeji?" Ɓe mbi'a: "oo'owoye !" [Ayninaaɓe] ɓen wi'a: "Awa toree, onon tigiri !" Kono toraare he'eferɓe ɓen ngonaani, si wanaa e majjere.

40:51.t: Pellet, Min mballay Nulaaɓe Amen ɓen, e gooŋɗiinɓe ɓen, ka nguurndam aduna, e Ñalnde seedeeɓe ɓeen daroytoo,

40:52.t: ñalnde de ngantinagol nafoytaa tooñnooɓe ɓeen, hara kuddi hino woodani ɓe, e galle bonɗe.

40:53.t: Gooŋɗii Min ngokkii Muusaa ganndal [Tawreeta] ngal, Min ndonini ɓiɗɓe Israa'iila ɓen, deftere nden.

40:54.t: ko nde peewal e waaju, wona nde joomiraaɓe haqqille ɓeen.

40:55.t: Muñño tan, pellet, fodoore Allah nden ko goonga, imsinano bakkaatuuji maa ɗiin, subbunhinanoɗaa Joomi maa, kiikiiɗe e bimmbi.

40:56.t: Pellet, weeñinirooɓe e aayeeje Allah ɗeen, ko aldaa e dalil arɗo e maɓɓe, alaa e ɓerɗe ɗen, si wonaa mawnintinagol. Ɓe yottotaako noon, e ɗuum. Moolor Allah, Ko Kaŋko woni Nanoowo, ji'oowo On.

40:57.t: Pellet, ko takde kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin, ɓuri mawnude e dii tageendi yimɓe ɓeen. Kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓen, ɓe nganndaa.

40:58.t: Bumɗo e ji'oowo potataa, gooŋɗiinɓe ɓeen kadi ngolli moƴƴuɗi, potataa e bonɗo. Famɗii ko mbajitorton !

40:59.t: Pellet, Darnga, ko ko arata, sikke alaa e mu'um. Kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓeen, ɓe ngoŋɗinaa.

40:60.t: Joomi mon daali: "Toree Kam, Mi jaabinana on. Mawtinantooɓe dewugol Lam ɓeen, ko pellet, ɓe naatoyay Jahannama, ko ɓe hoyɓe".

40:61.t: Ko Allah waɗirani on jemma on, ka fowtoɗon e mum, e ñalawma on, yi'inoowo. Pellet, Allah ko Jom ɓural e yimɓe ɓen, kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e yimɓe ɓen, ɓe njettataa (neema).

40:62.t: Ko oon mooɗon Allah Joomi mon, woni Takɗo kala huunde. Reweteeɗo alaa, si wanaa Kaŋko. Ko honno pirlitortaɗon (e ɗuum?)

40:63.t: Ko noon ɓeya yeddatnooɓe aayeeje Allah ɗeen, perlisortenoo.

40:64.t: Ko Allah woni baɗiranɗo on leydi ndin, ñiiɓirde, kammu ngun, kippoodi, O mbaadini on - O moƴƴini mbaadiiji mon -, O arsiki on e laaɓuɗi. Ko oon mooɗon woni Allah Joomi mon; senaare woodanii Allah, Jeyɗo winndere nden !

40:65.t: Ko Kaŋko woni guurɗo Oon. Deweteeɗo alaa, si wonaa Kaŋko. Ndewee Mo kisan; laɓɓinano mo diina kan. Jettooje ngoodanii Allah, Jeyɗo winndere ndeen !

40:66.t: Maaku: "Miin mi haɗaama dewugol ɗiin ɗi noddoton ga Allah, tuma nde ɓannganduyeeji ɗin ari e am, immorde e Joomi am, mi yamiraama kadi, nde mi jebbilantoo, Jeyɗo winndere ndeen".

40:67.t: Ko Kaŋko woni takɗo on e mbumbuldi, refti e toɓɓere (maniiyu), refti e heɗɗere, refti o yaltiniri on penuuɓe fii no njottoron cemmbe mon, e no laatoron nayeeɓe, - no e mo'on, ƴettiteteeɓe ado ɗuum, - haa no njottoron lajal kappaangal, mbelajo'o, on kaqqilay.

40:68.t: Ko Kaŋko woni guurnoowo e waroowo. Si O haajii e fiyaaku, ko O wi'anat mo tan: "Laato", o laatoo.

40:69.t: E a tinaani, ɓeen yeddondirteeɓe e aayeeje Allah ɗeen, ko honno ɓe pirlitoraa?

40:70.t: Ɓeen yedduɓe deftere ndeen, e kon ko Min nuliri nulaaɓe Amen ɓeen; ɓe ngaray anndude,

40:71.t: tuma kolombooje ɗen mbaɗoyaa e daaɗe maɓɓe, e jolokooje(callalle) ɗeen, hara heɓe ndaasiree

40:72.t: ka ndeer ngulɗam; refti ɓe huɓɓoyee ka ndeer Yiite.

40:73.t: refti ɓe mbi'anee: "Ko holto woni ɗin ɗi kafidatnoɗon?

40:74.t: Ko aldah e Allah?" Ɓe mbi'a: "Ɗi majjitike min. Wurin, min ngonaano ko adii, e dewugol hay hu'unde". Ko hona nih Allah majjinirta he'eferɓe ɓen.

40:75.t: Ko waɗi on ɗuum, ko ko mbeltoratnoɗon kon ka hoore leydi, ko aldaa e goonga, e ko mbliratnoɗon kon.

40:76.t: Naatiree dame Jahannama ɗeen, luttugol ton. nge bonii jaaƴorde wona'de mawnintiniiɓe ɓeen!.

40:77.t: Muñño. Pellet, fodoore Allah nden, ko goonga. Ko si Min hollete yoga e ko Min podi ɓe kon, maa hara Min ƴettite (ado mum) ko ka Amen ɓe ruttirtee.

40:78.t: Gooŋɗii Min imminii Nulaaɓe ado maa. Hino e maɓɓe, ɓe Min cifani maa fii mum; hino maɓɓe, ɓe Min cifanaaki ma fii mum. Haananaa Nulaaɗo, addugol aaya, si wonaa e duŋayee Allah. Si yamiroore Allah nden arii, goonga ñaawirte meerente'en sooya nden ñalnde.

40:79.t: Ko Allah woni waɗiranɗo On neemoraaɗi ɗin ko mbaɗɗoron, ñaamon kadi e majji.

40:80.t: nafooje kadi hino ngoodani on e majji, e no njottoron e majji, haaju hittuɗo e berde mon. Ko e hoore majji e hoore laaɗe ɗeen, woni ko ndonndeteɗon.

40:81.t: Himo holla on maandeeji makko ɗin. Ko holɗum e Ma'andeeji Allah ɗin, woni ko njeddoton?

40:82.t: E ɓee yiilaaki ka leydi, ɓe ndaara ko holno battane ɓeya ado maɓɓe mbattinirnoo? Ɓen no ɓurunoo ɓe ɗuude e saɗtude doole e batteeji [waɗaaɗi] ka leydi. Kono kon ko ɓe paggotonoo, duncanaano ɓe.

40:83.t: Nde Nulaaɓe maɓɓe ɓen addannooɓe ɓanngannduyeeji ɗin, ɓe wewliri ganndal ko woni ka maɓɓe kon. Ɓe kuuɓitiraa kon ko ɓe njalkitaynoo.

40:84.t: Nde ɓe nii'unoo lepte Amen ɗen, ɓe mbi'i: "Min ngooŋɗinii Allah tan, min yeddii kon ko men wonunoo e cirkannde".

40:85.t: Kono ngooŋɗinal maɓɓe wonaano ko nafata ɓe, feewndo ɓe nji'unoo lepte Amen ɗeen; ɗum ko laawol Allah non, gooŋɗii ɗun yawtiino e jiyaaɓe makko ɓeen. Yedduɓe ɓen sooyi ɗon nden ñalnde.

41:2.t: Ko jipporiinde immorde ka Jurmeteeɗo, Hinnotooɗo on.

41:3.t: Deftere fensitaande aayeeje mum, janngeteende e ɗemngal aarabu, wonan,de yimɓe anndooɓe.

41:4.t: wewlinaynde jeertinaaɓe. Kono ɓurɓe ɗuuɗude ɓen e maɓɓe, ɗuurnii, ɓeen ɓe nanataa.

41:5.t: Ɓe mb'i: "Ɓerɗe amen no ommbanii ko noddataa men e mum kon, noto hino e noppi amen, heedo kadi hino hakkunde amen e maa. Haray wonu e golle maa ; menen kadi miɗen e golle amen".

41:6.t: Maaku: "nganndee ko neɗɗanke yeruujo mon. Wahayinaama e am, won'de Deweteeɗo mon on, ko Deweteeɗo gooto. Ñiiɓee e ɗum, insinanoɗon mo". Bone woodanii sirkooɓe ɓen.

41:7.t: ɓe njonnataa ɓeen askal, hara kadi hiɓe njeddi fii La'akara.

41:8.t: Pellet, ɓeen gooŋɗiinɓe ɓe ngolli moƴƴi ɗin, hino woodani ɓe njoɓdi ndi taƴondirtaa.

41:9.t: Maaku: "Eey mon on njedda oon takɗo leydi ndin ndeer balɗe ɗiɗi, mbaɗanon mo goreeɓe? Awa ko oon woni Jeyɗo winndere ndeen.

41:10.t: O waɗi pelle e dow mayri, O hebbini barki e mayri, O eɓɓi nguureeji mayri ɗin e ndeer balɗe nayi timmuɗe, wonan'de lamndotooɓe ɓeen.

41:11.t: Refti o fotondiri ka kammu, fewndo ka ngu curkinnoo, O daalidani ngun kanngu e leydi ndin: "ngrdiree ɗoftaare, maa karheede". Ɗi wi'idi: "Min ngarii ko min ɗoftii ɓe".

41:12.t: O timminiri ɗi kammuuji jeeɗiɗi ndeer balɗe ɗiɗi, O yamiri kala kammu, fiyaaku maggu. Min cuɗiniri kammu aduna ngun, koode e reenirɗum. Ɗum ko eɓɓoore pooluɗo, gannduɗo On.

41:13.t: Si ɓe ɗuurnike, haray wi'u ɓe: "Min nejertinirii on haacaangu, sugu ha'acaango Aadi'en e Samuuda'en.

41:14.t: nde Nulaaɓe ɓren ardirannooɓe, ye'eso maɓɓe e ɓaawo maɓɓe, won'de: "Wata on ndewu dey, si wonaa Allah", ɓe mb'i: "Si Joomi amen haajuno, ko Malaa'ika O jippinaynoo. Awa minen, ko min yedduɓe ko nulaɗon mum kon".

41:15.t: Aadii'en kan, ɓe mawnintini ka hoore leydi, ko aldaa e goonga, ɓe mbi'i: "Hara ko hommbo ɓuri min doole?" E ɓee yiaani, won'de Allah takɗo ɓe On no ɓuri ɓe tiiɗude doole? Ɓe ngoni e yeddugol Aayeeje amen ɗen.

41:16.t: Min ngurti henndu ɓuuɓundu e maɓɓe e ñalaaɗe hiitaaɗe, fii no Min meeɗinira ɓe lepte koyeera ɗen ka nguurndam aduna. Pellet, ko lepte La'akara ɗen ɓuri won'de koyeera, kadi ɓe faaboytaake.

41:17.t: Samuuda'en kan, Min ɓannginanno ɓe; kono ɓe suɓii bumɗam ɗam e dow peewal ngal. Dillere lepte hoynooje ɗen nanngiri ɓe, sabu ko ɓe paggitotonoo kon.

41:18.t: Min ndaɗndi gooŋɗimɓe ɓe woniina hulnooɓe ɓen.

41:19.t: Ñalnde noon ayñɓe Allah ɓeen mooɓiroytee faade ka Yiite... Hara heɓe ñoƴƴindiree.

41:20.t: Haa si ɓe hewtii nge, nannɗe maɓɓe ɗeen, e giiɗe maɓɓe ɗen, e guri ɓalli maɓɓe ɗin seeditoo e dow maɓɓe, kon ko ɓe gollatnoo.

41:21.t: Ɓe wi'ana guri maɓɓe ɗen: "Ko fii honlɗum seeditaniɗon e amin?" Ɗe wi'a: "Ko Allah wowlinɗo kala hu'unde On, wowlini men. Ko Kaŋko tagunoo on gila ka laawol aranol, ko ka makko kadi rutteteɗon".

41:22.t: On ngonaani hiɗon cuuɗora, fii wata nanɗe mon, e giiɗe mon, e guri mon seedito e mon. Kono on cikkuno, won'de Allah anndaa ko ɗuuɗi e ko ngolloton.

41:23.t: Ko ɗuum mooɗon, cikkunoɗon Joomi mon, ɗuum halki on. Waɗtinɗon jeyyaaɓe e pertuɓe ɓeen.

41:24.t: Hay si ɓe muññike, ko Yiite ngen wonata jaaƴorde maɓɓe; si ɓe ɗaɓɓii feleede ngaccitee, ɓe wonaani feleteeɓe accitee.

41:25.t: Min ngurtani ɓe wondiiɓe, ɓeen cuɗinani ɓe ko woni ye'eso maɓɓe, e ko woni ɓaawo maɓɓe. Konngol [lepte] ngol jojji e maɓɓe, won'dude e mofte yawtunooɗe ado maɓɓe, immorde e jinna e yimɓe. Pellet, ɓe laatino hayruɓe.

41:26.t: Yedduɓe ɓeen mb'i: "Wota on jentito ndee Alqur'aanaare, sonkee e mayre (tuma nde janngetee) mbelajo'o, on foolay".

41:27.t: Ma Min meeɗiniroy yedduɓe ɓeen, lepte saɗtuɗe, Min njoɓira ko ɓuri bon'de e ko ɓe ngollatnoo noo kon.

41:28.t: Ko ɗum woni njoɓdi añɓe Allah ɓeen: Ko Yiite ngen. Ko galle luttugol woodani ɓe ton, njoɓdi kon ko ɓe yeddiraynoo aayeeje amen ɗen.

41:29.t: Yedduɓe ɓen mbi'a: "Joomi amen, hollii min majjinnooɓe min ɓeen ka jinna e ka yimɓe, min yaaɓa ɓe min fuga, haa ɓe wona e ɓurɓe joltude ɓen".

41:30.t: Pellet, wi'uɓe ɓeen : "Joomi amen ko Allah", refti ɓe tabiti; Malaa'ika'en hino jippoo e maɓɓe (wiide): "Wota on hulu, wota on suno; wewliree Aljanna, on mo wonanoɗon fodeede.

41:31.t: Ko minen ngoni ni wallooɓe on ɓeen ka nguurndam aduna e ka La'akara. Hino woodani on ton, kala ko woŋkiiji mon wooɗetee, hino woodani ton, kala ko noddoton,

41:32.t: ko maraari, immorde e kaforoore, Hinnotooɗo".

41:33.t: Hara ko hommbo ɓuri moƴƴude konngol, wano on nodduɗo e fii Allah, o golli moƴƴere, o wi'i: "miin, ko e juulɓe ɓen mi njiyaa?".

41:34.t: Moƴƴere ndeen fotataa e bone on. Duñir (golle bonɗe ɗen) kon ko ɓuri moƴƴude; e jaka yoo, on mo ngayngu woni hakkunde maa e mum, himo wa'ita wa giɗo saɗtuɗo giggol.

41:35.t: Kono hawrataa e ɗuum, si wonaa muññiiɓe ɓen; hawrataa e ɗuum, si wonaa jom geɗal mawnungal.

41:36.t: Si sowinsinoore arii heɓude ma immorde e seytaane, moolor Allah. Kaŋko ko O Nanoowo, gannduɗo.

41:37.t: Hino jiyaa e Ma'andeeji makko ɗin, jemma on e ñalawma on, e na'ange ngen e lewru ndun. Wota on cujjan na'ange ngen wonaa kadi lewru ndun. Cujjanee Allah, takɗo ɗi On, si wonii ko Kaŋko ndewoton.

41:38.t: Si ɓe townitike, ɓeen wonɓe ka Joomi maa kan, hiɓe cubbunhinorana mo jemma e ñalawma, hara ɓe haaɓataa.

41:39.t: Hino jeyaa e Ma'andeeji makko ɗin, tawde a nji'ay leydi ndin no yoori. Si wonii Min njippinii ndiyam toɓo e mayri, ndi dilla ndi fontoo. Awa nguurnituɗo ndi on, pellet, ko wuurnitoowo maayɓe ɓen, tawde pellet, ko O kattanɗo haka hu'unde.

41:40.t: Pellet, ooñotooɓe ɓeen e aayeeje Amen ɗeen, ɓe vuuɗotaako Min. E ko feroyteeɗo on ka Yiite ɓuri moƴƴude kaa ko aroyoowo on Ñalnde Darngal hino hoolii? NGollee ko paalaɗon, ko pellet, Homo reeni ko ngolloton kon.

41:41.t: Yedduɓe ɓeen Alqur'aana tuma nde arnoo e maɓɓe, pellet noon, ko nde deftere teddunde [foolnde];

41:42.t: mehre iwrantaa nde ye'eso mayre, wonaa ɓaawo mayre. Ko jipporiinde immorde ka Ñeeño, jettiniiɗo On.

41:43.t: A wi'aaka si wonaa ko Nulaaɓe adinooɓe ma ɓen mbi'anoo. Pellet, Joomi maa, ko O Jom yaafuyee, e Jom lepte mu'usuuɗe.

41:44.t: Si Min mbaɗuno nde janngeteende e haala ajami, ɓe wi'atno: "Ko haɗno aayeeje mayre ɗen fensitee? E nde wonat e haala ajami, [Nulaaɗo] on wona aarabuujo?" Maaku: "Kayre wonan'de gooŋɗinɓe ɓen, ko nde peewal e cellal". Ɓe ngooŋɗinaa ɓen kan, noto hino e noppi maɓɓe ɗin, kayre ko nde niɓe e dow maɓɓe; ɓen hino noddiree e nokku woɗɗuɗo.

41:45.t: Gooŋɗii Min ngokkii Muusaa Deftere ndeen, nde luutondira e mayre. Si wonaano Konngol ardinoongol immorde ka Joomi maa, hakkunde maɓɓe ñaaweteno. Kamɓe kan, pellet, hiɓe e sikke sikkitiiɗo nde.

41:46.t: Kala golluɗo ko moƴƴi, ko fii hoore-makko; kala kadi bonnuɗo, yantat e makko. Joomi maa ciforaani won'de, tooñoowo jiyaaɓe ɓen.

41:47.t: Ko ka makko woni ko ganndal Darngal nduttetee. Dimɗe yaltataa e coomɗi mum, deyel (woo) saawataa,ngel jibintaa si wanaa e ganndal makko.Ñande O noddiroyta ɓe:"Ko honto woni kafidaaɗi am ɗin?", ɓe mbi'a:"Min nganndinii Ma, alah e amen seedotooɗo [ɗum]"

41:48.t: Ɓe majjira e ko ko ɓe ndewatnoo ko adii; ɓe yananee won'de daɗirgal alanaa ɓe.

41:49.t: Neɗɗaŋke on kaaɓataa toragol moƴƴere. Si bone memii mo, ko o taƴotooɗo, jonndiniiɗo.

41:50.t: Si Min meeɗinir mo moƴƴere immorde ka Amen, ɓaawo nde lorra memi mo, ko pellet o wi'ay: "Ɗuum ɗoo ko min ! Mi pellitaani si Darnga daroto. Si mi nduttaama ka Joomi am, ko pellet, moƴƴere hino woodani lam ka makko". Ma Min kumpitu yedduɓe ɓeen, fii ko ɓe huuwi kon, ko ma Min meeɗinoy ɓe lepte saɗtuɗe.

41:51.t: Si Min neeminii e neɗɗaŋke on, o ɗuurnoo o toowna balaaje makko; si bone non heɓii mo, o wona jom toraare jaaynde.

41:52.t: Maaku: "Yeetee kam, si wonii le ko ka Allah nde iwri, refti njedduɗon nde; haray ko hommbo ɓuri majjude on gonɗo e lurral woɗɗungal?"

41:53.t: Aray Min kolla ɓe Ma'andeeji Amen ɗin ka tatteeji e maɓɓe tigi, haa ɓanngana ɓe won'de ko nde goonga. E yonaani won'de Joomi maa, ko O ceediiɗo kala hu'unde?

41:54.t: Ganndee heɓe e cikke fii hawroygol e Joomi maɓɓe. Ganndee non, ko O huɓindiiɗo kala hu'unde.

42:3.t: Ko wano nii woni ko Allah Teɗɗuɗo, Ñeeño oon wahayiniri e maa, e ɓeen adinooɓe maa.

42:4.t: Ko Kaŋko woodani kala ko woni ka kammuuji e ka leydi. Ko Kaŋko kadi woni Toowuɗo, mawɗo oon.

42:5.t: Kammuuji ɗiin no eɓɓa seekorgol dow majji, hara Malaa'ika'en no subbunhinanora yettugol Joomi maɓɓe, ɓe imsinanoo wonɓe ka leydi ɓeen. Ngandee pellet, ko Allah woni kaforoowo, jurmotooɗo otooɗo On.

42:6.t: Ɓeen non jogitiiɓe yiɗɓe goo ga Makko, Allah ko deenuɗo ɓe. A wonaani deenoowo ɓe.

42:7.t: Ko wano noon Min wahayniri e maaɗa, janngeteende e aarabu, fii yo a jeertin yimɓe neene ca'e ɗen e wonɓe takko mayre ɓeen, jerrtinaa fii ñalnde dental nden, - nde sikke alaa e mu'um - Fedde goo ka Aljnna, fedde goo kadi ka Yiite.

42:8.t: Si Allah haajuno, O waɗayno ɓe mofte goote. Kono himo oon mo O muuyi ka Yurmeende makko. Tooñooɓe ɓeen non, giɗo alanaa ɓe, wonaa ballo.

42:9.t: Kaa ɓe njogiti yiɗɓe goo ga makko? Awa ko Allah woni Giɗo on, ko Kaŋko wuurnitata maayɓe ɓeen; ko Kaŋko kadi woni kaɗtanɗo kala hu'unde.

42:10.t: Kala ko luutondirɗon e fii mun, haray ñaawoore mum nden ko ka Allah woni. Ko on mooɗon Allah, woni Joomi am; ko e makko mi fawii, ko ka makko kadi mi ruttorta [tuubugol].

42:11.t: Puɗɗuɗo kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin. O waɗiranii on e pittaali mon ɗin genndooɓe, ka neemoraaɗi kadi nooneeji; Homo ɗuɗɗinira on ɗum. Hay hu'unde yerondiraa e makko; ko Kanko woni Nanoowo, ji'oowo On.

42:12.t: Ko Kaŋko heerori soktirɗe kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndin. Homo weertana arsike on mo o muuyani, O ɓiɗtinana (mo O muuyani). Pellet, ko O gannduɗo kala hu'unde.

42:13.t: O sar'inanii on e diina kan, koŋko ko o yamirnoo nuuhu, e kon ko Min wahayini e maaɗa, e kon ko Min njamirnoo Ibraahiima, e Muusaa e Iisaa, won'de: "Ñiɓnee diina kan; hara on ceertaani e makka". Kono Ko noddotaa sirkooɓe ɓen e mum kon, mawnii e dow maɓɓe. Allah non hino suɓanoo ɗum, mo O muuyani, O fewna e makko, kala tuuboowo.

42:14.t: Ɓe seertaano, si wonaa ɓaawo nde ganndal ngal arde e maɓɓe, sabu bewre hakkunde maɓɓe. Si wonaano fii Konngol ardinoongol, immorde ka Joomi maa, haa e lajal taƴaangal, ñaaweteno hakkunde maɓɓe. Ko pellet, roninaaaɓe deftere nden ɓaawo maɓɓe, hino e sikke fii mayre sikkitiiɓe.

42:15.t: Noddu (yimɓe ɓen) kisan; ñiiɓiraa no yamiraɗaa non, wota a jokku mbeleeɗe maɓɓe ɗeen, maakaa: "Mi gooŋɗinii ko Allah jippini kon (fof) e defte, mi njamiraama kadi, nunɗugol hakkunde mon. Allah woni Joomi amen e Joomi mon. Ko minen golle amen woodani, ko onon kadi golle mon woodani. Yeddondiral woo alaa hakkunde amen e mon. Allah mooɓoyay e denndaandal. Ko ka makko woni ruttorde nden".

42:16.t: Ɓeen weeñirooɓe e diina Allah kan, ɓaawo ka jaɓaneede, hujja maɓɓe on ko mehre, tikkere no fawii e maɓɓe, hino woodani ɓe kadi lepte caɗtuɗe.

42:17.t: Ko Allah woni jippiniri deftere nden goonga, e manndakke ɗen. E ko anndin maa? Hino gasa hara darnga ngal ko ko ɓadii?

42:18.t: Ɓeya ɓe gooŋɗinaani ngal ɓeen, hiɓe heñoringal; gooŋɗinɓe ɓen kan, ko ɓe hulu fii maggal, e hoore hiɓe felliti won'de ko ngal goonga. Awa anndee wonɓe yeddondireede ɓen fii Darngal, ko pellet, ɓe ngonii e ndeer majjere woɗɗunde.

42:19.t: Allah ko newaniiɗo jiyaaɓe makko ɓen. Homo arsike on mo o muuyani. Ko Kaŋko woni Doolnuɗo, poolɗo On.

42:20.t: Kala tawɗo ko baraaje ndun laakara o faalaa, Men ɓeydanay mo mbarjaari makko ndin; kala kadi tawɗo ko jayru ndun aduna o yiɗi, Min ngokkay mo ɗum, hara non o alaa ka kaalara (ton) geɗal.

42:21.t: Kaa hara denndaaaaɗi hino woodani ɓe, sar'inanɗi ɓe e diina kan, ko ko Allah duŋaaki fii mum? Si wonaano fii Konngol [happunoongol] ngol fii senndugol [hakkunde maɓɓe], ñaaweteno hakkunde maɓɓe. Ko pellet, hino woodani tooñuɓe ɓen, lepte muusɗe.

42:22.t: A yi'at tooñɓe ɓen hino huli e ko ɓe fggitii kon, ɗum le ko yantayɗum e maɓɓe. Gooŋɗinɓe ɓen, ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe, hiɓe e dinngire naakooji, hara hino woodani ɓe ka Joomi maɓɓe, kala ko ɓe faaletee. Ko ɗuum tigiri, woni ɓural mawnungal ngal.

42:23.t: Ko ɗuum woni ko Allah wewlinirta jiyaaɓe makko gooŋɗiiɓe ɓen, ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe. Maaku: "Mi lamndaaki on njoɓdi e ɗum, si wonaa tun giggol enɗam ɗam". Kala paggitiiɗo moƴƴere, Min ɓeydanay mo moƴƴere e hoore mayre. Pellet, Allah ko kaforoowo, mantoowo.

42:24.t: Kaa ɓe mbi'ay o fefindor nde e hoore Allah fenaande. Si Allah haajuno, O notatno e ɓernda maa nden. Alla no meha meere nden, O tabintinira goonga kan Daalol makko ngol. Pellet, ko O gannduɗo gunndooji ɓerɗe ɗeen.

42:25.t: Ko Kaŋko woni jaɓanoowo jiyaaɓe makko ɓeen tuubuubuyee, O yaafoo bonɗi ɗin, e hoore Himo anndi ko ngolloton kon.

42:26.t: Himo jaabinana gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen, ɓe ngolli moƴƴuɗi, O ɓeydana ɓe e ɓural makko ngal. Heeferɓe ɓen non, hino woodani ɓe lepte caɗtuɗe.

42:27.t: Si tawno Allah yaññanno jiyaaɓe Makko ɓeen [fof] arsike, pellet, ɓe bewayno ka leydi; kono Homo jippinira emmbere ko O muuyi. Pellet, ko O kummpitiiɗo, yioowo jeyyaaɓe makko ɓeen.

42:28.t: Ko Kano woni jippinoowo toɓo ngoon ɓaawo ɓe taƴaade, O saaka yurmeende makko nden. Ko Kaŋko kadi woni Giɗo, jettiniiɗo On.

42:29.t: Hino jeyaa e Ma'andeeji makko ɗiin: tagugol kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndin, e ruugayɗi ɗi O saaki ɗin hakkunde majji. Kaŋko e fii mooɓindiroygol ɓe ngool, si O haajii, ko O kattanɗo.

42:30.t: Kala ko heɓi on e masiibo, ko sabu ko juuɗe mon ɗeen faggitii kon. Himo ya'afoo noon, ko ɗuuɗi.

42:31.t: OOn wonaani laawotooɓe ka leydi ; alanaa on ga Allah, giɗo, wanaa ballo.

42:32.t: Hino jiyaa e Ma'andeeji makko ɗiin: dogayɗe ɗen ka maayo, wa'aɗe wa pelle.

42:33.t: Si O haajii, O deeƴinay henndu ndun, ndu waɗtinira tabitndu e hoore maggo. Wonii e ɗuum, Ma'andeeji, wona 'de kala muññotooɗo, jettoowo.

42:34.t: Maa yooliraɗe sabu ko ɓe paggitii kon. Himo ya'afoo noon ko ɗuuɗi.

42:35.t: Wennjooɓe ɓeeen e aayeeje Amen ɗen, hino anndi ɓe alaa laaworde.

42:36.t: Kala ko ngokkaɗon e hu'unde, ko dakamme nguurndam aduna; ko ko woni ka Allah koon, ɓuri moƴƴude woni kadi ko heddotoo wonan'de gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen fawotooɓe e Joomi maɓɓe.

42:37.t: woɗɗitotooɓe bakkaatuuji mawɗi ɗiin e paŋkare ɗeen, si wonii ɓe tikkii, hara ɓe yaafoto,

42:38.t: ɓeen nootiiɓe Joomi maɓɓe, ɓe ñiɓni juulde nden, ɓe tawata fiyaaku maɓɓe on ko diisondiral hakkunde maɓɓe, nafqooɓe e ko ko Min ngarsiki ɓe,

42:39.t: e ɓeen tawɓe si bewre heɓii ɓe, ɓe njottoto.

42:40.t: Njoɓdi bonnere, ko bone yeru mum. Kala non yaafiiɗo o moƴƴintini, haray njoɓdi makko ndin ko ka Allah woni. Pellet non, O yiɗaa tooñooɓe ɓeen.

42:41.t: Kala noon yottiiɓe ɓaawo ɓe tooñeede, ko ɓen woni ɓe laawol [nanngitireede] fawaaki e mum.

42:42.t: Ko laawol [nanngitireede] fawii e mum, ko tooñooɓe yimɓe ɓeen, hara hiɓe bewira e leydi ndin ko aldaa e goonga: ɓe ɗoon, hino woodani lepte mu'usuuɗe.

42:43.t: Muññiiɗo on kadi o yaafii, ko pellet, ɗuum no jiyaa e pellital fiyakuujI.

42:44.t: Kala mo Allah majjini, haray giɗo (goo) alanaa mo ɓaawo ɗum. A tinay tooñɓe ɓeen, tuma ɓe nji'i lepte ɗeen, hiɓe mbi'a: "Hara laawol ruttorde no woodi?".

42:45.t: A tinay ɓe kadi, heɓe mbeeɓitee e magge, hara heɓe njankinii koyeera on, heɓe ndaarira ndaarɗe leppagol. Gooŋɗinɓe ɓen mbi'aya: "Ko woni hayru ɓe ɓeen, ko ɓen hayrimɓe ko'e mun e ɓeynguureeji maɓɓe ɗin Ñalnde Darngal". Nganndee pellet, tooñuɓe ɓeen no e lepte duumiiɗe.

42:46.t: Yiɗɓe alanaa ɓe, ko wallitoo ɓe, hara wonaa Allah. Kala noon mo Allah majjini, haray laawol alanaa mo.

42:47.t: Nootee Joomi mon, ado ñalaande arde, nde ruttoowo alaa ɗuum ka Allah. Nden ñalnde, faaborde alanaa on, jeddugol kadi alanaa oon.

42:48.t: Si ɓe ɗuurnike non, haray min nuliraali ma, aynoowo ɓe: fawaaki ma, si wonaa joottingol. Si wonii Min meeɗiniri neɗɗanke on neema immorde e Amen, o wewlira mo; si ko bone non heɓi ɓe, sabu kon ko juuɗe maɓɓe ɗen ardiniri, a taway pellet, neɗɗo on ko jedduɗo sanne !

42:49.t: Ko Allah woodani laamagol kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin. Himo taga ko o muuyi. Homo yeɗa mo o muuyani ɓiɓɓe rewɓe, O yeɗa kadi mo O muuyani ɓiɗɓe worɓe.

42:50.t: maa O jillira ɓe worɓe e rewɓe; Homo waɗa dimaro, on mo o muuyani. Pellet, ko O ganduɗo, kattanɗo.

42:51.t: Sellantaa neɗɗaŋke, nde Allah yeewtata mo, si wonaa wahayu, maa e ɓaawo heedo, maa o immina Nulaaɗo (Malaa'ikaajo), on wayahina e duŋayee(sakkitoore) makko, ko ko O haaji. Pellet, ko O toowuɗo, Ñeeñɗo.

42:52.t: Ko wano non Min mbayayinir e maaɗa, ruuhu on [Alqur'aana] e yamiroore Amen. A anndaano ko woni deftere, maa gooŋɗinal; si ko woni, Min mbaɗunde ndaygu, ngu Min peewwnirta on mo Min muuyani e jiyaaɓe Amen ɓen. Pellet, ko a feewnoowo e laawol Pocciingol,

42:53.t: laawol Allah, On jeyɗo ko woni kammuuji e ka leydi. ganndee, ko ka Allah, fiyakuuji ɗin nduttotoo.

43:3.t: Min maɗii nde janngeteende [e ɗemngal] aarabu, mbelajo'o, on kaqqilay.

43:4.t: Pellet, hende woni ka Amen gaa, ka yumma defte, toownde, ñeñaande.

43:5.t: E Min ngacciray njippinangol on jantoore ndeen, ɗuurngal on, fii on ngonii yimɓe fantinɓe?

43:6.t: Ɗuuɗii e Annabaaɓe ɓe Min nuli e adinooɓe ɓeen.

43:7.t: Annabaajo araali e maɓɓe, si wonaa ɓe njalkitay mo.

43:8.t: Min kalki ko ɓuri ɓe saɗtude doole ! Toode mise adinooɓe ɓeen jawtiino.

43:9.t: Ko pellet, si a lamndike ɓe: "Ko hommbo tagi kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin?" Ɓe mbi'ay: "Ko pooluɗo, gannduɗo on tagi ɗii".

43:10.t: Oon mbaɗiranɗo on leydi ndin weertaandi, O waɗani on ɗate e mayri, fii no ɗoworon.

43:11.t: Oon jippinrɗo toɓo ka kammuu, yeru haaju, Min nguurnitiri ngo leydi maayndi. Ko noon yaltinirteɗon.

43:12.t: On takɗo nooneeji ɗin fow, O waɗirani on e laaɗe ɗen e neemoraaɗi ɗiin, ko mbaɗɗoron,

43:13.t: fii yo on potondir e hoore majji, refti ngannditon neema Joomi mon on, tuma potondirɗon e majji, mb'on on tuma: "Senaare woodanii eeltanɗo min ɗuum On, min ngonaano taaqanaaɓe ɗum.

43:14.t: minen noon, ko ka Joomi amen woni ko min nduttotoo".

43:15.t: Ɓe mbaɗani mo geɗal e jiyaaɓe Makko ɓeen ! Pellet, on neɗɗaŋke ko jedduɗo ɓannguɗo.

43:16.t: Kaa woo O jogiti ɓiɗɓe rewɓe e ko O tagi kon, O heertinani on ɓiɗɓe worɓe ɓeen?

43:17.t: Si goɗɗo e maɓɓe wewliniraama ko o waɗirani kon Hinaranke On misal, ye'eso makko ngon niɓɓita metteendi hombo suuɗi.

43:18.t: E ko on ne'eteeɗo e cuɗaari, hara kaŋko on ka yeddondiral, wonaa o ɓannginoowo haala?

43:19.t: Ɓe mbaɗi Malaa'ikaaɓe tawɓe ɓeen ko jiyaaɓe Joom yurmeende oon, rewɓe ! Kere ɓe seedino tageede ɓeen? Awa fii seedagol maɓɓe ngol winndete, ɓe lamnditoyee.

43:20.t: Ɓe mbi'iti: "Si Joom yurmeende On haajuno, min ndewataano ɓe". Ɓe alanaa ɗuum hay e ganndal; ɓe ngonaani, si wonaa hiɓe pena.

43:21.t: Kaa ko defftere Min ngaddani ɓe ado ndee ɗoo, hara ko nden woni ko ɓe njogitii?

43:22.t: Si ko woni, ɓe mbi'iu: "Minen Min tawu baabiraaɓe amen ɓeen e diina, haray ko e batteeji maɓɓe min peewirta".

43:23.t: Ko wano non, Min nulaali jeertinoowo aditaade ma e saare woo, si wonaa hooreeɓe maɓɓe neemiiɓe mbi'ay: "Minen Min tawu baabiraaɓe amen ɓen e diina, ɗum non ko batteeji maɓɓe ɗin men ñermtinta".

43:24.t: O maaki: "Hay si mi addan on ko ɓuri feewude kon ko tawruɗon baabiraaɓe mon ɓen?" Ɓe mbi'i: "Minen dey, ko min jedduɓe ko nulidaɗon e mum koon".

43:25.t: Min njottii e maɓɓe. ndaare no battande fennuɓe ɓeen mba'unoo.

43:26.t: Jaŋto tuma Ibraahiima maakannoo been makko e yimɓe makko ɓeen: "Min on ko mi daɗndiiɗo e kon ko ndewoton,

43:27.t: si wanaa On takɗo lam, Kaŋko oon, O feewnay kam".

43:28.t: O waɗi ngool konngol heddotoongol ɓaawo makko, mbelajo'o, ɓe nduttoto.

43:29.t: Si ko woni, Mi dakmitii ɓee ɗoo e baabiraaɓe maɓɓe ɓeen, haa nde goonga kan ngarnoo e maɓɓe, e Nulaaɗo ɓannguɗo.

43:30.t: Nde goonga kan arnoo e maɓɓe, ɓe mbi'i: "Ɗuum ko mbilewu, minen ko min njedduɓe ɗuum".

43:31.t: Ɓe mb'iti: "Ko haɗno ndee Alqur'aanaare jippinee e gorko mawɗo ca'e ɗen ɗiɗi?"

43:32.t: E ko kamɓe senndata yurmeende Joomi maa ndeen? Awa ko Minen ngoni ko senndi nguureeji maɓɓe ɗiin hakkunde maɓɓe, ka nguurndam aduna. Min ɓamti yoga maɓɓe e hoore ɓeya, darjaaji, fii no yoga maɓɓe jogitora yoga eeltane. Haray ko yurmeende Joomi maa ndeen, ɓuri moƴƴude e ko ko ɓe mooɓata.

43:33.t: Si wonaano fii wata yimɓe ɓeen ngon mofte goote, Min mbaɗayno e cuuɗi kala jedduɗo Hinnaranke Oon: kiɓɓe kaalisi e ŋabbirɗe ka ɓe ƴawra;

43:34.t: (Min mbaɗayno kadi) e cuuɗi maɓɓe ɗiin, dame e ndaɗɗude ka ɓe soɓɓindoo,

43:35.t: e cuɗaari. Kono ɗuum fow wonaani, si wonaa dakamme nguurndam aduna. Ko La'akara on ka Joomi maa, woni fii gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen.

43:36.t: Kala ɗuurniiɗo e jaŋtoore Hinaranko On, Min nguurta mo e seytanuuru, hara ko ndun woni ko o coowodata.

43:37.t: Ɗiin (awaseeji) noon, ko sakkorayɗi ɓe e peewal ngal, haa ka ɓe cikkata hiɓe peewi.

43:38.t: Haa si o aroyii e Amin, o wi'a: "Ee bone ! hara hakkunde am e maa woɗɗirayno goɗɗal puɗɗirɗe ɗen ɗiɗi woɗɗiri ! A bonii cinndadiiɗo !".

43:39.t: [Ɗuum] nafataa on hannde - nde tawnoo on tooñii - won'de ko ka lepte kaawtuɗon.

43:40.t: E ko an naninta paaɗuɗo maa feewnaa bunɗo e on wonɗo e ndeer majjere ɓanngunde?

43:41.t: Si Min ngar ƴettitude ma, ko Min yoɓottotooɓe e maɓɓe.

43:42.t: maa hara Men holle ko Min kammbirani ɓeen kon, haray noon ko Min gaynooɓe fii maɓɓe.

43:43.t: Jogito kon ko wahayinaa e maaɗa. Pellet, hiɗa jokki laawol pocciingol.

43:44.t: Ndee non [Alqur'aanaare], ko nde teddungal maa an e yimɓe maa ɓeen. Aray nde laɓnditeeɗon.

43:45.t: Lamndii e ɓeen Nulaaɓe Amen ɓe Min nulunoo ado maa, si Min mbaɗuno ko wanaa Hinnaranke On, deweteeɗi goo?

43:46.t: Gooŋɗii Min immindinii Muusaa e aayeeje Amen ɗeen, haa e Fir'awna e mbatu mun ngun, o maaki: "Ko mi Nulaaɗo Jeyɗo tagoore".

43:47.t: Nde o addannooɓe aayeeje Amen ɗren, e jaka yoo hiɓe njalaɗi.

43:48.t: Min hollaali ɓe aaya, si wonaa haray on ɓuri adiiɗo mo on mawnude. Min nanngiri ɓe lepte ɗeen, mbelajo'o, ɓe nduttoto.

43:49.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Ko an yo mbileejo! Torano min Joomi maa, ko O ahodi kon e maaɗa. Pellet, ko min feewooɓe".

43:50.t: Nde Min huncannooɓe lepte ɗeen, e jaka yoo, hiɓe pirta [ahadi].

43:51.t: Fir'awna noddi e yimɓe ɓeen, o wi'i: "Ko onon yo yimɓe am, wanaa miin jey laamu Misra? E hino ɗii canɗi no ila e ley kuɓeeji am? E on nji'ataa?

43:52.t: Kaa mi ɓuraa teddude oo koyɗo mo eɓɓataa laɓɓinnde haala?

43:53.t: Awa ko hanno jawe kaŋŋe mbrnee e makko? Ma Malaa'ika'en arda e makko, na jokkondiri?"

43:54.t: O ɗaytini yimɓe makko ɓen, ɓe ɗowtii mo. Pellet, ɓeen ɗon laatino yimɓe faasiqiiɓe.

43:55.t: Nde ɓe tikkinnoo Min, Min yottii e maɓɓe; Min njooli ɓe fof.

43:56.t: Min mbaɗi ɓe ardiiɓe e yeru, wonan'de sakkiitiiɓe ɓeen.

43:57.t: Tuma nde geɗal neene Maryama on piyiranoo misal, tawaa yoo, yimɓe maa ɓeen no sooƴira ɗuum.

43:58.t: ɓe mbi'i: "Ko deweteeɗi amen ɗin ɓuri moƴƴude, kaa ko Kaŋko?" Ɓe piyiranaali ma ngal (misal), si wonaa fii wennjugol. Wurin, ko ɓe yimɓe saɗtuɓe mbeñe.

43:59.t: Awa (Iisaa) wonaani, si wanaa jiyaaɗo mo Min neemini e mum, Min mbaɗi mo yeru wonan'de ɓiɗɓe Israa'iila ɓeen.

43:60.t: Si Moen kaajuno, Min waɗtitirayno on Malaa'ika, ko lomtoo ka leydi.

43:61.t: Pellet non, ko o anndinorde Darngal. Wota on cikkito fii maggal. Jokkee kam, ko ɗuum woni laawol Pocciingol ngol.

43:62.t: Wota seytaane falo on ! tawde pellet, ko o gaño mon ɓannguɗo.

43:63.t: Nde Iisaa ardunoo e ɓannguɗi ɗin, o maaki: "Gooŋɗii mi ardanii on e ñeeñal, e no mi ɓannginirana on yoga e ko luutondirɗon e muuɗum. Haray kulee Allah, ɗoftoɗon mi.

43:64.t: Pellet, ko Alla Woni Joomi am e Joomi mon. Ndewee Mo. Ko ɗuum woni laawol pocciingol ngol".
