43:65.t: Feddeeji ɗiin luutondiri hakkunde majji. Bone woodanii ɓen yedduɓe, immorde e lepte ñalaande mu'usuuɗe !

43:66.t: Hara ɓe habbi si wpnaa nde Darngal ngal ardata ɓe e juhal, hara ɓe so'aa anndude?

43:67.t: Welduɓe ɓeen, nden ñalnde, yoga maɓɓe ko ayrooɓe yoga; si wonaa gooŋɗuiɓe ɓeen.

43:68.t: Ko onon yo jiyaaɓe Am ! Kulol alanaa on hannde; wonaa on sunotooɓe kadi.

43:69.t: ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe Aayeeje Amen ɗeen, ɓe ngoni jebbiliiɓe,

43:70.t: naatee ka Aljanna, onon e nannduɓe e mon, hoɗon saɗnee".

43:71.t: [Gollooɓe] hino wannginee e maɓɓe, mirannji kaŋŋe e yedduɗe; hino ton kadi: kala ko wonkii muuyetee, gite dakmitoo. Hara le, ko on duumotooɓe toon.

43:72.t: Ko on ngoni Aljanna mo roniniraɗon, sabu ko ko ngollaynoɗon.

43:73.t: Hino woodani on toon, muuyanteeɗi ɗuuɗuɗi, ɗi ñaamoton e mum.

43:74.t: Pellet, bonɓe ɓen, ko ka lepte Jahannama ɓe luttoyta,

43:75.t: ɓe koynantaake, tee hara ko ɓe taƴiiɓe toon.

43:76.t: Min tooñaani ɓe few, si ko woni, ko kamɓe woni tooñuɓe ɓeen.

43:77.t: Ɓe nodda: "Ko an yo Maaliku ! Yo Joomi maa gaynu fii amen !" O wi'i: "Pellet, ko on luttooɓe [toon] !"

43:78.t: "Gooŋɗii Min ngaddanii on goonga kan ; kono ɗuuɗuɓe e mon, ko añɓe goonga".

43:79.t: Kaa ɓe eɓɓu fehre ? Doo ko Min fewjooɓe !

43:80.t: Maa hara ɓe cikku Min nanataa gunndooji maɓɓe e sirru maɓɓe? Oo’owoye! Nulaaɓe Amen ɓeen hino maandina takko maɓɓe.

43:81.t: Maaku: "Si Hinaranko on no njogitii ɓiɗɗo, ko miin adotonoo rewude oon".

43:82.t: Senaare woodanii Jeyɗo kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin, Jeyɗo Arsi kin; laaɓuɗo e kon ko ɓe cifrotta mo.

43:83.t: Accuɓe ɓe jumpa, ɓe pija haa ɓe hawroya e ñalaande maɓɓe ndeɓe fodaa.

43:84.t: Ko Kaŋko woni On deweteeɗo ka kammu e deweteeɗo ka leydi, ko Kaŋko kadi woni Ñeeño, gannduɗo On.

43:85.t: Barke heewanii on mo woodani ɗum, laamu kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin e ko woni hakkunde majji. Ko ka makko anndal fii Darngal woni. Ko ka makko kadi ndutteteɗon.

43:86.t: Ɗi ɓe ndewata ɗin ga makko jeyah tefoore, si wonaa seediiɓe goonga ɓeen, hara heɓe nganndi.

43:87.t: Ko pellet, si a lamndike ɓe, ko hommbo woni ko tagi ɓe? Ɓe mbi'ay: "Ko Allah". Ko holno non ɓe njiiliraa?

43:88.t: [Himo anndi kadi] fii ko (Nulaaɗo) oon maakunoo kon: "Ko an yo Joomi, pellet, ɓee ko yimɓe ɓe ngooŋɗintaa".

43:89.t: Yaafo ɓe, maakaa: "Kisal !" Aray ndebe ngannda.

44:3.t: Min njippinirii nde e jemma barkinaaɗo, Min siforii won'de jeertinooɓe.

44:4.t: Ko e on (jehma) woni ko seerndetee kala fiyaaku ñeñaaɗo.

44:5.t: Ɗuum ko yamiroore immorde ka amen. Min siforii won'de Nulooɓe.

44:6.t: yurmeende immornde ka Joomi maa. Pellet, ko Kaŋko woni Nanoowo, gannduɗo oon.

44:7.t: Jeyɗo kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndiin e ko woni kon hakkunde majji, si wonii ko on yananaaɓe.

44:8.t: Deweteeɗo goo alaa, si wanaa Kaŋko. Homo wuurna, Himo wara. Jeyɗo on Jeyi baabiraaɓe mon aramɓe ɓeen.

44:9.t: Ko woni tan, ɓe wonii e sikke, heɓe pija.

44:10.t: Habbito ñande kammu ngun ardata e curki feeñuuki,

44:11.t: suddayki yimɓe ɓen. [Ɓe mbi'anee]: "Ɗuum ko lepte mu'usuuɗe" !

44:12.t: "Joomi amen, huncan min lepte ɗeen. Minen ko men gooŋɗinɓe".

44:13.t: Ko honno ɓe mbaajitorta, ko goongo Nulaaɗo ɓannginɗo ariino ɓe?

44:14.t: Refti ɓe nduŋti, ɓe mb'i: "Ko tinndinaaɗo, kaangaaɗo".

44:15.t: Awa ko Min ittooɓe lepte ɗen seeɗa; kono pellet, ko on ruttitotooɓe.

44:16.t: Ñande Min nanngiroyta bippannde mawnde nden, pellet, ko Min yoɓtoytooɓe.

44:17.t: Gooŋɗii Min njarribinoke ado maɓɓe, yimɓe Fir'awna ɓen, Nulaaɗo tedduɗo ari e maɓɓe,

44:18.t: won'de: "mbaɗee e juuɗe am, jiyaaɓe Allah ɓeen. Min ko mi Nulaaɗo e mon, koolniiɗo.

44:19.t: E won'de wota on townitano Allah, tawde mi addanay on hujja ɓannguɗo.

44:20.t: Min kadi noon, mi moolorii Jeyɗo kam oon Jeyi on, nde piɗotonmi kaaƴe.

44:21.t: Si on ngooŋɗinaa kam, haray celee kam".

44:22.t: O noddi Joomi makko, won'de: "Ɓee ɗoo, ko yimɓe bonɓe".

44:23.t: "Yaadir e jiyaaɓe Am ɓen jehma; nganndon ko on sukketeeɓe.

44:24.t: Ngaccaa maayo ngoon deeƴa [si on lummbii] ɓeya kan, ko konu yooleteengu".

44:25.t: Ɗuuɗii ko ɓe ngacci e gese e ɓulli,

44:27.t: e dokke ɓe ngonnoo e neeminireede.

44:28.t: Ko wano noon. Hooti Min ndonini ɗi yimɓe woɓɓe.

44:29.t: Kammu nguun toɓaali ɓe, wonaa leydi ndin, ɓe ngonaani kadi muñanteeɓe.

44:30.t: Gooŋɗii Min ndaɗndii ɓiɗɓe Israa'iila ɓeen e lepte koyneeje;

44:31.t: immorde e Fir'awna, tawde o laatino townitiiɗo, jiyaaɗo e fantimɓe ɓeen.

44:32.t: Gooŋɗii Min cuɓorike ɓe e dow ganndal e hoore winndere ndeen,

44:33.t: Min ngokki ɓe Ma'andeeji, ɗi jarrabuyee ɓannguɗo woni e mum.

44:35.t: "Ndee wonaani, si wonaa maayde amen aranere nden tan. Min wonatah immintinoyteeɓe.

44:36.t: Awa artiree baabiraaɓe amen ɓeen, si wonii ko on gooŋɗuɓe".

44:37.t: Kere ko kamɓe ɓuri moƴƴude kaa ko yimɓe "Tubba'in" ɓeen e ɓeya adinooɓe ɓe? Min kalkuno ɓeen, tawde hari ko ɓe bonɓe.

44:38.t: Min tagiraali kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin e ko woni hakkunde majji kon, fijooɓe.

44:39.t: Min tagiraali ɗin ɗiɗi, si wonaa e goonga. Kono ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe, ɓe nganndaa.

44:40.t: Pellet, ko Ñalaande Seerndindiro ngon, woni ko ɓe saatinanaa, kamɓe fof.

44:41.t: Ñalnde nde giɗo duncanoytaa giɗo [mum] hay hu'unde; ɓe wonaani kadi walloyteeɓe,

44:42.t: si wonaa mo Allah yurmaa woo. Pellet, ko Kaŋko woni pooluɗo, jurmotooɗo On.

44:45.t: A sikkay ko taayinaa ; hino fata ka ndeer deedi.

44:47.t: Nanngee mo pooɗiron ka hakkunde dulɓatnge.

44:48.t: refti njuppon ka hoore makko, lepte patinaaɗe ɗeen.

44:49.t: Meeɗu noon ! Asn [sikkunooɗo] ko a poolɗo, tedduɗo.

44:50.t: Awa ko ɗuum woni kon ko cikkitiɗon e mum.

44:51.t: Pellet, gooŋɗuɓe ɓren ngonii e weerde koolniinde,

44:53.t: heɓe ɓoornoo ko ɗaati e ko tekki, hara hiɓe peewtondiri.

44:54.t: Ko wano noon. Min ndesini ɓe kadi yaacɓe gite.

44:55.t: Hiɓe nodda toon, kala muuyanteeɗi, hara ko ɓe hooliiɓe.

44:56.t: Ɓe meeɗataa toon maayde, si wonaa maayde aranere nden. O daɗnda ɓe lepte Jahiimi ɗeen.

44:57.t: ko dokkal noon, immorde ka Joomi maa. Awa ko ɗuum woni maloore mawnde ndeen.

44:58.t: Ko Min newiniri nde e ɗamngal maaɗa, ko no ɓe mbaajitora.

44:59.t: Habito. Kamɓe ne ko ɓe habbitiiɓe.

45:2.t: Jippagol deftere nde, ko immorde ka Allah, pooluɗo, Ñeeño O.

45:3.t: Pellet, hino e tagugol kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndin, Ma'andeeji wonan'de gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen.

45:4.t: Hino e takgol oon ngol kadi, e kon ko O saaki e ruugayɗi, ko Ma'andeeji wonan'de yimɓe yananaaɓe ɓeen.

45:5.t: E luutondirgol jehma e ñalawma ngol, e kon ko Allah jippiniri ka kammu, immorde e toɓo, O wuurnitiri ngo leydi ndin ɓaawo ndi yo'orude, e firlitagol keneeli ɗin, ko Ma'andeeji wonan'de yimɓe haqqilooɓe ɓen.

45:6.t: Ɗiin ko Ma'andeeji Allah ɗi Min njanngirante hoore goonga. E ko holɗum e yewtere ɓe gooŋɗinta, ɓaawo [yewtere] Allah nden e Aayeeje makko ɗeen?

45:8.t: Mo no nana Aayeeje Allah ɗen hino janngee e dow makko, refti o hedditora e toownitaare, wa si tawii o nanaani ɗe. Awa weltinir mo lepte mu'usuuɗe.

45:9.t: Si o anndii goɗɗum e aayeeje Amen ɗeen, o jogitora ɗum jalnori. Ɓeen ɗoon, hino woodani lepte koynooje:

45:10.t: Jahannama hino caggal maɓɓe. Ko ɓe paggitinoo duncanoytaaɓe hay hu'unde, wonaa kon ko ɓe jogitinoo yiɗɓe ko wonaa Allah. Hino woodani ɓe lepte mawɗe.

45:11.t: Ndee [deftere]ko peewal. Ɓeen yedduɓe noon aayeeje Joomi maɓɓe ɗen, hino woodani lepte coɓɗe mu'usuuɗe.

45:12.t: Ko Alla oon woni ko eeltanta mon maaya ngam laaɗe ndoga e hengo e dow yamiroore makko, ngam ɗaɓɓon e ɓural makko e yaama joo njetton.

45:13.t: O eeltani on ko woni e kammuuji e ka leydi fof, wonii e ɗuum kaawisaaji wonan'de yimɓe miijatooɓe.

45:14.t: Maakan ɓeen goonɗinɓe yooɓe njaafa ɓeen ɓe tijjaaki nyalɗi Alla ngam O yoɓa ɓe yimɓe koɓe paggittono ko.

45:15.t: Kalo golluɗo ko moƴƴi,ko fii hoore-makko; kala kadi bonnuɗo, yantat e makko refti ko ka Joomi maa woni ruttorde mon.

45:16.t: Min tottii banii Israa*iil deftere e ñeeñal e annabaagal Min njeɗiɓe e dagiiɗi Min ɓurniɓe ko heewi e binnde he.

45:17.t: Min totti dallillaaji ɓannginooji ɓe luuraani si wonah caggal nde ganndal ari e mum en sabu bewre hakkunde maɓɓe pellet Jooma na ñaawa hakkunde maɓɓe ñande darnga koɓe njeddandiratnoo ko.

45:18.t: Refti min mbaɗma e laawol e yamiroore amen, woto rew belaaɗe ɓeen ɓe ngannda.

45:19.t: Pellet ɓeen ɓe nafataama gaa e Alla hay hu'unde pellet tooñooɓe yogo e mum en ko weldiiɓe, Alla woni keeda hulɓe ɓe.

45:20.t: O quraana kombo gite e peewal e yurmeende wonan'de yananaaɓe ɓe.

45:21.t: Mbele ɓeen waɗɓe boneeji na nanndi e gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli golle lobbe hoɓe fota e nguurndam mum en e maayde maɓɓe bonii koɓe ñaawata.

45:22.t: Alla tagrii kammuuji e leydi goonga ngam kala fittaandu yoɓee kondu fagginoo ko kamɓe ɓe tooñetaake.

45:23.t: Mbele a yiaani oon jaggirɗo belaaɗe makko deweteeɗo Alla majjini mbo e dow ganndal O uddi nanɗe makko e ɓernde makko, o waɗi e gite makko hee cuddi ko hombo feewnata oon caggal Alla mate on miictaaka.

45:24.t: He'eferɓe mbii ɗum wona si wona nguurndam aduna min maaya min nguura, halkataa min si wona jamaanu, ɓe ngalana ɗuum ganndal ɓe cikkita tan.

45:25.t: Si aayeeje amen ɓannguɗe njanngaama e mum en hujja maɓɓe wonata si wona ngaddee baabiraaɓe amen si on ngonii gooŋɗuɓe.

45:26.t: Maaku ko alla wuurnata on refti o wara on refti renndina on fa'ade ñalawma darnga mbo sikke alah e mum, kono ko ɓuri heewde e yimɓe ngannda.

45:27.t: Woodanii Alla laamu kammuuji e leydi, ñande darnga darii ñande heen meerenteeɓe ɓe perta.

45:28.t: Haɗa yiya -aan nulaaɗa- kala leñol na gurfanii e koppi mum,kala leñol na noddiree deftere mum hannde woni ko njoɓeteɗon ko ngollatnaɗon e ndeer aduna.

45:29.t: Ndee ko deftere amen honde wowla goonga, min ngoniina min ceeraani won'de emin njamira nde winndate ko ngollatna ɗon.

45:30.t: Tawi ko ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli golle lobbe O naatnatɓe e yurmeende makko, ko ɗuum woni mala ɓanngungal.

45:31.t: Tawi ko ɓeen he'efareeɓe mbele aayeeje am ɗe njanngetanooke e dow mon mawnikiniɗon laatiɗon yimɓe bonɓe.

45:32.t: Si ɓe mbiaama pellet fodoore Alla ko goonga sikke alah heen mbi'on min ngannda ko woni darnga, min cikkiti cikkitagol min ngonaani yananaaɓe.

45:33.t: boneeji ɗi ɓe paggitinoo ɗiin feñana ɓe, ko ɓe njalkitatnoo kon fiiltoo ɓe.

45:34.t: ɓe mbi'ana hannde min njejjita mon hono no njejjitirɗon pottal ñangu mon hannde ngu, ko yiite woni hoɗorde mon on ndañata walladiiɓe.

45:35.t: ɗuum noon ko sabu on njaggarii aayeeje Alla ɗe njalkito nguurndam aduna hoomti on,hannde ɓe njaltata e yiite ɓe nduttataaka aduna ɓe ngolla golle lobbe haa Alla weleeɓe.

45:36.t: Woodanii Alla jettooje nder kammuuji e leydi Jom binnde.

45:37.t: Na woodani mbo manngu ndeer kammuuji e leydi ko Kaŋko woni mbo gooto foolata ñeeñɗo.

46:2.t: Jippagol deftere nden, ko immorde ka Allah, pooluɗo, ñeeño on.

46:3.t: Min tagiraali kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin e ko woni hakkunde majji, si wonaa e goonga e lajala happaangal [fii mum]. Yedduɓe ɓen ko ɗuurniiɓe e ko ɓe ndentiniraa kon.

46:4.t: Maaku: "On nji'ii ko ndewoton kon hara wonaa Allah, kollee Kam ko ɗi tagi e leydi ndiin? Kaa hara hiɗi mari geɗal e [tagoore] kammuuji ɗiin? Awa ngaddanee lam deftere jippinaande ado ndee ɗoo ma batte ganndal, si wonii ko on gooŋɗuɓe !".

46:5.t: Ko hommbo ɓuri majjude, wa on dewoowo ko wanaa Allah, ko jaabotaako mo haa Ñande Darngal? Hara ɗin [deweteeɗi] ko welsindiiɗi e dewal majji.

46:6.t: Si yimɓe ɓen mooɓoyaama [ka Darngal], ɗi ngontanoyat ɓe añɓe, ɓe ngona e jeddugol ko ɓe ndewaynooɗi kon.

46:7.t: Si aayeeje Amen ɓannguɗe ɗen janngaama e maɓɓe, yedunooɓe goonga ɓen tuma nde arnoo e maɓɓe ɓen mbi'a: "Ɗuum ko mbilewu ɓanngu ngu".

46:8.t: Kaa ɓe wi'at woni :"O pekindi nde?" Awa maaku: "Si taw mi pefkndi nde, awa doo on duncantaa lam hu'unde e [lepte] Allah ɗen. Ko Kaŋko ɓuri anndude oon, tuma nde jumpoton e mayre. O yonii seedee hakkunde am e mon. Ko Kaŋko woni kaforowo, jurmotooɗo On.

46:9.t: Maaku: "Mi wonaa adano e Nulaaɓe ɓeen; mi anndaa kadi ko waɗetee mi, maa ko waɗeteɗon. Mi jokkaa si wonaa ko wahayinaa kon e am; mi laataaki si wonaa jeertinoowo ɓanngina".

46:10.t: Maaku: "Yeetee kam, si tawii le konde iwrunde ka Allah, njedduɗon ɗum, seedotooɗo e ɓiɗɓe Israa'ila ɓen ceedii e [sellugol] ɗum, o gooŋɗini, onon kan townitiɗon...Pellet, Allah feewnata yimɓe tooñooɓe ɓeen.

46:11.t: Yedduɓe ɓen wi'ani gooŋɗinɓe ɓen: "Si tawno ɗuum ko moƴƴere, ɓeen (waasuɓe) adototaako men e mum". Nde wonunoo ɓe fewnoraani nde, ma ɓe mbi'u: "Ndee ko fenaande neeɓunde!".

46:12.t: Hino aditiinde, deftere Muusaa nden, ɗowornde e yurmeende. Ndee ɗoo kadi, ko deftere gooŋɗinir- nde [ɗeya defte] e ɗemngal aarabu, fii yo jeertinir (nde) tooñooɓe ɓen e weltinirnde moƴƴinooɓe ɓeen.

46:13.t: Pellet, wi'uɓe ɓeen: "Ko Allah woni Joomi amen", refti ɓe tabiti (e gooŋɗinal), kulol alanaa ɓeen, wonaa kamɓe cunoytoo.

46:14.t: Ko ɓeen ngoni yimɓe Aljanna ɓeen duumotooɓe ton, njoɓdi ko ɓe ngollatnoo kon.

46:15.t: Min njamirii neɗɗaŋke on moƴƴagol e jibimɓe mo ɓen: Jiido makko soworike mo saɗteende, o njibiniri mo kadi saɗteende; soweede mo e enteede mo ko lebbi cappanɗe tati, haa ka o si o yottike cagatalaaku makku nguun o timminii duuɓi cappanɗe nayi, o wi'a: "Joomi, longinam jettugol neema Ma mo neeminirɗaa mi miin e jibimɓe kam, e nde mi ngollata moƴƴuɗi weltinayɗe Ma, moƴƴinanaa kam geñngol am ngol. Mi tuubanii Ma, ko mi jiyaaɗo e jebbiliiɓe ɓeen".

46:16.t: Ko ɓeen ngoni ɓe Min njaɓanta ko ɓuri moƴƴude e ko ɓe ngolli, Min njawtana ɓe bonɗi maɓɓe, (ɓe jeyaama) e yimɓe Aljanna ɓen. Ɗuum ko fodoore goonga nde ɓe podanoo.

46:17.t: Kala noon bi'anɗo jipnaaɓe mum ɓeen: "Uf mo'on ! Kere on poday kam immintineede hara le gooŋɗii mofte yawtiino ado kam?" Hara ɓen ɗiɗo no faabtinora Allah [wiide mo]: "Ee bone maa, Gooŋɗin ! Pellet, fodooree Allah nde ko goonga". O wi'a: "Ɗuum wonaani, si wonaa tinndi adinooɓe ɓen".

46:18.t: Ko ɓeen woni ɓe Konngol ngol jojji e mum, (ɓe jiyaama) e mofte yawtunooɗe ado maɓɓe, immorde e jinna e yimɓe. Pellet, ɓe laatino sooyɓe.

46:19.t: Hino woodani kala [fedde e maɓɓe]: darjaaji e ko ɓe ngolli ko, fii no O hunnirana ɓe njoɓdi golle maɓɓe ɗeen; e hoore ɓe tooñetaake.

46:20.t: Ñande he'eferɓe ɓeen weeɓitoytee e Yiite ngeen (ɓe mbi'anee): "On naɓii moƴƴi mon ɗin ka nguurndam mon aduna, ndakmitorɗon ɗi. Hannde noon, on njoɓitirte lepte koynooje, sabu ko townitoraynoɗon ko ka hoore leydi, ko aldaa e goonga, e ko ngollatnoɗon noɗon kon faasiqaaku".

46:21.t: Jaŋto fii musiɗɓe Aadi (Huudi) ɓeen, nde o jertinirnoo yimɓe makko ɓen aynde nden - gooŋɗii hari jeertinooji yawtiino ye'eso makko e ɓaawo makko - won'de: "Wota on rew si wonaa Allah. Miin miɗo hulani on lepte ñalaande mawnde".

46:22.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "E a aru min fii yo a firliaa min e dewetee- ɗi amen ɗiin? Awa addan min ko kammbiranɗaa min kon, si wonii ko a jiyaaɗo e gooɓe ɓeen".

46:23.t: O maaki: "Ganndal ngal ko ka Allah woni. Miin mi yottinanat on tun woni, ko mi nulaa kon. Ko woni tun mi yi'ii ko on yimɓe majjaaɓe".

46:24.t: Nde ɓe nji'unoo ruulde honde weeɓitii fewtiri ayɗe maɓɓe ɗen, ɓe mbi'i: "Ndee ko duulere toɓatnde e men". Ko nden kan woni ! ko kawjirnoɗon kon : ko henndu, ndu lepte mu'usuuɗe woni e mum.

46:25.t: hindu muncira kala hu'unde, yamiroore Joomi mayru". Ɓe mbaɗtini, tawi yi'etaake si wonaa koɗooli maɓɓe ɗin. Ko wano nii Min njoɓitirta yimɓe bonnooɓe ɓen.

46:26.t: Gooŋɗii Min njeɗiino ɓe, e ko ko Min njeɗaali on e mum. Min mbaɗani ɓe nanɗe, e ji'iɗe e ɓerɗe. Kono ɗeen nanɗe maɓɓe, e j'iiɗe maɓɓe e ɓerɗe maɓɓe (fof) duncanaani ɓe goɗɗum, tawde ɓe laatino yeddooɓe aayeeje Allah ɗen. Ko ɓe njalkitatnoo ko jippii e maɓɓe.

46:27.t: Gooŋɗii Min kalkiino ca'e wonnooɓe sera mon; Min pirlitiri aayeeje ɗeen, mbelajo'o ɓe nduttoto.

46:28.t: Ko haɗno ɗin ɗi ɓe njogitornoo deweteeɗi ɓaɗtinorɗi ga Allah, faaboo ɓe? Tigi on, ɗiin majjirii ɓe; ko ɗum wonnoo fenaande maɓɓe e ko ɓe pekindotonoo. Mo

46:29.t: Jaŋto tuma nde Min imminnoo fedde jinna e maaɗa, hiɗi heɗoo Alqur'aana. Nde ɗi tawanoo ɗum, ɗi mbi'i: "Heɗee"...Nde [janngin kin] timmunoo, ɗi huccitiri ka yimɓe majji, jeertinooji.

46:30.t: Ɗi mbi'i: "eey mon yo mbatu amen, min nanii deftere jippinaande ɓaawo Muusaa, goonginnde ɗen adiiɗe nde. Hinde feewna e goonga e laawol Pocciingol.

46:31.t: Eey mon yo mbatu amen, nootee noddoowo e Allah on, ngooŋɗinon mo. [On tuma] O haforanat on bakkatuuji ɗiin, O daɗnda on lepte mu'usuuɗe.

46:32.t: Kala mo nootaake noddoowo e Allah on, o wonaa laawotooɗo ka leydi, o alaa kadi giɗo ga makko. Ko ɓen ngoni e ndeer majjere ɓanngunde".

46:33.t: E ɓee nji'aani won'de ko Allah tagi kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndin, O ronkiraani tagugol ɗi, won'de ko O kattanɗo wuurnitugol maayɓe ɓen? Ko non woniri. Pellet, ko O kaɗtanɗo kala hu'unde.

46:34.t: Ñande he'eferɓe ɓeen weeɓitoytee e Yiite ngen, [ɓe mbi'anee]: "Wonaa goonga nii?" Ɓe mbi'a : "Ko non woniri! Min ngoɗondirii Joomi amen!". O Daala : "Awa meeɗiree non lepte ɗeen, sabu ko njeddiratnoɗon".

46:35.t: Muññor muñal joomiraaɓe pellital ɓeen ka Nulaaɓe; wota a hawjan ɓe. Ñande ɓe nji'oyta ko ɓe kammbiranaa kon, ɓe mba'oyat wa si ɓe ñiiɓaano [ka leydi] si wonaa dumunna-hun ñalawma. Ɗun ko yottinal. Ko homɓe halketee si wonaa yimɓe faasiqiiɓe ɓeen?

47:1.t: Ɓeen yedduɓe ɓe falii laawol Allah ngol, O bonnii golle maɓɓe ɗeen.

47:2.t: Gooŋɗinɓe ɓen ɓe ngolli golle moƴƴe, ɓe ngooŋɗini ko jippinaa kon e Muhammad - on goonga immorɗo e Joomi maɓɓe - O yawtanii ɓe bonɗi maɓɓe ɗin, O moƴƴinii fiyaaku maɓɓe oon.

47:3.t: Ko waɗi ɗuum, ko tawde yedduɓe ɓen njokkii mehre nden, gooŋɗiinɓe ɓen kan njokki goonga kan immorde e Joomi maɓɓe on. Ko wano nii Allah fiyiranta yimɓe ɓen yeru maɓɓe ɗen.

47:4.t: Si on kawri e yedduɓe ɓeen (ka hare), ko soppugol daaɗe ɗeen. Haa si on ɗuɗɗinii bargol ɓe, kaɓɓon koyɗe ɗen. Ko si on moƴƴora e maɓɓe ngaccitugol ɓe ɓaawo ɗuum, maa si ko soktiigu, haa hare ndeen wallina jogaaji mayre. Ko non ñaawiraa, si Allah no muuyunoo, O wallitotono on e maɓɓe, ko woni tan, ko no O jarribora yoga mon e dow yoga. Waraaɓe fii Allah ɓeen, pellet, O yeebataa golle maɓɓe ɗeen.

47:5.t: Arma O feewna ɓe, O moƴƴina fiyaaku maɓɓe,

47:6.t: O naatnya ɓe Aljanna, mo O anndini ɓe fii mum.

47:7.t: Eey mon yo gooŋɗiinɓe, si on ngonii wallooɓe fii Allah, O wallat on, O tabintina teppe mon ɗen.

47:8.t: Yedduɓe ɓee kan, halkaare woodanii ɓe, O majjinii kadi golle maɓɓe ɗeen.

47:9.t: Ɗuum le ko tawde ɓe añii ko Allah jippini kon, O bonni golle maɓɓe ɗeen.

47:10.t: E ɓee njiilaaki e leydi ndin, ɓe teskoo ko honno battane adinooɓe ɓeen wa'unoo? Allah halkuno fii maɓɓe. sugu mum kadi hino woodani yedduɓe ɓeen.

47:11.t: Ko waɗi ɗum, ko tawde ko Allah woni giɗo gooŋɗiinɓe ɓeen; hara non yedduɓe ɓen, giɗo (woo) alanaa ɓe.

47:12.t: Pellet, Allah naatnoyat gooŋɗiinɓe ngolli moƴƴuɗi ɓen, Aljannaaji ɗi canɗi ilata ley (kuɓeeje) majje. Yedduɓe ɓeen kan, heɓe ndakmitoo, ɓe ñaamira wano neemoraaɗi ɗiin ñaamirta; hara noon ko Yiite nge woni jaaƴorde maɓɓe.

47:13.t: Ɗuuɗii e ca'e, ɓurnooɓe tiiɗude semmbe, e dii ndeen saare maa raɗiinde ma, ɓe Moen kalki, ballo alanaa ɓe.

47:14.t: Kere ko on gonɗo e ɓanngannduyee immorde ka Joomi mum, wa'i wa ɓeen cuɗinanaaɓe kuuɗe mun bonɗe ɗen, ɓe jokki beleeɗe maɓɓe?

47:15.t: Ko woni sifa Aljanna podaaɗo on gooŋɗuɓe ɓeen: ina toon canɗi ndiyam ɗi dakamme mum waylaaki, e caatli ɓira ɗi waylataa dakamme mum, e caatli konnjam mbelayɗam yarooɓe, e caatlii njuuri laɓɓinaandi. Hino woodani ɓe kadi ton: kala dimɓe, e haforaneede immorde e Joomi maɓɓe. [Ɓeen wa'oyay] wa luttinoyteeeɓe ɓen ka Yiite, ɓe njarnee ndiyam fatayɗam, ɗam taƴa tekteki maɓɓe ɗin?

47:16.t: Hino e maɓɓe heɗitotooɓe ma. Kono ko haa si ɓe yaltii ka maaɗa, ɓe wi'ana okkaaɓe ganndal ɓeen: "Ko holɗum dee, o wi'unoo naanen?" Ko ɓen woni ɓe Allah noti e ɓerɗe mum ɗeen, ɓe njokki mbeleeɗe maɓɓe ɗeen.

47:17.t: Feewuɓe ɓeen kan, O ɓeydu ɓe peewal O okkiɓe gooŋniɗal maɓɓe.

47:18.t: Hara ɓee no kabbbii si wonaa Darngal ngal nde ardata ɓe e juhal? Gooŋɗii le Ma'andeeji maggal arii. Ko holno ɓe mbaajitoroyta, si ngal ardanii ɓe (juhal)?

47:19.t: Awa anndu pellet, deweteeɗo alaa si wonaa Allah, imsinanoɗaa bakkati maa ɗin, e gooŋɗiinɓe worɓe ɓeen e gooŋɗiinɓe rewɓe ɓen. Allah no anndi ñallirde mon e hiirirde mon.

47:20.t: Gooŋɗinɓe ɓen hino mbi'a: "Hara non cortewol (simoore) jippotono!" Si tawii le cortewol ñeñaangol jippinaama, fii hare jaŋtaama e maggol, a tinay ɓen ɓe ñawu woni e ɓerɗe mum hino ndaare, ndaarɗe mo maayde faɗɗini. Ko haanannoo ɓe,

47:21.t: ko ɗoftagol e konngol moƴƴol. Si fiyaaku o fellitii, ɓe ngooŋɗinno Allah, ko ɗuum ɓuratnoo moƴƴannde ɓe.

47:22.t: E on tamƴinaaki, si wonii on ɗuurnima nde mbonnoton e leydi ndin, taƴon enɗamaaji mon?

47:23.t: Ko ɓeen ngoni ɓe Allah huɗi ɓeen, O fa'aɗini ɓe, O wumini giiɗe maɓɓe ɗeen.

47:24.t: E ɓee tasktaako Alqur'aana, ka ko cokirɗe woni woni e ɓerɗe mum en?

47:25.t: Pellet, ɓeen ruttorɓe ɓabbe mum ɓaawo nde peewal ngal ɓanngannoo ɓe, ko seytaane cuɗinani ɓe, o hodi ɓe.

47:26.t: Ko tawde ɓe mbi'anii ɓeen añuɓe ko Allah jippini kon: "Min ɗoftoto on e yoga e piiji". Allah non no anndi gunndooji maɓɓe ɗiin.

47:27.t: Ko honno (ɓee mba'oyta) tuma nde Malaa'ika'en timmini fii maɓɓe, hara hiɓe bantoo j'eece maɓɓe e dote maɓɓe?

47:28.t: Ko tawde ko ɓe njokkii ko tikkinta Allah, ɓe añii welayɗi Mo ɗiin, O bonni fii golle maɓɓe ɗeen.

47:29.t: Kaa ɓeen ɓe ñawu woni e ɓerɗe mum sikuu won'de Allah yaltintaa ngaynguuji maɓɓe?

47:30.t: Sinno Min kaajuno, Min kolleteno ɓe. Ganndiraa ɓe Ma'andeeji maɓɓe ɗiin; ko pellet, a nganndiratno ɓe ka konngol belngol. Allah non hino anndi golle mon ɗeen.

47:31.t: Ma Min njarribo on, haa Min ngannda tiiɗniiɓe ɓen e mon, e muññiiɓe ɓeen. Min njarriboo kadi kabaruuji mon.

47:32.t: Pellet, yedduɓe ɓeen ɓe paddi laawol Allah ngol, ɓe lunndii Nulaaɗo on ɓaawo nde peewal ngal ɓanngannde ɓe, ɓeen lorrataa Allah hay hu'unde. Ma O bonnu fii golle maɓɓe ɗeen.

47:33.t: Eey mon yo gooŋɗinɓe! ɗoftee Allah, ɗoftoɗon Nulaaɗo on, wata on mbonnu golle mon ɗeen.

47:34.t: Pellet, ɓeen yedduɓe ɓe sakkii e laawol Allah ngol, hooti ɓe maayi ko ɓe he'eferɓe, Allah haforanoytaa ɓe.

47:35.t: Wota on lo'inkino, noddon e beldal, ko onon woni fooluɓe ɓeen, Allah no wonndi e mon, O ustantaa on njoɓdi golle mon ɗeen.

47:36.t: Ganndee nguurndam aduna ko fijindaaru e mbeleeɗe tan; hara le si on ngooŋɗiii, on kulii [Allah], O yeɗay on njoɓdi mon ndiin, o lamndotaako on jawle mon ɗeen.

47:37.t: Si O aru laɓndaade on fii majje, haa O duñii on (e mum), nguddon, O feññina noon konnaagu mon ngun.

47:38.t: Hey mon onon ɗoo, hoɗon noddee e nafqugol fii laawol Allah ngol. Hino e mo'on wuddatɓe. Kala non gudduɗo, haray ko hoore-makko o wuddani. Ko Allah woni Galo On, onon ngoni wa'asuɓe ɓeen. Si on nduŋtii, O waɗtitira on woɓɓe goo, hara non ɓeen mba'ataa wano mon.

48:2.t: fii no Allah yaafoma ko ngardinɗaa e bakkaat, e ko sakkitii, e fii no O timminira neema makko on e maaɗa, O feewne e laawol po'occiingol.

48:3.t: e no Allah wallirma ballal tiiɗngal.

48:4.t: Ko Kaŋko woni jippinɗo deeƴere nden e ɓerɗe gooŋɗinɓe ɓen, fii no ɓe ɓeydora gooŋɗinal e dow gooŋɗinal maɓɓe ngal. Ko Allah woodani koneeji kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndin; Allah siforii won'de gannduɗo, Ñeeñɗo,

48:5.t: e fii no O naadira gooŋɗinɓe worɓe ɓen e gooŋɗinɓe rewɓe ɓen, Aljannaaji ɗi canɗi ilata ley mum, ko ɓɗe duumotooɓe e majji, e no O montira-naɓe banɗi maɓɓe ɗin. Ɗuum wonii ka Allah, malal mawnungal.

48:6.t: E no O leptira naafiqiiɓe worɓe ɓeen e naafiqiiɓe rewɓe ɓeen, e sirkooɓe worɓe ɓen e sirkooɓe rewɓe ɓen, sikkooɓe Allah sikke bonɗe. Yiiloonde bonɗi ngonii e dow maɓɓe. Allah tikkaniiɓe kadi, O huɗii ɓe, O hebilanii ɓe Jahannama. Nge bonii ruttorde !

48:7.t: Ko Allah woodani konuuji kammuuli ɗiin e leydi ndin. Allah siforii won'de 'oolɗo, Ñeeñɗo.

48:8.t: Min nulirii ma seedotooɗo, wewlinoowo, e jeertinoowo,

48:9.t: fii no gooŋɗiniron Allah e Nulaaɗo makko on, mawninon mo, teddinon mo, subbunhinanoɗon mo bimmbi e kiikiiɗe.

48:10.t: Pellet, ɓeen wonɓe ahodude e maaɗa, anndu ko Allah ɓe woni e ahodude. Junngo Allah ngon no dow juuɗe maɓɓe ɗen. Kala non pirtuɗo, haray ko hoore makko o firtani; kala kadi hunnuɗo ko o ahodi kon e Allah, nde o okkata mo njoɓdi mawnundi.

48:11.t: Aray nde tultuɓe jiyaaɓe e yimɓe ladde ɓen mbi'ane: "Jawle amen ɗeen e ɓeynguureeji amen ɗin sokolinii min. Insinano min". Hiɓe wowlira ɗemɗe maɓɓe, ko alaa e ɓerɗe maɓɓe. Maaku: "Ko hommbo waawani on ka Allah, si O faandanike on lorra maa hara O faandani on nafa? Wurin Allah siforiino won'de kumpitiiɗo ko mgollaynoɗon kon.

48:12.t: Wurin on cikkuno Nulaaɗo on e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen ngartataano fes ka ɓeynguureeji maɓɓe. Ɗuum siɗinaa e ɓerɗe mon; cikkuɗon sikke bonɗe, laatiɗon yimɓe halkaaɓe.

48:13.t: Kala dee mo gooŋɗinaani Allah e Nulaaɗo makko on, haray Moɗen keblani yedduɓe ɓeen (Yiite) dulbaynge.

48:14.t: Ko Allah heeranii laamagol kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndiin. Himo haforana mo o muuyani, o lepta mo o muuyani. Allah siforii won'de kaforoowo, jurmotooɗo.

48:15.t: Aray nde luttuɓe ɓen mbi'a, tuma fokkitanoyton henndagol konu-hoyri ndin: "ngaccee min njokka on". Hiɓe faalaa waɗtitugol daalol Allah ngol. Maaku: "On njokkataa min fes. Ko wano mon nii Allah daalirnoo oya tuma". Ma ɓe mbi'u: "On añanat min tun woni". Tigi on, ɓe faamataano si wonaa seeɗa.

48:16.t: Maakan tultuɓe ɓen e yimɓe ladde ɓeen: "Arma nde noddeteɗon e yimɓe joomiraaɓe doole tiiɗuɓe. Hoɓon ɓe maaɗum ɓe silma. Si on ɗoftike, Allah okkat on mbarjaari moƴƴundi; si on nduŋtii ii no huccitirnoɗon oya tuma, O leptira lepte mu'usuuɗe".

48:17.t: Bakkaatu fawaaki e hoore ɓumɗo on, wonaa e laƴoowo on wonaa kadi e nawnuɗon bakkaatu fawii. Kala ɗoftiiɗo Allah e Nulaaɗo makko on, O naadoyay mo Aljannaaji ɗi canɗi ilata senngo ley mum. Kala kadi ɗuurniiɗo, O leptiray mo lepte mu'usuuɗe.

48:18.t: Gooŋɗii Allah welano gooŋɗinɓe ɓen, tuma ɓe ahondiraynoo e maaɗa ka ley lekki kin. O anndi ko woni kon ka ɓerɗe maɓɓe, O jippini deeƴere nden e maɓɓe, O warjoriiɓe uddital ɓadiingal,

48:19.t: e konu-heyri ɗuuɗundi ndi ɓe keɓɓitotoo. Allah siforii won'de poolɗo, Ñeeñɗo.

48:20.t: Allah fodii on konu-heyri ɗuuɗundi ndi keɓɓitoɗon, O yaccinani on ndii ɗoo, o suri juuɗe yimɓe ɓeen e mo'on, fii yo wonu Ma'ande wonan'de gooŋɗinɓe ɓen, O fewnira on laawol Pocciingol.

48:21.t: E woɗndi goo ndi on haɗtanaali taho, Allah kan no huɓindii ndi. Allah siforii won'de kaɗtanɗo kala hu'unde.

48:22.t: Hay si yedduɓe ɓeen haɓiino on, ɓe huccintinayno ɓabbe maɓɓe ɗen, refti ɓe keɓataano giɗo wonaa ballao.

48:23.t: Ɗuum ko sunna Alla peƴƴunooɗo ko adii. A heɓantaa laawol Alla ngol, mbattiigu.

48:24.t: Ko Kaŋko woni curanɗo on juuɗe maɓɓe ɗen e mo'on, e curɗo juuɗe mon ɗen e maɓɓe, ka aynde Makka, ɓaawo O foolni on e maɓɓe. Allah siforii won'de deenɗo ko ngolloton kon.

48:25.t: Ko ɓeen ngoni ko jeddi, ɓe paddii on e Juurlirde Hormorde ndeen, [ɓe haɗi] neldaari ndin nde ndi yottotoo nokku mayri. Si wonaano sabu worɓe gooŋɗinɓe e rewɓe gooŋɗinnɓe ɓe on nganndataano haa kaɓon ɓe, bakkaatu heɓa on e fee maɓɓe, ko aldaa e ganndugol... fii yo Allah naatnu e yurmeende makko nden, on mo O muuyani. Si ɓe seetndondir-no [e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen], ko pellet, Min leptirayno yedduɓe ɓen e maɓɓe, lepte mu'usuuɗe.

48:26.t: Tuma nde ɓeya yedduɓe mbaɗnoo ka ɓerɗe maɓɓe jinngo, jinngo majjiyaŋkooɓe...Allah jippini deeƴere makko nden e dow Nulaaɗo makko on e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen, O fawi ɓe konngol gooŋɗal, ɓe woni ɓurɓe jojjude e hanndude e maggol. Allah siforii ganndugol kala hu'unde.

48:27.t: Gooŋɗii Allah goonginiranii Nulaaɗo makko on, koyɗol ngol e hoore goonga : Ko maa naaton e juulirde Hormorde ndeen si Allah muuyii, hara ko on hooliiɓe, femmbuɓe ko*e mon maa ɗuytuɓe (cukuli), on hulataa. Himo anndi ko on nganndaa. O waɗi ko wonaa ngol (naatugol makko) ɗon, uddital ɓadiingal.

48:28.t: Ko Kaŋko woni Nulirɗo Nulaaɗo makko on peewal e diina goonga, fii yo o fawaka ka e hoore kala diina. Allah yonii seedee.

48:29.t: Muhammdu ko Nulaaɗo Allah. Won'ɗuɓe e makko ɓeen ko ñaaɗuɓe e yedduɓe ɓeen, yurmondirɓe hakkunde maɓɓe. A yi'at ɓe hiɓe ruƴƴa, hiɓe cujja, hiɓe ɗaɓɓira Allah ɓural e welayee. Ma'andeeji maɓɓe ɗin no ka j'eece maɓɓe batte cujjugol ngol. Ko ɗuum woni ko ɓe ciforaa ka Tawreeta. No ɓe ciforaa ka Linjiila kan, ko wano remuru yaltingu puɗi mayru, ngu ɓanngini ɗi, ɗi tekki, ɗi fotondiri e binndeeje majji, hara ɗuum no haawna remooɓe, fii no [Allah] tikkinira ɓe yedduɓe ɓen. Allah fodii e maɓɓe ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli moƴƴuɗi ɗin, haforanal e njoɓdi mawnundi.

49:1.t: Eey mon yo ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ! wota on adito ye'eso Allah e Nulaaɗo makko on. Hulee Allah. Pellet, Allah ko Nanoowo, Ji'oowo.

49:2.t: Eey mon yo ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ! wota on toownu hitooji mon e dow hito Annabaajo on, wota on ewnor mo kadi konngol, wano no yoga mon ewnorta yoga, sakko golle mon ɗen mbonata, hara on so'aa-anndude.

49:3.t: Pellet, ɓeen joltinooɓe hotooji maɓɓe ɗin ka Nulaaɗo Allah on, ko ɓen ngoni ɓe Alla jarabii ɓerɗe mum ɗen gooŋɗal. Hino woodani ɓe haforanal e njoɓdi mawndi.

49:4.t: Pellet, ɓeen ɓe no noddire ka ɓaawo cuuɗi, ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude e maɓɓe, wonaa haqqilooɓe.

49:5.t: Sinno ɓe muññino haa njaltaa e maɓɓe, ko ɗuum ɓuraynoo moƴƴannde ɓe. Allah ko kaforoowo, jurmotooɗo.

49:6.t: Eey mon yo ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ! Si faasiqiijo ardanii on e kumpital, tefee fii wota on keɓor e yimɓe sabu majjeede, ngonton nimsuɓe e kon ko mbaɗɗɗon.

49:7.t: Nganndee won'de Nulaaɗo Allah on hino hakkunde mon. Si o tewtino on e ko ɗuuɗi e fiyakuuji, on tampayno. Kono Allah yiɗini on gooŋɗinal, O suɗini ngal e ɓerɗe mon; O añini on ke'eferaaku, e faasiqaaku e jeddi. Ko ɓeen ngoni feewɓe ɓen,

49:8.t: ɗuum ko ɓural immorde ka Allah e neema. Allah ko gannduɗo, Ñeeñɗo.

49:9.t: Si peɗle ɗiɗi e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen haɓii, moƴƴintinee hakkunde maɓɓe. Si fedde goo bewii e hoore ndeya, ko kaɓugol won'de e bewude nden, haa nde ruttoo e yamiroore Allah nden. Si nde ruttike, moƴƴintiniree hakkunde maɓɓe nunɗal. Nunɗee, tawde pellet, Allah no yiɗi nuunɗooɓe ɓeen.

49:10.t: Nganndee gooŋɗinɓe ɓen ko jeyduɓe. Haray moƴƴinee hakkunde jeydal mon ngal, kulon Allah, mbelajo'o on njurminte.

49:11.t: Eey mon yo ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ! Wota yimɓe jalnor yimɓe : hino gasa hara ɓen (jalaaɓe) hino ɓuri ɓe moƴƴude. Wanaa rewɓe ngoni ko jalnorta rewɓe : hino gasa hara ɓeen no ɓuri ɓe moƴƴude. Wata on aybidnir ko'e-mon, wota on bugondir jammooje (bonɗe). Innde faasiqaaku nden bonii ɓaawo nde gooŋɗinal nden. Kala mo tuubaali, ko ɓeen ngoni tooñuɓe ɓen.

49:12.t: Eey mon yo ɓen gooŋɗinɓe ! Woɗɗitee e ko ɗuuɗi e sikke. Pellet, yoga e sikke ko bakkaatu. Wota on wiɗondir, wata yoga mon ño'u yoga. Hara gooto e mo'on njiɗay ñaamugol teewu musiɗɗo mum maayɗo? Hiɗon añi ɗum. Kulee Allah. Pellet, Allah ko Jaɓoowo tuubuubuyee, jurmotooɗo.

49:13.t: Eey mon yo yimɓe ! Min tagiriii on immorde e gorel e deyel, Min mbaɗiri on leƴƴi e gori, fii yo on anndindir. Pellet, ɓurɓe teddude e mon ɓen ka Allah, ko ɓurɓe gooŋɗude ɓen e mon. Pellet, Allah ko gannduɗo, kumpitiiɗo.

49:14.t: Yimɓe ladde ɓen mbi'i: "Min ngooŋɗinii". Maaku: "On ngooŋɗinaani taho. Mbii'ee kan : Min silmii. Gooŋɗinal ngal naataali taho ka ɓerɗe mon. Si on ɗoftike Allah e Nulaaɗo makko on, O ɗuytantaa on hu'unde e golle mon ɗeen". Pellet, Allah ko kaforoowo, jurmotooɗo.

49:15.t: Gooŋɗinɓe (tigi) ɓeen, ko ɓen gooŋɗinɓe Allah e Nulaaɗo makko on, refti ɓe cikkitaaki, ɓe tiiɗnori kadi jawle e pittaali maɓɓe ɗin fii laawol Allah ngol. Ko ɓen ngoni gooŋɗɓe ɓen.

49:16.t: Maaku: "Kere on nganndinay Allah diina mon kan, hara non Allah no anndi kala ko woni kammuuji e ka leydi?" Allah ko ganduɗo kala hu'unde.

49:17.t: Hiɓe mbaj Ma fii ɓe silmii. Maaku: "Wata on mbajitam silmugol mon. Si ko woni, ko Allah wajitata on fii O feewnirii on e gooŋɗinal, si wonii ko on gooŋɗuɓe".

49:18.t: Pellet, Allah no anndi wirniiɗi kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndin. Allah ko deenɗo ko ngolloton kon.

50:1.t: Qaaf. Mi wooɗndirii Alqur'aanaare teddunde ndeen!

50:2.t: Si ko woni, ɓe ŋalɗu ko tawi kon jeertinoowo arii ɓe iwɗo e maɓɓe ; he'eferɓe ɓen mbi'i: "Ɗuum ɗoo ko hu'unde haawniinde.

50:3.t: Kere si min maayii, min ngoontii mbulmbuldi...? Ɗuum ɗon ko duttitagol goɗɗungol noon !"

50:4.t: Gooŋɗii miɗen nganndi ko leydi ndin ñaamata kon e maɓɓe ; hino ka Amen gaa deftere reennde.

50:5.t: Si ko woni, ɓe njeddu goonga kan tuma nde ka arnoo e maɓɓe, hiɓe e ndeer fiyaaku jilɓuɗo.

50:6.t: E ɓee ndaaraani kammu ngun dow maɓɓe, ko honno Min mahiri ngun Min cuɗini ngu ; hara perɗi alanaa ngu?

50:7.t: Leydi ndin kadi, Min mbeerti ndi Min mberlii e mayri pelle, Min puɗini e mayri kala nooneeji [puɗi] gooɗuɗi.

50:8.t: fii tasakuyee e waaju wonan'de kala jiyaaɗo duttotooɗo.

50:9.t: Min njippini kadi ndiyam mbarkinaaɗam ummaade ka kammu, Min puɗiniri ɗam gese e gabbe coñeteeɗe.

50:10.t: e leɗɗe tamaro juutɗe gon'dude e piindi fawondirndi,

50:11.t: ko arsike jeyaaɓe ɓen. Min nguurnitiri ɗam kadi leydi yoorundi. Awa ko noon woni fii ummital ngal.

50:12.t: Ado maɓɓe, yimɓe nuuhu ɓen, e yimɓe Ɓunndu ɓeen e Samuuda'en [fof] f Njedduno,

50:13.t: e 'Aadi'en, e Fir'awna e musiɗɓe Luutu ɓeen.

50:14.t: e yimɓe fitaare nden, e yimɓe Tubba' ɓeen. Kala maɓɓe jedɗuno Nulaaɓe ɓeen, kammbaa am on jojji.

50:15.t: Kere Min ndoŋkuno fii tagoore ado nde? Ko woni kamɓe, hiɓe e jiɓaare fii tagiteede laawol kesol.

50:16.t: Gooŋɗii Min tagii neɗɗaŋke on, Meɗen nganndi ko woŋkii makko kin sowinsinirta mo. Ko Minen ɓuri ɓadaade mo e dii ɗaɗol (makko) daande ngol.

50:17.t: tuma nde jaɓɓoytooɓe ɓeen ɗiɗo jaɓɓoroytoo [golle makko ɗeen] ñaamo e nano, hara hiɓe njooɗii.

50:18.t: O wowlataa konngol, si wonaa hino takko makko binndoowo tawaaɗo.

50:19.t: Ɗeɗɗere maayde nden ardi e goonga : "Ko ɗuum wonnnoo ko ndogaynoɗaa".

50:20.t: Wuttee ka alaandu ; ko nden woni Ñalaande kammbaa ndeen.

50:21.t: Woŋkii kala ara, hara hiki won'di e coggoowo e ceedotooɗo.

50:22.t: "Gooŋɗii a laatinoke belsindiiɗo e ndee. Min kunci wirngallo maa ngon kisan; gite maa ɗeen hannde ko ceeɓɗe".

50:23.t: Gonndiijo makko on wi'a: "Ko ɗuum ɗoo woni ka am ɗoo, maandinaa-ɗum".

50:24.t: Bugee ka Jahannama onon ɗiɗo, kala jedduɗo canndallo.

50:26.t: on baɗiduɗo e Allah deweteeɗo goo. Bugee mo ka ndeer lepte caɗtuɗe".

50:27.t: Cinndadiijo makko (seytaane) on wi'i: "Joomi amen, mi bewinaali oo; si ko woni, ko e majjere woɗɗunde o wonnoo e mum".

50:28.t: [Allah] daala : "Wota on njeddondir ka Am ɗoo ! Nde tawnoo Mi ardiniino e mon kammbaa.

50:29.t: Konngol waɗtitetaake ka am ɗoo ; Mi siforaa kadi tooñoowo jiyaaɓe ɓen".

50:30.t: Ñande Min mbi'anoyta Jahannama o : "E a heewii?" Nge wi'a: "Ko ɓeydee hino woodi?"

50:31.t: Aljanna on ɓaɗtinanee gooŋɗuɓe ɓen, hara wonaa ka woɗɗi.

50:32.t: "Ko ɗum ɗoo woni ko podaɗon, wonan'de kala duttiiɗo [e Joomi mun] deeniiɗo.

50:33.t: oon kuluɗo Joom Hinaranke oon ka wirnii, o ardi e ɓernde laaɓunde.

50:34.t: Naatiree mo e jam". Ko nden woni ñalaande luttaynde ndeen.

50:35.t: Hino woodani ɓe toon kala ko ɓe faaletee, hara kadi ɓeydaari hino ka Amen.

50:36.t: Ɗuuɗii e gire ɗen Min kalki ado maɓɓe, ko ɓeen ɓurnooɓe doole, ɓeen mbanngorii e leydi ndiin, ndaarugol taw si ɓe keɓay laaworde.

50:37.t: Pellet, woni e ɗuum, waajo wonan'de kala jom ɓernde, maa tuɗuɗo noppi hara ko tawaaɗo.

50:38.t: Gooŋɗii Min tagii kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndin e kon ko woni hakkunde majji, ndeer balɗe jeegoo, tampere woo heɓaani Min.

50:39.t: Muñño e ko ɓe kaalata kon, subbunhinanoɗaa Joomi maa ado puɗal na'ange ngen e ado mutal ngal.

50:40.t: Jemma on kadi, subbunhinanoɗaa mo e ka battane [juluɗe] farlaaɗe.

50:41.t: Heɗo, ñande noddoowo o noddoyta e nokkuure ɓattiinde,

50:42.t: ñande ɓe naniroyta ha'acaango ngon e hoore goonga. Ko ndeen woni Ñande yaltugol ngol [ka genaale].

50:43.t: Pellet, ko Monen nguurnata Min mbara, ko ka amen kadi woni ruttorde nde.

50:44.t: Ñalnde leydi ndiin seekotoo [ɓe njaltira] keñagol; ko nde woni mooɓirde newaniinde Min.

50:45.t: Ko Minen ɓuri anndude ko ɓe kaalata kon. A wonaa dooloowoɓe. Haray waajor Alqur'aanaare nden, kala kuloowo kammbaa an on.

51:2.t: Mi wooɗndirii duule donndotooɗe toɓo tiiɗngo !

51:5.t: ko podete ɗon ko, ko ɗum goongo.

51:7.t: Mi wooɗndirii kammu jom ɗate nguun !

51:9.t: Hino yiltee e makko kala firlitaaɗo e gooŋɗinal.

51:12.t: Heɓe laɓndoo : "Ko honnde woni Ñalaande njoɓdi kuuɗe?"

51:13.t: Ñalaande nde ɓe leptoyteeɓe ta Yiite :

51:14.t: "Meeɗee lepte mon ɗeen; ko ɗum woni ko keppatnoɗon ko".

51:15.t: Pellet, gooŋɗuɓe ɓen wonii e aljannaaji e ɓulli.

51:16.t: Jaggitooɓe ko Joom maɓɓe okkiɓe ɓe ko adii ɗuum koɓe moƴƴinatnooɓe.

51:18.t: E saanga ndoogu heɓe toro yaafeede.

51:19.t: Ina e jawɗe mu'en hakke wonan'de ñaagatooɓe e ɓe ñaagataako.

51:20.t: Ina e ndeer leydi he Ma'andeeji wonan'de yananaaɓe.

51:21.t: E ndeer pittaali mon mate on teskataaka.

51:22.t: Ina e kammu arsuka mon e ko podante ɗon ko.

51:23.t: E Joom kammu e leydi ko ɗum goongo hono no kaalirton nih.

51:24.t: Mbele arii e maa yeewtere hoɗɓe Ibraahiima teddinaaɓe ɓe.

51:25.t: Tuma ɓe naatnoo ka makko ɓe mbi'i: "Salaam (Kisal mon)". O maaki: "Minen ko men ɗenƴii ɓe on".

51:26.t: O naayii fa'ade e koreeji makko o addori ngaari payndi.

51:27.t: O ɓadaniɓe ndi o wii on ñaamata?

51:28.t: O so*i e mu,'en kulol, ɓe mii woto hul, ɓe mbeltiniriɓe cuklel.

51:29.t: Jom suudu makko ari hombo wulla o hellii ye'esa makko, o wii nayeejo dimara.?.

51:30.t: Maleykaaji ɗi mbii ko hono nih Joom ma daali ko Kaŋko woni ñeeño Ganndo.

51:31.t: [Annabai Ibraahiima] maaki: "Ko ho ɗum woni fii mon, onon ɓee nelaaɓe?"

51:32.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Minen Min nela e yimɓe bonɓe ɓen,

51:33.t: fii yo min ngaccitu e maɓɓe, kaaƴe iwɗe e loope (juɗaaɗe),

51:34.t: maandiniraaɗe ka Joomi maa, fii fantinooɓe ɓeen".

51:35.t: Min njaltini toon kala gooŋɗinɓe wonunooɓe toon.

51:36.t: Min tawaano ton, si wonaa suudu juulɓe wo'oturu.

51:37.t: Min ngacci ton Ma'ande, wonan'de ɓen hulooɓe lepte mu'usuuɗe ɗen.

51:38.t: [Min ngacci kadi ma'ande] e Muusaa, tuma nde Min nulunoo mo e Fir'awna, wond'ude e hujja ɓannguɗo.

51:39.t: Kono o ɗuurnodii e semmbe makko, o wi'i [Muusaa]: "Ko bileejo maa feetuɗo".

51:40.t: Min nanngi mo kaŋko e koneeli makko ɗin, Min bugodii ɓe ka maayo, tawde ko o pelniiɗo.

51:41.t: E 'Adi'en, tuma Min ngurtunoo henndu bonndu ndun e maɓɓe.

51:42.t: ndu accataa hay hu'unde nde ndu arani, si wonaa ndu waɗtay nde wa ndoondi.

51:43.t: E Samuuda'en kadi, tuma nde ɓe mbi'ananoo : "ndakmitee haa seeɗa !"

51:44.t: Ɓe townitanii yamiroore Joomi maɓɓe nden, ha'acaango ngon nanngi ɓe, tawi heɓe ƴeewa.

51:45.t: Ɓe mbaawaano daragol (laawoo), ɓe wonaano kadi faabaaɓe.

51:46.t: Ko noon kadi yimɓe Nuuhu ɓeen ko adii[ɓe]. Ɓen ko yimɓe faasiqiiɓe ngonnoo.

51:47.t: Kammu ngun, Min mahir ngu doole Amen. Pellet, ko Min yaññuɓe.

51:48.t: Leydi ndin kan, Min mbeertundi. Min moƴƴii weertuɓe.

51:49.t: E kala hu'unde, Min tagii noone ɗiɗi; mbelajo'o on mbaajitoray.

51:50.t: "Awa ndogee kisan fa'ade e Allah. Min, wonan'de on immorde ka makko, ko mi jeertinoowo ɓannguɗo.

51:51.t: Wota on mbaɗidane Allah deweteeɗo goo. Min, wonan'de on immorde ka makko, ko mi jeertinoowo ɓannguɗo".

51:52.t: Ko wano non. Nulaaɗo araani e ɓeen adinooɓe ɓe, si wonaa ɓe mbi'ay : "Ko bileejo maa feetuɗo!".

51:53.t: Hara ɓe mbasondir e ɗuum? Ko woni kon, ɓee ko yimɓe bewɓe.

51:55.t: Waajo tan; sabu baajagol ngol, hino nafa gooŋɗinɓe ɓen.

51:56.t: Mi tagiraali jinna e yimɓe, si wonaa fii yo ɓe ndewam

51:57.t: Mi ɗaɓɓiraa ɓe arsike; mi ɗaɓɓaa yo ɓe ñamminam.

51:58.t: Pellet, ko Allah woni garsikoowo on, Jom semmbe tiiɗuɗe.

51:59.t: Haray hino woodani ɓen tooñɓe, bakkaat yeru bakkaat nanndo maɓɓe'en, wota ɓe hawju.

51:60.t: Bone woodanii ɓeen yedduɓe, e nde Ñalaande maɓɓe nde ɓe kammbanaa!

52:7.t: Pellet, lepte Jooma ɗe ko janooje.

52:11.t: haray nden ñande, bone woodanii yedduɓe ɓe.

52:12.t: ɓeen wonɓe e jumpugol, heɓe pija.

52:13.t: Ñande ɓe duñiroytee doole e Yiite Jahannama duñannde,

52:14.t: [Ɓe mbi'anee] : "Ko ngee Yiite woni ko njeddtnoɗon.

52:15.t: E ko mbilewu nii? Kaa hara on ngla yi'ide?

52:16.t: Cumee e magge! Muññiɗon ma on muññaaki, fof no fota e mon. Nganndee ko njoɓeteɗon, ko ko ngollaynoɗon".

52:17.t: Pellet, gooŋɗuɓe ɓeen hino e Aljannaaji e neemaaji,

52:18.t: ko ɓe dakimitotooɓe ko Joomi maɓɓe okki ɓe, Joomi maɓɓe daɗndi ɓe lepte Jahiimi ɗeen.

52:19.t: [Ɓe mbi'anee] : "Ñaamee njaron, ko newi moɗdeum, sabu koko ngollaynoɗon.

52:20.t: hara ko on soɓɓindiiɓe e hoore danɗe weertindiraaɗe", Min ndesina ɓe kadi yooɗa e yaaJa gite en

52:21.t: Ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe, geñngol maɓɓe ngol kadi jokki ɓe e gooŋɗinal, Min tawtindinay ɓe e geñngol maɓɓe ngol. Min istantaa ɓe hu'unde e golle maɓɓe ɗeen; neɗɗo kala ko faggitii kon no tiginaa.

52:22.t: Min ɓeydani ɓe muuyanteeɗi e tebbeeli kala ko ɓe tuuyetee.

52:23.t: Heɓe njaɓondira toon, ñedduɗe ɗe jillaa mehre wonaa ko bakkondinta.

52:24.t: Sukaaɓe no eeltanaaɓe hino wanngoo hakkunde maɓɓe, wa'aɓe wa kaŋŋe maraaɗe.

52:25.t: Yoga maɓɓe feewtita yoga, ɓe laɓndondira;

52:26.t: ɓe mbi'a: "Pellet, min laatino ado [hannde], hulnooɓe [lepte ɗeen] hakkunde yimɓe amen";

52:27.t: Allah moƴƴii e amen, O daɗni meon lepte Norngal.

52:28.t: Min laatino ado [hannde], torotonooɓe Mo. Pellet, ko Kaŋko woni moƴƴo, jurmotooɗo tooɗo on".

52:29.t: Anndintin tan, sabu neema Joomi maa oon, a wonaa ndureejo wonaa a kaangaaɗo.

52:30.t: Kaa ɓe mb'ay won'de : "Ko jimoowo ! Min habbitani mo tan jikke maayde".

52:31.t: Maaku : "kabbitee ! Miin kadi miɗo habbitodi e mon".

52:32.t: Kaa ko haqqille maɓɓe ɗeen yamirɓe ɗuum? Kaa hara ko ɓe yimɓe bewɓe tan?

52:33.t: Kaa ɓe mbi'ay won'de : "O sincu nde?" Si ko woni, wonaa ɓe gooŋɗinooɓe.

52:34.t: Yoo ɓe ngaddu yeewtere sugu mayre, si wonii ko ɓe gooŋɗuɓe.

52:35.t: Kaa ɓe tagira ɓaawo takɗo? Kaa ko kamɓe ngoni tagooɓe ɓen?

52:36.t: Kaa (ko) kamɓe tagi kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin? Ko woni kon, ɓe njananaaka.

52:37.t: Kaa ɓe njogiti ngaluuji Joomi maa ɗiin? Kaa ko kamɓe ngoni huɓindiiɓe ɓeen?

52:38.t: Kaa ɓe njogiti ɓargal ngal ɓe njentorta? yoo keɗitiiɗo e maɓɓe oon addu hujja ɓannguɗo !

52:39.t: Maa ko ɓiɗɓe rewɓe ngoodanta mo, onon kam worɓe ɓeen?

52:40.t: Kaa a laɓndi ɓe njoɓdi, hara joɓugol ndi no teddani ɓe?

52:41.t: Kaa ɓe nganndu fii wirniiɗi ɗiin, hara heɓe mbinnda?

52:42.t: Maa ɓe paala fewjoore? ko yedduɓe ɓeen, woni fooleteeɓe pewje ɓen.

52:43.t: Kaa heɓe mari deweteeɗo ko woori Allah? Senaare woodanii Allah, e kon ko ɓe cirkata !

52:44.t: Si ɓe nji'ii taƴatine immornde ka kammu no yani, ɓe mbi'a: "Ko duule pawondirɗe".

52:45.t: Terto ɓe, haa ɓe kawroya e ñalaande maɓɓe nde ɓe leptoytee e mum;

52:46.t: Ñande nde pewje maɓɓe duncanoytaa ɓe hay hu'unde, ɓe ngonaa kadi walloyteeɓe.

52:47.t: Ko pellet, hino woodani tooñɓe ɓeen, lepte goo ko wonaa ɗen ɗon. Ko ko ɓuri ɗuuɗude kon e maɓɓe, ɓe nganndaa.

52:48.t: Muñño ñaawoore Joomi maa ndeen. Tawde pellet, haɗa e ndenka amen. Seniniraa yettugol Joomi maa, tuma ɓaŋotoɗaa.

52:49.t: Jehma on kadi, subbunhinanoɗaa mo e ka mutugol koode.

53:1.t: Mi wooɗndirii hoodere si konde fukkiima

53:4.t: Ndee [Alqur’aanaare] wonaani, si wonaa waajo bahyateeɗo.

53:5.t: Ko joom semmbe janngini ɗum mbo.

53:9.t: O woni ɓadiiɗo fotde lahñe ɗiɗe wolla ko ɓuri ɓadaade.

53:10.t: O wahyii e maccuɗo makko ko o wahyii ko.

53:11.t: ɓernde mum fennaani e ko o yi'i ko.

53:12.t: mbele hoɗon njeddandira e mum ko yi'i.

53:13.t: Ko noon tigi o yi'i Jibriir laawol goɗngol.

53:15.t: ko kiin lekki woni aljanna koɗirɗo.

53:16.t: Nde muurata e lekki jaaɓi-he ko naatata.

53:17.t: Gite ɗe oonñaaki nde njawtaani keerol.

53:18.t: Ko goonga o yi'i e kaawsaaji Alla ɓurɗi he mawnide.

53:19.t: Onon he'eferɓe mbelr on nji'i laata e ujjaa.

53:20.t: E manaata tataɓiija goɗɗo oon ne.

53:21.t: Mbele hina woodani on gorko na woodani Mbo debbo.

53:22.t: ɗuum de wadde ko peccugol ngol nuunɗaani.

53:23.t: ɗi ngonah si wonah inɗe ɗe innuɗon onon e baabiraaɓe mon Alla jippinaani heen daliil ɓe ndewaani si wona sikke e mbelamme pittaali ko goongo peewal arii e maɓɓe ummaade to Joom mu'en.

53:24.t: wolla mbele na woodani neɗɗo ko o wooɗa ko.

53:25.t: Ko Alla woodani ko sakkati e ko adii ko.

53:26.t: Heewii e maleykaaji e ndeer kammuuji ɗi tefoore majji nafatah hu'unde tawi wonah caggal de Alla sakkitani wonan'de mbo O wela O.

53:27.t: Pellet ɓeen ɓe ngoonɗinaani La'akara hoɓe innira maleykaaji inɗe rewɓe.

53:28.t: Woodanaani ɓe ganndal, alah koɓr ndewata si wona sikke, pellet sikke nafatae goonga hay hu'unde.

53:29.t: ɗuurno oon nduntiiɗa jikru amen mbo yiɗah si wona nguurndam aduna.

53:30.t: Ko ɗoon ganndal mum en haaɗi, pellet ko Alla ɓuri anndude oon majjuɗo laawol makko, ko Kaŋko kadi ɓuri anndude oon peewɗo.

53:31.t: Ko Alla woodani kala ko woni e kammuuji e leydi ngam o yoɓa ɓeen bonnuɓe koɓe mbonni ko, o yoɓa kadi moƴƴinɓe moƴƴoore.

53:32.t: ɓeen woɗɗitotooɓe bakkatuuji mawɗi ɗin e paŋkare [ɓe paggitotaako] si wonaa tokoosi ɗin. Pellet, Joomi maa ko jaacɗo yaafuyee. Ko Kaŋko ɓuri anndude on gila O puɗɗunoo on ummaade e leydi, e nde ngonnoɗon fuƴƴannde ka deedi neeniraaɓe mon. Wota on mantu ko'e mon; ko Kaŋko ɓuri anndude gooŋɗuɓe ɓren.

53:34.t: hino okkira seeɗaa, hooti o ɗawa?

53:35.t: Kere o jogi ganndal mbirniiɗi ngal o yi'irta?

53:36.t: Kaa o humpitaaka ko woni kon e ɗeri Muusa ɗiin

53:38.t: won'de woŋkii [woo] ronndotaako doŋgal (bakkaat) woɗkii goo,

53:39.t: e won'de alanaa neɗɗanke, si wonaa ko o golli kon;

53:40.t: e won'de golle makko ɗeen, aray ka yi'ee,

53:41.t: Refti o yoɓire ɗe njoɓdi timmundi,

53:42.t: e wonan'de ko ka Joomi ma woni haattirde ndeen.

53:43.t: e won'de ko Kaŋko woni beltinoowo gullinoowo

53:44.t: ko Kaŋko kadi woni barooro Wuurnita,

53:45.t: e won'de O tagii resindirayɗi ɗin ɗiɗi : gorel e deyel,

53:46.t: immorde e toɓɓere maniiyu si yuppaama,(e raŋŋa).

53:47.t: e wonnode ko Kaŋko woodani tagitugol ɗimmum.

53:48.t: e won'de ko Kaŋko woni galɗinɗo e gokkuɗo,

53:49.t: e won'de ko Kaŋko woni Jeyɗo hoodere Si'ira ndeen,

53:50.t: e won'de ko Kaŋko halki Aadi'en adinooɓe,

53:51.t: e Samuuda'en, o heddaano hay e gooto,

53:52.t: Ko non kadi yimɓe Nuuhu ɓeen ko adii[ɓe], pellet, ɓeen laatino ɓurɓe tooñude e bewde.

53:53.t: e yimɓe fitaare ɓeen (ɓe) o waylitunoo:

53:54.t: O hippiri ɗe ko ko o hippiri.

53:55.t: Ko holɗum e neemaaji Joomi ma ɗiin cikkitotoɗaa?

53:56.t: Oo ko jeertinoowo jiyaaɗo e jeertinooɓe adinooɓe.

53:58.t: Duñoowo ngal ko woori Allah, ala.

54:1.t: Darngal ngal ɓattiima, lewru ndun kadi se'ekiima

54:2.t: Si ɓe nji''ii Ma'ande, ɓe ɗuurnoo ɓe mbi'a: "Ko mbilewu jokkondirngu".

54:3.t: Ɓe njeddi, ɓe njokki mbeleeɗe maɓɓe. Hara le hu'unde kala no mari ñiiɓirde.

54:4.t: Gooŋɗii kumpite arii e maɓɓe, ɗe kaɗitorɗum woni e mum;

54:5.t: [Ɗuum] ko ñeñƴal jottiingal. Kono jeertingol ngol nafaani.

54:6.t: Sel ɓe. Ñande noddoowo on noddoyta e hu'unde añiniinde.

54:7.t: ja'asɓe ndaarɗe, hiɓe njaltira e genaale ɗeen wano kanuuji caratooɗi.

54:8.t: heñaniiɓe noddoowo on. He'eferɓe ɓeen mbi'a: "Ndee ko ñalaande saɗtunde".

54:9.t: Ado maɓɓe, yimɓe nuuhu ɓeen yedduno. Ɓe njedfi jiyaaɗo Amen on, ɓe wi'i : "Ko jinnaaɗo!", o kammbanaa.

54:10.t: O torii Joomi makko, won'de : "Miin on ko mi poolaaɗo, faabo [kam]".

54:11.t: Min ngudditiri dammbuɗe kammu ngun, ndiyam wanncoojam,

54:12.t: Min puccitiri leydi ndin ɓulli. Ndiye ɗern fottiri e yamiroore hoddiranoonde.

54:13.t: Min ndoondori mo e [laana] lesaaka marka alluwe e peŋe,

54:14.t: hika dogira e ndenka amen. Ɗuum ko njoɓdi [Nuuhu] jeddanooɗo oon.

54:15.t: Gooŋɗii Min ngaccirii [kon ko Min mbaɗi ɓe] tasakuyee. Taw si woodi baajitorayɗo?

54:16.t: Tesko ko hono lepte Am e jeertingol (am) wa'anoo?

54:17.t: Gooŋɗii Min newinirii Alqur'aanare nden baajitorgol. Hara wooday baajitorɗo?

54:18.t: Aadi'en njedduno. Taskee ko hono lepte am e jeertingol (sm) wa'anoo?

54:19.t: Min ngurtu e maɓɓe henndu saɗtundu, e ñalaande hiitaande, duumiinde;

54:20.t: hindu bippitira yimɓe ɓeen, wa si tawii ko ɓe daƴƴe tamaro irtaaɗe.

54:21.t: Taskee ko hono lepte am ɗen e jertingol (am) ngol wa'anoo?

54:22.t: Gooŋɗii Min newinirii Alqur'aanare nden sabu baajitorgol. Hara wooday baajitorɗo?

54:24.t: ɓe mb'i: "Kere ko neɗɗo gooto e amen woni ko min njokkata? Haray min ngonii on tumba e nderr majjere e tamperere.

54:25.t: Hara ko e makko jaŋtoore nden wernaa hakkunde amen? Si ko woni, ko penoowo nii, townitiiɗo".

54:26.t: Aray ɓe ngaannda (Ñalnde) Janngo, ko hommbo woni penoowo toownitiiɗo on.

54:27.t: Ko Min wurtirooɓe ngelooba ndewa ba ngam, jarribagol ɓe. Aynitu ɓe, muññoɗaa.

54:28.t: Humpitu ɓe won'de ndiyam ɗam ko sennndaaɗam hakkunde maɓɓe [e ngelooba ba]; kala yaray geɗal mum.

54:29.t: Ɓe noddi gon'diijo maɓɓe, o jonni [kaafa kan], o sodi [ba].

54:30.t: Teskii ko hono lepte am ɗeen e jeertingol (am) ngol wa'anoo?

54:31.t: Ko ha'acaango wooturu tun Min ngurti e maɓɓe, ɓe mba'i wa ledde yo'orude muncaaɗe.

54:32.t: Gooŋɗii Min newinirii Alqur'aanare nden baajitorgol. Hara wooday baajitorɗo?

54:33.t: Yimɓe Luutu ɓen njedduno jeertine ɗeen.

54:34.t: Min ngurtuno henndu kaaƴe e maɓɓe, si wonaa e ɓeynguure Luutu nden, Min daɗndirno ɓeen ka wenndo,

54:35.t: moƴƴere immorde e Amen. Ko non Min nkoɓitirta kala kettuɗo [neema Allah on].

54:36.t: Gooŋɗii le o jeretinirno ɓe nanngal amen cattungal ngal. Kono ɓe cikkitii jeertinol ngol.

54:37.t: Gooŋɗii ɓe ɗaɓɓirno mo [bonidugol e hoɗɓe makko ɓeen]. Min mehi gite maɓɓe ɗeen. "Meeɗee lepte ɗeen e jeertingol am ngol".

54:38.t: Gooŋɗii ko bimmbi law, woni ko lepte duumiiɗe ndawirani ɓe.

54:40.t: Gooŋɗii Min newinirii Alqur'aanare nden baajitorgol. Hara wooday baajitorɗo?

54:41.t: Gooŋɗii jeertinaango ngon arii e yimɓe Fir'awna ɓeen.

54:42.t: Ɓe njeddi aayeeje amen ɗen fof. Min nanngiri ɓe, nanngal pooluɗo kattanɗo.

54:43.t: Ko he'eferɓe mon ɓen ɓuri ɓeya moƴƴude? Kaa ko daɗgol woodani on ka Ɗeri?

54:44.t: Kaa hara ɓe mbi'ay : "Minen ko min dental wallindirooɓe"?

54:45.t: Aray nde dental [maɓɓe] ngal foolee, ɓe ndunntina ɓabbe maɓɓe.

54:46.t: Wurin ko Darnga ngo woni kammbaa maɓɓe on, Ko Darnga noon ɓuri mawnude e haaɗude.

54:47.t: Pellet, bonɓe ɓen ngonii e majjere e ooyunge.

54:48.t: Ñande ɓe daasiroytee je'ece maɓɓe ɗeen ka nder Yiite, (ɓe mbi'anee): "Meeɗee meemugol Saqara".

54:49.t: Minen Min tagir hu'unde kala e eɓɓoore,

54:50.t: Yamiroore amen wonaani, si wonaa [konngol] gootol pet, [yaawira] wa hinƴaango yiitere.

54:51.t: Gooŋɗii Min kalkiino yeradiiɓe mon. Hara wooday baajitorayɗo?

54:52.t: Kala hu'unde nde ɓe ngolli no ka ndeer ɗeri,

54:53.t: kala kadi toksum e mawnukum, ko binndaa ɗum.

54:54.t: Pellet, gooŋɗuɓe ɓren ngonii e Aljannaaji e caatli,

54:55.t: e toolorde goonga, ka Laamɗo kattanɗo.

55:5.t: Nayange ngen e lewru ndun [hiɗi ndogira] limoore,

55:6.t: koode ɗeen kadi e leɗɗe ɗeen, hino cujjude.

55:7.t: Kammu ngun, o toowni ngu. O waɗi nunɗal ngal,

55:8.t: fii wota on mbewu ka pe'esirɗe.

55:9.t: Ñinniron petgol ngol no nunɗiri. Wata on ustu pe'esirɗe ɗeen.

55:10.t: Leydi ndiin, O waɗanndi tagoore ndeen:

55:11.t: Muuyanteeɗi hino e mayri, e leɗɗe tamaro marɗe poƴƴi.

55:12.t: e gabbe marɗe ña'ande, e uurngol.

55:13.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin woni ko njeddoton?

55:14.t: O tagiri neɗɗo on immorde e loopal, ba'ngal e ko juɗaa.

55:15.t: O tagiri jinnaaji ɗiin, immorde e lew lewndu yiite laaɓuki.

55:16.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗiin njeddoton?

55:17.t: Jeyɗo fuɗirɗe ɗeen ɗiɗi Jeyi kadi mutirɗe ɗeen ɗiɗi.

55:18.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:19.t: O Tuppindiri maaje ɗeen ɗiɗi, hiɗe potta.

55:20.t: heedo hino hakkunde majje, ɗe njillondirtaa.

55:21.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:22.t: Hino yalta e ɗeen [maaje] ɗiɗi: kaŋŋe "Lu'lu'u" e "marjaan".

55:23.t: E ko holɗi e neemaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:24.t: Ko Kaŋko woodani dogooje lesaaɗe ka ndeer maayo, ba'aɗe na pelle.

55:25.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:26.t: Kala ko woni e hoore mayri ko ko re'oyta,

55:27.t: heddoo Jaati Joomaa Kiin, Jom mawngu e teddungal.

55:28.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:29.t: Ɓeen ngonɓe ka kammuuji e ka leydi hino naamnoo mo. Ñande woo, Himo e fiyaaku.

55:30.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗiin njeddoton?

55:31.t: Aray nde Min fa'andii hasbude on, onon yo tedda ko'e en ɗiɗo en..

55:32.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:33.t: Eey mon yo dental jinna e yimɓe ! Si on kattanii wuɗɗirgol ka seraaji kammuuji e ka leydi, haray nguɗɗee. On wuɗɗirtaa si wonaa e doole.

55:34.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗiin njeddoton?

55:35.t: Hino wurtee e mon - [onon jinna e yimɓe] - ɗemngal yiite e curki [maa sila taayuɗo], on paabondirtaa.

55:36.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:37.t: Si wonii kammu nguun seekiima, ngu wojjirii wa piindi hono pentiir boɗe.

55:38.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:39.t: Nden ñande, wonaa neɗɗo maa jinne woni ko laɓnditetee fii bakkaat mum.

55:40.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:41.t: Bonɓe ɓeen hino ngaannditiree Ma'andeeji maɓɓe ɗiin. Ɓe nanngiroyee ka njubuuji-tin tinɗi- e ka koyɗe.

55:42.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin woni ko njeddoton?

55:43.t: Ko ngee woni Jahannama nge bonɓe ɓen njeddynoo fii mum.

55:44.t: Hiɓe mbanngoo hakkunde magge e fatayɗam kattuɗam wulde.

55:45.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:46.t: Hino woodani kala kulɗo daragol ye'eso Joomi mum, aljannaaji ɗiɗi;

55:47.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:49.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:50.t: Ɓulli ɗiɗi hino e ndeer majji, ilayɗi.

55:51.t: E ko holɗi e neemaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:52.t: Hino e ndeer majji kala muuyanteeɗi ɗiin, noone ɗiɗi.

55:53.t: E ko holɗi e neemaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:54.t: Hara ko ɓe soɓɓindiiɓe e ndaɗɗule tekkirɗe ndeer, dimɗe majje ɗeen ɗiɗi ko ɓadiiɗe.

55:55.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:56.t: (Rewɓe) ɗaɓɓiɗa ndaarɗeɓe hino toon, ɓe neɗɗo memaani ado maɓɓe wonaa kadi jinna.

55:57.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:59.t: E ko holɗi e neemaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:60.t: Hara njoɓdi moƴƴere no woodi, si wonaa moƴƴere?

55:61.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗiin njeddoton?

55:62.t: Hino ga ɗiin ɗiɗi, aljannaaji ɗiɗi kadi.

55:63.t: E ko holɗi e neemaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:65.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗiin njeddoton?

55:66.t: Ɓulli ɗiɗi hino e ndeer majji, ɓulayɗi.

55:67.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:68.t: Hino e majji : muuyanteeɗi, e leɗɗe tamarooje e rummaana.

55:69.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:70.t: Hino e ɗiin ɗiɗi : rewɓe suɓaaɓe (labaaɓe).

55:71.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:73.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:74.t: neɗɗo memaani ɓen ado maɓɓe, wonaa kadi jinna.

55:75.t: E ko holɗi e neemaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:76.t: Ko ɓe soɓɓindotooɓe e dow ngawluuji haakooji, e ndaɗɗule abqari labaaɗe.

55:77.t: E ko holɗi e ne'emaaji Joomi mon ɗin njeddoton?

55:78.t: Barkinii innde Jooma nden, Jom mawngu e teddungal !

56:8.t: Ko wontirooɓe ñaamo ɓeen - iskin ɓeen yimɓe ñaamo !

56:9.t: e wontirooɓe nano ɓeen, bis e ɓeen yimɓe nano !

56:10.t: Ko adondiratnooɓe ɓeen (e moƴƴere ka aduna), adoytee (naatneede Aljanna).

56:14.t: e seeɗaaɓe jiyaaɓe e [mofte] sakkitiiɓe ɓeen,

56:16.t: hara heɓe soɓɓindii e majje, feewtondirɓe.

56:17.t: Sukaaɓe duuminaaɓe hino mbanngoo hakkunde maɓɓe,

56:18.t: wonndude e ñedduɗe, e cataloy, e koroy e [hebbiniraakoy] beere ilatnde,

56:19.t: ɓe muusetaake ko*e ndeer toon, ɓe ciwritaa;

56:21.t: E teewu colli ngu ɓe tuuyatee.

56:25.t: Ɓe nanataa ndeer ton haala mhere, wonaa ko bakkondiŋta;

56:26.t: si wonaa wi'aneede : "Salaaman! Salaaman!" [Saɗi mon! saɗi mon!].

56:27.t: E wontirooɓe ñaamo ɓeen, ko ngoni ɓeen yimɓe ñaamo?

56:40.t: E seeɗaaɓe jiyaaɓe e [mofte] sakkitiiɓe ɓeen.

56:41.t: E wontirooɓe nano ɓeen. Ko homɓe nhoni ɓeen yimɓe nano?

56:45.t: Ado ɗuum, hari ko ɓe neeminaaɓe.

56:46.t: ɓe laatino heɓe deppitoo e bakkaat mawɗi ɗiin,

56:47.t: heɓe mbi'atnoo: "Enee, si min maayii, min ngontii mbullaari e ƴi'e, hara ko min immintinoyteeɓe?

56:50.t: ko mooɓoyteeɓe e ñalaande anndaande waktu mum.

56:51.t: refti pellet, onon ɓee majjuɓe yedduɓe [ummital],

56:52.t: ko on ñaamoyayɓe e leggal "Zaqquumi" ngal

56:56.t: Ko ɗuum woni ko ɓe kottiigu !u! en ñalnde njoɓdi diina.

56:57.t: Ko Minen ngoni ko tagi on. Haɗi ngooŋɗion [Min immintinat on]?

56:58.t: On nj'ii on maniiyu mo ndufoton?

56:59.t: Ko onon tagata mo? Kaa ko minen ngoni tagooɓe [ɗum]?

56:60.t: Ko Minen koddiri maayde ndeen hakkunde mon. Min ngonaani adateeɓe

56:61.t: E battitugol yeruuɓe mon, Min puɗɗira on e ko on ngannda.

56:62.t: Gooŋɗii hoɗon nganndi tageede aranun ɗum. Ko haɗi mbaajitoɗon?

56:64.t: Ko onon puɗinta ɗum? Kaa ko Minen ngoni fuɗinooɓe ɓeen?

56:65.t: Si min kaajuno, pellet, Min mbaɗayno ndu foron. Mbattinon hiɗon kaawoo [mbi'a] :

56:66.t: "Minen ko min lepteteeɓe perte ko min nafqi ko.

56:68.t: On yi'ii ndiyam ɗam njaroton ɗam?

56:69.t: E ko onon njippiniri ɗam ka duule? Kaa ko minen njippini [ɗam]?

56:70.t: Si Min kaajuno, Min mbaɗayno ɗam kaaɗɗam. Ko haɗi njetton [Allah]?

56:71.t: On nj'ii yiite nge kuɓɓoton ngen?

56:72.t: E ko onon woodini waɗi leɗɗe mum? Kaa ko Minen ngoodini [ɗe]?

56:73.t: Min mbaɗir ngen [yiite] waaju, e nafitor nge setotooɓe.

56:74.t: Subbunhinor innde Joomi maa, mawɗo oon!

56:76.t: Pellet, ɗuum ko woondoore mawnde, si hoɗon nganndunoo.

56:77.t: Pellet nee ko alqur'aanaare konde teddunde,

56:79.t: meemataa nden si wonaa laɓɓinaaɓe ɓeen;

56:80.t: ko jippiniraande ka Jeyɗo winndere ndeen.

56:81.t: E ko ndee yeewtere woŋki ko njeddoton onon?

56:82.t: Hoɗon mbaɗa arsike mon (toɓo ngon) ko on yeddooɓe [arsikuɗo On]?

56:83.t: Ko haɗata nde woŋkii yottii ka lookoƴere,

56:84.t: hara onon hoɗon ndaara on tumba,

56:85.t: hara non ko Minen ɓuri on ɓadaade mo, kono on nji'ataa.

56:86.t: Ko haɗata on, si tawiino on njoɓetaake.

56:87.t: Ndutton kin [woŋkii], si tawii ko on goonguɓe?

56:88.t: Si tawii on ko jiyaaɗo e ɓattinaaɓe ɓeen,

56:89.t: haray ko foftere, e moƴƴere, e Aljannaaji ne'ema (woodani mo).

56:90.t: Si tawii kadi ko jiyaaɗo e yimɓe ñaamo ɓeen,

56:91.t: haray [o jaɓɓoroyte] : "Kisal maa" e ɓaŋge yimɓe ñaamo ɓeen.

56:92.t: Si tawii noon ko jiyanooɗo e yedduɓe majjuɓe ɓeen,

56:93.t: haray hoɗtorde makko on ko patayɗam,

56:95.t: Pellet, ko ɗum woni goonga jananaaɗo oon.

56:96.t: Subbunhinor innde Joomi maa, mawɗo oon!

57:1.t: Kala ko woni ka kammuuji e ka leydi seninii Allah. Ko Kaŋko woni pooluɗo, Ñeeño on.

57:2.t: Ko Kaŋko heeranii laamu kammuuji ɗiin e lesdi ndin. Himo wuurna Himo wara, Kanŋko O kattanɗo kala hu'unde.

57:3.t: Ko Kaŋko woni arano e cakkitiiɗo, peeñuɗo e birniiɗo, Kaŋko ko O gannduɗo kala hu'unde.

57:4.t: Ko Kaŋko tagi kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndiin ndeer balɗe jeegoo, refti O fotondiri ka dow "Arsi"; Himo anndi ko mutata kon ka leydi, e ko ƴawata e mayri, e ko jipporta ka kammu e ko ƴawata e maggu. Homo wonndi e mon kala ka ngonɗon. Allah no reeni ko ngolloton kon.

57:5.t: Ko Kaŋko heeranii laamu kammuuji ɗin e leydi ndin. Ko ka Allah fiyakuuji ɗin nduttirtee.

57:6.t: Himo naadia jemma on e ndeer ñalawma on, o naadira ñalama on kadi e ndeer jemma on. Kaŋko ko O gannduɗo ko woni e ndeer ɓerɗe.

57:7.t: Gooŋɗinee Allah e nulaaɗo makko on, nafqon kon ko o waɗiri on lomtinaaɓe e mum. Gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen e mon, ɓe nafqi [jawle maɓɓe ɗen], hino woodani ɓeen njoɓdi mawnundi.

57:8.t: E ko heɓi on, on ngooŋɗintaa Allah? E hino Nulaaɗo on hino nodda on e gooŋɗingol Joomi mon. Gooɗii [Allah] ƴettii e mon ahadi, si on laatike gooŋɗinɓe.

57:9.t: Ko Kaŋko jippinta e jeyaaɗo makko on aayeeje ɓannguɗe, fii no o njaltinira on e niɓe fa'ade e ndaygu. Pellet, Allah ko jurmotooɗo on, jaafotooɗo.

57:10.t: E ko heɓi on, on cakkotaako fii laawol Allah ngol, e hino le ko Allah woodani ronugol kammuuji ɗiin e leydi ndin? Fotataa e mon, ɓen sakkinooɓe ado uddital ngal ɓe haɓidaa; ko ɓeen ɓuri mawnude darja e dii ɓeen sakkiiɓe ɓaawo ɗum ɓe haɓidaa. Ɓe fof maɓɓe noon, Allah fodii ɓe moƴƴere. Allah no humpitii ko ngolloton kon.

57:11.t: Ko hommbo ñamlirta Allah ñamaande labaande, o sowana mo nde, hara no woodani mo njoɓdi teddundi?

57:12.t: Ñande nji'oytaa gooŋɗinɓe worɓe ɓeen e gooŋɗinɓe rewɓe ɓeen, hara annoora maɓɓe yaara ye'eso maɓɓe e ñaamo maɓɓe (ɓe mbi'anee): "Weltaare mon hannde ko Aljannaaji, ɗi canɗi ilata senngo ley mum, ko on duumotooɓe ndeer ton". Ko ɗum woni malal mawngal ngal.

57:13.t: Ñalnde naafiqiiɓe worɓe ɓeen e naafiqiiɓe rewɓe ɓen mbi'anoyta gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen: "kabbee min, min njalbinora annoora mon on". Ɓe mbi'anee : "Yiltoree ɓaawo mon, ɗaɓɓoyon annoora". Heedo waɗee hakkunde maɓɓe, ngo damal ngal yurmeende woni e nder mum, ɓaawo maggal noon, ko lepte woni e bannge mum.

57:14.t: Hiɓe nodda ɓe : "E min ngondaano e mon?" Ɓe mbi'a : "Ko non nhoniri. Ko woni tun, on fitinno ko'e mon, habbitaniɗon [gooŋɗinɓe ɓen bone], cikkitiɗon, yelaaji hodi on haa yamiroore Allah nden ari. Hodoowo on hodi on e moƴƴere Allah ndeen.

57:15.t: Hannde noon, on njaɓantaake coktorɗum wonaa e ɓeen yedduɓe. Depporde mon nden ko ka Yiite : ko ngen woni ko hannduɗon. Nge bonii ruttorde.

57:16.t: E yontaani gooŋɗiiɓe ɓen nde ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen deeƴirta jantoore Allah nden e kon ko jippii immorde e goonga? Hara ɓe wa'aani wa ɓeen okkanooɓe defte ɓen ko adii, dumunna on juutani ɓeen, ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen njo'ori, ko ɗuuɗunoo e maɓɓe ko ko faasiqiiɓe.

57:17.t: Nganndee pellet, Allah wuurnitay lesdi ndiin ɓaawo ndi yo'orii. Gooŋɗii Min ɓannginiranii on aayeeje ɗeen, fii no haqqiliron.

57:18.t: Pellet, sakkotooɓe (jawɗe mum ɓeen) ka worɓe e ka rewɓe ɓe ñami Allah ñamaande labaande, ɓe sowanoyte (mbarjaari) hara no woodani ɓe njoɓdi mawndi.

57:19.t: Ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe Allah e Nulaaɗo makko on, ko ɓen woni goongiyaŋke en. Sahodinɓe ɓen ka Joomi mun, hino woodani ɓen njoɓdi maɓɓe e annoora maɓɓe. Ɓeen noon yedduɓe ɓe njeddi aayeeje Amen ɗeen, ko ɓeen ngoni yimɓe Jahiimi ngen.

57:20.t: Ngnndee won'de nguurndam aduna ɗam ko fijindaaru, e mbeleeɗe, e cuɗaari, e ɓurondiro hakkunde mon e jawɗe e ɓiɓɓe. Wano toɓo haawnungo remooɓe ɓen puɗi mum, refti ngo yo'ora, yi'aa hingo soyɗi; refti ngo wonta munciiɗum. Hino ka laakara, lette caɗtuɗe, e yaafuyee immorde e Allah e yarluyee. Nguurndam aduna ɗam wonaani, si wonaa dakammehoy hodo.

57:21.t: Ngadondiree e (golle) yaafaawuya ka Joomi mon, e Aljanna mo yaajeendi mun wa'i yaajeendi kammu ngun e leydi ndin, on maranaama ɓren gooŋɗinɓe Allah e Nulaaɓe makko ɓen. Ɗuum ko ɓural Allah ngal o okkata on mo O muuyani. Allah ko Joim ɓural mawnungal.

57:22.t: Bone woo heɓataa [on] e lesdi ndiin ma e pittaali mon ɗiin, si wonaa ɗuum woniino e deftere ado min tagude ndee [tagoore]. Pellet, ɗuum ko ko newanii Allah.

57:23.t: Ko fii wota on cuno e ko laawii on kon, ngonaa kadi weltorgol ko o okki on kon. Allah yiɗaa kala ñaaƴoowo, mantiiɗo.

57:24.t: Ɓeen wuddooɓe ɓe njamira yimɓe ɓeen nguddam... kala ɗuurniiɗo, pellet, Allah kan ko Galo, jettiniiɗo.

57:25.t: Gooŋɗii Min nulirii Nulaaɓe amen ɓeen ɓanngannduyeeji, Min njippindinani ɓe defte e sariyaare, fii no yimɓe ɓeen ñiiɓira e nunɗal. Min njippini kadi njamndi ndiin, ndi doole tiiɗuɗe woni e mum e nafooje wonan'de yimɓe ɓeen, e no Allah feññinira ɓeen wallooɓe mo e Nulaaɗo makko on ka wirnii. Pellet, Allah ko Jom demmbe, pooluɗo.

57:26.t: Gooŋɗii Min nulii Nuuhu e Ibraahiima, Min maɗi e geñngol maɓɓe ngol Annabaaku e defte. Hino e maɓɓe feewuɓe, ko ɗuuɗi kon e maɓɓe ko faasiqiiɓe.

57:27.t: Refti Min njokkindini e batteeji maɓɓe ɗin, nulaaɓe amen [goo], Min njokkintiniri [ɓe] Iisaa geɗal Maryama on, Min ngokki mo Linjiila, Min mbaɗi e ɓerɗe jokkuɓe mo ɓen : yurmeende e giggol. Labbeyaagal ngal ɓe sinci ngal, Minen Min mbaɗɗinaa ngal e maɓɓe. [Min lamndaaki] si wonaa ɗaɓɓugol welayee Allah. Kono ɓe ayniraali ɗum no haani aynireede. Min ngokki njoɓdi goiŋɗinɓe ɓeen e maɓɓe. Ko ɗuuɗunoo kon e maɓɓe ko faasiqiiɓe.

57:28.t: Eey mon yo gooŋɗiiɓe! Kulee Allah, ngooŋɗinon Nulaaɗo makko on; O yeɗay on geɗe ɗiɗi e mbarjaari makko ndiin, O waɗana on annoora mo ndayginorton, O haforana on. Pellet, Allah ko kaforoowo, jurmootooɗo.

57:29.t: Fii no yimɓe defte ɓeen ngnndira won'de ɓe kattanaa hay hu'unde e ɓural Allah ngal, e won'de ɓural ngal ko e juuɗe Allah woni; Himo yeɗa ngal mo O muuyani. Pellet, Allah ko Joom ɓural manngal.

58:1.t: Ko goonga Alla nani konngol oon duttondiroowo e ma haala ko faati e joom galle makko hombo wullito fa'ade e Alla; Alla na nana yeewtere mon nde pellet Alla ko nanoowo ji'oowo

58:2.t: Ɓeen nanndinooɓe suddiiɓe mum en e yummiraaɓe maɓɓe, ɓeen ɓe ngona yummiraaɓe maɓɓƴe, woni yummiraaɓe mum en ko ɓeen jibinɓe ɓe pellet hoɓe kaala paŋkare e penaande e pellet Alla ko jaafatooɗo jarlotooɗo bakkatuuji.

58:3.t: Ɓeen nanndinooɓe rewɓe mum en refti ɓe ndutto ko ɓe mbiino ko yoɓe ndimɗin daande ko adi ndeɓe memandirta ko ɗum woni ko mbaajete ɗon ko, alla na kumpati ko ngollaton ko.

58:4.t: Kala mbo dañaani yo o hoor lebbi ɗiɗi dewandirɗi ko adii ndeɓe mandirta kala mbo kattanaani yo o ñammin miskineeɓe capanɗe njeegom, ɗuum ko ngam ngoonɗinon Alla e nelaaɗo makko ko ɗuum woni keerol Alla woodanii he'eferɓe lepte cattuɗe.

58:5.t: Pellet ɓeen luundotooɓe Alla e nelaaɗo makko ɓe koynaama hono no adiiɓe ɓe koynirano, min tellinii aayeeje peeñɗe, woodani he'eferɓe lepte koynooje.

58:6.t: Ñande o ummini ɓe kamɗe fof o holla ɓe koɓe ngolluno ko, o tonngii ɗuum ɓe njejji ɗuum Alla na seedii kala hu'unde.

58:7.t: Mbele a annda won'de Alla na anndi ko woni e ndeer kammuuji e ko woni e ndeer leydi, gunndo wonata hakkunde tata si wona o nayɓitaɓe ngo wonata hakkunde noyo si wona o wona jeegoɓo ngo wonata ko ja'asi ɗuum si wona o won'da e mum en toɓe mbaawi won'de fof, refti o habraɓe ko ɓe ngolli ñande darnga, pellet Alla na anndi kala hu'unde.

58:8.t: Mbele a yiyaani ɓeen kaɗaaɓe ndeeyu refti ɓe nduttoo koɓe kada ko ɓe ndeeyandira e bakkatuuji e añanaagal e woopde nelaaɗo, siɓi ngarii e ma ɓe calmanir ma na Alla salminiraani ma nih ɓe mbiya e pittaali mum en ko haɗi Alla leptira min ko min kaalata ko, yoniiɓe jahannama hoɓe naatne heen bonii wattannde.

58:9.t: Eey mon mon gooŋɗinɓe si on ndeeydii e nelaaɗo wotee ndeeyde e makko e bakkaat e añanaagal e woopde nelaaɗo, ndeeydee e ɗiggere e kulol Alla mbo mooɓoyteɗon to makko.

58:10.t: Pellet gunndo ko e seytaane ngam o sunina ɓeen gooɗinɓe o lorotaaɓe hay ndiga si wona e sakkitoore Alla, e dow Alla woni ko gooŋɗiɓe mbakkilto.

58:11.t: Eey mon mon gooŋɗinɓe si on mbiyaama yaacne e joɗle yaacne Alla njaajnana mon, si on mbi'aama umme, ummɗon Alla ɓamta ɓeen gooŋɗin ɓe e mon e joman en ganndal darajaaji, Alla na kumpatii ko ngolloton ko.

58:12.t: Eey mon gooŋɗinɓe si on ndeeydii e nelaaɗo tottire e ndeeyu mon sadak, ko ɗuum ɓuri moƴƴude e mon ko ɗuum ɓuri laaɓde, si on keɓaani Alla de ko jaafatooɗo jurmotooɗo.

58:13.t: Mbele on kul tottirde sadaka saanga ndeeydaton e nelaaɗo, si on tottiraani Alla jaɓani on tuubuubuya, ndarnee juulde toottiron askal ɗoftoɗon Alla e nelaaɗo makko, Alla na kumpatii ko ngolloton ko.

58:14.t: Mbele a yii'aani ɓeen heedninɓe aade en ɓe Alla tikkani ɓe njeyaaka e mon ɓe njeyaako e maɓɓe, hoɓe ngooɗndira penaale te hoɓe nganndi.

58:15.t: Alla heblaniiɓe lepte caɗtuɗe pellet bonii koɓe ngolluno ko.

58:16.t: ɓe nanngarii goonɗdooje mum en ɗe heedo, ɓe palii laawol Alla ngol, woodaniiɓe lepte koynooje.

58:17.t: Pellet, ɓeen yedduɓe, jawle maɓɓe ɗen e ɓiɗɓe maɓɓe ɓen duncantaaɓe e lepte Alla ɗen hay hu'unde. Ko ɓeen ɗoon ngoni yimɓe yiite ɓeen, kamɓe ko ɓe luttooɓe toon.

58:18.t: Ñande Alla umminiɓe kamɓe fof, ɓe ngooɗndana mbo hono noɓe ngooɗndaranta mon nih, hoɓe cikka won koɓe ngoni e dow mum, ɓe tigi ngoni fenooɓe ɓe.

58:19.t: Seytaane tehriiɓe o yejjitini ɓe jaŋtaade Alla ko ɓee tigi ngoni fedde seytaane, pellet ko fedde seytaane woni pertuɓe.

58:20.t: Ɓeen haɓatooɓe Alla e nelaaɗo makko,ko ɓeen ɓuri hoyde.

58:21.t: Alla ñaawi ma ni fool miin e nelaaɓe am, pellet Alla ko cemmbuɗo tedduɗo.

58:22.t: A heɓatah yimɓe gooŋɗinɓe e ñalawma cakkatiiɗo na njiɗandira e luundiiɓe Alla e nelaaɗo makko haysi ɓe ngonii baabiraaɓe mum en wolla ɓiɓɓe wolla musiɓɓe, wolla gorol mum en, ko ɓe ɓerɗe mum en mbinnda iimaan O semmbiniɓe e ruuhu ummade e makko, O naatnaɓe aljannaaji na dogo ley majji caatli ɓe duumo toon haa pooma, Alla weleeɓe ɓe mbele Alla, ko ɓeen ngoni fedde Alla, ko fedde Alla tigi woni malaaɓe.

59:1.t: Kala ko woni ka kammuuji e ka leydi seninii Allah. Ko Kaŋko woni pooluɗo , Ñeeño on.

59:2.t: Ko Kaŋko yaltini ɓeen he'efareeɓe joom en defte en e galleeji mum en e mooɓdu adanuru ndu, on cikkaana maɓe njaltu, ɓe cikki galli mum en ɗi ndeenatɓe e Alla, O ardiɓe ɗoɓe cikkaana, O werlii e ɓerɗe mum en kulol, hoɓe njirbinira galleeji maɓɓe juuɗe mum en e juuɗe gooŋɗinɓe, teskee onon joman en kakkillaaji.

59:3.t: Si alla farlaana e mum en yaltineede ma o leptuɓe e aduna woodanaɓe lepte yiite.

59:4.t: Ɗuum, ko fii kamɓe ɓe lunndike Alla e nulaaɗo makko on. "Kala noon lunndiiɗo Alla e nulaaɗo makko on, pellet, alla ko caɗtuɗo lepte".

59:5.t: Kala ko taƴɗon e tamaroowi wolla ngaccuɗonki hoki dari e pooɓe makki, ko e yamiroore alla ngam o hoyna faasiqeeɓe.

59:6.t: Ko Alla rutti fa'ade e nelaaɗo makko ummaade e mum en, on keñaraaki e mum pucci wolla geloobi, kono Alla na wuurta nelaaɓe makko e dow mbo o wela, Alla na hattani kala hu'unde.

59:7.t: Ko Alla neemini e nelaaɗo mum e yimɓe gure dow, na woodani Alla e nelaaɗo makko e ɓadiiɓe nelaado e alyatitm en e miskineeɓe e ɓiy laawol ngam ɗum wa'asa yiilaade hakkunde alɗuɓe mon, ko nelaaɗo totti on ɓame ko o haɗi on ngacce, ndeene Alla, pellet Alla ko caɗtuɗo lepte.

59:8.t: Woodani wa'asɓe yaltinaaɓe galleeji mum en e jawɗeele mum en hoɓe ɗaɓɓa ɓural ummaade e Alla e weluya hoɓe mballa Alla e nelaaɗo makko, ko ɓeen de ngoni gooŋɗuɓe tigi.

59:9.t: E ɓeen telliiɓe e madiina e iimaan ko adii ɓe, hoɓe njiɗi oon perɗo fa'ade e maɓɓe ɓe keɓatah e ɓerɗe mum en tikkere koɓe totta ko, hoɓe ɓurna e dow ko*e mum en haysi hoɓe ngondi e ba'asal, kala mbo Alla reeni fittaandu mum e ɗawre, ko ɓeen de ngoni malaaɓe ɓe.

59:10.t: E ɓeen arɓe caggal mu'en na mbi'a joomo amen yaafa amen minen e musiɓɓe amen adiiɓe amen e iimaan wota waɗ e ɓerɗe amen cokotaagal wonan'de ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe,joomi amen ko aan woni enɗiiɗo jurmotooɗo.

59:11.t: Mbelr a yiaani ɓeen naafaqinɓe wiiɓe musibbe mum en yedduɓe jiyaaɓe e yimɓe defte, si on njaltii pellet ma min njaltid e mon, min ɗototaako e dow mon hay gooto, si on kaɓaama ma min mballu mon Alla na seedo koɓe fenooɓe.

59:12.t: Siɓe njaltinaama ɓe njaltidtah e mum en si ɓe kaɓaama ɓe mballataa ɓe siɓe mballiiɓe maɓe ndunta refti ɓe mballetaake.

59:13.t: Ko onon ɓuri sattu kulo e ɓerɗe maɓɓe ga ni e Alla, waɗi noon koɓe yimɓe ɓe paamatah.

59:14.t: ɓe kaɓatah e mon si wonah hoɓe e gure taartinaaɗe galli wolla caggal mahdeele bone maɓɓe hakkunde mu'en na satti haɗa sikka koɓe gootum kono ɓerɗe maɓɓe na ceerti waɗi noon koɓe yimɓe ɓe kakkiltah.

59:15.t: Hona yeru ɓeen adiiɓe ɓe ko ɓadii ɓe meeɗi lepte fiyaaku mum en woodaniiɓe lepte caɗtuɗe.

59:16.t: Ko hono seytaane de wi'i neɗɗaŋke o yeddu, nde o yeddi o wi'i miin komi kisɗo e ma, miin mbiɗo huli Alla joom binnde o.

59:17.t: Laati batte mu'en kanɓe ɗiɗa ko yiite saasooɓe toon, ɗuum ko njoɓdi tooñooɓe.

59:18.t: Eehey mon gooŋɗinɓe ndeente Alla, yo fittaandu ndaar kondu ardinani jannga kule alla pellet alla ko kumpatiiɗo ko ngolloton ko.

59:19.t: Wote ngone hono ɓeen yejjitɓe Alla, o yejjitini ɓe pittaali mum'en ko ɓeen ngoni faasiqeeɓe.

59:20.t: Yimɓe yiite e yimɓe aljanna potaanih, ko yimɓe aljanna ngoni foolɓe.

59:21.t: Si min tellinna o alquraana e dow hooseere ma a yiinde honde luli honde fetta ngam hulde Alla ɗi tinndi emin piyaniɗi yimɓe ko ngam ɓe miijo.

59:22.t: Ko Kaŋko woni deweteeɗo deweteeɗo e goonga alah si wonah Kaŋko, ganndo ko wirni e ka wirnaaki kaŋko woni joom yurmeende huftadinnde e yurmeende heeriinde.

59:23.t: Ko Kaŋko Alla mbo deweteeɗo e goonga alah si wonah Kaŋko laamɗo ceniiɗo kisɗo gooŋɗiɗo kiilndiiɗo tedduɗo cemmbinɗo mawɗo senaare woodanii Alla e koɓe ndenndinta mbo ko.

59:24.t: Ko Kaŋko woni Alla takɗo gootnuɗo mbaadinɗo tagu woodanii mbo inɗe ɓurɗe moƴƴude, woodanii mbo ko woni e ndeer kammuuji e leydi ko Kaŋko woni pooloowo mbo hay gooto foolatah Ñeeñƴuɗo.

60:1.t: Eehey mon gooŋɗinɓe wote njaggire añɓe mi e añɓe mon heetɓe hoɗon mberno e mum en gilli te koɓe yedduɓe goongo garɗo o e mon, hoɓe njaltina nelaaɗo e onon sabu tan on ngooŋɗanii Alla joomi mon, tawde on njalti sabu jihaadi e laawol am e ɗaɓjude weluya am, hoɗon cuurtanaɓe kabaruuji juulɓe ngam ɓe mbele mon, mbiɗa anndi ko cuuɗoton e ko ɓanngiɗon, kala e mon baɗɗo ɗuum o majji laawol peewngol.

60:2.t: Siɓe peewnatiima e mon ɓe ngonana mon añɓe ɓe mberta juuɗe maɓɓe e ɗemɗe mu' en e mbaadi mbonndi ɓe njiɗiina nde ngonaton heefereeɓe.

60:3.t: Nafatah on enɗameeje mon wona ɓiɓɓe mon ñande darnga O seernda hakkunde mon Alla na yi'a ko ngolloton ko.

60:4.t: Woodanii on ñeemtinirde moƴƴere e Ibraahiima e ɓeen wonduɓe e mum nde ɓe mbi'i pellet ko min hisɓe e mon e ko ndewaton ko wona Alla ko, min njeddii on feeñi hakkunde men ngañngu e tikkere haa pooma haa ngooŋɗinon Alla gooto o, si wona konngol Ibraahiima wonan'de baaba makko pellet ma mi yaafnano ma, mi alanaama hay hu'unde ka Alla, joomi amen min mbakkaliima e ma ko e ma min ndutti e ko e ma woni wattande.

60:5.t: joomi amen wota waɗ min fitina wonan'de ɓeen yedduɓe, yaafa amen joomi amen pellet ko aan woni tedduɗo mbo fooletaake ñeeñɗuɗo.

60:6.t: Gooŋɗi,woodani mon e maɓɓe ñeemtanirgal moƴƴal wonan'de oon joortiiɗo e Alla e ñalngu La'akara, oon ɗuurniiɗo noon pellet Alla ko gala jettaaɗo.

60:7.t: Yaama nde Alla waɗata hakkunde mon e ɓeen ɓe ngañandirɗon e mu'en gilli, Alla ko kattanɗo Alla ko kafroowo bakkatuuji jurmotooɗo.

60:8.t: Alla haɗataa mon ɓeen ɓe kaɓaani e mon e diine ɓe njaltinaani on e galleeji mon nde ɗiggantonɓe nuunɗon fa'ade e maɓɓe pellet Alla ko jiɗɗo nuun'ɗuɓe.

60:9.t: Kono Alla haɗata on ko ɓeen haɓatooɓe on e diine yaltinooɓe on galleeji mon ɓe mballandiri e yaltinde on, nde keetnaton ɓe kala baɗɗo ɓe keeda ko ɓeen ngoni tooñooɓe.

60:10.t: Eehey mon gooŋɗinɓe si gooŋɗinɓe rewɓe ngarii e mon njaribeeɓe Alla na anndi iimaan mu'en, si on nganndii koɓe gooŋɗinɓe wotee ndutteeɓe e he'eferɓe ɓe ndaganaaki he'eferɓe ɓe heeferɓe ɓe kadi ndaganaaki ɓe, totteeɓe koɓe nafqi ko bakkaat ala e mon nde ndesaton ɓe si on tottii ɓe teŋe maɓɓe wote nanngite piɓle rewɓe he'eferɓe naamnee ko nafquɗon kamɓe ne yo ɓe naamna ko ɓe nafqi ko, ko ɗuum woni ñaawoore Alla hakkunde mon Alla ko gannda ñeeñɗuɗo.

60:11.t: Si hu'unde faatiima mon e rewɓe mon fa'ade e he'efareeɓe leptuɗon ɓe tottee ɓeen ɓe rewɓe mu'en njahi fotde koɓe tottirno kulee Alla mbo ngoonŋɗin ɗon O.

60:12.t: Eehey ma annabi si rewɓe juulɓe ngari e ma hoɓe coodandira e ma nde ɓe ndenndinta Alla e hay gooto,ngujjata njinata, mbarata sukaaɓe mu' en,ngaddata fenaande fekindaande hakkunde juuɗe mu' en e koyɗe mum en,ɓe ngoopataa ma e moƴƴere ndeen de soodandir e mum 'en, yaafnanoɓe Alla, pellet Alla ko jaafatooɗo jurmotooɗo

60:13.t: Eehey mjon goooŋɗiɓe wote keetne yimɓe ɓe Alla tikkani e dow mu'en, ɓe piɓtiima e La'akara hono no he'eferɓe piɓtari e yimɓe genaale.

61:1.t: Kala ko woni ka kammuuli e ka leydi seninii Allah. Ko Kaŋko woni pooluɗo, Ñeeño oon.

61:2.t: Eehey mon gooŋɗinɓe ko waɗi hoɗon kaala ko on mbaɗata.

61:3.t: Mawni tikkere ka Alla nde kaalaton ko on ngollata.

61:4.t: Pellet Alla na yiɗi ɓeen haɓateeɓe e laawol Alla heɓe ngoni saffeeji hono maadi fotndaandi.

61:5.t: Tumo nde o maakani yimɓe makko, yimɓe am holko taki hoɗon lora mi te hoɗon nganndi komi nelaaɗo Alla fa'ade e mon, ndeɓe ooñi Alla ooñi ɓerɗe maɓɓe Alla feewnata yimɓe faasiqeeɓe.

61:6.t: E nde Iisa ɓiy Maryama maaki ehey mon ɓiɓɓe Israa'iil komi nelaaɗo Alla tigi fa'ade e mon gooŋɗinɗo ko woni ko e ye'esam am Tawreet e beltinoowo nelaaɗo garoowo caggal hombo wiyee Ahmadu, nde o anndani ɓe hujjaaji laaɓɗi ɓe mbi'ii ɗum ko mbilewu ɓanngungu.

61:7.t: Alah ɓurɗa tooñde oon pekandiiɗo e dow Alla te hombo noddee e islaam, Alla feewnata tooñooɓe.

61:8.t: Hoɓe paala ñifrude annoore Alla nde kunduɗe maɓɓe, Alla ko timminoowo annoore makko nde haysi he'efareeɓe ngañii.

61:9.t: Ko Kanoko woni Nulirɗo Nulaaɗo makko on peewal e diina goonga, fii yo o ɓamtu ka e hoore kala diina, hay si sirkooɓe ɓen ngañii [ɗum].

61:10.t: Ehey mon gooŋɗinɓe mbele mi tinndinta on njulaagu ndaɗnatngu on e lepte mu'usɗe.

61:11.t: Ngooŋɗinon Alla e nelaaɗo makko mbaɗiron jihaadi e laawol makko jawdi mon e pittaali mon ko ɗuum ɓuri on moƴƴande si on ngonii annduɓe.

61:12.t: Alla hafrana on bakkatuuji mon, O naatna on aljannaaji ɗi caatli ndogata ley mum e koɗorɗe belɗe ka aljanna adan ko ɗuum woni malal manngal.

61:13.t: E goɗɗum ko njiɗɗon ballal ummaade e Alla e uddital ɓadingal weltin juulɓe ɓe.

61:14.t: Ehey mon gooŋɗinɓe ngonee wallooɓe Alla hono no Iisa Ibnu Mariya maaki suɓaaɓe mum hombo wallata mi fa'ade e Alla suɓaaɓe mum mbii ko minen ngoni wallooɓe Alla, heen fedde e Banii Isra'iil goonɗini won'de nde yeddi min cemmbini gooŋɗinnde nde e dow añɓe mum en ɓe ngonti foolɓe.

62:1.t: Kala ko woni nder kammuuji e leydi hino seninnde Allah, Laamɗo, ceniiɗo, Pooluɗo, Ñeeño on.

62:2.t: Ko Kaŋko nuli e humammbinneeɓe ɓeen Nulaaɗo jiyaaɗo e maɓɓe, himo janngana ɓe Aayeeje makko ɗen, o laɓɓina ɓe, o anndina ɓe deftere nden e Sunna on, hay si tawiino ko adii ɗuum, ɓe laatino e majjere ɓanngude.

62:3.t: (O nuli mo) kadi e woɗɓe goo e maɓɓe, ɓe hawrondiraali e ɓeen taho. Ko Kaŋko woni pooluɗo, Ñeeño on.

62:4.t: Ɗuum ko ɓural Allah, Homo okka ngal mo o muuyani. Allah ko Jom ɓural mawnngal.

62:5.t: Misal ronndinaaɓe Tawreeta ɓeen refti ɓe nigolliraali nde, no wa'i wa mbabba ronndii mba defte. Yeru yimɓe yeddooɓe aayeeje Alla ɗeen bonii. Allah feewnataa yimɓe tooñooɓe ɓeen.

62:6.t: Maaku: "Ko onon yo Huudiŋkooɓe ! Si on aaƴike wonan'de ko on yiɗaaɓe Allah ko wanaa yimɓe heddiiɓe ɓen, haray njelee maayde, si tawii ko on ngoonguɓe".

62:7.t: Ɓe njelotaako nde muk, sabu ko juuɗe maɓɓe ɗen ngardini kon. Allah ko gannduɗo tooñooɓe ɓeen.

62:8.t: Maaku: "Ndee maayde nde ndogoton, pellet, ko nde hawraynde e mon. Refti ndutteɗon to oon gannduɗo ko wirnii e ko feeñi, O kumpita on ko ngollaynoɗon kon".

62:9.t: Ko onon yo gooŋɗinɓe ! Si juulde nden noddinanaama ñalnde Juma, njaccee e jaŋtagol Allah, ngacciton njeengu. Ko ɗuum ɓuri moƴƴannde on, si tawno ko on annduɓe !

62:10.t: Si juulde nden gasii, haray ca,akitee ka leydi, ɗaɓɓon ɓural Allah ngal [woni arsike], jaŋtoron innde Allah ko ɗuuɗi, mbelajo'o on maloyte.

62:11.t: Si ɓe nji'ii njeeyngu maa fijindaaru, ɓe hammira toon, ɓe ngaccama hiɗa darii. Maaku: "Ko ko woni ka Allah kon ɓuri moƴƴude beleeɗe e njulaaku. Ko Allah ɓuri moƴƴude e arsikooɓe ɓeen".

63:1.t: Si naafiqiiɓe ɓeen ngrii e maa, ɓe mbi'a: "Miɗen ceedii won'de ko a Nulaaɗo Allah". Allah no anndi won'de pellet, ko a Nulaaɗo makko; Allah no seedii won'de pellet, naafiqiiɓe ɓeen ko fenooɓe.

63:2.t: Ɓe njogitorri goondooje maɓɓe ɗeen heedo, ɓe paddii laawol Allah ngol. Pellet, fii ko ɓe ngollaynoo kon bonii!

63:3.t: Ɗuim noon ko tawde ɓe gooŋɗinii, refti ɓe njeddi, ɓerɗe maɓɓe ɗen notaa e mum; kamɓe on ɓe paamataa.

63:4.t: Si a yi'ii ɓe, ɓalli maɓɓe welete; si ɓe wowlii, a nana konnguɗi maɓɓe ɗin. Hiɓe mba'i wa pecce ɓaaraaɗe, hiɓe cikka kala eewnaango ko e hoore maɓɓe. Ko ɓeen tigi ngoni añɓe ɓen, reenoɓe. Allah huɗii ɓe ! Ko honno ɓe nkiiltiratool (e goonga) !

63:5.t: Si ɓe mbianaama: "ngaree Nulaaɗo Allah on imsinanoo on", ɓe hayla ko'e maɓɓe ɗeen, nji'aa hiɓe ɗuurnoo hara ko ɓe townitiiɓe.

63:6.t: Hino fota e maɓɓe, foti a imsinani ɓe maa hara a imsinanaaki ɓe: Allah yaafotaako ɓe fes, pellet, Allah feewnataa yimɓe faasiqiiɓe ɓeen.

63:7.t: Ko ɓeen ngoni wiooɓe wote nafqee wonɓe e sera nelaaɗà haa ɓe ceerta na woodani Alla moftirɗi kammuuji e leydi kono tan naafiqeeɓe ɓe paamatah.

63:8.t: Hoɓe mbia si en nduttiima Madiina ma ɓurɓe teddude njaltin ɓurɓe hoyde ɓe, woodanii Alla teddungal e nelaaɗo makko e gooŋɗinɓe ɓe, kono tan naafige en nganndah.

63:9.t: Eehey mon gooŋɗinɓe woto sokli mon jawɗeele mon e ɓiɓɓe mon gaa e innude Alla kala baɗɗo ɗuum ko ɓeen ngoni pertuɓe ɓe.
