63:10.t: Nafqe ko Alla arsakini on ko, ko adii nde maayde arata e gooto e mon o wi'a joom am a leelnantaa kam haa e happu ɓadiiɗo mi sakkoro mi wona e moƴƴuɓe ɓe.

63:11.t: Alla neeɓnantah hay fittaandu wo'oturu si happu manndu arii Alla na humpatii ko ngolloton ko.

64:1.t: Ina subhinanoo Alla kala ko woni e kammuuji e ka lesdi, na woodani mbo laamu na woodani mbo jettooje ko O kattanɗo kala hu'unde.

64:2.t: Ko Kaŋko tagi on ina e mon ke'efeera ina e mon gooŋɗinɗo Alla na yi'a ko ngolloton ko.

64:3.t: O tagrii kammuuji e leydi goongo o mbaadini on o moƴƴini mbaadiili mon ko e makko woni battane mon.

64:4.t: Hombo anndi ko woni e kammuuji e leydi hombo anndi ko mbirnaton e ko ɓannginton Alla na anndi ko woni e ɓerɗe.

64:5.t: Mbela araani e mon kabaruuji ɓeen yeddunooɓe ko adi,ɓe meeɗi lepte fiyakuuji mum en woodaniiɓe lepte mu'usɗe.

64:6.t: Woni sabu ɗeen lepte noon ko nelaaɓe mum en na ngaddanatnoo ɓe dallillaaji ɓannguɗi ɓe mbi'a ee ko ɓanndiyankooɓe peewnata min,ɓe njeddi, Alla yon'danii,Alla ko galo jettaaɗo.

64:7.t: He'eferɓe ɓe ɓe aaƴiima ɓe ummintaake,maaku oho kay ma on ummine mi wooɗndirii joom am ma on ummine,refti ma on kumpite ko ngolluuɗon, ɗuum na newanii Alla.

64:8.t: Ngooŋɗinee Alla e nelaaɗo makko e annoore nde o tellini pellet Alla ko kumpatiiɗo ko ngolloton ko.

64:9.t: ñande o renndi mon ñalngu denndingol oon woni ñalngu basandiral, ka gooŋɗinɗo Alla o golli ko lobbi o momtone boneeji mum, o naatna mbo aljanaaji ɗi caatli ndogata les majji ɓe caasa toon haa pooma, ko ɗuum woni malal manngal.

64:10.t: Ko ɓeen yedduɓe ɓe njeddi aayeeje amen ngoni yimɓe yiite saasooɓe e henge, nge bonii battane.

64:11.t: Musiiba heɓata hay gooto si wona e sakkitoore Alla, kala gooŋɗinɗo Alla O feewna ɓernde makko, Alla na anndi kala hu'unde.

64:12.t: Ɗoftee Alla, ɗoftoɗon Nulaaɗo on, ndeentoɗon ! Si on nduŋitii, nganndee pellet, ko fawii nulaaɗo Amen on tan, ko jottingol ɓanngina.

64:13.t: Allaahu alah deweteeɗo e goongo si wona Kaŋko, ko e dow makko goonɗinɓe mbakkilato.

64:14.t: Eehey mon gooŋɗinɓe pellet ina e yogo e suddiiɓe mon e ɓiɓɓe mon ko añɓe mon ndeenteeɓe, si on njaafiima on njarliima noon Alla ko jaafatooɗo jurmotooɗo.

64:15.t: Ngandee pellet, jawɗe mon ɗeen e ɓiɗɓe mon ɓeen ko fitina ina ka Alla njoɓdi mawndi.

64:16.t: Kulee Alla ko kattanɗon nanee ɗoftaɗon nafqe ko ɗuum ɓuri moƴƴan'de pittaali mon, oon deenaaɗo fittaandu makko e ɗawre, ko ɓeen ngoni malaaɓe ɓe.

64:17.t: Si on ñamlii Alla ñamaande moƴƴere o sowana ɗuum en nde, o yaafoɓe Alla ko jettoowo ko muñɗo.

64:18.t: Gannduɗo mbirniiɗi e feeñuɗi, mawɗo, ñeeñɗo.

65:1.t: Eehey ma annabi si on ceerii suddiiɓe ceereeɓe e edda mu' en tonnge edda o, kulee Alla joomon wotee njaltineeɓe e cuuɗi mu'en wotoɓe njaltu si wona ɓe mbaɗ paŋkare peeñɗe ko ɗiin ngoni keeri Alla kala jawtuɗo keerol Alla o tooñi hoore makko, a anndah yaama de Alla waɗata caggal ɗuum fiyaaku.

65:2.t: Si ɓe njottinii edda mu'en nanngireeɓe no moƴƴi wollo ceerdonɓe no moƴƴi,ceednon seedeeji ɗiɗi ummaade e mon ndarnee seedanfaagal fii Alla ko ɗuum woni ko waajete wonan'de oon gooŋɗinɗo Alla e ñalnde sakkatiinde kala deentiiɗo Alla,Alla waɗana mbo yaltirde.

65:3.t: O arsikina mbo to o sikkaana, kala bakkaliiɗo e Alla yonii mbo, pellet yamiroore Alla nde ko yottotoonde, Alla waɗani kala hu'unde fotde mum.

65:4.t: ɓeen suddiiɓe mon fiɓtiiɓe fiilayru si on cikkatiima edda mu'en ko lebbi tati e ɓeen ɓe piilataako edda mu' en ko lebbi tati, debadeedi en noon edda maɓɓe gasata ko nde ɓe njibini, kala kulɗo Alla o waɗana mbo newaare e fiyaaku makko.

65:5.t: ɗuum ko ñaawoore Alla o tellaniinde e mon, kala kulɗo Alla o hafrana mbo bakkatuuji makko, o mawninana mbo njoɓdi.

65:6.t: Koɗneeɓe ɗo koɗɗon fotde kattane mon wotee loreeɓe ngam ɓittinan'deɓe, nafqeeɓe ha ɓe keɓto tawde koɓe korinoo ɓe, si wonii ɓe muyninanii on njonnee ɓe njoɓdi mu' en njandire moƴƴere hakkunde mon, si on cattiraama yo goɗɗo muynin mbo.

65:7.t: Yo nafqu gala e ngalu makko he, oon paaɗaaɗo noon yo nafqu e ko Alla totti mbo ko,Alla fawata hay fittaandu si wona ko tottindu ko, ma Alla waɗ caggal satteende newuya.

65:8.t: Heewii saare saliinde yamiroore joom mum e nelaaɓo mum, min kaasbii nde haasboore saɗtunde Min leptinnde lepte bon'ɗe.

65:9.t: Nde meeɗi e lepte golle mayre laati batte fiyaaku mayre ko perte.

65:10.t: Alla heblaniɓe lepte caɗtuɗe kulee Alla onon joom en kakkillaaji ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe, Alla tellinii e mu' en ko siftinta.

65:11.t: Nelaaɗo taratooɗo e mon aayeeje ɓannguɗe ngam o yaltina ɓeen gooŋɗin ɓe ngolluɓe golle lobbe ummaade e niwre fa'ade e annoore, kala gooŋɗinɗo Alla golli ko moƴƴi O naatna mbo aljannaaji ɗi caatli ilata les majji ɓe nduumo toon, ko goongo Alla moƴƴinanii mbo arsuka.

65:12.t: Alla talɗo kammuuji jeeɗiɗi e leydi yeru majji, yamiroore Alla na tello hakkunde majji ngam nganndon wonde Alla ko kattanɗo kala hu'unde Alla fiiltariima kala hu'unde e ganndal.

66:1.t: Ehey ma annabi ko taki ana harmina ko Alla daknan ma sabu ɗaɓɓude welnaade suddiiɓe ma, Alla ko jaafatooɗo jurmotooɗo.

66:2.t: Alla farlii e mon daktinde gooɗndooje mon Alla ko keedo mon ko kaŋko woni ganndo Ñeeñɗo.

66:3.t: Tuma nde annabi deeyi fa'ade e yogo e suddiiɓe makko yeewtere, nde o habri yeewtere nde, Alla feññinani mbo o anndini yogo e yeewtere he, o falii heen yogo, nde o habri mbo ɗum o wi'i hombo habru ma ɗuum o maaki habrii kam Gannda Kumpatiiɗo.

66:4.t: Si on tuubi fa'ade e Alla sabu ɓerɗe mon ɗe ooñinooma si on mballandirii e dow makko, ko Alla woni ballo makko e jIbriil e gooŋɗinɓe moƴƴuɓe e Malaeyka en caggal ɗuum koɗi ballooji.

66:5.t: Yaama de joom makko si o ceeriiɓe nde o wostantoo mbo ɓurɓe mon moƴƴude juulɓe gooŋɗinɓe ɗoftiiɓe tuubooɓe rewooɓe Alla hoorooɓe Seemedɓe e boomi.

66:6.t: Ehey mon gooŋɗinɓe ndeene ko'e mon e koreeji mon e yiite docate mannge ko yimɓe e kaaƴe ina e dow henge maleykaaji tekkuɗi cattuɗi ɗi ngoopata ko Alla yamariɗi te hoɗi ngolla ko Alla yamiriɗi.

66:7.t: Ehey mon he'eferɓe wote ngantinee hannde njoɓeteɗon tan koko ngollatna ɗon ko.

66:8.t: Ehey mon gooŋɗinɓe tuubee fa'ade e Alla tuubgol laaɓngol yaama joomi mon hafrana on bonɗi mon o naatna mon aljannaaji na ila ley majji caatli, ñande Alla hoynata annabi e ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe wond'ude e mum, annoore mum en na yaha ye'esa mum en e ñaama mu' en hoɓe mbiya joomi amen timminan amen annoore amen yaafa min pellet ko a kattanɗo kala hu'unde.

66:9.t: Ehey ma annabiijo, haɓ e he'eferɓe ɓen e naafiqiiɓe ɓen, saɗtinanaa ɓe; weerde maɓɓe nden ko Jahannama, nge bonii ruttorde.

66:10.t: Alla fiyani yeru wonan'de ɓeen yedduɓe soknaaja Nuuhu e luutu ɓe ngoniina e les jiyaaɓe amen ɗiɗo moƴƴuɓe ɓe njanfiiɓe ɗuum nafaaniɓe ka Alla hay hu'unde,ɓe mbi'e naatee yiite wond'ude e naatɓe ɓe.

66:11.t: Alla fiyani yeru gooŋɗinɓe ɓe debbo fir'awna nde o wiino joom am mahanam ka ma suudu ka aljanna ndaɗndaa mi e fir'awna e golle mum, daɗndam e yimɓe tooñooɓe.

66:12.t: E Maryama ɓiy imraana oon deenɗo hoore makko e jina min ngutti heen ruuhu amen o gooŋɗini konngi joomiiko e defte makko o tawa e ɗoftiiɓe ɓe.

67:1.t: Mo laamu woni e juuɗe mum mawnii, ko Kaŋko woni kattanɗo kala hu'unde.

67:2.t: Oon tagirɗo maayde e nguurndam, fii ndaarndagol on ko hommbo e mo'on ɓuri moƴƴude golle. Ko Kaŋko woni pooluɗo, kaforoowo on.

67:3.t: On takɗo kammuuji jeeɗiɗi pawondirɗi. A yi'ataa ɓura-ɓurda e tagoore jom hinaraŋke On. Yiiltu ndaarɗe maa ɗen (daaraa). Taw si a yi'ay ce'ekol?

67:4.t: Refti nduttaa ndaarɗe ɗen laaɓi ɗiɗi, gite maa ɗeen nduttoto e maaɗa hara ko ɗe hoyɗe, taƴiiɗe.

67:5.t: Gooŋɗii Min cuɗinirii kammu aduna nguun [koode] pitilli, Min mbaɗi ɗe fiɗirɗe seytanuuji, Min kebilani ɓe lette huɓɓunge nge.

67:6.t: Hino woodani ɓeen yedduɓe Joomi mum, lette Jahannama. Nge bonii ruttorde !

67:7.t: Si ɓe mbeddaama e ndeer magge, ɓe nanirat nge ha'acaango, hara henge fata.

67:8.t: Henge eɓɓa fultagol, sabu tikkere ndeen. Tuma kala nde dental bugaa e magge, ayninaaɓe nge ɓeen lamndoo ɓe : "E hara jeertinoowo araano e mo'on?"

67:9.t: Ɓe mbi'a: "Pellet ! Jeertinoowo arno e amen tigi, kono min njeddi min mbi'i: Allah jippinaani hay e hu'unde, on ngonaani si wonaa e ndeer majjere mawnde".

67:10.t: Ɓe mbi'ita : "Si miɗen nanaynoo maa hara meɗen haqqilaynoo, min njeyetanooke e yimɓe Huɓɓunge ngeen".

67:11.t: Ɓe qirritii bakkatuuji maɓɓe ɗin. Halakuyee woodanii joom en Huɓɓaynge ngen.

67:12.t: Pellet, hulooɓe Joomi mum ɓeen ka wirnii, hino woodani ɓen haforaneede e njoɓdi mawndi.

67:13.t: Cuuɗee konnguɗi mon maa ɓanninon ɗum. Kaŋko on ko o gannduɗo ko woni e ndeer ɓerɗe.

67:14.t: E hara takɗo oon anndaa? Ko Kaŋko le woni newiiɗo, kumpitiiɗo oon.

67:15.t: Ko Kaŋko waɗani on leydi ndin eeltaandi : haray njehee e seraaji mayri, ñaamon e arsike makko. Ko ka makko woni ummital ngal.

67:16.t: E on kooli on gon'ɗo ka kammu nde o munnataa e mo'on leydi ndin, tawa yoo hindi dilla?

67:17.t: Kaa on kooli On gon'ɗo ka kammu nde Oo wurtataa e mon henndu bippooru? Aray nde anndon ko honno woni jeertinaango am ngon.

67:18.t: Sellii adinooɓe ɓeen ɗoon ɓen njeddiino. Taskii ko honno leɓte an ɗen mbattinirnoo!

67:19.t: E ɓee nji'aani colli ɗiin dow maɓɓe, hiɗi fonta gabitannji ɗi ñobba? [Won'de] jogitaaki ɗin si wonaa Joom hinaraŋke on. Pellet, ko o deenɗo kala hu'unde.

67:20.t: E ko hommbo woni on konuujo mum wallata on hara wonaa Jom hinaraŋke on? Tigi on, he'eferɓe ɓeen ngonaani si wonaa e ndeer hodo.

67:21.t: E ko hommbo woni arsikoowo on, si o jogitike arsike makko on? si ko woni, ɓe duumike e ƴaggere e goɗɗitagol.

67:22.t: Kere ko on jahoowo no hippi ye'eso mum ɓuri feewde? Kaa ko on jahoowo no fotondiri e laawol pocciingol?

67:23.t: Maaku: "Ko Kaŋko woni ko fuɗɗi oon, O waɗani on nanɗe e giiɗe e ɓerɗe". Kono famɗii ko njettoton [neema].

67:24.t: Maaku: "Ko Kaŋko woni ca'aktuɗo on leydi, ko ka makko kadi woni ko mooɓitoyteɗon".

67:25.t: Heɓe mbi'a: "Ko honnde tuma woni ndee fodoore, si tawii ko on gooŋɗuɓe?"

67:26.t: Maaku : "nganndee anndugol [fii Darnagl] ko ka Allah woni. Miiin on ko Mi jeertinoowo [tan] ɓanngina".

67:27.t: Nde ɓe nji'oyta (leɓte) ɗen ka ɓadii, j'eece yedduɓe ɓen suni j'eece he'eferɓe, [ɓe] mbi'anee : "Ko ɗuum ɗoo woni ko ɗaɓɓatnoɗon".

67:28.t: Maaku : "Yeetee kam, si Allah ƴettitii kam miin e wonndiiɓe am maa o yurmaama min, ko hommbo daɗndata he'eferɓe ɓeen lepte mu'usuuɗe?"

67:29.t: Maaku : "Ko Kaŋko Joom hinaraŋke oon. Min ngooŋɗinii mo, ko e makko kadi men fawii. Aray nde nganndon ko hommbo woni e majjere ɓanngunde".

67:30.t: Maaku : "njeewtee kam , si ndiyam mon ɗam wattinii ɓeeɓuɗam, ko hommbo addanta on ndiyam ilatɗam?"

68:1.t: Nuun. Mi wooɗndirii kuɗol e ko ɓe mbinndirta ko!

68:2.t: Aan a wonaa, sabu neema Joommaa o, kaangaaɗo.

68:3.t: Ko pellet, hino woodani-ma njoɓdi ndi taƴondirtaa.

68:4.t: E ko pellet, haɗa e jikku mawɗo.

68:5.t: Aray nde nji'aa, ɓe nji'a kamɓe kadi

68:6.t: ko hombo e mon woni kaangaaɗo oon.

68:7.t: Pellet, ko Joommaa ɓuri anndude majjuɗo on laawol makko ngol, ko Kaŋko kadi ɓuri anndude feewɓe ɓe.

68:9.t: Heɓe njiɗi si a newantono (ɓe), ɓe newano-(maa).

68:10.t: Wota a tefto kadi kala ɗuuɗuɗo woondugol, koyɗo.

68:13.t: yo'ora-ɓerndeejo e hoore ɗum, keɓiraaɗo nii(.ɓiy jina).

68:14.t: fii o wonii joom jawdi e ɓiɗɓe.

68:15.t: Si aayeeje amen ɗeen janngaama e [tawnde] makko, o wi'a: "Ko tinndi adinooɓe".

68:16.t: Aray nde min maandina mo e hoore kinal.

68:17.t: Min njarribor ɓe wano Min njarribornoo jeyɓe ngesa mba : fewndo ɓeen ngooɗndunoo pellet, ɓe coñat ba subaka ko ɓe dawɓe.

68:19.t: Jayngol immori ka Joomi maa ari huuɓiti ba tawi heɓe ɗaanii.

68:22.t: "Kori ndawee ta ngesa mon, si tawii ko on soñooɓe".

68:24.t: Won'de "miskiino woo naatataa e mabba hannde".

68:25.t: Ɓe ndawidi e ɗawugol [wa'asuɓe ɓeen] ko ɓe eɓɓuɓe.

68:26.t: Nde ɓe nji'unoo ba, ɓe mbi'i: "Pellet, min majjii [laawol ngol]".

68:28.t: Ɓurɗo ɓe moƴƴude oon wi'i: "mi wi'anaano on : haanii ko cubbunhinoɗon?"

68:29.t: Ɓe mb'i: "Senaare woodanii Joomi amen ! Pellet, hari ko min tooñɓe".

68:30.t: Woɗɓe e maɓɓe feewtiti ɓeya, heɓe pelindira.

68:31.t: Ɓe mbi'i: "Ee bone amen ! Pellet, hari ko min bewɓe.

68:32.t: Hino gasa ka Joomi amen wattitana min ɓuri baan ɗon moƴƴude. Ko ka Joomi amen ko min reerɗube e [ya'afeede] .

68:33.t: Ko noon tigi woni leɓte ɗeen; ko lette La'akara ɗeen non ɓuri manude, sinno heɓe nganndunoo !

68:34.t: Pellet, hino woodani gooŋɗuɓe ɓeen ka Joomi maɓɓe, Aljannaaji ne'ema.

68:35.t: Kere Min mbaɗay jebbiliiɓe ɓeen wano bonɓe ɓeen?

68:36.t: Ko heɓi on, si ɗon ñaawira noon?

68:37.t: Kaa hoɗon mari deftere, nde janngoton e mum?

68:38.t: Pellet, ko woodani on e mayre, ko ko cuɓotoɗon.

68:39.t: Ka ko podooje woodani on e amen, koolniiɗe haa Ñande Darngal, won'de pellet, hino woodani on ko ñaawoton kon?

68:40.t: Laɓndii ɓe ko hommbo e maɓɓe fawtaniiɓe ɗuum?

68:41.t: Kaa ko kafidiiɓe woodani ɓe? yoo ɓe ngaddu kafidiiɓe maɓɓe ɓen, si tawii ko ɓe gooŋuɓe !

68:42.t: Ñande belenru ñoroytee, ɓe noddee e cujjugol kono ɓe mbaawataa.

68:43.t: Hara gite maɓɓe ɗeen no heli, koyeera no suddi ɓe. Ko tawde ɓe noddeteno e cujjugol fewndo ka ɓe mbaawunoo...!

68:44.t: Accidam e kala jedduɗo ndee yeewtere; aray nde Min suynira ɓe nokku ka ɓe nganndaa.

68:45.t: Miɗo neeɓnan ɓe. Pellet noon, pewje am ɗen ko tiiɗɗe.

68:46.t: Kaa a laɓndi ɓe njoɓdi, hara ko yoɓugol ndi teddani ɓe?

68:47.t: Kaa ɓe nganndu fii wirniiɗi ɗiin, hara hiɓe mbinndira [ɗim hujjaaji maɓɓe]?

68:48.t: Muññor ñaawoore Joommaa nden, hara a wa'aali wa wonndiiɗo linngii ngii fewndo o noddunoo [Joom makko] homo sunii.

68:49.t: Si tawno moƴƴere immorde e Joomi makko hewtitanooki mo, ko pellet, o bugeteno e wulaa hara ko o pelniiɗo.

68:50.t: Joomi makko suɓii mo, o waɗi mo e moƴƴuɓe ɓeen.

68:51.t: Hay yedduɓe ɓeen eɓɓiinoo yuwirgol ma gite maɓɓe ɗeen, nde ɓe nanunoo Jaŋtoore nden, hiɓe mbi'a: "on ko kaangaaɗo!".

68:52.t: Ndee [Alqur’aanaare] wonaani, si wonaa waajo winndere nde!

69:3.t: Ko honɗum anndin maa ko woni Darngal?

69:4.t: Samuudu e Aadi en njeddii duɗɗugol Darnga.

69:5.t: Si ko Samuuda en, ɓe kalkira ha'acaango.

69:6.t: Aadi en kan, ɓe kalkira henndu bippooru hattinndu tiiɗude.

69:7.t: O eelti ndu e hoore maɓɓe jehmaaji jeeɗiɗi e ñalawmaaje jeetati jokkondirɗe; nji'aa yimɓe ɓeen no pukkii e ɗiin [koɗooli] wa si tawii ko ɓe daƴƴe tamaro irtiiɗe.

69:8.t: Taw si a yi'anat ɓe ko keddii?

69:9.t: Fir'awna e adinooɓe mo e ca'e junnitanooɗe ɗeen ngardi e goopi.

69:10.t: ɓe njeddi nulaaɗo Joomi maɓɓe on, o nanngiri ɓe nanngal cattungal.

69:11.t: Ko Minen nhoni, fewndo ndiyam ɗam hummbunoo, Min ndoondi on ka dogayka

69:12.t: fii no Mon mbaɗirana ɗum waajo, nofru nanatndu nana ɗum.

69:13.t: Si wuttaama ka allaandu wuttaande wo'otere,

69:14.t: leddi ndiin e pelle ɗeen ɓamtee moññe mo ɓññannde wo'otere.

69:16.t: Kammu ngun se'ekoo, hara ko ngu lo'ungu ndeen ñande.

69:17.t: Hara Malaa'ika'en ngontira ka seraaji maggu, njeetato [e maɓɓe] ronndoo Arsi Joomi maa kiin e hoore maɓɓe ndeen ñande.

69:18.t: Ndeen ñande ko on weeɓitetee; hay hu'unde e fii mon suuɗotaako.

69:19.t: Si ko jonnitiroyaaɗo talkuru mum ndun ka ñaamo mum, o wi'oyay : "njaɓee ! Janngon talkuru am nduun.

69:20.t: Miin mi fellitno mi kawroygol e hasboore am moƴƴere ndeen".

69:24.t: "Ñaamee yariron no newori, sabu ko ngardin-ɗon kon e ñalaaɗe feƴƴuɗe".

69:25.t: Si tawii noon ko jonntiiroyaaɗo talkuru mum nduun ka nano mum, on wi'oyay : "Haaaniino kam hara mi jonnitaaka talkuru am nduun !

69:26.t: Hara mi anndaani ko woni ñaawoore am.

69:32.t: Refti naatnon mbo e jolokooje-callale- ɗe juuteendi mum woni cogone cappanɗe jeeɗiɗi.

69:33.t: Tawde o gooŋɗinaano Allah mawɗo on.

69:36.t: Wonaa ñaamde, si wonaa e ƴiƴƴiƴiri".

69:37.t: Ñaamata ndin, si wonaa bakkondinɓe ɓeen".

69:40.t: won'de pellet, [Alqur'aana] ko konngol nulaaɗo tedduɗo,

69:41.t: wonaa nde konnguɗi yimoowo; kono famɗii ko ngooŋɗinton.

69:42.t: wonaa kadi nde konnguɗi bileejo, kono famɗii ko mbaajitotoɗon.

69:43.t: ko jippinaande immi e Jeyɗo einndere nde.

69:44.t: Si tawno o fekindino e amen yoga e konnguɗi,

69:45.t: ko pellet, min nanngirayno mo doole.

69:46.t: Hooti Min taƴayno e makko ɗaɗol ɓernde ngol.

69:47.t: Alaa e mo'on hay gooto kaɗoowo Min e makko.

69:48.t: Pellet, nde [Alqur'aanaare] konde baajitorgol gooɗuɓe ɓen.

69:49.t: Haray kadi, Miɗen nganndi ina e mon yeddooɓe [nde] .

69:50.t: ko pellet noon, ɗuum ko nimse e hoore yedduɓe ɓeen.

69:51.t: pellet kadi, ko nde goonga jananaaɗo.

69:52.t: Haray subbunhinor innde Joom maa, mawɗo on!

70:2.t: wonan'de he'eferɓe ɓen, alaa duñanoowo ɓe ɗe,

70:3.t: ko immorde e Allah, joom ƴawruɗe.

70:4.t: Maleykaaji wond'ude e Jibriilu hiɗi ƴawa fa'ade e makko, e ndeer ñalaande nde eɓɓoore mum woni duuɓi ujune cappanɗe jowi.

70:6.t: Kamɓe heɓe nji'a (lepte) ɗen ko goɗɗuɗe.

70:7.t: Miɗen nji'a ɗe minen ko ɓadiiɗe,

70:8.t: Ñande kammu nguun wa'oyta wa ko taaynaa.

70:9.t: pelle ɗeen mba'oya wa hottolle kardaako,

70:10.t: ka ɓadondiraaɗo laɓdotaako fii jeydaaɗo mum,

70:11.t: Hiɓe kollindiree. Bonɗo on yeloto sottorde lepte ɗen nden ñande, ɓiɗɓe makko ɓeen.

70:12.t: e gennda makko, e musiɗɗo neene gooto makko on.

70:13.t: E gorol makko ngol moolatngol mo.

70:14.t: e kala wonɓe e lesdi ɓeen, fii no ɗuum daɗndira mo.

70:17.t: Henge nodda oon ɗuurniiɗo o ruŋiti,

70:18.t: o mooɓi (jawɗe) o mari e marirgel.

70:19.t: Pellet, neɗɗo o tagaama ko o ɗenƴotooɗo;

70:20.t: si bone memi mo, o faaya.

70:21.t: Si ko mo moƴƴere nde heɓi mo, o salora.

70:23.t: ɓeen tawɓe ko ɓe duumiiɓe e juulde maɓɓe ndeen.

70:24.t: E ɓeen tawɓe hino ka jawɗe maɓɓe haqqee ganndaaɗo,

70:26.t: e E ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe ñalaande njoɓdi nde,

70:27.t: E ɓeen tawɓe ko ɓe huluɓe lepte Joomi maɓɓe ɗen

70:28.t: Tawde pellet, lepte Joomi maɓɓe ɗen ngonaa koolniiɗe,

70:29.t: E ɓeen tawɓe ko reenɓe farjuuji maɓɓe ɗiin

70:30.t: si wonaa e rewɓe maɓɓe maa ɓeen horɓe maɓɓe ɓe ɓe jeyiri ñaame maɓɓe, ɗoon on ɓe peletaake.

70:31.t: Kala noon ɗaɓɓuɗo [ka dakmitora] caggal ɗuum, haray ko ɓeen ngoni jaggituɓe ɓeen.

70:32.t: E ɓeen tawɓe ko aynituɓe koolaaje e aadiiji maɓɓe ɗiin.

70:33.t: E ɓeen tawɓe ko ñiiɓuɓe e seedeeji mum.

70:34.t: E ɓeen tawɓe ko reenooɓe e juulde maɓɓe ndeen.

70:35.t: Ɓeen ɗoon ko teddinoyteeɓe e aljannaaji.

70:36.t: E ko heɓi yedduɓe ɓeen takko maaɗa, heɓe keñora.

70:37.t: To nano e ka ñaamo, ko ɓe dentoñ-dentoñ?

70:38.t: Hara go'oto kala e maɓɓe tamƴinoto naatoygol aljanna ne'emaaji?

70:39.t: Ɗum waɗataa ! Min tagiriɓe ko ɓe nganndi.

70:40.t: Mi wooɗndirii Jeyɗo fuɗirɗe e mutirɗe on, pellet, ko Min hattanɓe.

70:41.t: wattitirgol ɓe ko ɓuri ɓe moƴƴude, Min siforaa ronkugol [ɗuum].

70:42.t: Accuɓe ɓe njumpa, ɓe pija ha ɓe kawroya e ñalaande maɓɓe nde ɓe kammbirananoo.

70:43.t: ñalnde ɓe njaltiroyta e genaale ɗren heñaare, wa si tawii ko kaaƴe (sanamu) ɓe ngoni wugganaade.

70:44.t: Hara gite maɓɓe no keli, koyeera no cuddi ɓe. Ko nden ñalaande woni ko ɓe kammbirananoo!

71:1.t: Min nulii Nuuhu haa e yimɓe makko ɓeen, won'de : "Jeertin yimɓe ma ɓen, ado lette mu'usuuɗe arde e maɓɓe".

71:2.t: O maakani [ɓe] : "ehey yimɓe am, miin ko mi jeertinoowo on ɓannguɗo.

71:3.t: won'de yo on ndewu Allah, kulon mo, ɗoftoɗon kam.

71:4.t: O haforanat on bakkatuuji i mon ɗin, O neeɓna on haa e lajal taƴaangal. [Ko woni tan] lajal Allah ngal si hewtii, ngal neeɓnetaake, si tawii hoɗon nganndunoo!".

71:5.t: O maaki : "Joomi am, miin mi noddirii yimɓe am ɓeen jehma e ñalawma,

71:6.t: kono noddaandu am nduun ɓeydaani ɓe, si wonaa dogugol.

71:7.t: Tuma kala kadi nde mi noddi ɓe fii no kafaranaa ɓe, ɓe mbaɗat kolli maɓɓe ɗiin ka ndeer noppi maɓɓe, ɓe buumora comci maɓɓe ɗiin, ɓe deppitoo, ɓe townitora townitaadee.

71:8.t: Refti mi noddirii ɓe e kene.(Feeñi).

71:9.t: Refti mi feññinani ɓe, mi suuɗanii ɓe suuɗaandee.

71:10.t: Mi wi'i [ɓe] : "Imsinanee Joomi mon, tawde o siforii won'de kaforoowo.

71:11.t: O wurtira toɓo ngo e mon dewnindiral,

71:12.t: O ɓeydira on jawɗe e ɓiɗɓe, o waɗana on gese, o waɗana on caatli.

71:13.t: E ko heɓi on, on njoortaaki manngural Allah ngal,

71:15.t: E on nji'ataa no Allah tagiri kammuuji jeeɗiɗi tegondirɗi?

71:16.t: O waɗi lewru ndun jalɓundu e majji, o waɗi na'ange ngen pitilol.

71:17.t: Ko Allah fuɗniri on ka lesdi puɗnugol.

71:18.t: Refti o ruttirat on e mayri, o yaltina on yaltinndee.

71:19.t: Allah waɗiranii on leydi ndiin weertaandi.

71:20.t: fii yo on naatir e mayri laabi jaacɗi".

71:21.t: Nuuhu maaki : "Joomi am, ɓee njeddii kam, ɓe njokkii on mo jawɗe mum e ɓiɗɓe ɓeydaani ɗum si wonaa hayrugol.

71:23.t: ɓe mbi'i: "Wota on terto dey deweteeɗi mon ɗiin: wota on terto Wudda, e Suwaa'a, e Ya'uuqatha, e Nasr".

71:24.t: Ko pellet, ɓe majjinii ko ɗuuɗi. [Joomi] wota A ɓeydir tooñɓe ɓeen, si wonaa majjere.

71:25.t: Ko sagu goopi maɓɓe ɗiin ɓe njooliranoo, ɓe naatna Yiite, ɓe heɓanaano ko'e maɓɓe paabotooɗo ga Allah".

71:26.t: Nuuhu maaki kadi : "Joomi am, wota a accu e leydi ndin, hay keefeero dilloowo.

71:27.t: Ko pellet, si a accii ɓe, ɓe majjinat jiyaaɓe maa ɓen, ɓe njibinoytaako si wonaa bonnooɓe ɗuuɗuɓe jeddi.

71:28.t: Joomi am, kaforanam miin e jibinɓe kam ɓen, e ɓen gooŋɗinɓe naatuɓe ka suudu am, e gooŋɗinɓe worɓe ɓen e gooŋɗinɓe rewɓe ɓeen; wata A ɓeydir tooñuɓe ɓeen, si wonaa halakuyee.

72:1.t: Maaku : "Wahayinaama e am, won'de dental jinna keɗiimo [kam miɗo jannga Alqur'aana], ɗi wi'i: "Minen min nani janngeteende haawniinde.

72:2.t: Hende ɗowira e peewal. Min ngooŋɗinii nde. Min kafidatah e Joomi amen, hay e gooto.

72:3.t: E won'de manngural Joomi amen ngal mawnii, o siforaali jogitagol genndo, wonaa ɓiɗɗo !

72:4.t: E won'de [Ibuliisa] ɗayɗo on e amen hino wowlaynoo penaale e hoore Allah.

72:5.t: Minen min cikkuno won'de yimɓe e jinna wowlataano fenaande e hoore Allah.

72:6.t: Hari le worɓe yimɓe hino mooloratnoo worɓe jinna, ɓe ɓesdi ɗi bewre.

72:7.t: Kamɓe [yimɓe ɓeen] ɓe cikkir no sikkirɗon noon, won'de Allah immintintah hay gooto.

72:8.t: E won'de min meemii kammu ngun, min tawi hingu hebbiniraa aynooɓe tiiɗuɓe e docote.

72:9.t: E won'de miɗen njooɗotonoo ton fii keɗagol. Kala non keɗitiiɗo jooni, o hawray e docotal tommbingal.

72:10.t: E won'de min nganndaa si ko bone fa'andanaa wonɓe ka leddi ɓen, kaa hara Joomi maɓɓe faandani ɓe peewal.

72:11.t: E won'de hino e amen moƴƴuɗi, hino e amen kadi ko jaasi ɗum. Hari miɗen e laawi ceertuɗi.

72:12.t: E won'de min pellituno min laawotaako Allah ka hoore leydi, e won'de min laawortaa Mo dogugol.

72:13.t: E won'de nde min nanunoo peewal nagl, min ngooɗini ngal. Kala gooŋɗinɗo Joomi mum, oon hulataa ɗuytaneede [moƴƴi] wonaa ɓeydaneede [bonɗi].

72:14.t: E won'de hino e amen jebbiliiɗi, hino e amen kadi ooñiiɗi. Kala jebbilii ngii, ɗin ɗoon faandike peewal.

72:15.t: Ooñiiɗi ɗiin kan, ɗi laatanike Jahannama oon carmalle.

72:16.t: E won'de si ɓe ñiiɓuno e hoore laawol ngol, ko pellet, Min njarnayno ɓe ndiyam ɗuuɗuɗam,

72:17.t: fii yo Min ndaarndoro ɓe heen. Kala ɗuurniiɗo e Jaŋtoore Joomi mum nden, O naaday mo e lepte caɗtuɗe.

72:18.t: E won'de juulirɗe ɗeen ko Allah leeranii. Wata on kafidu e Allah hay e gooto.

72:19.t: E won'de tuma jiyaaɗo Allah on darinoo himo rewa mo, ɗi ɗeɓuno waɗɗondirgol e hoore makko.

72:20.t: Maaku : "nganndee ko Joomi am (tan) mi ndewata, mi kafidataa mo kadi hay e gooto".

72:21.t: Maaku : "Miin mi waawanaa on duñude lorra, wonaa fii pooɗugol nafa".

72:22.t: Maaku : "Hay gooto waawaa daɗndugol kam e Allah; mi heɓataa ko woori mo ƴooñorde

72:23.t: si wonaa yottingol immorde e Allah e nule makko ɗeen. Kala jedduɗo Allah e Nulaaɗo makko on, haray ko Yiite Jahannama woodani mo, ɓe luttay e magge poomaa.

72:24.t: Haa si ɓe nji'ii ko ɓe kammbirananoo kon, ɓe aray anndude ko hombo ɓuri lo'ode ballo, ɓuri kadi famɗude limoore.

72:25.t: Maaku : "Mi anndaa si ko kammbiranaɗon kon hino ɓadii, maa si koomi am waɗanat ɗuum dumunna.

72:26.t: Ko o ganndo wirniiɗi. O ƴellintinantaa wirniiɗi makko ɗiin hay e gooto.

72:27.t: si wonaa mo o welanaa e Nulaaɗo, o naadnay ye'eso on e ɓaawo makko tommbotooɓe.

72:28.t: fii yo o anndu won'de ɓen njottinii nule joomi maɓɓe ɗeen. O huɓindorii (anndugol) ko woni ka maɓɓe kon, O mofti limoore kala hu'unde".

73:2.t: Ɓaŋo (nguurnitaa) jehma o, si wonaa seeɗa [e makko];

73:3.t: feccere makko, maa isytaa seeɗa e ɗuum;

73:4.t: maa ɓesdaa ɗoon. Janngiraa Alqur'aanaare nden dewnindiral.

73:5.t: Miɗen caatii tellinnde e maaɗa konngol teddungol.

73:6.t: Pellet, ko dewal tummbo jehma ngal, ɓuri tiiɗude batte e fooccaade konngol.

73:7.t: Anndu hino woodan-maa e ñalawma oon, ferlitagol juutungol.

73:8.t: Jaŋto innde Joomi maa nden, taƴo-ɗaa yahaa e makko haaɗtirde taƴagol.

73:9.t: Jeyɗo on fuɗna'ange e hiirnaange.deweteeɗo woo alaa e si wona Kaŋko,Jogito mo koolorteeɗo.

73:10.t: Muñño e ko ɓe wowlata kon; ngoɗɗito-raa ɓe woɗɗitannde labaande.

73:11.t: Accidam e yeddooɓe joomiraaɓe neemaaji ɓeen; kabbito-ɗaa ɓe seeɗa.

73:12.t: Ko pellet, hino ka amen gaa : Tonngii e Jahiimi,

73:13.t: E ñaametee ɗeɗɗoowo, e lepte mu'usuuɗe.

73:14.t: Ñalnde lesdi ndiin e pelle ɗen dillata, pelle ɗeen wa'a wa njaare ilayndi.

73:15.t: Min nelii e mon nelaaɗo haa o wona seede e dow mon hono no min nelduno fa'ade e Fir'awna nelaaɗo.

73:16.t: Fir'awna woopi nelaaɗo o min nanngi mbo nanngugol caɗtungol.

73:17.t: Hono ndeenraton pittaali mon si on njeddi ñalawmo baɗoowo sukaaɓe danndalinde.

73:18.t: Kammu o na fetta e kulhuli hembo laatiima fodoore Alla ko wonoore.

73:19.t: Ko oon woni waaju goongo kala paalaaɗo daɗde nanngira joomiiko ruttorde.

73:20.t: Pellet joom ma na anndi haɗa juula ko ɓuri famɗude e tataɓal jehma wollo feccere mammbo wond'ude e fedde e ɓeen won'ɗuɓe e ma Alla hoddira jehma e ñalawma O anndi on tonngataa mbo o yaafii mon, njannge ko newanii on e Quraana hombo anndi ma won e mon ñawɓe goo ngona e ɗatngal ka lesdi hoɓe ndaarta ɓural Alla woɓɓe kadi na kaɓano laawol Alla njannge ko newanii mon e hembo ndarnon juulde tottiron askal ñamlon Alla ñamaande moƴƴere kala ko mbaɗaɗon ko'e mon e jam tawon mbo ka Alla hombo ɓuri moƴƴude e mawnude njobdi njaafnee Alla sabu Alla ko jaafatooɗo ko jurmotooɗo.

74:6.t: Wota a okkir fii heɓugol ko ɓuri ɗuum...

74:10.t: E hoore he'eferɓe ɓeen, nde wanaa newiinde.

74:11.t: Accidam e oon mo mi tagi on kañun tan.

74:15.t: Refti homo tamƴinoo nde mi ɓeydata.

74:16.t: Ɗuum waɗataa ! tawde o laatino sanndalɗiiɗo e aayeeje amen ɗeen.

74:17.t: Aray mi fawa mo lepte caɗtuɗe.

74:18.t: Kaŋko oon, o miijiti o eɓɓindii.

74:19.t: O huɗa hono no o hoddiri.

74:20.t: Refti o huɗa kadi hono o hoddiri.

74:24.t: ɓe mbi'a: "Ɗuum wonaani, si wonaa mbilewu ɓanngu ngu.

74:25.t: Mbo wona si wona konngol aade.

74:26.t: Ma mi naatnu mbo yiite saqara.

74:27.t: Hol ko anndinat ma ko woni Saqara.

74:30.t: ina e dow mannge sappa e jeenay.

74:31.t: Min mbaɗaani aynooɓe yimɓe Yiite ngen, si wonaa Malaa'ika. Min mbaɗiraani limoore maɓɓe si wonaa jarraborgol yedduɓe ɓen, e fii yo henan okkaaɓe defte ɓeen, e fii no gooŋɗinɓe ɓeen ɓeydora gooŋɗinal, e fii wata okkaaɓe defte ɓen e gooŋɗinɓe ɓen cikkito; e fii yo ɓeen ɓe ñawu woni e ɓerɗe mum e he'eferɓe ɓeen mbi'u: "Hara ko holɗum Allah faandorii e ngal misaal?" Ko wano non Allah majjinirta mo o muuyani, homo feewna kadi mo O muuyani. Hay gooto anndaa yeru koneeli Joomi maa ɗiin, si wonaa Kaŋko. Ngen [Yiite] wonaali, si wonaa waajo wonan'de neɗɗaŋke.

74:32.t: Kono yo henane! mi wooɗndirii lewru ndun,

74:33.t: O wooɗndirii jehma si mbo runtii ma.

74:37.t: Wonan'de on njiɗuɗo e mo'on, nde o yaccotoo maa nennoo.

74:38.t: Woŋkii kala ko faggii kon nanngirte.

74:40.t: hiɓe e ndeer gese, heɓe laɓndondira

74:43.t: Ɓen mbi'a: "Min njeyanooka e juulooɓe ɓeen.

74:44.t: min njeyanooka kadi e ñamminooɓe miskimɓe ɓeen.

74:45.t: Hari min jumpidatno kadi e jumpooɓe ɓeen.

74:46.t: Hari kadi min njeddatno fii ñalaande njoɓdi ndeen.

74:49.t: Hol ko waɗi ɓe sirkuɓe na ɗuurno alquraana.

74:50.t: Hoɓe mba'i e bamɗi laawatooɗi na ndoga.

74:52.t: Gooto e mu'en fof na faala totteede ɗeri caraaɗi.

74:55.t: Ko kala paalaaɗo waactoraade o waactaroo mbo.

74:56.t: ɓe mbaactaaka si wona Alla na haaja, ko Kaŋko woni kaanduɗo e huleede ko Kaŋko woni kaanduɗo e yaafaade.

75:3.t: Mbela aade sikkat min ndenndintah ƴi'e makko.

75:4.t: Oho kay mbiɗa min kattani fotndude gulle peɗeeli makko.

75:5.t: Kono aade yiɗi konde o wonata saay ye'eso ka ye'eso makko.

75:6.t: Hiɓe laɓndoo : "Ko honnde woni Ñalaande njoɓdi kuuɗe?"

75:10.t: Ndeen aade wi'a hoɗo dogirde ngoni.

75:11.t: Ala dokdu alah e oon ñalngu.

75:12.t: Koto joom ma ñande heen woni ruttorde nde.

75:13.t: Aade na habre ñande heen ko ardini e golle e ko o leelni ko.

75:14.t: Ko woni ko aade o na seedii e fittaandu makko.

75:15.t: Hay si o addii ngantuuji makko ɗi.

75:16.t: Woto dillin heen ɗemngal ma haa njaawnaɗa e hembo.

75:17.t: Ko minen woodani renndinde mbo e jannginde mbo ma.

75:18.t: Si min njanngii mbo rew e jaŋde makko.

75:19.t: Refti ko e amen fawi firde mbo.

75:20.t: Ala woni ko hoɗon njiɗi aduna jaawɗo o ko gasata.

75:22.t: Je'ece malaaɓe ñande heen na fooyni.

75:23.t: Hoɗe ndaara fa'ade e joom mu' en.

75:25.t: Hoɗe cikka ma telline e mu' en musiiba mawɗo.

75:28.t: O yananee ko ɗum ceergal e aduna.

75:30.t: Ko ta joom ma ñande heen woni ruttorde.

75:33.t: Refti o yahi to koreeji makko hombo wasoo.

75:35.t: Refti halkaare kadi woodanii ma e halkaare titi.

75:36.t: Mbele aade o sikku o accete hombo duda.

75:37.t: Mbele o wonaana toɓɓe maniyyu juppateende e rannga.

75:38.t: Refti o wonti heɗɗere o tagi o fonndi.

75:39.t: O waɗI heen kuɓe ɗiɗi dewel e gorel.

76:1.t: Mbele arii e aade tumo e yonta nde o wonaana hay hu'unde jaŋtateende.

76:2.t: Min tagii aade e toɓɓere jillunde ndiyam gorko e debbo min kumpitoo mbo min laatini mbo nanoowo ji'oowo.

76:3.t: Miin peewnii mbo e laawol o yetta wollo o yedda.

76:4.t: Pellet Miin keblinii he'eferɓe callalle e tonngi e yiite.

76:5.t: Pellet ɗigguɓe ɓe na njara e kaas jilluɗo kaafuur.

76:6.t: Sewnde nde jiyaaɓe Alla ɓallinaaɓe njarata heɓe ilnande ilnugol.

76:7.t: Heɓe kuuɓna takkere hoɓe kula ñalawma mbo bone mum na saroo.

76:8.t: Hoɓe ñammina ñamri wond'ude e yiɗde ndi miskiin e alyatiime e dahaaɗo.

76:9.t: Miin ñamminirta mon ko sabi Alla miin faalaaka e mon njoɓdi wona yetteede.

76:10.t: Pellet min kuli ummaade e joomi amen ko ñalawma ñirɓiniiɗo cattuɗo tumminaare.

76:11.t: Alla reeniɓe e bone oon ñalawma o okkiɓe pummam labaɗam e weltaare.

76:12.t: Alla yoɓiri ɓe koɓe muñi ko aljanna e (comci)hariir.

76:13.t: Hoɓe tuugnii e fotooyji ɓe yi'atah heen na'ange wonah jaangol cattungol.

76:14.t: Na ɓadi e dow mu'en ɗowdi mammba ɓesnaaɗe mum na eeltanaaɓe eeltegol.

76:15.t: Ina taarneeɓe ngennduwoñ kaalis e kaasyoñ na feewnira weer.

76:17.t: Hoɓe njarnee kaas njilludi mum ko janjabiil.

76:18.t: Sewnde na e hembo na innire Sal sabiil.

76:19.t: Sukaaɓe saasnaaɓe na mbanngo e mum en si a yi'iiɓe cikka ko ɓe lu'u lu'u caraaɗo.

76:20.t: Si a yi'i toon nji'a neema e laamu manngu.

76:21.t: Ina e dow mu'en comci sundus ɗi mbaadi ha'aka hecco e istabraq ɓe ɓoorna jawe kaalis joom mu'en yarnaɓe njaram laaɓɗam.

76:22.t: Pellet ɗum wonanii mon njoɓdi golle mon kadi golle mon ngoniina mantaaɗe.

76:23.t: Ko minen tigi tellini alquraana e dow ma tellingol.

76:24.t: Muñ e ñaawoore joom ma woto ɗofto e mum en bakkadinɗo wolla ke'efeera.

76:25.t: jaŋta inne joom ma subaka e kikiiɗa.

76:26.t: E jemma he cujjan mbo cubahinanɗaa mbo jehma juutɗo.

76:27.t: Pellet ɓe na njiɗi nguurndam aduna njaawɗam gasde ɗam ɓe ngacca caggal mum en ñalawma nisɗo.

76:28.t: Ko minen tagi on min cemmbini terɗo si min kaajaama min ngostoroo on nandadiiɓe mon gostogol.

76:29.t: Ko nde woni waajo goongo kala paalaaɗo daɗde nanngira fa'ade e joomiiko ruttorde.

76:30.t: On paaletaake si wonaAlla haaje pellet Alla ko ganndo ko ñeeño

93:2.t: Mi wooɗndarii jehma si mbo deeƴi.

93:3.t: Joom ma accaani mo o añaani.

93:4.t: Pellet ko galle La'akara ɓuri aduna o.

95:1.t: Mi woondiri e Tiin(ƴibbe)(nebbam) e jaytuun.

95:4.t: Min tagii neɗɗo e mba'adi ɓurndi fortaade e feewde.

95:5.t: Refti min ndutti mbo to ɓuri le'esɗude.

95:7.t: Hol ko yeddatma ñalawma njobdi caggal ɗuum.

97:1.t: Min njippini ii mbo e jehma leylatul qadiri.

98:1.t: Wonaana ɓeen he'eferɓe joom defte en ko seertuɓe ha ari e maɓɓe dallillaaji peeñɗi.

98:2.t: Ko o nelaaɗo ummaade e Alla dursittooɗo ɗereeji laɓɓinaaɗi.

98:4.t: Seertaani ɓeen tottaaɓe defte si wona caggal nde ari e mu'en ko ɓanngi.

98:5.t: ɓe njamiraako si wona yooɓe ndew Alla tawa heɓe laɓɓinani mbo diine poocciiɗo ɓe ndarana juulde ɓe tottira askal ko ɗuum woni diine po'occiiɗo.

98:6.t: Pellet ɓeen he'eferɓe ummaade e joom defte en e sirkuɓe hina e jayngol jahatnama ɓe caasa toon ha pooma ko ɓeen ngoni ɓurɓe bon'de e tagoore he.

98:7.t: Pellet ɓeen gooŋɗinɓe ɓe ngolli ko ɓuri moƴƴude ko ɓeen ngoni ɓurbe moƴƴude e winndere he.

98:8.t: Njoɓdi mu'en to joom mu'en ko aljannaaji ɗi caatli ilata e les mum ɓe caasa toon haa pooma Alla na welaaɓe kamɓe ne heɓe mbela Alla ɗuum wonan'de oon kulɗo Alla.

99:3.t: Neɗɗo o wi'a ko heɓi ndi.
